zh.tag: 人类与AI代理共存的蜂巢式协作空间
zh.what: Buzz 是一个自托管的协作平台，让人类和 AI 代理在同一个“房间”里共同工作。它基于 Nostr 协议，所有消息、操作和工作流步骤都作为签名事件记录在日志中，提供统一的身份模型和审计追踪。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 Buzz 平台源码，包括前端界面、后端服务、Nostr 中继实现以及多个 Rust crate。提供了频道、画布、工作流、语音讨论等功能，并支持代理执行仓库操作、代码审查、CI/CD 等任务。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Rust 语言开发，基于 Nostr 协议，依赖多个 Rust crate 实现事件日志、身份管理和中继功能。
zh.hot: Buzz 在 GitHub 上一天内获得 3252 颗星，总星数达 4148，因其创新的“人类与代理平等协作”理念和自托管、基于 Nostr 的架构吸引了大量关注。
uses: 团队协作 —— 人类与 AI 代理在同一工作空间中共同管理项目、代码审查和 CI/CD
AI 代理开发 —— 测试和部署具有完整操作权限（如仓库、工作流）的 AI 代理
事件驱动工作流 —— 利用 Nostr 事件日志构建可审计的自动化流程
自托管社区 —— 为需要完全控制数据和身份的组织提供私有协作平台

en.tag: A self-hostable workspace where humans and agents collaborate in shared rooms
en.what: Buzz is a self-hostable workspace where humans and AI agents share the same rooms. Built on the Nostr protocol, every message, action, and workflow step is a signed event in a single log, providing a unified identity model and audit trail.
en.content: The repository contains the full Buzz platform source code, including frontend UI, backend services, Nostr relay implementation, and multiple Rust crates. It offers channels, canvases, workflows, voice huddles, and enables agents to perform repo operations, code review, CI/CD, etc.
en.stack: Primarily developed in Rust, based on the Nostr protocol, leveraging multiple Rust crates for event logging, identity management, and relay functionality.
en.hot: Buzz gained 3252 stars in a single day, reaching 4148 total, due to its innovative concept of equal collaboration between humans and agents, self-hosted nature, and Nostr-based architecture.
uses: Team collaboration — humans and AI agents manage projects, code review, and CI/CD in the same workspace
AI agent development — test and deploy agents with full operational capabilities (repos, workflows, etc.)
Event-driven workflows — build auditable automation using Nostr event logs
Self-hosted communities — provide a private collaboration platform for organizations needing full data and identity control

zh.tag: AI 驱动的全球实时态势感知仪表盘
zh.what: World Monitor 是一个实时全球情报仪表盘，利用 AI 聚合新闻、监控地缘政治事件和基础设施状态，提供统一的态势感知界面。它支持多个垂直领域（科技、金融、大宗商品、能源等）的定制化视图。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 Web 应用源码、CLI 工具和 npm 包，提供多种主题变体（科技、金融、大宗商品、能源等），以及 MCP 服务器集成。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 开发，使用 npm 包管理，支持 Web 应用和 CLI 两种形态，集成了 MCP 服务器。
zh.hot: 凭借 AI 驱动的实时全球情报聚合和多个垂直领域定制视图，上线后迅速获得 6.5 万+ Star，日增近 1300，登顶 GitHub 日榜。
uses: 地缘政治分析师 —— 实时监控全球事件与基础设施状态
金融投资者 —— 跟踪大宗商品、能源等市场动态
科技从业者 —— 获取科技领域新闻与趋势
普通用户 —— 通过 Happy 变体关注积极新闻

en.tag: AI-powered real-time global intelligence dashboard for situational awareness
en.what: World Monitor is a real-time global intelligence dashboard that uses AI to aggregate news, monitor geopolitical events, and track infrastructure status in a unified situational awareness interface. It offers customized views for various verticals like tech, finance, commodities, and energy.
en.content: The repository contains full web application source code, CLI tools, and npm packages, offering multiple theme variants (tech, finance, commodities, energy, etc.), along with MCP server integration.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript, managed via npm, supports both web app and CLI, and integrates MCP server.
en.hot: With AI-powered real-time global intelligence aggregation and multiple vertical-specific views, it quickly gained over 65K stars, adding nearly 1,300 daily, topping GitHub's daily trending chart.
uses: Geopolitical analysts — monitor global events and infrastructure in real time
Financial investors — track commodities, energy, and market movements
Tech professionals — stay updated with tech news and trends
General users — follow positive news via the Happy variant

zh.tag: 金融市场的首个开源基础模型
zh.what: Kronos 是一个专为金融市场 K 线序列设计的解码器基础模型。它通过两阶段框架：先用量化器将 OHLCV 数据转为层次化离散 token，再用自回归 Transformer 预训练，统一处理多种量化任务。
zh.content: 仓库包含模型代码、预训练权重、微调脚本、论文及在线演示。提供 Hugging Face 模型和实时 BTC/USD 预测演示。
zh.stack: 基于 PyTorch 和 Transformer 架构，依赖 Hugging Face Transformers 和自定义 tokenizer。
zh.hot: 作为首个开源金融基础模型，被 AAAI 2026 接收，上线即获 3.2 万星标，展示强大预测能力。
uses: 量化研究员 —— 用于金融时间序列预测和因子挖掘
交易员 —— 辅助技术分析和策略回测
AI 开发者 —— 研究金融领域的 tokenization 和预训练方法

en.tag: First open-source foundation model for financial markets
en.what: Kronos is a decoder-only foundation model tailored for financial K-line sequences. It uses a two-stage framework: a specialized tokenizer quantizes OHLCV data into hierarchical discrete tokens, then an autoregressive Transformer is pre-trained to handle diverse quantitative tasks.
en.content: Repository includes model code, pretrained weights, fine-tuning scripts, paper, and a live demo. Hugging Face model and real-time BTC/USD forecast demo are available.
en.stack: Built on PyTorch and Transformer architecture, with Hugging Face Transformers and custom tokenizer.
en.hot: As the first open-source financial foundation model, accepted at AAAI 2026, it gained 32K stars upon release, demonstrating strong forecasting capability.
uses: Quantitative researchers — for financial time series forecasting and factor mining
Traders — for technical analysis and strategy backtesting
AI developers — for studying tokenization and pretraining in finance

zh.tag: 用 Rust 重写的高性能 Minecraft 服务端
zh.what: Pumpkin 是一个完全用 Rust 编写的 Minecraft 服务器，旨在提供极致的性能和可定制性。它支持最新的 Java 和 Bedrock 版本，同时保持原版游戏机制。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的服务器核心实现，包括世界加载、区块生成、玩家管理、实体 AI、红石、插件系统等模块，目前处于积极开发中。
zh.stack: 技术栈为 Rust，利用多线程和零成本抽象实现高性能；依赖 tokio 异步运行时和自定义网络协议实现。
zh.hot: Rust 语言的高性能和安全性吸引了大量 Minecraft 社区关注，今日新增 108 星，总星数 8415，位列 GitHub 日榜第 18 名。
uses: Minecraft 服务器管理员 —— 希望部署高性能、低资源占用的服务端
Rust 开发者 —— 学习 Rust 在游戏服务器领域的实践
Minecraft 模组/插件开发者 —— 基于其插件系统进行扩展

en.tag: A fast, efficient Minecraft server built entirely in Rust
en.what: Pumpkin is a Minecraft server built entirely in Rust, designed for maximum performance and customizability. It supports the latest Java and Bedrock editions while adhering to vanilla game mechanics.
en.content: The repository contains a full server core implementation, including world loading, chunk generation, player management, entity AI, redstone, plugin system, etc., currently under heavy development.
en.stack: Tech stack is Rust, leveraging multi-threading and zero-cost abstractions for high performance; relies on tokio async runtime and custom network protocol implementation.
en.hot: The high performance and safety of Rust attract massive attention from the Minecraft community, with 108 stars added today and 8415 total, ranking 18th on GitHub Trending daily.
uses: Minecraft server admins — seeking high-performance, low-resource server software
Rust developers — learning Rust in game server development
Minecraft mod/plugin developers — extending functionality via its plugin system

zh.tag: 为你和AI代理设计的并行浏览器
zh.what: ego lite 是一款专为人类和 AI 代理并行工作而设计的浏览器。AI 代理可以在独立的空间中运行多个浏览器任务，而你的标签页保持独立，任务完成更快且消耗更少的 token。
zh.content: 仓库包含 macOS 桌面应用（.dmg 安装包）和 ego-browser 技能包，支持通过 npx 安装技能。提供文档、Discord 社区和 X 账号。
zh.stack: 基于 JavaScript 构建，依赖 macOS 系统，通过 npx 管理技能。
zh.hot: 今日新增 247 颗星，GitHub Trending 日榜第 5 名。解决了 AI 浏览器自动化工具与用户争夺标签页的痛点，提供真正的并行体验。
uses: AI 开发者 —— 需要让 AI 代理在浏览器中自主操作，同时保留自己的浏览会话
自动化测试工程师 —— 利用 AI 代理并行执行浏览器测试任务
日常用户 —— 希望 AI 助手在不干扰自己浏览的情况下完成网页任务

en.tag: A browser designed for you and your AI agents to work in parallel
en.what: ego lite is a browser designed for humans and AI agents to work in parallel. Agents run multiple browser tasks in their own Spaces while your tabs stay yours, completing tasks faster on fewer tokens.
en.content: The repo includes a macOS desktop app (.dmg installer) and the ego-browser skill package, installable via npx. Also provides docs, Discord community, and X account.
en.stack: Built with JavaScript, depends on macOS, skill management via npx.
en.hot: Gained 247 stars today, ranked #5 on GitHub Trending. Solves the pain point of AI browser automation tools fighting for tabs with users, offering true parallel experience.
uses: AI developers — need AI agents to operate browsers autonomously while keeping their own sessions
Automation test engineers — leverage AI agents to run browser tests in parallel
Everyday users — want AI assistants to complete web tasks without interrupting their browsing

zh.tag: 阿波罗11号制导计算机原始源码
zh.what: 这是阿波罗11号指令舱和登月舱制导计算机（AGC）的原始汇编源码。由Virtual AGC和MIT博物馆数字化，旨在提供最准确的转录版本。
zh.content: 包含指令舱的Comanche055和登月舱的Luminary099两个程序版本，以及多语言翻译的README文件。
zh.stack: 纯汇编语言，无现代依赖；编译需使用Virtual AGC模拟器。
zh.hot: 作为人类登月历史的重要代码遗产，今日新增1235星，总星数近7万，持续吸引科技史爱好者和程序员。
uses: 科技史研究者 —— 研究阿波罗计划软件工程
复古计算爱好者 —— 探索AGC架构与汇编编程
教育场景 —— 作为计算机历史教学案例

en.tag: Original Apollo 11 Guidance Computer source code
en.what: This is the original assembly source code for the Apollo Guidance Computer (AGC) used in the Command Module and Lunar Module of Apollo 11. Digitized by Virtual AGC and MIT Museum, it aims to provide an accurate transcription.
en.content: Contains two program versions: Comanche055 for the Command Module and Luminary099 for the Lunar Module, along with multilingual README translations.
en.stack: Pure assembly language with no modern dependencies; compilation requires the Virtual AGC simulator.
en.hot: As a historic code artifact from the moon landing, it gained 1,235 stars today, nearing 70k total, attracting tech history enthusiasts and programmers.
uses: Tech historians — study Apollo software engineering
Retro computing enthusiasts — explore AGC architecture and assembly
Education — as a case study in computer history

zh.tag: 开源免费AI网关，单端点聚合264家模型提供商并智能压缩省token
zh.what: OmniRoute 是一个开源的免费 AI 网关，通过单一 API 端点聚合了 264+ 家模型提供商（含 90+ 免费 tier），让你能把 Claude Code、Cursor、Copilot 等主流编程工具无缝接入免费的 Claude、GPT 或 Gemini。它内置 RTK+Caveman 双层压缩算法，可自动减少 15%–95% 的 token 消耗，并支持智能故障自动回退、MCP/A2A 协议以及多模态接口。
zh.content: 仓库包含可直接部署的网关核心、Web 管理后台（Dashboard）、PWA 与桌面端应用，以及详细的路由策略配置、免费额度文档和 Provider 接入模板。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 全栈构建，网关层采用 Node.js 高并发架构，前端提供 React 驱动的 Dashboard 与 PWA，并支持 Desktop 端封装。
zh.hot: 本周新增 3,605 Star、总星数突破 1.8 万并登上 GitHub 周榜第 16 名，反映出开发者对「零成本调用多模型」的强烈需求——聚合 90+ 免费提供商与高达 95% 的 token 压缩能力，直接切中了 AI 应用落地时的成本焦虑。
uses: 独立开发者 / 小型团队 —— 想用 Claude/GPT/Gemini 但预算有限，通过免费 tier 聚合实现零成本调用。
AI 编程工具重度用户 —— 将 Cursor、Cline、Claude Code 等 IDE 插件的底层模型切换到免费提供商。
网关/中间件自建者 —— 需要统一端点管理多模型路由、自动容灾和 token 压缩的企业内部 AI 基础设施。

en.tag: Open-source AI gateway aggregating 264 providers with token compression and auto-fallback
en.what: OmniRoute is an open-source free AI gateway that aggregates 264+ providers—including 90+ free tiers—behind a single API endpoint, letting you plug Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot and other tools into free Claude, GPT or Gemini instances. It features RTK+Caveman stacked compression to cut token usage by 15–95%, alongside smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A support, and multimodal APIs.
en.content: The repo ships with a deployable gateway core, a web admin dashboard, PWA and desktop apps, plus routing strategy configs, free-tier documentation, and provider integration templates.
en.stack: Built entirely in TypeScript on a Node.js backend for high-concurrency gateway operations, with a React-based web dashboard and PWA, plus desktop packaging.
en.hot: It gained 3,605 stars this week, reaching 18.4k total and hitting #16 on GitHub Trending, as developers rush to cut AI costs—aggregating 90+ free providers and slashing token usage by up to 95% directly addresses the biggest barrier to shipping AI apps.
uses: Indie devs & small teams —— Access Claude/GPT/Gemini at zero cost by pooling 90+ free tiers instead of paid APIs.
Power users of AI coding tools —— Redirect Cursor, Cline, Claude Code and Copilot to free model backends via one endpoint.
Platform builders —— Those needing a unified gateway with auto-fallback, routing strategies, and token compression for internal AI infra.

zh.tag: Claude 技能与插件精选集，赋能 AI 工作流
zh.what: 这是一个精心整理的 Claude Skills 和插件列表，包含 1000+ 生产级技能，用于定制 Claude AI 工作流。不仅支持 Claude.ai 和 Claude Code，还兼容 Codex、Cursor、Gemini CLI 等编码代理。
zh.content: 仓库包含技能目录（文档处理、开发工具、数据分析、商业营销等）、快速入门指南、以及连接 500+ 应用的插件。
zh.stack: 基于 Python，依赖 Composio 平台实现应用集成，支持 Claude CLI 插件系统。
zh.hot: 拥有 6.8 万+ Star，日增 163，位列 GitHub 日榜第 10。Claude 生态爆发，用户急需实用技能和插件来扩展 AI 代理能力。
uses: Claude 用户 —— 快速添加邮件、Slack、GitHub 等 500+ 应用集成
AI 开发者 —— 探索和贡献 Claude Skills，构建自定义工作流
编码代理用户 —— 在 Codex、Cursor 等工具中复用 Claude 技能

en.tag: Curated Claude Skills & plugins to supercharge AI workflows
en.what: A curated list of 1000+ production-ready Claude Skills and plugins for customizing Claude AI workflows, supporting not only Claude.ai and Claude Code but also coding agents like Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more.
en.content: Includes a skills directory (document processing, dev tools, data analysis, business marketing, etc.), a quickstart guide, and plugins to connect Claude to 500+ apps.
en.stack: Python-based, leverages Composio for app integrations, supports Claude CLI plugin system.
en.hot: 68k+ stars, +163 daily, #10 on GitHub Trending. The booming Claude ecosystem drives demand for practical skills and plugins to extend AI agent capabilities.
uses: Claude users — quickly add integrations with 500+ apps like email, Slack, GitHub
AI developers — explore and contribute Claude Skills, build custom workflows
Coding agent users — reuse Claude skills in tools like Codex, Cursor

zh.tag: 为AI代理打造的CAD与机器人设计技能库
zh.what: Text-to-CAD 是一个为AI代理提供CAD、机器人和硬件设计技能的库。它允许代理通过自然语言或图像生成、编辑CAD模型，并导出为STEP、STL、3MF等格式，同时支持机器人描述文件（URDF、SDF、SRDF）的生成。
zh.content: 仓库包含多个技能模块：CAD建模、CAD预览、标准件查找、切片、机器人描述文件生成等，每个技能都有独立的文档和实现。
zh.stack: 主要使用Python 3.11+，依赖CAD内核（如CadQuery）和机器人描述库，前端预览基于Web浏览器。
zh.hot: 将大语言模型与CAD/机器人设计结合，极大降低了硬件设计门槛，今日新增297星，总星数8649，登顶JavaScript日榜。
uses: AI代理开发者：为代理集成CAD和机器人设计能力
硬件工程师：通过自然语言快速生成3D模型
机器人爱好者：自动生成URDF等机器人描述文件
创客与教育：降低CAD学习曲线，快速原型设计

en.tag: A skill library for AI agents to generate CAD, robotics, and hardware designs
en.what: Text-to-CAD is a library of agent skills for CAD, robotics, and hardware design. It enables agents to generate and edit CAD models from plain language or images, export to STEP, STL, 3MF, and produce robot description files (URDF, SDF, SRDF).
en.content: The repo contains multiple skill modules: CAD modeling, CAD viewer, off-the-shelf parts sourcing, slicing, and robot description file generation, each with its own documentation and implementation.
en.stack: Primarily uses Python 3.11+, with CAD kernel (e.g., CadQuery) and robot description libraries; frontend preview is web-based.
en.hot: Combining LLMs with CAD and robotics design dramatically lowers the barrier to hardware design. Gained 297 stars today, total 8649, topping the JavaScript daily trending list.
uses: AI agent developers: integrate CAD and robotics design skills into agents
Hardware engineers: quickly generate 3D models from natural language
Robotics enthusiasts: auto-generate robot description files like URDF
Makers and educators: lower CAD learning curve for rapid prototyping

zh.tag: 为 pi 编码代理打造的本地 Web 界面
zh.what: Pi Web 是一个为 pi 编码代理设计的本地 Web 用户界面。它读取本地的 pi 会话文件，提供浏览器工作区，支持会话浏览、实时聊天、模型配置、技能管理和项目文件预览。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 Web 应用源码，支持通过 npx 或 npm 全局安装运行，提供会话管理、模型配置、文件预览等功能，并附带中文文档。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 开发，使用 Node.js 运行时，依赖 pi 编码代理的会话文件格式。
zh.hot: 今日新增 298 星，总星数 1723，位列 GitHub 日榜第 17。作为 pi 代理的官方 Web UI，填补了 CLI 代理缺乏图形界面的空白，受到开发者欢迎。
uses: 使用 pi 编码代理的开发者 —— 通过浏览器管理会话和配置
需要可视化浏览代理会话记录的用户 —— 按项目浏览历史对话
希望从终端切换到图形界面的用户 —— 在 Web UI 中配置模型和技能

en.tag: Local web UI for the pi coding agent
en.what: Pi Web is a local web UI for the pi coding agent. It reads local pi session files and provides a browser workspace for session browsing, real-time chat, model configuration, skill management, and project file preview.
en.content: The repository contains the full web app source code, can be run via npx or npm global install, offering session management, model configuration, file preview, and includes Chinese documentation.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript, runs on Node.js, depends on pi coding agent session file format.
en.hot: Gained 298 stars today, total 1723, ranked #17 on GitHub Daily Trending. As the official web UI for the pi agent, it fills the gap of missing GUI for CLI agents and is well received by developers.
uses: Developers using pi coding agent — manage sessions and config via browser
Users who need to visually browse agent session logs — browse past conversations by project
Users who want to switch from terminal to GUI — configure models and skills in web UI

zh.tag: 阿里巴巴开源的企业级AI代码审查CLI工具
zh.what: OpenCodeReview 是一款基于 AI 的代码审查 CLI 工具，起源于阿里巴巴集团内部，经过两年大规模验证，为数万开发者服务并发现数百万代码缺陷。它读取 Git diff，通过具备工具调用能力的 Agent 将变更文件发送给可配置的 LLM，生成精确到行的结构化审查评论。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Go 编写的 CLI 工具源码、内置精细调优的规则集（NPE、线程安全、XSS、SQL注入等）、支持 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 兼容接口，以及多语言文档和安装脚本。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言开发，依赖 Git 和 LLM API（OpenAI/Anthropic 兼容），支持 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 等 Agent。
zh.hot: 作为阿里巴巴内部大规模验证的代码审查工具开源，结合确定性流水线和 LLM Agent 的混合架构，精准行级评论和内置规则集吸引了大量开发者，今日新增 162 星，总星数 10964。
uses: 开发团队 —— 集成到 CI/CD 流水线，自动审查代码提交，提升代码质量
个人开发者 —— 在本地运行审查，快速发现潜在缺陷和安全漏洞
开源维护者 —— 用于管理 PR 审查，减少人工负担

en.tag: Alibaba's battle-tested AI code review CLI with deterministic pipelines + LLM Agent
en.what: OpenCodeReview is an AI-powered code review CLI tool originating from Alibaba Group's internal system, serving tens of thousands of developers and identifying millions of code defects over two years. It reads Git diffs, sends changed files to a configurable LLM via an agent with tool-use capabilities, and generates line-level structured review comments.
en.content: The repo contains Go CLI source code, built-in fine-tuned rulesets (NPE, thread-safety, XSS, SQL injection), support for OpenAI & Anthropic compatible APIs, and multi-language documentation and installation scripts.
en.stack: Primarily built with Go, depends on Git and LLM APIs (OpenAI/Anthropic compatible), supports agents like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor.
en.hot: Open-sourced from Alibaba's battle-tested internal tool, its hybrid architecture of deterministic pipelines + LLM Agent, precise line-level comments, and built-in rulesets have attracted many developers, gaining 162 stars today and 10964 total.
uses: Development teams — integrate into CI/CD pipelines for automated code review on commits, improving code quality
Individual developers — run locally for quick detection of potential defects and security vulnerabilities
Open source maintainers — manage PR reviews with reduced manual effort

zh.tag: 用WiFi信号实现穿墙感知的空间智能平台
zh.what: RuView 是一个利用 WiFi 信道状态信息（CSI）实现穿墙感知的平台。它能检测人员存在、呼吸心率、运动轨迹，并通过 Matter/HomeKit 等协议与智能家居系统集成。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Rust 编写的核心引擎、ESP32 固件、Home Assistant 集成文档、Matter 桥接方案以及 21 种实体类型（含 10 种推断语义状态）。
zh.stack: 主语言 Rust，依赖 ESP32 硬件（CSI 采集）、MQTT 协议、Matter/HomeKit 桥接库。
zh.hot: 82,697 星，日增 1114，因其将科幻般的穿墙感知能力与主流智能家居生态无缝集成，且无需摄像头或穿戴设备。
uses: 智能家居用户 —— 通过 Home Assistant/Apple Home 实现无摄像头的人员检测与健康监测
老年人照护 —— 检测跌倒风险、长时间不动、异常离床等安全事件
办公空间管理 —— 会议室占用检测、人员流动分析
开发者/研究者 —— 探索 WiFi 感知技术，扩展自定义语义状态

en.tag: Turn commodity WiFi into real-time spatial intelligence & vital sign monitoring without cameras
en.what: RuView is a WiFi sensing platform that uses Channel State Information (CSI) from commodity routers to detect people, measure breathing and heart rate, and track movement through walls. It integrates with major smart home ecosystems via Matter, HomeKit, and MQTT.
en.content: The repo contains the Rust core engine, ESP32 firmware, Home Assistant integration docs, Matter bridge implementation, and 21 entity types (including 10 inferred semantic states like sleeping, distress, fall risk).
en.stack: Primary language Rust, relies on ESP32 hardware for CSI capture, MQTT for communication, and Matter/HomeKit bridging libraries.
en.hot: 82,697 stars (+1,114 today) due to its sci-fi-like through-wall sensing capability seamlessly integrated with major smart home platforms, requiring no cameras or wearables.
uses: Smart home users — camera-free presence detection and vital sign monitoring via Home Assistant/Apple Home
Elderly care — detect fall risk, prolonged inactivity, bed exit anomalies
Office space management — meeting room occupancy, people flow analysis
Developers/researchers — explore WiFi sensing technology, extend custom semantic states

zh.tag: 代码驱动、实时更新的软件架构可视化工具
zh.what: LikeC4 是一种建模语言和工具集，用于从代码描述生成软件架构图。它受 C4 模型启发，但允许自定义符号、元素类型和嵌套层级，使架构图始终与实际代码同步。
zh.content: 仓库包含 LikeC4 语言规范、CLI 工具、VS Code 扩展以及示例模板。核心是 `likec4` 包，提供 `start` 命令启动本地预览服务器，并支持导出为静态站点。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 开发，依赖 Node.js 运行时。前端使用 React 渲染交互式图表，支持 VS Code 和 Open VSX 扩展。
zh.hot: 今日新增 58 星，总星数 4019，位列 TypeScript 日榜第 12。开发者对“代码即架构”的自动化、可视化需求强烈，LikeC4 提供了比传统 UML 更灵活、更现代的替代方案。
uses: 软件架构师 —— 用代码定义并维护系统架构图，确保文档与实现一致
开发团队 —— 在 CI/CD 中自动生成架构图，用于代码审查和文档
技术写作者 —— 为开源项目或内部系统创建可交互的架构文档

en.tag: Code-driven, always up-to-date software architecture visualization
en.what: LikeC4 is a modeling language and toolset that generates software architecture diagrams from code descriptions. Inspired by the C4 model, it allows custom notation, element types, and nested levels, keeping diagrams always in sync with the actual code.
en.content: The repository includes the LikeC4 language specification, CLI tool, VS Code extension, and example templates. The core `likec4` package provides a `start` command to launch a local preview server and supports exporting to static sites.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript, runs on Node.js. The frontend uses React for interactive diagram rendering, with extensions for VS Code and Open VSX.
en.hot: Gained 58 stars today, total 4019, ranked #12 on TypeScript daily trending. Developers have a strong demand for automated, code-driven architecture visualization, and LikeC4 offers a more flexible, modern alternative to traditional UML.
uses: Software architects — define and maintain system architecture diagrams in code, ensuring docs match implementation
Development teams — auto-generate architecture diagrams in CI/CD for code reviews and documentation
Technical writers — create interactive architecture docs for open-source or internal systems

zh.tag: 离线、隐私优先的英语语法检查器，快速开源，Rust 驱动
zh.what: Harper 是一个离线运行的英语语法检查工具，注重隐私和速度。它可以在毫秒级内检查文档，内存占用仅为 LanguageTool 的 1/50，且所有处理都在本地完成，无需联网。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Harper 核心库、语言服务器（harper-ls）、WebAssembly 版本以及多种编辑器集成（VS Code、Obsidian 等）。提供二进制下载和 npm 包。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Rust 编写，通过 WebAssembly 支持浏览器端运行。提供 LSP 协议实现，可集成到各种编辑器中。
zh.hot: Harper 在 GitHub 上获得 12,300+ 星标，今日新增 624 星，排名日榜第 14。其离线、隐私优先的设计解决了 Grammarly 和 LanguageTool 的痛点，吸引了大量关注。
uses: 注重隐私的写作者 —— 无需将文本发送到云端即可获得语法检查
开发者 —— 集成到 VS Code、Neovim 等编辑器中，作为轻量级 LSP 使用
Obsidian 用户 —— 通过插件在笔记中直接使用 Harper
需要离线环境的用户 —— 如飞机上或网络受限场景

en.tag: Offline, privacy-first English grammar checker, fast and open-source, powered by Rust
en.what: Harper is an offline English grammar checker that prioritizes privacy and speed. It can lint documents in milliseconds, uses less than 1/50th of LanguageTool's memory, and processes everything locally without network requests.
en.content: The repository includes the Harper core library, language server (harper-ls), WebAssembly build, and integrations for multiple editors (VS Code, Obsidian, etc.). Binaries and npm packages are available.
en.stack: Primarily written in Rust, with WebAssembly support for browser usage. Implements the LSP protocol for editor integration.
en.hot: Harper has garnered 12,300+ stars on GitHub, with 624 new stars today, ranking 14th on the daily trending list. Its offline, privacy-first approach addresses pain points of Grammarly and LanguageTool, drawing significant attention.
uses: Privacy-conscious writers — get grammar checking without sending text to the cloud
Developers — integrate into editors like VS Code, Neovim as a lightweight LSP
Obsidian users — use Harper directly in notes via plugin
Users needing offline environments — such as on flights or restricted networks

zh.tag: 开源免费的家庭媒体服务器后端
zh.what: Jellyfin 是一个自由软件媒体系统，让你完全掌控媒体管理和流媒体播放。它是专有软件 Emby 和 Plex 的替代品，通过专用服务器向终端设备提供媒体内容。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Jellyfin 服务器后端及 API，基于 .NET 平台，支持跨平台运行。提供 Docker 镜像、安装指南和丰富的文档。
zh.stack: 基于 C# 和 .NET 平台，使用 ASP.NET Core 构建 Web API，支持 SQLite、MySQL、PostgreSQL 等数据库。
zh.hot: 作为 Emby 的开源替代，Jellyfin 拥有庞大用户群，54k+ Stars 且持续增长，今日新增 66 Stars，位列 GitHub Trending 日榜第 15 名。
uses: 家庭用户 —— 搭建个人媒体服务器，管理电影、电视剧、音乐等
媒体爱好者 —— 跨设备流媒体播放，支持转码和元数据刮削
开发者 —— 基于开源 API 开发客户端或集成插件

en.tag: Free and open-source media server backend for managing and streaming personal media
en.what: Jellyfin is a free software media system that puts you in control of managing and streaming your media. It serves as an alternative to proprietary Emby and Plex, providing media from a dedicated server to end-user devices.
en.content: This repository contains the Jellyfin server backend and API, built on the .NET platform with full cross-platform support. It includes Docker images, installation guides, and extensive documentation.
en.stack: Built with C# and .NET, using ASP.NET Core for the web API, and supports SQLite, MySQL, PostgreSQL, and other databases.
en.hot: As a free alternative to Emby, Jellyfin has a massive user base with 54k+ stars and continues to grow, gaining 66 stars today and ranking #15 on GitHub Trending daily.
uses: Home users — set up a personal media server to manage movies, TV shows, music, etc.
Media enthusiasts — stream media across devices with transcoding and metadata scraping
Developers — build clients or integrate plugins using the open-source API

zh.tag: 像训练神经网络一样训练智能体技能，无需修改模型权重
zh.what: SkillOpt 是一个文本空间优化器，通过轨迹驱动的编辑和验证门控更新，为冻结的 LLM 智能体训练可重用的自然语言技能。它生成可部署的 best_skill.md 工件，实现智能体技能的自我进化。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心 Python 库（skillopt 包）、CLI 工具（skillopt-sleep 夜间离线进化引擎）、集成脚本（Claude Code、Codex、Copilot、Devin 等）、文档、论文和演示视频。
zh.stack: 基于 Python 3.10+，依赖 PyPI 包 skillopt，集成多种 LLM 代理框架（如 Claude Code、Codex、Copilot、Devin），使用 JSON 解析和文件系统操作。
zh.hot: 14469 Stars 且单日新增 599，因其创新地将神经网络训练范式（epoch、batchsize、learning rate、validation gate）应用于智能体技能优化，无需修改模型权重，解决了 LLM 智能体技能自进化的关键痛点。
uses: LLM 智能体开发者 —— 自动优化智能体技能，提升任务执行效率
AI 研究员 —— 探索文本空间优化与技能自进化方法
企业 AI 工程团队 —— 部署可复用的最佳技能工件到生产环境

en.tag: Train agent skills like neural networks — with epochs, batchsize, learning rates, validation gates — without touching model weights
en.what: SkillOpt is a text-space optimizer that trains reusable natural-language skills for frozen LLM agents through trajectory-driven edits and validation-gated updates, producing deployable best_skill.md artifacts for self-evolving agent skills.
en.content: The repo contains the core Python library (skillopt package), CLI tools (skillopt-sleep nightly offline self-evolution engine), integration shells for Claude Code, Codex, Copilot, Devin, etc., documentation, paper, and demo video.
en.stack: Built on Python 3.10+, depends on the skillopt PyPI package, integrates with multiple LLM agent frameworks (Claude Code, Codex, Copilot, Devin), uses JSON parsing and filesystem operations.
en.hot: 14,469 stars with 599 daily additions, because it innovatively applies neural network training paradigms (epochs, batchsize, learning rates, validation gates) to agent skill optimization without modifying model weights, addressing a key pain point in LLM agent self-evolution.
uses: LLM agent developers — automatically optimize agent skills to improve task execution efficiency
AI researchers — explore text-space optimization and skill self-evolution methods
Enterprise AI engineering teams — deploy reusable best skill artifacts to production

zh.tag: 300+ AI 代理资源精选列表
zh.what: 这是一个精心整理的 AI 代理资源列表，收录了 300 多个项目，涵盖框架、工具、应用等。旨在帮助开发者快速了解并选择适合的 AI 代理相关资源。

zh.hot: AI 代理是当前热点，该列表收录了 300+ 资源，今日新增 53 星，总星数 2045，位列 Python 日榜第 4。

研究人员 —— 追踪最新 agentic AI 进展
技术决策者 —— 评估不同 AI 代理框架

en.tag: Curated list of 300+ agentic AI resources
en.what: A curated list of 300+ agentic AI resources, including frameworks, tools, and applications. It helps developers quickly discover and select relevant AI agent projects.
en.content: Includes a Top 10 projects list (e.g., AutoGPT, Ollama, LangChain) and categorized resources, each with a brief description and GitHub star count.

Technical decision-makers — evaluate different AI agent frameworks

zh.tag: AI 代理的 IDE 级语义编码工具包
zh.what: Serena 是一个基于 MCP 协议的编码工具包，为 AI 代理提供语义级别的代码检索、编辑、重构和调试能力。它让代理像使用 IDE 一样理解符号和代码结构，从而更高效、可靠地操作代码库。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Serena 的 Python 实现、MCP 服务器配置、快速入门指南以及演示视频。核心是提供符号级抽象的工具集，替代传统的行号或模式匹配方法。
zh.stack: 基于 Python 开发，通过 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 与任何客户端/LLM 集成。依赖语义代码分析技术，支持多种语言和代码库。
zh.hot: Serena 为 AI 代理提供缺失的 IDE 级语义理解，显著提升编码效率，尤其适合大型复杂代码库。26.8k Stars 反映开发者对代理工具链优化的强烈需求。
uses: AI 代理开发者 —— 为代理集成高级代码理解与操作能力
使用 Claude Code、Codex CLI 等编码代理的开发者 —— 提升代理在大型项目中的表现
对 MCP 生态感兴趣的开发者 —— 学习如何构建语义级工具

en.tag: IDE-level semantic coding toolkit for AI agents
en.what: Serena is an MCP-based coding toolkit that provides AI agents with semantic-level code retrieval, editing, refactoring, and debugging capabilities. It enables agents to understand symbols and code structure like an IDE, making code operations faster and more reliable.
en.content: The repo contains the Python implementation of Serena, MCP server configuration, quick start guide, and demo videos. The core is a set of tools with symbol-level abstractions, replacing traditional line-number or pattern-matching approaches.
en.stack: Built with Python, integrates with any client/LLM via the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Relies on semantic code analysis, supporting multiple languages and codebases.
en.hot: Serena fills the gap of IDE-level semantic understanding for AI agents, dramatically improving coding efficiency, especially in large complex codebases. 26.8k stars reflect strong demand for agent toolchain optimization.
uses: AI agent developers — integrate advanced code understanding and manipulation into agents
Developers using coding agents like Claude Code, Codex CLI — boost agent performance on large projects
Developers interested in MCP ecosystem — learn how to build semantic-level tools

zh.tag: 统一 AI 计算控制平面，跨云调度与编排
zh.what: SkyPilot 是一个跨云 AI 计算平台，允许用户在任意基础设施上运行、管理和扩展 AI 工作负载。它为 AI 团队提供简单接口，为基础设施团队提供统一控制平面，支持高级调度、扩缩容和编排。
zh.content: 仓库包含 SkyPilot 核心系统、CLI、Python SDK、与主流云（AWS、GCP、Azure、Kubernetes 等）的集成，以及文档、示例和社区资源。
zh.stack: Python 为主，依赖云 SDK（boto3、google-cloud-sdk、azure-cli）、Kubernetes、Ray 等，支持 Slurm 和 Docker。
zh.hot: 随着 AI 工作负载激增，跨云统一管理成为刚需。SkyPilot 提供“一次编写，随处运行”的能力，大幅降低多云和混合云管理的复杂性，10k+ Stars 印证了其广泛需求。
uses: AI 团队 —— 在任意云或本地 GPU 上运行训练、推理和批量作业，无需处理底层基础设施细节
基础设施团队 —— 统一管理分散的 GPU 资源，实现成本优化和自动化扩缩容
研究机构 —— 快速搭建实验环境，利用 Spot 实例降低成本
企业平台 —— 作为内部 AI 平台的基础，支持多租户和策略控制

en.tag: Unified control plane for AI compute across clouds and on-prem
en.what: SkyPilot is a cross-cloud AI compute platform that lets users run, manage, and scale AI workloads on any infrastructure. It provides a simple interface for AI teams and a unified control plane for infra teams, with advanced scheduling, scaling, and orchestration.
en.content: The repo contains the SkyPilot core system, CLI, Python SDK, integrations with major clouds (AWS, GCP, Azure, Kubernetes, etc.), along with documentation, examples, and community resources.
en.stack: Primarily Python, with dependencies on cloud SDKs (boto3, google-cloud-sdk, azure-cli), Kubernetes, Ray, and support for Slurm and Docker.
en.hot: With the surge in AI workloads, unified cross-cloud management is critical. SkyPilot's 'write once, run anywhere' capability drastically reduces multi-cloud and hybrid cloud complexity, and its 10k+ Stars reflect widespread demand.
uses: AI teams — run training, inference, and batch jobs on any cloud or on-prem GPU without managing infrastructure details
Infrastructure teams — unify fragmented GPU resources, optimize costs, and automate scaling
Research institutions — quickly set up experimental environments and reduce costs with spot instances
Enterprise platforms — serve as the foundation for internal AI platforms with multi-tenancy and policy controls

zh.tag: Apple Silicon 上最快的本地 AI 引擎
zh.what: Rapid-MLX 是一个专为 Apple Silicon 优化的本地 AI 推理引擎，提供比 Ollama 快 2-4 倍的性能。它支持 OpenAI/Anthropic API 兼容的接口，可无缝替代云端服务，并内置提示缓存、工具调用、推理分离等功能。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Python 包、CLI 工具、Homebrew 配方和安装脚本，以及文档和模型镜像链接。核心是 mlx 加速的推理引擎，附带 17 种工具解析器和云路由功能。
zh.stack: 基于 Apple MLX 框架，使用 Python 3.10+ 开发，依赖 Homebrew 分发预编译包。支持所有 M 系列芯片，通过 mlx-lm 实现高效推理。
zh.hot: 凭借比 Ollama 快 2-4 倍的实测性能、0.08 秒缓存 TTFT 和 100% 工具调用支持，迅速获得 3365 颗星，成为 Apple Silicon 用户本地运行大模型的首选。
uses: Mac 开发者 —— 在本地快速运行 LLM 进行代码辅助或测试
AI 应用开发者 —— 需要兼容 OpenAI API 的本地推理后端
隐私敏感用户 —— 在本地处理数据，避免云端传输
Claude Code/Cursor 用户 —— 作为本地推理引擎替代云端 API

en.tag: The fastest local AI engine for Apple Silicon
en.what: Rapid-MLX is a local AI inference engine optimized for Apple Silicon, delivering 2-4x faster performance than Ollama. It offers OpenAI/Anthropic API-compatible endpoints as a drop-in replacement for cloud services, with built-in prompt caching, tool calling, and reasoning separation.
en.content: The repo includes a Python package, CLI tool, Homebrew formula, install script, and links to docs and model mirrors. The core is an mlx-accelerated inference engine with 17 tool parsers and cloud routing.
en.stack: Built on Apple's MLX framework, developed in Python 3.10+, distributed via Homebrew. Supports all M-series chips, leveraging mlx-lm for efficient inference.
en.hot: With 2-4x faster performance than Ollama, 0.08s cached TTFT, and 100% tool calling support, it quickly gained 3365 stars, becoming the go-to local LLM engine for Apple Silicon users.
uses: Mac developers — run LLMs locally for code assistance or testing
AI app developers — need a local inference backend compatible with OpenAI API
Privacy-conscious users — process data locally without cloud transmission
Claude Code/Cursor users — use as a local inference engine to replace cloud APIs

zh.tag: 从零手写AI工程：503课时的全栈开源课程体系
zh.what: 这是一套系统化的开源AI工程课程，包含503节课、20个阶段，总计约320小时学习内容。课程覆盖从线性代数、反向传播到注意力机制、智能体循环和自主集群的完整链路，要求学员从零手写实现每个核心组件。每节课最终产出可复用的工程产物（提示词、技能、智能体或MCP服务器），强调“先懂原理再调框架”。
zh.content: 仓库按20个递进阶段组织，包含503节自包含课程及对应代码，涵盖Python、TypeScript、Rust、Julia四种语言实现；配套有网站、路线图、学习数据追踪及可本地运行的测试与构建脚本。
zh.stack: 课程以Python为主语言，同时涉及TypeScript、Rust和Julia；从裸机数学推导起步，逐步引入PyTorch等框架，所有内容设计为可在个人笔记本上本地运行。
zh.hot: 仓库已获超3.8万Star且单日新增232星，跻身GitHub Trending日榜第8；其“从零手写”的硬核路径和503节课的系统性填补了“学生普遍使用AI但仅18%感到职业准备充分”的市场空白。
uses: 转码/在校学生 —— 希望从零建立AI工程系统能力，而非仅调用API的初学者
全栈工程师 —— 需要深入理解Transformer、注意力机制和智能体底层原理的开发者
AI产品经理/技术负责人 —— 想要建立端到端技术视野、评估算法可行性的非纯研发角色
自学者/面试者 —— 寻求结构化、可本地运行的长周期课程替代碎片化网课的人群

en.tag: Open-source AI engineering bootcamp: 503 lessons across 20 phases in 4 languages
en.what: It is a comprehensive open-source curriculum for AI engineering with 503 lessons across 20 phases (~320 hours total). The course spans from foundational linear algebra and backpropagation to attention mechanisms, agent loops, and autonomous swarms, requiring learners to implement every core component from scratch before touching high-level frameworks. Each lesson ships a reusable artifact—prompt, skill, agent, or MCP server—bridging theory and production-ready engineering.
en.content: The repository is organized into 20 progressive phases containing 503 self-contained lessons with code implementations in Python, TypeScript, Rust, and Julia, accompanied by a website, roadmap, local test runners, and build scripts.
en.stack: Python is the primary language, with additional implementations in TypeScript, Rust, and Julia; the curriculum starts from raw math and gradually introduces frameworks like PyTorch, designed to run entirely on a local laptop.
en.hot: With over 38.8k stars and 232 new stars today, hitting #8 on GitHub Trending, its "build from scratch" philosophy and 503-lesson structure directly address the gap where 84% of students use AI tools but only 18% feel professionally prepared.
uses: Career switchers and students seeking to build systematic AI engineering skills from the ground up rather than just calling APIs.
Full-stack developers who need deep, first-principles understanding of transformers, attention, and agent internals.
AI product managers and tech leads who want end-to-end technical literacy to assess algorithm feasibility without pure research backgrounds.
Self-learners and interview candidates looking for a structured, locally runnable long-form curriculum to replace scattered tutorials.

zh.tag: 开源量化交易平台，集成AI多因子策略开发
zh.what: VeighNa 是一套基于 Python 的开源量化交易系统开发框架，提供从数据获取、策略研究到实盘交易的全流程支持。4.0 版本新增 AI 模块，集成机器学习模型训练与因子工程，助力专业量化交易。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心交易框架、CTP 等接口、策略回测引擎、以及 vnpy.alpha 子模块（含数据集、模型、策略、投研管理）。提供多个 Jupyter Notebook 示例演示 AI 投研流程。
zh.stack: Python 3.10-3.13，依赖 NumPy、Pandas、scikit-learn、LightGBM、PyTorch 等，支持 Windows/Linux/macOS。
zh.hot: 43.8k Stars，今日新增129，长期稳居量化交易领域头部项目。4.0版本引入AI模块，融合机器学习与量化策略，吸引大量专业用户。
uses: 量化交易开发者 —— 基于框架快速搭建自定义交易系统
私募/券商/期货公司研究员 —— 使用AI模块进行多因子策略开发与回测
金融科技学习者 —— 通过完整代码和文档学习量化交易与AI应用

en.tag: Open-source quantitative trading platform with AI-powered multi-factor strategy development
en.what: VeighNa is an open-source quantitative trading system framework in Python, covering the full workflow from data acquisition, strategy research to live trading. Version 4.0 introduces an AI module with machine learning model training and factor engineering for professional quant traders.
en.content: The repo includes the core trading framework, CTP and other interfaces, backtesting engine, and the vnpy.alpha submodule (dataset, model, strategy, lab). Multiple Jupyter Notebook demos illustrate AI research workflows.
en.stack: Python 3.10-3.13, depends on NumPy, Pandas, scikit-learn, LightGBM, PyTorch, etc. Supports Windows/Linux/macOS.
en.hot: 43.8k stars, +129 today, consistently top in quantitative trading. The 4.0 release with AI module integrating machine learning attracts many professional users.
uses: Quant trading developers — quickly build custom trading systems on the framework
Researchers at hedge funds, securities, futures firms — develop multi-factor strategies with AI module
Fintech learners — study quant trading and AI applications through complete code and docs

zh.tag: DevOps/SRE 面试题库与练习
zh.what: 这是一个包含 2624 道练习题和面试题的仓库，涵盖 Linux、Docker、Kubernetes、AWS、Python、Ansible、Terraform 等数十个 DevOps 相关技术主题。适合用于面试准备或技能巩固，但作者提醒大部分题目并非真实面试题。
zh.content: 仓库按主题组织，每个主题（如 DevOps、Git、Kubernetes、Cloud）有独立的 README 文件，内含练习题和答案。此外还包含 Python 和 Go 的独立练习仓库链接。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Python 编写部分脚本，但练习题本身不依赖特定技术栈，涵盖范围广泛。
zh.hot: 拥有 83320 颗星，长期作为 DevOps 面试准备的首选资源，每日新增 44 星，持续吸引求职者和开发者。
uses: 求职者准备 DevOps/SRE 面试 —— 系统复习各技术主题
开发者巩固 DevOps 技能 —— 通过练习查漏补缺
培训师或教育者 —— 作为教学材料或课堂练习

en.tag: DevOps/SRE interview questions and exercises
en.what: This repo contains 2624 exercises and questions covering dozens of DevOps-related topics like Linux, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Python, Ansible, Terraform, etc. It's useful for interview prep or skill reinforcement, though the author notes most questions are not actual interview questions.
en.content: Organized by topic, each topic (e.g., DevOps, Git, Kubernetes, Cloud) has its own README with exercises and answers. Also includes links to separate Python and Go exercise repos.
en.stack: Primarily uses Python for some scripts, but the exercises themselves are tech-stack agnostic, covering a wide range of tools.
en.hot: With 83,320 stars, it's a long-standing top resource for DevOps interview prep, gaining 44 stars daily and consistently attracting job seekers and developers.
uses: Job seekers preparing for DevOps/SRE interviews — systematically review topics
Developers reinforcing DevOps skills — identify gaps through exercises
Trainers or educators — use as teaching material or classroom exercises

zh.tag: 多平台 AI 代理助手与开发框架
zh.what: AstrBot 是一个集成了多种即时通讯平台、大语言模型、插件和 AI 功能的 AI 代理助手与开发框架。它可以作为 OpenClaw 的替代品，帮助用户构建和管理 AI 驱动的自动化工作流。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的源代码、文档、多语言 README（中、英、日、法、西、俄）、Docker 部署配置以及丰富的插件示例。项目采用模块化架构，支持快速扩展。
zh.stack: 基于 Python 3.12+ 开发，依赖主流 LLM API（如 OpenAI、Claude）、IM 平台 SDK（如 QQ、Telegram、Discord）以及插件系统。
zh.hot: 凭借 37K+ Stars 和每日 300+ 新增，AstrBot 因提供一站式多平台 AI 代理解决方案而备受关注，尤其作为 OpenClaw 的替代品吸引了大量开发者。
uses: 开发者 —— 快速搭建跨平台 AI 聊天机器人或自动化助手
AI 爱好者 —— 集成多种 LLM 和插件，探索 AI 代理能力
企业团队 —— 利用 AstrBot 构建内部 AI 工作流，替代商业工具

en.tag: Multi-platform AI agent assistant & dev framework
en.what: AstrBot is an AI agent assistant and development framework that integrates multiple IM platforms, LLMs, plugins, and AI features. It can serve as an alternative to OpenClaw, helping users build and manage AI-driven automation workflows.
en.content: The repository includes full source code, documentation, multilingual READMEs (Chinese, English, Japanese, French, Spanish, Russian), Docker deployment configs, and rich plugin examples. The project uses a modular architecture for easy extensibility.
en.stack: Built with Python 3.12+, relies on mainstream LLM APIs (e.g., OpenAI, Claude), IM platform SDKs (e.g., QQ, Telegram, Discord), and a plugin system.
en.hot: With 37K+ stars and 300+ daily additions, AstrBot gains attention for its all-in-one multi-platform AI agent solution, especially as an OpenClaw alternative, attracting many developers.
uses: Developers — quickly build cross-platform AI chatbots or automation assistants
AI enthusiasts — integrate multiple LLMs and plugins to explore agent capabilities
Enterprise teams — leverage AstrBot to build internal AI workflows, replacing commercial tools

zh.tag: 免费开源的人体运动捕捉系统
zh.what: FreeMoCap 是一个免费开源的运动捕捉系统，无需专用硬件即可从普通摄像头视频中提取人体 3D 骨骼运动数据。它支持多摄像头同步录制、自动骨骼追踪、数据导出（如 .csv/.bvh），并提供了图形界面和 Python API。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Python 后端（基于 MediaPipe 和 skellytracker 进行姿态估计与三角测量）和 React/Electron 前端 GUI，以及文档、示例数据和安装脚本。
zh.stack: 技术栈：Python（MediaPipe、NumPy、OpenCV）、TypeScript/React、Electron；依赖 skellytracker 进行 GPU/CPU 骨骼追踪。
zh.hot: 近万星标，日增 52 星，因其将专业级动捕技术平民化，无需昂贵设备即可用于科研、教育、动画制作等领域，社区活跃。
uses: 科研人员 — 低成本采集人体运动数据用于生物力学分析
动画师/游戏开发者 — 从视频中快速生成角色动画骨骼数据
教育工作者 — 在课堂上演示运动捕捉原理
运动康复 — 分析患者动作模式

en.tag: Free and open-source motion capture for everyone
en.what: FreeMoCap is a free and open-source motion capture system that extracts 3D skeletal motion data from ordinary camera videos without specialized hardware. It supports multi-camera synchronized recording, automatic skeleton tracking, data export (e.g., .csv/.bvh), and provides a GUI and Python API.
en.content: The repo contains a Python backend (using MediaPipe and skellytracker for pose estimation and triangulation) and a React/Electron frontend GUI, along with documentation, sample data, and installation scripts.
en.stack: Tech stack: Python (MediaPipe, NumPy, OpenCV), TypeScript/React, Electron; relies on skellytracker for GPU/CPU skeleton tracking.
en.hot: Nearly 10k stars with 52 new stars today, popular for democratizing professional motion capture, enabling research, education, and animation without expensive gear, with an active community.
uses: Researchers — low-cost human motion data for biomechanics analysis
Animators/game developers — quick character animation skeleton from video
Educators — demonstrate motion capture principles in class
Sports rehabilitation — analyze patient movement patterns

zh.tag: 自托管可视化 CMS，一分钟内运行
zh.what: Instatic 是一个现代化的自托管可视化 CMS，集成了可视化编辑器、内容引擎和发布器，全部运行在一个 Bun 服务器上。它生成的页面是干净的语义 HTML 和紧凑 CSS，没有框架运行时或多余的标记。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 CMS 源代码，包括可视化编辑器、内容管理、媒体处理、认证、表单、插件系统和发布器。支持 SQLite 或 Postgres 数据库，并提供一键部署到 Railway。
zh.stack: 使用 TypeScript 编写，运行在 Bun 运行时上，数据库支持 SQLite 和 Postgres。
zh.hot: Instatic 因其极简的架构和快速部署而受到关注，今日新增 179 星，总星数达 3939，在 GitHub Trending 日榜 TypeScript 类别中排名第 6。
uses: 希望拥有自托管 CMS 的开发者 —— 无需复杂配置，一分钟内启动
追求简洁 HTML 输出的网站建设者 —— 生成干净的语义页面
需要一体化解决方案的小型团队或个人 —— 集成编辑、内容管理和发布

en.tag: Self-hosted visual CMS, running in 1 minute
en.what: Instatic is a modern self-hosted visual CMS that integrates a visual editor, content engine, and publisher all in one Bun server. It outputs clean semantic HTML and compact CSS with no framework runtime or extra markup.
en.content: The repository contains the full CMS source code, including a visual editor, content management, media handling, authentication, forms, plugin system, and publisher. It supports SQLite or Postgres databases and offers one-click deploy to Railway.
en.stack: Written in TypeScript, runs on Bun runtime, supports SQLite and Postgres databases.
en.hot: Instatic gains attention for its minimal architecture and fast deployment, with 179 stars today and 3939 total, ranking #6 on GitHub Trending daily for TypeScript.
uses: Developers wanting a self-hosted CMS — launch in one minute without complex setup
Website builders seeking clean HTML output — generates semantic pages
Small teams or individuals needing an all-in-one solution — integrated editing, content management, and publishing

zh.tag: 多 AI 编程代理并行编排的桌面与移动工作平台
zh.what: Orca 是一款 Agent Development Environment（ADE），让用户能够并行运行多种主流 AI 编程代理（如 Codex、Claude Code、OpenCode 等），各自在隔离的 git worktree 中执行任务。同时提供移动端伴侣应用，方便用户随时随地监控、接收通知并追加指令。
zh.content: 仓库包含跨平台桌面端应用源码（支持 macOS/Windows/Linux）、移动端配套应用（iOS/Android），以及用于多代理并行执行、git worktree 管理与结果对比合并的核心模块。
zh.stack: 主要基于 TypeScript 构建，提供跨平台桌面客户端与移动端配套应用，通过集成多家第三方 AI 编程代理的 API 实现统一调度。
zh.hot: 在 AI 编程代理百花齐放的背景下，Orca 以「并行工作树 + 移动端遥控」解决了多代理对比与随时监控的痛点；一周内新增 5,409 Star 并以 21.3k 总星数冲上 GitHub 周榜第 7，足见开发者对统一代理调度界面的强烈需求。
uses: 需要同时对比多个 AI 编程代理输出的开发者——在独立 git worktree 中并行运行多个代理，择优合并结果
追求随时随地掌控编码任务的技术团队——通过移动端伴侣应用远程监控代理状态并追加指令
希望统一调度自有 AI 订阅工具的高级用户——将 Codex、Claude Code 等集中在一套桌面环境中管理
需要保持代码库隔离的谨慎工程师——每个代理在独立工作树中操作，避免污染主分支

en.tag: Parallel AI coding agent orchestrator for desktop and mobile
en.what: Orca is an Agent Development Environment (ADE) that lets developers run a fleet of popular coding agents—such as Codex, Claude Code, and OpenCode—in parallel within isolated git worktrees. It also offers a mobile companion app to monitor progress, receive notifications, and send follow-up instructions from anywhere.
en.content: The repository houses the cross-platform desktop application source (macOS/Windows/Linux), a mobile companion app (iOS and Android), and core modules for parallel agent execution, git worktree management, and result comparison/merging.
en.stack: Built primarily in TypeScript, it provides cross-platform desktop clients and mobile companion apps, integrating third-party AI coding agent APIs for unified orchestration.
en.hot: As AI coding agents proliferate, Orca's parallel worktrees and mobile companion solve the pain of comparing multiple agents and monitoring them on the go; the project gained 5,409 stars this week, hitting #7 on GitHub Trending with 21.3k total stars, reflecting strong demand for a unified agent orchestration interface.
uses: Developers who want to benchmark multiple AI agents side-by-side—run several agents in isolated git worktrees and merge the best result
Teams needing on-the-go oversight—monitor and steer agents from the mobile companion app anywhere
Power users with multiple AI subscriptions—unify Codex, Claude Code, and others under one desktop orchestrator
Engineers prioritizing code safety—each agent operates in its own git worktree to avoid polluting the main branch

zh.tag: AI 编程助手的规范驱动开发框架
zh.what: OpenSpec 是一个规范驱动开发（SDD）框架，旨在为 AI 编程助手提供结构化的规范定义和迭代流程。它通过 /opsx:propose、/opsx:apply 等命令，让开发者与 AI 协作时遵循从提案、设计到实现的清晰路径。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心 TypeScript 库（npm 包 @fission-ai/openspec）、CLI 工具、文档和示例工作流。核心是 opsx 工作流，支持探索、提案、应用和归档等阶段。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript，依赖 Node.js 和 npm。集成了 AI 编程助手（如 Claude、Copilot）的 API，通过规范文件驱动代码生成。
zh.hot: 获得 6.2 万星标，日增 191，因其解决了 AI 编程中缺乏结构化流程的痛点，提供从想法到实现的标准化规范，大幅提升协作效率。
uses: AI 编程助手用户 —— 通过规范驱动开发，减少模糊指令导致的错误
团队协作开发 —— 使用 /opsx:propose 和 /opsx:archive 管理功能迭代
个人项目 —— 快速将想法转化为可执行的规范，提升开发效率

en.tag: Spec-driven development framework for AI coding assistants
en.what: OpenSpec is a spec-driven development (SDD) framework designed to provide structured specification definitions and iterative workflows for AI coding assistants. It uses commands like /opsx:propose and /opsx:apply to guide developers and AI through a clear path from proposal to implementation.
en.content: The repository includes the core TypeScript library (npm package @fission-ai/openspec), CLI tools, documentation, and example workflows. The core is the opsx workflow, supporting phases like explore, propose, apply, and archive.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript, depends on Node.js and npm. Integrates with AI coding assistants (e.g., Claude, Copilot) via their APIs, driving code generation through spec files.
en.hot: With 62K stars and 191 daily additions, it addresses the pain point of lacking structured workflows in AI coding, providing standardized specs from idea to implementation, significantly boosting collaboration efficiency.
uses: AI coding assistant users — reduce errors from vague instructions via spec-driven development
Team collaboration — manage feature iterations with /opsx:propose and /opsx:archive
Personal projects — quickly turn ideas into executable specs, boosting development efficiency

zh.tag: 开源 SEO 分析平台，支持 AI Agent 与 MCP 工具链集成
zh.what: OpenSEO 是 Semrush 和 Ahrefs 的开源替代品，提供关键词研究、排名追踪、竞品洞察、外链审计与站点诊断等核心 SEO 工作流。它采用按量付费模式，用户只需接入自己的 DataForSEO API 密钥即可使用，无需订阅。同时，它内置 MCP 服务器和可复用的 Agent Skills，让 Claude Code、OpenClaw 等 AI 代理直接调用 SEO 数据完成自动化任务。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的前后端应用代码与现代化 UI，支持 Docker 和 Cloudflare 自托管，内置 MCP 服务器以及预设的 Agent Skills（如 keyword-research、competitor-analysis、link-prospecting）。文档涵盖 API 密钥配置、Google Search Console 接入、SEO 成本参考及本地开发指南。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 构建，前端采用现代 UI 框架，后端依赖 DataForSEO API 获取 SEO 数据，并通过 MCP 协议与外部 AI Agent 通信；支持 Docker 容器化部署与 Cloudflare 边缘托管。
zh.hot: 在 SEO 工具普遍昂贵且功能臃肿的背景下，它以开源、按量付费、可自托管的定位迅速获得关注；4,405 Stars 中本月新增 2,187 颗，登上 GitHub TypeScript 月榜第 17 名，其对 MCP 与 AI Agent 的原生集成进一步放大了开发者与增长团队的兴趣。
uses: 独立开发者 / 小团队 —— 无需订阅高价 SaaS，用自有 API 密钥低成本完成 SEO 监控与关键词研究。
AI 工程师 / Agent 开发者 —— 通过 MCP 将实时 SEO 数据接入 Claude Code、OpenClaw 等智能体，实现自动化内容策略。
增长与营销团队 —— 利用预设 Agent Skills 快速完成竞品分析、外链挖掘和排名追踪。
隐私敏感企业 —— 支持 Docker/Cloudflare 自托管，完全掌控数据与成本。

en.tag: Open-source SEO suite with AI agent & MCP integration for self-hosting
en.what: OpenSEO is an open-source alternative to Semrush and Ahrefs, offering keyword research, rank tracking, competitor insights, backlink audits, and site audits. It uses a pay-as-you-go model with your own DataForSEO API key instead of expensive subscriptions. It also exposes an MCP server and reusable Agent Skills so AI agents like Claude Code and OpenClaw can interact directly with SEO data.
en.content: The repository contains a full-stack application with a modern UI, supporting Docker and Cloudflare self-hosting, along with a built-in MCP server and pre-built Agent Skills (e.g., keyword-research, competitor-analysis, link-prospecting). Documentation covers API key setup, Google Search Console integration, SEO cost references, and local development guides.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript, it features a modern frontend UI, relies on the DataForSEO API for search data, and communicates with external AI agents via the MCP protocol. It supports Docker containerization and Cloudflare edge hosting.
en.hot: It gained rapid traction as a free, pay-as-you-go, self-hostable alternative to expensive and bloated SEO suites; with 4,405 stars and 2,187 added this month alone—ranking 17th on GitHub's monthly TypeScript trending list—its native MCP and AI Agent support has further driven interest from developers and growth teams.
uses: Indie developers and small teams —— Avoid expensive subscriptions by using your own API key for low-cost SEO monitoring and keyword research.
AI engineers and agent builders —— Feed real-time SEO data into Claude Code, OpenClaw, or other agents via MCP for automated content strategy.
Growth and marketing teams —— Use pre-built Agent Skills to quickly run competitor analysis, link prospecting, and rank tracking.
Privacy-conscious organizations —— Self-host via Docker or Cloudflare to maintain full control over data and costs.

zh.tag: AI 智能体工具链：统一 LLM API、代理循环、TUI 与编程代理 CLI
zh.what: 提供模块化 AI 代理开发框架，整合多厂商 LLM API、代理运行时与终端交互界面。内置可自扩展的编程代理 CLI，支持工具调用、状态管理与交互式编码任务。
zh.content: 仓库采用 monorepo 结构，包含 pi-ai（统一 LLM 接口）、pi-agent-core（代理运行时）、pi-coding-agent（交互式编码 CLI）和 pi-tui（差分渲染终端 UI）四个核心包。README 还提供了容器化与沙箱隔离方案，以及面向人类和代理的协作规范。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 构建，使用 npm 管理 monorepo 依赖与生命周期脚本。支持 OpenAI、Anthropic、Google 等主流 LLM 提供商，并可通过 Docker 或 Gondolin micro-VM 进行容器化隔离。
zh.hot: 一周内新增 2,741 Star 使其冲上 TypeScript 周榜第 17 名，目前总 Star 数已突破 7.2 万。开发者对统一 LLM 接口与自扩展编程代理的结合表现出强烈兴趣。
uses: 需要构建多模型 AI 代理的开发者——统一接口降低集成成本
追求终端原生体验的 CLI 用户——内置 TUI 与差分渲染提升交互效率
关注代码安全隔离的团队——提供 Docker、micro-VM 等多种沙箱方案
希望人机与 AI 代理协作的项目维护者——贡献指南同时面向人类与 Agent

en.tag: AI agent toolkit with unified LLM API, agent loop, TUI and coding agent CLI
en.what: A modular AI agent development framework that unifies multi-provider LLM APIs, agent runtime, and terminal UI. It features a self-extensible coding agent CLI with tool calling, state management, and interactive coding capabilities.
en.content: The monorepo houses four core packages: pi-ai (unified LLM API), pi-agent-core (agent runtime), pi-coding-agent (interactive CLI), and pi-tui (diff-rendered terminal UI). It also includes containerization guides and contribution rules for both humans and agents.
en.stack: Built on TypeScript with npm-based monorepo tooling and lifecycle scripts. Supports major LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google) and offers containerization via Docker or Gondolin micro-VM.
en.hot: It gained 2,741 stars this week, landing at #17 on GitHub's TypeScript Weekly Trending with over 72.2k total stars. The combination of a unified LLM API and a self-extensible coding agent has drawn strong developer interest.
uses: Developers building multi-model AI agents — unified API reduces integration overhead
CLI users preferring terminal-native experiences — built-in TUI with diff rendering
Teams requiring secure isolation — supports Docker, micro-VM, and sandbox patterns
Project maintainers enabling human and AI co-contribution — guidelines cover both humans and agents

uses: 后端开发者 —— 为 API 生成可交互文档
前端/移动端开发者 —— 快速了解并测试 API 端点

en.what: Swagger UI is a frontend tool that automatically generates interactive API documentation from OpenAPI specifications. It allows developers to visualize and test API endpoints without any implementation logic.
en.content: The repository contains HTML, JavaScript, and CSS assets, along with three npm modules: swagger-ui (for SPAs), swagger-ui-dist (dependency-free server-side), and swagger-ui-react (React component).
en.stack: Built with JavaScript and React, relying on OpenAPI specification parsing libraries.
en.hot: As the de facto standard for API documentation, it has nearly 29K stars, active maintenance, and gained 12 stars today, ranking 5th on JavaScript daily trending.

zh.tag: 基于 Promise 的 HTTP 客户端，浏览器与 Node.js 通用
zh.what: Axios 是一个基于 Promise 的 HTTP 客户端，可用于浏览器和 Node.js。它提供了简洁的 API 来发送 HTTP 请求，并支持拦截器、自动转换 JSON 数据、取消请求等特性。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的源代码、示例、测试用例和详细的文档。核心功能包括请求/响应拦截器、并发请求、CSRF 保护等。
zh.stack: 纯 JavaScript 实现，无外部依赖。浏览器端使用 XMLHttpRequest，Node.js 端使用 http/https 模块。
zh.hot: Axios 是 JavaScript 生态中最流行的 HTTP 客户端之一，拥有超过 109k 星标。其稳定的 API 设计和广泛的兼容性使其成为众多项目的默认选择。
uses: 前端开发者 —— 在浏览器中发送 AJAX 请求
Node.js 开发者 —— 在服务端调用 REST API
全栈开发者 —— 统一浏览器和 Node.js 的 HTTP 请求方式

en.tag: Promise-based HTTP client for browser and Node.js
en.what: Axios is a Promise-based HTTP client for both browser and Node.js. It provides a simple API for making HTTP requests, with features like interceptors, automatic JSON transformation, and request cancellation.
en.content: The repository includes full source code, examples, tests, and comprehensive documentation. Core features include request/response interceptors, concurrent requests, and CSRF protection.
en.stack: Pure JavaScript implementation with zero dependencies. Uses XMLHttpRequest in browsers and http/https modules in Node.js.
en.hot: Axios is one of the most popular HTTP clients in the JavaScript ecosystem with over 109k stars. Its stable API design and broad compatibility make it the default choice for many projects.
uses: Frontend developers — making AJAX requests in browsers
Node.js developers — calling REST APIs on the server
Full-stack developers — unifying HTTP requests across browser and Node.js

zh.tag: GitHub 界面全面中文化插件
zh.what: 这是一个用户脚本，能将 GitHub 网页界面的菜单、按钮、标题等元素全部翻译为中文。它基于正则匹配和词库实现，支持自动本地化时间、项目描述人机翻译等功能。
zh.content: 仓库包含用户脚本（JavaScript）、词库文件（locals.js）以及 VS Code 扩展。安装后通过 Tampermonkey 等脚本管理器运行，即可生效。
zh.stack: 纯 JavaScript 实现，依赖 Tampermonkey 或 Violentmonkey 等用户脚本管理器运行。
zh.hot: 拥有 2.9 万 Star，长期受中文开发者欢迎。今日新增 86 Star，登上 JavaScript 日榜第 10 名，说明持续有用户发现并使用。
uses: 中文开发者 —— 希望将 GitHub 界面汉化，降低使用门槛
非英语母语者 —— 需要更友好的中文界面浏览 GitHub
开源贡献者 —— 推荐给团队或社区，提升协作体验

en.tag: A plugin to fully localize GitHub UI into Chinese
en.what: This is a userscript that translates GitHub's web interface elements such as menus, buttons, and titles into Chinese. It uses regex matching and a dictionary, and supports automatic time localization and human-machine translation of project descriptions.
en.content: The repo contains the userscript (JavaScript), dictionary files (locals.js), and a VS Code extension. After installation via a script manager like Tampermonkey, it works immediately.
en.stack: Pure JavaScript, requires a userscript manager like Tampermonkey or Violentmonkey.
en.hot: With 29K stars, it remains popular among Chinese developers. Gaining 86 stars today and ranking 10th on the JavaScript daily trending list shows sustained user interest.
uses: Chinese developers — want to localize GitHub UI for easier use
Non-native English speakers — need a Chinese-friendly interface on GitHub
Open source contributors — recommend to teams or communities for better collaboration

zh.tag: Node.js 最流行的极简 Web 框架
zh.what: Express 是一个快速、极简且灵活的 Node.js Web 框架，提供强大的路由、中间件支持和 HTTP 辅助功能。它被广泛用于构建 Web 应用和 API，是 Node.js 生态中最流行的框架之一。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Express 核心源码、文档、测试用例和示例代码。主要模块包括路由系统、中间件处理、请求/响应对象扩展以及视图引擎支持。
zh.stack: 基于 Node.js，使用 JavaScript 编写，依赖 npm 包管理。主要依赖包括 body-parser、qs、accepts 等中间件。
zh.hot: Express 是 Node.js 生态的基石，拥有 69k+ 星标，长期占据 GitHub 热门榜。虽然今日新增仅 7 星，但作为经典项目，其稳定性和广泛使用使其持续受到关注。
uses: Web 开发者 —— 快速构建 RESTful API 或全栈 Web 应用
初学者 —— 学习 Node.js 后端开发的首选框架
企业团队 —— 用于生产环境的高性能 Web 服务

en.tag: Fast, unopinionated, minimalist web framework for Node.js
en.what: Express is a fast, unopinionated, minimalist web framework for Node.js, offering robust routing, middleware support, and HTTP helpers. It is widely used to build web applications and APIs, and is one of the most popular frameworks in the Node.js ecosystem.
en.content: The repository contains the core source code, documentation, test cases, and example code for Express. Key modules include the routing system, middleware handling, request/response object extensions, and view engine support.
en.stack: Built on Node.js, written in JavaScript, managed via npm. Key dependencies include body-parser, qs, accepts, and other middleware.
en.hot: Express is a cornerstone of the Node.js ecosystem with 69k+ stars, consistently appearing on GitHub trending. Despite only 7 new stars today, its stability and widespread use keep it relevant.
uses: Web developers — quickly build RESTful APIs or full-stack web apps
Beginners — go-to framework for learning Node.js backend development
Enterprise teams — high-performance web services in production

zh.tag: WordPress 区块编辑器，重塑内容发布体验
zh.what: Gutenberg 是 WordPress 的区块编辑器项目，旨在彻底改变内容创建和发布方式。它将页面和文章中的每个内容元素（段落、图片、标题等）视为独立的“块”，用户可以通过拖拽和排列这些块来构建丰富的媒体页面。该项目目前处于四阶段计划的第二阶段，专注于编辑体验，并计划未来覆盖定制化、协作和多语言功能。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Gutenberg 编辑器的完整源代码、插件、文档和测试套件。使用 Lerna 管理多包结构，包含核心编辑器、块库、设计工具和协作功能等模块。
zh.stack: 主要使用 JavaScript（React）开发，依赖 Node.js、npm、Lerna 进行包管理，使用 Storybook 进行组件开发，并集成多种 CI/CD 测试流程。
zh.hot: 作为 WordPress 的核心编辑器，Gutenberg 拥有超过 11,700 颗星，是内容管理系统领域的重要项目。其持续的更新和未来协作功能的规划吸引了大量开发者关注。
uses: WordPress 网站管理员和内容创作者 —— 使用区块编辑器创建和编辑页面/文章
WordPress 主题和插件开发者 —— 扩展和自定义区块功能
希望了解现代编辑器架构的前端开发者 —— 学习 React 和模块化设计

en.tag: The block editor for WordPress, revolutionizing site building and publishing
en.what: Gutenberg is the block editor project for WordPress, aiming to revolutionize content creation and publishing. It treats each content element (paragraph, image, headline, etc.) as an independent 'block' that users can add, arrange, and rearrange to build media-rich pages visually. The project is in the second phase of a four-phase plan, focusing on editing, with future phases covering customization, collaboration, and multilingual support.
en.content: The repository contains the full source code, plugin, documentation, and test suite for the Gutenberg editor. It uses Lerna to manage a monorepo structure with packages for the core editor, block library, design tools, and collaboration features.
en.stack: Primarily built with JavaScript (React), relying on Node.js, npm, and Lerna for package management, using Storybook for component development, and integrating multiple CI/CD testing workflows.
en.hot: As the core editor for WordPress, Gutenberg has over 11,700 stars, making it a pivotal project in the CMS space. Its continuous updates and planned collaboration features draw significant developer attention.
uses: WordPress site administrators and content creators — use the block editor to build and edit pages/posts
WordPress theme and plugin developers — extend and customize block functionality
Frontend developers interested in modern editor architecture — learn React and modular design

zh.tag: 开源无代码游戏引擎，支持2D/3D/多人游戏
zh.what: GDevelop 是一款功能完备、开源、无代码的游戏开发软件，支持构建 2D、3D 和多人游戏，可发布到移动端、桌面和网页。它采用基于事件的直观系统和模块化行为，并集成 AI 辅助创作。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的游戏引擎和编辑器源码，以及扩展系统、示例游戏和文档。提供跨平台桌面应用和在线版本。
zh.stack: 主语言 JavaScript，使用 Electron 构建桌面应用，支持 WebGL 渲染，集成 AI 模型辅助开发。
zh.hot: 无代码游戏开发降低了创作门槛，近期新增 AI 辅助功能，吸引大量独立开发者，Star 数已超 2.5 万。
uses: 游戏爱好者 —— 无需编程即可快速制作 2D/3D 游戏
教育工作者 —— 用于教授游戏设计逻辑和创意编程
独立开发者 —— 快速原型验证和发布跨平台游戏
AI 探索者 —— 体验 AI 辅助游戏创作流程

en.tag: Open-source, no-code game engine for 2D/3D/multiplayer games
en.what: GDevelop is a full-featured, open-source, no-code game development software for building 2D, 3D, and multiplayer games targeting mobile, desktop, and web. It uses an intuitive event-based system and modular behaviors, with AI assistance.
en.content: The repo contains the full game engine and editor source code, along with an extension system, example games, and documentation. It offers cross-platform desktop apps and an online version.
en.stack: Primarily JavaScript, with Electron for desktop apps, WebGL rendering, and integrated AI models for assistance.
en.hot: No-code game development lowers the barrier, and recent AI features attract indie developers, with over 25K stars.
uses: Game enthusiasts — create 2D/3D games quickly without coding
Educators — teach game design logic and creative programming
Indie developers — rapid prototyping and cross-platform publishing
AI explorers — experience AI-assisted game creation

zh.tag: AI 金融分析技能集合，遵循 Agent Skills 开放标准
zh.what: 这是一个为 AI 代理（如 Claude Code）提供金融分析和交易技能的集合。它包含市场分析、数据提供、社交阅读、初创工具等多个插件，每个插件下又有具体的技能，如公司估值、财报预览、期权分析等。

zh.stack: 基于 JavaScript，依赖 yfinance 等金融数据源，遵循 Agent Skills 开放标准。
zh.hot: 今日新增 11 星，总星数 3060，位列 JavaScript 日榜第 14。它填补了 AI 代理在金融分析领域的技能空白，且由 Funda AI 赞助，具备专业背景。
uses: AI 代理开发者 —— 快速为 Claude Code 等代理添加金融分析能力
金融分析师 —— 利用 AI 代理自动化估值、财报分析等任务
量化交易者 —— 集成期权分析、ETF 溢价等技能到交易流程中

en.tag: A collection of agent skills for AI financial analysis, following the Agent Skills open standard
en.what: This is a collection of agent skills for financial analysis and trading, designed for AI agents like Claude Code. It includes plugins for market analysis, data providers, social readers, startup tools, and more, each containing specific skills such as company valuation, earnings preview, and options analysis.
en.content: The repository contains multiple plugins (e.g., finance-market-analysis) and corresponding skills (e.g., company-valuation, earnings-preview), each with its own directory and documentation. Users can quickly install them into Claude Code or other agents via npx commands.

en.hot: Gained 11 stars today, total 3060, ranked #14 on JavaScript daily trending. It fills the gap of financial analysis skills for AI agents and is sponsored by Funda AI, adding professional credibility.
uses: AI agent developers — quickly add financial analysis capabilities to agents like Claude Code
Financial analysts — automate valuation, earnings analysis, and more with AI agents
Quantitative traders — integrate options analysis, ETF premium, and other skills into trading workflows

zh.tag: 批量注册ChatGPT/OpenAI账号的Chrome侧边栏扩展
zh.what: FlowPilot 是一个 Chrome 侧边栏扩展，用于批量处理 ChatGPT / OpenAI 账号的注册、授权、Plus 支付和平台接入流程。它支持多种来源（CPA、SUB2API、Codex2API、Kiro、Grok）和邮箱验证码方式，提供自动执行、重试和记录管理功能。

zh.stack: 基于 JavaScript 开发，依赖 Chrome 扩展 API，支持多种邮箱服务（Hotmail、QQ Mail、iCloud 等）和接码平台。
zh.hot: 解决批量注册 OpenAI 账号的刚需，功能全面且自动化程度高，获得 5038 星，位列 JavaScript 日榜第 15 名。
uses: 需要批量注册 ChatGPT/OpenAI 账号的运营人员或开发者
使用 CPA、SUB2API 等平台接入 OpenAI 服务的用户
需要自动化处理验证码、OAuth 和 Plus 支付流程的团队

en.tag: Chrome sidebar extension for batch registering ChatGPT/OpenAI accounts
en.what: FlowPilot is a Chrome sidebar extension for batch processing ChatGPT/OpenAI account registration, authorization, Plus payment, and platform integration. It supports multiple sources (CPA, SUB2API, Codex2API, Kiro, Grok) and email verification methods, with auto-execution, retry, and record management.

en.stack: Built with JavaScript, leveraging Chrome Extension APIs, supporting various email services (Hotmail, QQ Mail, iCloud, etc.) and SMS verification platforms.
en.hot: Addresses the strong demand for batch OpenAI account registration with comprehensive features and high automation, earning 5038 stars and ranking #15 on JavaScript daily trending.

Users integrating OpenAI via platforms like CPA or SUB2API
Teams automating captcha, OAuth, and Plus payment workflows

zh.tag: 一键检测硬件，推荐可运行的LLM模型
zh.what: llmfit 是一个终端工具，能自动检测你的硬件（RAM、CPU、GPU），从数百个模型和提供商中筛选出最适合你设备的模型。它通过质量、速度、适配度和上下文等维度打分，并支持交互式 TUI 和传统 CLI 两种模式。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Rust 编写的核心引擎、TUI 界面、CLI 接口，以及基准测试和共享功能。支持多 GPU、MoE 架构、动态量化选择、速度估算，并集成 Ollama、llama.cpp、MLX 等本地运行时。
zh.stack: 使用 Rust 开发，依赖终端 UI 库（如 ratatui）和 LLM 运行时（Ollama、llama.cpp、MLX、Docker Model Runner、LM Studio）。
zh.hot: 近 3 万星标，今日新增 247，因其解决了 LLM 本地部署的硬件适配痛点，一键推荐可运行模型，大幅降低试错成本。
uses: AI 开发者：快速找到适合本地硬件的 LLM 模型，避免下载后无法运行
硬件评测者：使用内置基准测试测量真实 tok/s，并贡献结果到社区
普通用户：通过 TUI 轻松浏览和选择模型，无需手动配置

en.tag: One command to find which LLM models run on your hardware
en.what: llmfit is a terminal tool that automatically detects your hardware (RAM, CPU, GPU) and scores hundreds of models from various providers to find the best fit for your machine. It evaluates models across quality, speed, fit, and context dimensions, offering both an interactive TUI and a classic CLI mode.
en.content: The repo contains a Rust core engine, TUI interface, CLI interface, and benchmarking & sharing features. It supports multi-GPU, MoE architectures, dynamic quantization selection, speed estimation, and integrates local runtimes like Ollama, llama.cpp, MLX, etc.
en.stack: Built with Rust, leveraging terminal UI libraries (e.g., ratatui) and LLM runtimes (Ollama, llama.cpp, MLX, Docker Model Runner, LM Studio).
en.hot: With nearly 30k stars and 247 new today, llmfit solves the pain point of hardware compatibility for local LLM deployment, recommending runnable models with one command and significantly reducing trial-and-error costs.
uses: AI developers: quickly find LLM models compatible with local hardware, avoiding download failures
Hardware reviewers: use built-in benchmarks to measure real tok/s and contribute results to the community
General users: easily browse and select models via TUI without manual configuration

zh.tag: Rust 编写的下一代 Coding Agent Harness，极致性能与多会话支持
zh.what: jcode 是一款基于 Rust 的下一代 Coding Agent Harness，旨在提升 AI 编程助手的技能上限。它专为多会话工作流、无限可定制性与极致性能而设计，能够在本地以极低资源消耗运行复杂编程任务。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Rust 核心运行时、跨平台 CLI 安装脚本（Linux/macOS/Windows），以及展示内存与启动速度优势的基准测试数据。
zh.stack: 以 Rust 为主语言，强调零成本抽象与资源效率；支持可选本地嵌入模型，通过 Bash/PowerShell 脚本实现一键跨平台安装。
zh.hot: 在 AI 编程工具同质化严重的背景下，jcode 凭借 8421 Star 和 Rust 日榜第 11 名的热度，以单会话 27.8 MB 的超低内存占用和多会话架构，精准击中开发者对高性能本地 Agent 的需求。
uses: 追求本地低内存、高性能 AI 编程体验的核心开发者
需要长期运行多会话复杂工作流的高级用户
希望深度定制 Coding Agent 行为与工具链的极客与团队

en.tag: Next-gen coding agent harness in Rust for multi-session, low-RAM workflows
en.what: jcode is a next-generation coding agent harness built in Rust to raise the skill ceiling of AI coding assistants. It is designed for multi-session workflows, infinite customizability, and extreme performance, allowing complex coding tasks to run locally with minimal resource usage.
en.content: The repo includes a Rust core runtime, cross-platform CLI installers for Linux/macOS/Windows, and benchmark data highlighting its memory and boot-up speed advantages.
en.stack: Primarily Rust with zero-cost abstraction and resource efficiency in mind; supports optional local embeddings and one-click cross-platform installation via Bash/PowerShell scripts.
en.hot: With 8,421 stars and a spot at #11 on GitHub's Rust daily trending list, jcode stands out in the crowded AI coding space by delivering an ultra-low 27.8 MB RAM footprint per session and a multi-session architecture that meets developers' demand for high-performance local agents.
uses: Core developers seeking local, low-memory, high-performance AI coding experiences
Power users running long-term, complex multi-session workflows
Hackers and teams wanting infinite customizability of their coding agent behavior and toolchain

zh.tag: Rust 全栈跨平台 UI 框架，一套代码覆盖 Web、桌面与移动端
zh.what: Dioxus 是一个基于 Rust 的全栈应用框架，开发者只需维护一套代码库即可构建 Web、桌面和移动应用。它提供了类似 React 的组件化开发体验，并内置基于 Signals 的状态管理、热重载与零配置启动能力。通过 Server Functions 还能直接在同一代码库中编写后端逻辑，实现真正的全栈开发。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心 UI 库、跨平台渲染器（Web/桌面/移动端）、CLI 打包工具以及 Server Functions 全栈运行时。此外还提供了丰富的官方示例、文档站点和多语言 README，方便开发者快速上手。
zh.stack: 完全基于 Rust 生态，核心使用自研的 Virtual DOM 与 Signals 响应式系统，编译目标涵盖 WebAssembly、桌面端（基于 Winit/Tao）及移动端原生渲染。
zh.hot: 凭借 36.8K Star 的热度和本周 Rust 趋势榜第 18 名的成绩，Dioxus 吸引了大量希望用 Rust 替代 JavaScript 技术栈的开发者。其“一套代码、多端运行”的全栈能力，加上对热重载和零配置体验的重视，精准击中了 Rust 社区对高性能跨平台 UI 方案的强烈需求。
uses: Rust 开发者 —— 希望用单一代码库同时覆盖前端页面与桌面/移动原生应用的项目。
全栈工程师 —— 想在前端组件中直接调用 Server Functions，减少前后端语言切换成本的团队。
跨平台应用团队 —— 需要高性能、内存安全且拒绝 Electron 厚重方案的产品组。

en.tag: Rust fullstack cross-platform UI framework for web, desktop, and mobile
en.what: Dioxus is a Rust-based fullstack framework that lets developers build for the web, desktop, and mobile from a single codebase. It offers a React-like component model with zero-config setup, integrated hot-reloading, and signals-based state management. Server Functions enable backend logic to live alongside the UI, streamlining fullstack development in Rust.
en.content: The repo contains the core UI library, cross-platform renderers for web, desktop, and mobile, a CLI bundler, and a fullstack runtime for Server Functions. It also ships with extensive examples, documentation, and multilingual READMEs.
en.stack: Built entirely on Rust, featuring a custom Virtual DOM and signals-based reactivity, compiling to WebAssembly, desktop (via Winit/Tao), and mobile native targets.
en.hot: With 36.8K stars and ranking 18th on this week's GitHub Rust Trending, Dioxus is drawing developers eager to replace JavaScript stacks with Rust. Its promise of a single codebase spanning web, desktop, and mobile—backed by hot-reload and zero-config DX—directly addresses the Rust community's demand for high-performance cross-platform UI solutions.
uses: Rust developers —— teams wanting a single codebase for web, desktop, and mobile apps without sacrificing performance.
Fullstack engineers —— those looking to colocate Server Functions with UI components to cut language-switching overhead.
Cross-platform product teams —— groups that need memory-safe, high-performance alternatives to heavy Electron-style solutions.

zh.tag: 一站式媒体下载与学习管理桌面应用
zh.what: OmniGet 是一款开源桌面应用，支持从 1800+ 网站下载视频、音频、课程和电子书，并内置 PDF/EPUB 阅读器、专注模式、带时间戳的笔记和间隔重复功能。无需命令行，无需 Python，开箱即用。

uses: 在线课程学习者 —— 一键下载 Udemy、YouTube 等平台的课程视频和资料
媒体收藏爱好者 —— 从 1800+ 站点下载视频、音乐和电子书
高效学习者 —— 利用内置阅读器、笔记和间隔重复功能进行主动学习

en.tag: All-in-one desktop app for downloading, organizing and studying media
en.what: OmniGet is an open-source desktop app that downloads videos, audio, courses, and ebooks from 1,800+ sites, with built-in PDF/EPUB reader, focus mode, timestamped notes, and spaced repetition. No command line, no Python, just download and run.
en.content: The repo contains the full desktop app source code built with Tauri + Rust + Svelte, featuring media downloading, playback, reading, note-taking, and a plugin system.
en.stack: Tech stack: Tauri (desktop framework), Rust (backend), Svelte (frontend), yt-dlp (media downloading), SQLite (local storage).
en.hot: Gained 357 stars today, total 7277, ranked #10 in Rust daily trending. Its 'all-in-one download + study' positioning solves the pain of switching between platforms, and it's completely free and open-source.
uses: Online course learners — one-click download courses from Udemy, YouTube, and more
Media collectors — download videos, music, and ebooks from 1,800+ sites
Active learners — use built-in reader, notes, and spaced repetition for effective study

zh.tag: 20MB 轻量跨平台数据库客户端，支持 60+ 数据库与 AI 助手
zh.what: DBX 是一款极致轻量的跨平台数据库管理工具，仅 20MB 体积却支持 60 余种数据库。它提供桌面端与 Docker 自托管部署，并内置 AI 助手辅助查询与运维。
zh.content: 基于 Rust 构建的桌面端应用源码，包含多数据库驱动适配层、内置 AI 助手模块及 Docker 部署配置。
zh.stack: 以 Rust 为主语言构建，采用跨平台桌面框架，集成多种数据库原生驱动与 AI 接口。
zh.hot: 凭借 20MB 极简体积覆盖 60+ 数据库，月度激增 4470 Star 登榜 Rust 区第 4；内置 AI 助手与多平台支持直击开发者“轻便全能”的痛点。
uses: 多数据库运维开发者 —— 一键管理 MySQL、PG、Redis、MongoDB 等异构数据库
追求轻量工具的独立开发者 —— 20MB 体积替代臃肿的客户端套件
需要本地/内网自托管的团队 —— Docker 部署满足隐私与统一访问需求
借助 AI 提升查询效率的 DBA —— 内置 AI 助手辅助 SQL 编写与优化

en.tag: 20MB lightweight cross-platform DB client with AI assistant for 60+ databases
en.what: DBX is an ultra-lightweight, cross-platform database client packing support for 60+ databases into a 20MB footprint. It offers desktop and Docker self-hosting options and includes a built-in AI assistant to help with querying and management.
en.content: Rust-based desktop application source with multi-database driver adapters, an integrated AI assistant module, and Docker deployment configurations.
en.stack: Built primarily in Rust using a cross-platform desktop framework, integrating native drivers for 60+ databases and AI APIs.
en.hot: Its 20MB footprint covering 60+ databases, combined with a built-in AI assistant and multi-platform support, resonates with developers' need for lightweight versatility—driving 4,470 new stars this month and a #4 spot on the Rust trending chart.
uses: Multi-database developers — manage heterogeneous DBs like MySQL, PG, Redis, and MongoDB from one tool
Developers favoring lightweight tools — replace bloated client suites with a 20MB alternative
Teams requiring local/self-hosted access — Docker deployment satisfies privacy and unified access needs
DBAs leveraging AI — built-in assistant helps write and optimize SQL queries faster

zh.tag: 用 Rust 重写的 JS/TS 高性能工具集
zh.what: Oxc 是一个用 Rust 编写的 JavaScript 和 TypeScript 工具集合，包括解析器、linter、格式化器、转译器和压缩器。它旨在为 JS/TS 生态提供统一的高性能工具链，并已用于 Rolldown、Nuxt 等知名项目。
zh.content: 仓库包含多个核心组件：oxlint（linter）、oxfmt（格式化器）、解析器、转译器、压缩器和模块解析器。每个组件均可独立使用，也可集成到构建工具中。
zh.stack: 使用 Rust 开发，依赖 Rust 标准库和少量第三方 crate。提供 npm 包（如 oxlint）以便在 Node.js 环境中直接使用。
zh.hot: Oxc 凭借 Rust 带来的极致性能，在 JS 工具链领域迅速崛起，已获 22073 星。其 lint 工具 oxlint 因速度远超 ESLint 而备受关注，且被 Preact、Shopify 等大厂采用。
uses: 前端开发者 —— 使用 oxlint 进行极速代码检查，替代 ESLint
构建工具作者 —— 集成 Oxc 的解析器或转译器，提升构建性能
性能敏感项目 —— 使用 oxfmt 或压缩器优化代码格式化与打包

en.tag: A collection of high-performance JavaScript/TypeScript tools written in Rust
en.what: Oxc is a collection of JavaScript and TypeScript tools written in Rust, including a parser, linter, formatter, transformer, and minifier. It aims to provide a unified, high-performance toolchain for the JS/TS ecosystem and is already used by projects like Rolldown and Nuxt.
en.content: The repository contains several core components: oxlint (linter), oxfmt (formatter), parser, transformer, minifier, and module resolver. Each component can be used independently or integrated into build tools.
en.stack: Developed in Rust, relying on the Rust standard library and a few third-party crates. Provides npm packages (e.g., oxlint) for direct use in Node.js environments.
en.hot: Oxc has rapidly gained traction in the JS toolchain space due to its Rust-powered extreme performance, earning 22,073 stars. Its linter, oxlint, is notably faster than ESLint and has been adopted by major companies like Preact, Shopify, and ByteDance.
uses: Frontend developers — use oxlint for lightning-fast linting as a replacement for ESLint
Build tool authors — integrate Oxc's parser or transformer to improve build performance
Performance-sensitive projects — use oxfmt or the minifier to optimize code formatting and bundling

zh.tag: QUIC 传输协议与 HTTP/3 的 Rust 实现
zh.what: quiche 是 Cloudflare 开发的 QUIC 协议与 HTTP/3 实现，提供底层 API 处理 QUIC 数据包和连接状态。应用层负责 I/O 和事件循环，适合集成到网络栈中。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Rust 核心库、命令行工具（quiche-client/quiche-server）以及示例应用。提供完整的 QUIC 和 HTTP/3 协议支持，包括 TLS 1.3 加密、流控制、拥塞控制等。
zh.stack: 使用 Rust 语言开发，依赖 BoringSSL（OpenSSL 分支）进行加密，支持异步 I/O 集成。
zh.hot: QUIC/HTTP/3 是下一代网络协议，Cloudflare 背书且被 Android、curl 等广泛采用，11.7k Stars 反映其基础设施级重要性。
uses: 网络基础设施开发者 —— 集成 QUIC/HTTP/3 到 CDN、代理或自定义协议栈
应用层协议研究者 —— 测试 QUIC 特性或构建实验性传输层
curl 等工具用户 —— 通过 quiche 后端获得 HTTP/3 支持

en.tag: Rust implementation of QUIC transport protocol and HTTP/3
en.what: quiche is Cloudflare's implementation of the QUIC transport protocol and HTTP/3, providing low-level APIs for processing QUIC packets and managing connection state. The application handles I/O and event loops, making it suitable for integration into network stacks.
en.content: The repository includes the core Rust library, command-line tools (quiche-client/quiche-server), and example apps. It provides full QUIC and HTTP/3 protocol support, including TLS 1.3 encryption, flow control, and congestion control.
en.stack: Built with Rust, depends on BoringSSL (OpenSSL fork) for cryptography, and supports async I/O integration.
en.hot: QUIC/HTTP/3 is the next-gen network protocol, backed by Cloudflare and adopted by Android, curl, etc. Its 11.7k stars reflect its infrastructure-level importance.
uses: Network infrastructure developers — integrate QUIC/HTTP/3 into CDNs, proxies, or custom stacks
Protocol researchers — test QUIC features or build experimental transport layers
Users of tools like curl — gain HTTP/3 support via quiche backend

zh.tag: Rust 编写的高性能 CLI 代理，减少 LLM 调用 60-90% token 消耗
zh.what: RTK 是一个 CLI 代理，在将命令输出传递给 LLM 上下文之前进行过滤和压缩，从而大幅降低 token 消耗。它支持 100+ 常用命令，如 ls、cat、git、cargo test 等，平均节省 80% 的 token，且额外延迟小于 10ms。
zh.content: 仓库包含一个用 Rust 编写的单一二进制文件，零外部依赖。提供安装脚本、Homebrew 公式、Cargo 安装方式以及预构建二进制文件。
zh.stack: 纯 Rust 实现，无外部依赖。支持 Homebrew、Cargo 和 curl 安装。
zh.hot: RTK 通过大幅降低 LLM 调用成本（节省 60-90% token）吸引了大量关注，72k+ stars 表明开发者对优化 AI 使用成本的强烈需求。
uses: 使用 Claude Code、Cursor 等 AI 编程助手的开发者，减少 token 消耗
频繁在终端执行命令并与 LLM 交互的工程师
希望降低 AI API 调用成本的企业团队

en.tag: High-performance CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands
en.what: RTK is a CLI proxy that filters and compresses command outputs before they reach your LLM context, significantly reducing token consumption. It supports 100+ common commands like ls, cat, git, cargo test, etc., achieving average token savings of 80% with less than 10ms overhead.
en.content: The repository contains a single Rust binary with zero external dependencies. It provides installation scripts, Homebrew formula, Cargo installation, and pre-built binaries.
en.stack: Pure Rust implementation with zero dependencies. Supports installation via Homebrew, Cargo, and curl.
en.hot: RTK has gained massive attention by drastically reducing LLM token costs (60-90% savings). With 72k+ stars, it reflects developers' strong demand for optimizing AI usage costs.
uses: Developers using AI coding assistants like Claude Code, Cursor to reduce token consumption
Engineers who frequently run terminal commands and interact with LLMs
Enterprise teams looking to lower AI API call costs

zh.tag: 融合 traceroute 与 ping 的网络诊断工具
zh.what: Trippy 是一个网络诊断工具，融合了 traceroute 和 ping 的功能，帮助分析网络问题。它提供丰富的可视化界面，支持多协议（IPv4/IPv6、TCP、UDP、ICMP）和多种输出格式。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Rust 源码、文档、GitHub Actions CI 配置以及多平台安装包（cargo、apt、snap、homebrew、winget 等）。
zh.stack: 使用 Rust 语言开发，依赖 tokio 异步运行时、clap 命令行解析、crossterm 终端交互等库。
zh.hot: Trippy 凭借强大的 traceroute+ping 融合功能以及美观的 TUI 界面，在 Rust 社区和网络工程师中广受欢迎，今日新增 56 星，总星数 7334。
