uses: 网络工程师 —— 快速诊断路由路径和延迟问题
系统管理员 —— 监控网络连通性和性能
开发者 —— 调试网络应用或学习 Rust 网络编程

en.tag: A network diagnostic tool combining traceroute and ping
en.what: Trippy is a network diagnostic tool that combines traceroute and ping functionalities to assist with analyzing networking issues. It offers a rich TUI interface, supports multiple protocols (IPv4/IPv6, TCP, UDP, ICMP) and various output formats.
en.content: The repository contains Rust source code, documentation, GitHub Actions CI configuration, and multi-platform installation packages (cargo, apt, snap, homebrew, winget, etc.).
en.stack: Developed in Rust, relying on tokio async runtime, clap for CLI parsing, crossterm for terminal interaction, etc.
en.hot: Trippy is popular among the Rust community and network engineers for its powerful traceroute+ping fusion and beautiful TUI interface, gaining 56 stars today with a total of 7334 stars.
uses: Network engineers — quickly diagnose routing paths and latency issues
System administrators — monitor network connectivity and performance
Developers — debug network applications or learn Rust network programming

zh.tag: 追踪 AI 生成代码的 Git 扩展
zh.what: Git AI 是一个开源的 Git 扩展，能够自动追踪仓库中由 AI 生成的每一行代码，并将其与生成该代码的代理、模型和提示词关联起来。它无需改变现有工作流，只需正常提交即可记录 AI 代码比例与来源。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Git AI 扩展的 Rust 源码、安装脚本（支持 Mac/Linux/Windows WSL）、以及 Git AI 标准规范文档。核心功能包括 `git ai blame` 显示每行代码的 AI 归属，以及提交时展示 AI 代码占比。
zh.stack: 使用 Rust 开发，依赖 Git 命令行接口，支持多种 AI 代理（如 Claude Code、Cursor、Copilot 等）的集成。
zh.hot: 随着 AI 辅助编程普及，开发者急需区分人类与 AI 代码，Git AI 填补了这一空白。上线后迅速获得 2348 星，今日新增 11 星，位列 Rust 日榜第 14 名。
uses: 开发者 —— 追踪项目中 AI 代码的比例与来源，便于审计与合规
团队管理者 —— 评估 AI 工具对代码库的实际贡献，优化开发流程
开源项目维护者 —— 确保贡献者明确标注 AI 生成代码，维护代码透明度

en.tag: A Git extension to track AI-generated code in your repos
en.what: Git AI is an open-source Git extension that automatically tracks every line of AI-generated code in your repositories, linking it to the agent, model, and prompts that produced it. It requires no workflow changes—just commit normally to record AI code ratios and origins.
en.content: The repo contains the Rust source code of the Git AI extension, installation scripts (for Mac/Linux/Windows WSL), and the Git AI standard specification. Key features include `git ai blame` to show AI attribution per line, and commit-time display of AI code percentage.
en.stack: Built with Rust, depends on the Git CLI, and integrates with multiple AI agents (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot).
en.hot: As AI-assisted coding becomes widespread, developers urgently need to distinguish human-written from AI-generated code. Git AI fills this gap, quickly gaining 2,348 stars (11 today) and ranking #14 on the Rust daily trending list.
uses: Developers — track the proportion and origin of AI code in projects for audit and compliance
Team leads — evaluate the actual contribution of AI tools to the codebase and optimize workflows
Open-source maintainers — ensure contributors clearly mark AI-generated code for transparency

zh.tag: 为底层系统代码提供形式化验证的 Rust 工具
zh.what: Verus 是一个用于验证 Rust 代码正确性的工具。开发者编写代码应满足的规范，Verus 通过静态检查确保所有可能的执行都符合规范。它利用强大的求解器来证明代码的正确性，而不是添加运行时检查。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Verus 编译器、验证引擎、标准库（vstd）以及文档和示例。支持 VS Code 集成和在线 Playground。
zh.stack: 基于 Rust，使用 SMT 求解器（如 Z3）进行形式化验证。依赖 Rust 编译器基础设施。
zh.hot: 随着对系统安全性和正确性的需求增长，Verus 作为 Rust 生态中少数支持低级代码形式化验证的工具，吸引了 2754 星，日增 7 星，位列 Rust 日榜第 15。
uses: 系统程序员 —— 验证操作系统内核、驱动等底层代码的正确性
安全关键领域开发者 —— 确保嵌入式、航空航天等代码无缺陷
形式化方法研究者 —— 探索 Rust 验证技术

en.tag: A tool for verifying correctness of low-level Rust code
en.what: Verus is a tool for verifying the correctness of Rust code. Developers write specifications, and Verus statically checks that all possible executions satisfy them, using solvers to prove correctness without runtime checks.
en.content: The repo contains the Verus compiler, verification engine, standard library (vstd), documentation, and examples. It supports VS Code integration and an online Playground.
en.stack: Built on Rust, uses SMT solvers (e.g., Z3) for formal verification. Relies on Rust compiler infrastructure.
en.hot: With growing demand for system safety and correctness, Verus stands out as one of the few tools for formal verification of low-level Rust code, earning 2754 stars (+7 today) and ranking #15 on Rust daily trending.
uses: Systems programmers — verify correctness of OS kernels, drivers, and other low-level code
Safety-critical developers — ensure bug-free code in embedded, aerospace, etc.
Formal methods researchers — explore verification techniques for Rust

zh.tag: 跨平台安全文件传输工具，支持端到端加密与断点续传
zh.what: croc 是一款命令行工具，可在任意两台计算机之间简单、安全地传输文件与文件夹。它基于 PAKE 协议实现端到端加密，无需配置本地服务器或端口转发，通过中继即可完成跨平台传输。支持断点续传、多文件传输、IPv6-first 及代理（如 Tor）等功能。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 Go 源码、CLI 主程序、中继服务器实现，以及多平台安装脚本和 CI 配置。README 提供了详细的安装指南（涵盖 Homebrew、Scoop、Nix 等主流包管理器）和动态演示 GIF。
zh.stack: 基于 Go 语言开发，使用 PAKE 算法实现密钥交换，通过自定义中继协议传输数据，支持 IPv6/IPv4 双栈及 SOCKS5 代理（如 Tor）。
zh.hot: 凭借「开箱即用、安全无痛」的跨设备传输体验，croc 在开发者社区积累了 35.6K Star，本周再增 167 星并冲入 GitHub Go 周榜第 20 名。它填补了传统 scp/rsync 配置繁琐与即时传输工具缺乏加密之间的空白。
uses: 开发运维人员 —— 在不同服务器或本地与远程之间快速安全地传输配置文件与日志
跨平台协作团队 —— 在 Windows、macOS、Linux 同事之间即开即用地分享大文件或项目目录
隐私敏感用户 —— 借助端到端加密和 Tor 代理，在不信任网络中安全收发文件
命令行爱好者 —— 替代 scp/rsync，无需配置 SSH 或端口转发即可点对点传输

en.tag: Secure CLI tool for effortless cross-platform file transfers with encryption
en.what: croc is a CLI tool that lets any two computers simply and securely transfer files and folders. It uses PAKE for end-to-end encryption and works through a relay, eliminating the need for local servers or port forwarding. It supports resumable transfers, multiple files, IPv6-first with IPv4 fallback, and proxies like Tor.
en.content: The repository contains the full Go source code, CLI entry point, relay server implementation, and cross-platform install scripts with CI configs. The README includes detailed installation guides for Homebrew, Scoop, Nix, and more, plus a demo GIF.
en.stack: Written in Go, it uses PAKE for key exchange, a custom relay protocol for data transfer, and supports IPv6/IPv4 dual-stack with SOCKS5 proxy support (e.g., Tor).
en.hot: With an out-of-the-box, pain-free cross-device transfer experience, croc has earned 35.6K stars, gaining 167 this week and hitting #20 on GitHub's Go Trending chart. It fills the gap between tedious scp/rsync setup and instant tools that lack encryption.
uses: DevOps/Developers —— quickly and securely transfer configs and logs between servers or local and remote machines
Cross-platform teams —— instantly share large files or project folders across Windows, macOS, and Linux colleagues
Privacy-conscious users —— send files securely over untrusted networks using end-to-end encryption and Tor proxy support
CLI power users —— replace scp/rsync without needing SSH setup or port forwarding for ad-hoc transfers

zh.tag: AI API 订阅配额中转与拼车共享平台
zh.what: Sub2API 是一款开源中转服务，将 Claude、OpenAI、Gemini、Grok 等主流 AI 订阅统一接入单一平台。通过配额分发与拼车共享机制，帮助用户高效分摊订阅成本，并支持 Claude Code、Codex 等原生工具无缝调用。
zh.content: 仓库包含基于 Go 的 API 网关后端、Vue 3 前端管理界面，以及 Docker 部署配置。项目提供多语言文档、赞助商展示模块，并内置 PostgreSQL 与 Redis 的存储和缓存支持。
zh.stack: 后端基于 Go 1.25+ 构建，前端采用 Vue 3.4+，数据层依赖 PostgreSQL 15+ 与 Redis 7+，并通过 Docker 提供一键部署能力。
zh.hot: 凭借 32.7k Star 和本周新增 1416 Star 的增速，该项目精准切中 AI 开发者对多模型聚合与低成本共享订阅的刚需；其开源中转架构和「拼车」模式大幅降低了个人与团队使用顶级 AI 模型的门槛。
uses: 拥有多平台 AI 订阅但希望统一管理和分发配额的开发者或团队
希望以「拼车」方式分摊 Claude、OpenAI 等高昂订阅成本的个人用户
需要在 Claude Code、Codex 等原生工具中无缝切换多模型 API 的工程师

en.tag: AI API Gateway for Subscription Quota Sharing & Cost Splitting
en.what: Sub2API is an open-source relay gateway that unifies access to Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Grok and other AI subscriptions under one platform. It distributes subscription quotas and supports ride-sharing-style cost splitting to reduce individual expenses, while allowing native tools like Claude Code and Codex to work seamlessly.
en.content: The repository contains a Go-based backend API gateway, a Vue 3 frontend admin panel, and Docker deployment configurations. It ships with multi-language documentation, sponsor modules, and built-in PostgreSQL and Redis support for storage and caching.
en.stack: Backend is built with Go 1.25+, frontend uses Vue 3.4+, with PostgreSQL 15+ and Redis 7+ handling data and caching, and Docker providing one-click deployment.
en.hot: With 32.7k stars and 1,416 new stars this week, it hits a strong demand for multi-model aggregation and low-cost subscription sharing among AI developers; its open-source relay architecture and ride-sharing model significantly lower the barrier to using top-tier AI models.
uses: Developers or teams managing multiple AI subscriptions who need unified quota distribution
Individual users looking to split high subscription costs for Claude, OpenAI, and others via ride-sharing
Engineers who want seamless multi-model API switching within native tools like Claude Code and Codex

zh.tag: 全能开源安全扫描器，覆盖容器、K8s、代码、云
zh.what: Trivy 是一款多功能安全扫描工具，可检测容器镜像、文件系统、Git仓库、虚拟机镜像和Kubernetes中的漏洞、错误配置、密钥和SBOM。它支持多种编程语言、操作系统和平台，提供全面的安全覆盖。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Trivy 的 Go 源码、文档、安装脚本和集成示例（如 GitHub Actions、K8s operator、VS Code 插件）。提供 CLI 工具和 Docker 镜像，支持多种扫描目标和扫描器。
zh.stack: 使用 Go 语言开发，依赖常见包管理工具（如 Homebrew、Docker）和云原生生态（Kubernetes、GitHub Actions）。
zh.hot: 拥有 37K+ Star，今日新增 24，位列 Go 语言日榜第 4。因其全面的安全扫描能力和广泛的平台集成而备受欢迎。
uses: DevOps 工程师 —— 在 CI/CD 流水线中集成安全扫描
安全团队 —— 审计容器镜像和基础设施的合规性
开发者 —— 本地扫描代码仓库中的漏洞和密钥

en.tag: Comprehensive open-source security scanner for containers, K8s, code, and cloud
en.what: Trivy is a versatile security scanner that detects vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, and SBOM in container images, filesystems, Git repos, VM images, and Kubernetes. It supports most programming languages, OS, and platforms for comprehensive coverage.
en.content: The repo contains Trivy's Go source code, documentation, installation scripts, and integration examples (e.g., GitHub Actions, K8s operator, VS Code plugin). It provides a CLI tool and Docker image, supporting multiple scan targets and scanners.
en.stack: Developed in Go, relies on common package managers (e.g., Homebrew, Docker) and cloud-native ecosystem (Kubernetes, GitHub Actions).
en.hot: With 37K+ stars and 24 new today, ranking 4th on Go daily trending. Popular for its comprehensive security scanning and broad platform integrations.
uses: DevOps engineers — integrate security scanning into CI/CD pipelines
Security teams — audit container images and infrastructure compliance
Developers — scan local code repos for vulnerabilities and secrets

zh.tag: 最快企业级 AI 网关，性能是 LiteLLM 的 50 倍
zh.what: Bifrost 是一个高性能 AI 网关，通过统一的 OpenAI 兼容 API 接入 23+ 提供商（OpenAI、Anthropic、AWS Bedrock 等）。提供自动故障转移、负载均衡、语义缓存和企业级功能，部署仅需数秒且零配置。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Go 语言编写的网关核心、Web UI 管理界面、Docker 镜像、Helm Chart 以及 Go SDK。支持集群模式、自适应负载均衡、护栏和 MCP 网关等企业功能。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言开发，依赖 Docker 和 Kubernetes 部署，支持 OpenAI 兼容 API 协议。
zh.hot: 凭借声称比 LiteLLM 快 50 倍的性能、<100µs 开销和 5000 RPS 吞吐量，以及零配置快速部署，吸引了 6745 颗星，今日新增 37 星。
uses: 企业 AI 团队 —— 需要高性能、高可用 AI 网关来统一管理多个模型提供商
平台工程师 —— 部署私有 AI 基础设施，实现负载均衡、故障转移和监控
AI 应用开发者 —— 通过 OpenAI 兼容 API 快速集成多种模型，无需修改代码

en.tag: Fastest enterprise AI gateway, 50x faster than LiteLLM
en.what: Bifrost is a high-performance AI gateway that unifies access to 23+ providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, AWS Bedrock, etc.) through a single OpenAI-compatible API. It offers automatic failover, load balancing, semantic caching, and enterprise-grade features with zero-config deployment in seconds.
en.content: The repository contains the Go-based gateway core, a Web UI for management, Docker images, Helm Chart, and Go SDK. It supports cluster mode, adaptive load balancing, guardrails, and MCP gateway for enterprise deployments.
en.stack: Primarily developed in Go, deployed via Docker and Kubernetes, with OpenAI-compatible API protocol.
en.hot: With claimed 50x faster performance than LiteLLM, <100µs overhead and 5k RPS throughput, plus zero-config quick deployment, it has attracted 6745 stars with 37 new stars today.
uses: Enterprise AI teams — need high-performance, high-availability AI gateway to unify multiple model providers
Platform engineers — deploy private AI infrastructure with load balancing, failover, and monitoring
AI application developers — quickly integrate multiple models via OpenAI-compatible API without code changes

zh.tag: Go 编写的 WhatsApp 多设备 REST API，支持 UI、Webhook、MCP 和 Chatwoot
zh.what: 一个基于 Go 语言的高效 WhatsApp 多设备 REST API 服务，支持多账号管理、Webhook、MCP 协议和 Chatwoot 集成。提供 Web UI 和 Docker 部署，内存占用低，适合自建 WhatsApp 机器人或自动化系统。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 REST API 服务端、Web UI 界面（独立仓库）、MCP 服务器模式、n8n 节点包、Docker 镜像以及多设备管理功能。支持 ARM 和 AMD 架构。
zh.stack: Go 语言，依赖 WhatsApp Web 多设备协议库，支持 REST API、WebSocket、MCP 协议，可选集成 Chatwoot 和 n8n。
zh.hot: 今日新增 22 星，总星数 4320，位列 Go 语言日榜第 6。因其高效的 Go 实现、多设备支持、丰富的集成选项（Webhook、MCP、n8n、Chatwoot）而受到关注。
uses: 开发者 —— 自建 WhatsApp 机器人或自动化消息系统
企业 —— 集成 Chatwoot 实现客服消息管理
自动化爱好者 —— 通过 n8n 或 Webhook 连接 WhatsApp 到工作流
MCP 用户 —— 使用 MCP 协议与 AI 代理交互

en.tag: WhatsApp REST API with multi-device support, UI, Webhooks, MCP, and Chatwoot, built in Go
en.what: A high-performance WhatsApp multi-device REST API service built with Go, supporting multi-account management, Webhooks, MCP protocol, and Chatwoot integration. It offers a Web UI and Docker deployment with low memory footprint, ideal for building WhatsApp bots or automation systems.
en.content: The repository includes a complete REST API server, a separate Web UI, MCP server mode, n8n node package, Docker images, and multi-device management. Supports both ARM and AMD architectures.
en.stack: Built with Go, leveraging WhatsApp Web multi-device protocol library, supporting REST API, WebSocket, MCP protocol, with optional Chatwoot and n8n integration.
en.hot: Gained 22 stars today, total 4320, ranking #6 on Go daily trending. Popular due to its efficient Go implementation, multi-device support, and rich integration options (Webhook, MCP, n8n, Chatwoot).
uses: Developers — building custom WhatsApp bots or automated messaging systems
Enterprises — integrating with Chatwoot for customer support message management
Automation enthusiasts — connecting WhatsApp to workflows via n8n or Webhooks
MCP users — interacting with AI agents via the MCP protocol

zh.tag: 容器镜像与文件系统的 SBOM 生成工具
zh.what: Syft 是一个 CLI 工具和 Go 库，用于从容器镜像和文件系统生成软件物料清单（SBOM）。它支持多种包格式和输出标准，常与漏洞扫描器 Grype 配合使用。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Syft 的 Go 源代码、CLI 二进制构建脚本、文档和示例。核心功能包括 SBOM 生成、格式转换（CycloneDX、SPDX 等）以及签名认证。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言开发，依赖 OCI 镜像规范、多种包管理器解析库（如 apk、dpkg、rpm）以及 SBOM 标准格式库。
zh.hot: 随着软件供应链安全日益重要，SBOM 成为合规与漏洞管理的核心工具。Syft 凭借广泛的生态支持和与 Grype 的无缝集成，在 Go 社区中持续受到关注，今日新增 6 星，总星数 9284。
uses: DevOps/SRE 工程师 —— 在 CI/CD 中自动生成容器镜像的 SBOM
安全工程师 —— 结合 Grype 进行漏洞扫描与合规审计
开源维护者 —— 生成项目依赖清单，提升供应链透明度

en.tag: CLI & library to generate SBOM from container images and filesystems
en.what: Syft is a CLI tool and Go library that generates a Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) from container images and filesystems. It supports numerous package ecosystems and output formats, and integrates seamlessly with the Grype vulnerability scanner.
en.content: The repository contains Syft's Go source code, CLI binary build scripts, documentation, and examples. Core features include SBOM generation, format conversion (CycloneDX, SPDX, etc.), and signed attestations.
en.stack: Developed primarily in Go, leveraging OCI image specifications, package manager parsing libraries (e.g., apk, dpkg, rpm), and SBOM standard format libraries.
en.hot: With the growing importance of software supply chain security, SBOM has become a key tool for compliance and vulnerability management. Syft's broad ecosystem support and seamless integration with Grype keep it popular in the Go community, gaining 6 stars today for a total of 9284.
uses: DevOps/SRE engineers — automate SBOM generation for container images in CI/CD
Security engineers — combine with Grype for vulnerability scanning and compliance audits
Open source maintainers — generate dependency manifests to improve supply chain transparency

zh.tag: 面向 AI Agent 与后台任务的编排引擎
zh.what: Hatchet 是一个用于编排后台任务、AI 代理和持久化工作流的平台。它支持 Python、TypeScript、Go 和 Ruby 编写的应用，提供队列、自动重试、持久性、实时监控、告警和日志等完整功能。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Hatchet 的核心 Go 服务端、CLI 工具、多语言 SDK（Python/TypeScript/Go/Ruby）以及完整的自托管部署文档。
zh.stack: 主要语言为 Go，使用 Docker 进行本地部署，支持 Python、TypeScript、Go、Ruby 的 SDK。
zh.hot: 随着 AI Agent 和后台任务编排需求激增，Hatchet 提供了类似 Temporal 但更轻量、易用的开源替代方案，7.5k+ Stars 反映了开发者对可靠工作流引擎的强烈需求。
uses: AI Agent 开发者 —— 编排多步骤 Agent 工作流，确保可靠执行与重试
后端工程师 —— 管理后台异步任务、定时任务与持久化流程
平台团队 —— 自托管或使用云服务，为内部应用提供统一的任务编排层

en.tag: Orchestration engine for background tasks, AI agents, and durable workflows
en.what: Hatchet is a platform for orchestrating background tasks, AI agents, and durable workflows at scale. It supports applications written in Python, TypeScript, Go, and Ruby, offering queuing, automatic retries, durability, real-time monitoring, alerting, and logging.
en.content: The repo contains the core Go server, CLI tool, multi-language SDKs (Python/TypeScript/Go/Ruby), and comprehensive self-hosting documentation.
en.stack: Primarily written in Go, uses Docker for local deployment, with SDKs for Python, TypeScript, Go, and Ruby.
en.hot: With the surge in AI agent and background task orchestration needs, Hatchet offers a lighter, easier open-source alternative to Temporal, and its 7.5k+ stars reflect strong developer demand for reliable workflow engines.
uses: AI Agent developers — orchestrate multi-step agent workflows with reliable execution and retries
Backend engineers — manage async background tasks, scheduled jobs, and durable processes
Platform teams — self-host or use cloud service to provide a unified task orchestration layer for internal apps

zh.tag: 以太坊扩容的 OP Stack 核心实现
zh.what: Optimism 是一个致力于扩展以太坊技术的项目，通过 OP Stack 提供可扩展的区块链基础设施。该仓库包含 OP Stack 的核心组件，用于构建像 OP Mainnet 和 Base 这样的 Layer 2 区块链。
zh.content: 仓库包含 OP Stack 的核心代码，包括共识客户端、执行引擎、桥接合约等，以及开发与发布流程文档。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言开发，依赖以太坊相关库和协议，如 Geth、EVM 等。
zh.hot: Optimism 是领先的以太坊 Layer 2 解决方案，拥有 6454 颗星，因其对以太坊扩容的贡献和 OP Stack 的开源生态而备受关注。
uses: 区块链开发者 —— 构建或部署基于 OP Stack 的 Layer 2 网络
以太坊生态参与者 —— 了解 Layer 2 扩容技术原理
去中心化应用开发者 —— 在 OP Mainnet 上构建高性能 DApp

en.tag: Core implementation of the OP Stack for scaling Ethereum
en.what: Optimism is a project dedicated to scaling Ethereum's technology, providing scalable blockchain infrastructure via the OP Stack. This repository contains core components of the OP Stack used to build Layer 2 blockchains like OP Mainnet and Base.
en.content: The repository includes core OP Stack code such as consensus client, execution engine, bridge contracts, along with development and release process documentation.
en.stack: Primarily developed in Go, relying on Ethereum libraries and protocols such as Geth and EVM.
en.hot: Optimism is a leading Ethereum Layer 2 solution with 6454 stars, gaining attention for its contribution to Ethereum scaling and the open-source OP Stack ecosystem.
uses: Blockchain developers — build or deploy Layer 2 networks based on the OP Stack
Ethereum ecosystem participants — understand Layer 2 scaling technology
DApp developers — build high-performance DApps on OP Mainnet

zh.tag: 持续性能分析平台，定位代码级性能瓶颈
zh.what: Grafana Pyroscope 是一个持续性能分析平台，帮助开发者主动或被动地发现应用中的性能瓶颈，如 CPU、内存和 I/O 问题。它能够将性能问题定位到具体代码行，支持快速排查和优化。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Pyroscope 服务器（负责存储和处理 profiling 数据）、多种语言 SDK（用于采集数据）以及 Grafana 集成插件。v2 架构默认将数据直接写入对象存储，简化运维并降低资源消耗。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言开发，依赖对象存储（如 S3、GCS）作为后端，支持多种语言 SDK（如 Go、Java、Python、Ruby 等），与 Grafana 深度集成。
zh.hot: Pyroscope 2.0 发布，采用全新 v2 架构，简化运维并降低大规模使用时的资源消耗，吸引了大量关注。当前 11564 Stars，日增 6，在 Go 语言日榜排名第 16。
uses: 后端开发人员 —— 主动优化应用 CPU、内存等资源消耗，提升性能
SRE/运维工程师 —— 快速定位生产环境中的性能瓶颈，缩短故障排查时间
技术管理者 —— 通过持续性能分析降低基础设施成本，提升系统稳定性

en.tag: Continuous profiling platform to pinpoint code-level performance issues
en.what: Grafana Pyroscope is a continuous profiling platform that helps developers proactively and reactively identify performance bottlenecks in applications, such as CPU, memory, and I/O issues. It pinpoints performance problems down to specific lines of code, enabling rapid debugging and optimization.
en.content: The repository includes the Pyroscope server (for storing and processing profiling data), SDKs for multiple languages, and Grafana integration plugins. The v2 architecture writes data directly to object storage by default, simplifying operations and reducing resource usage.
en.stack: Primarily developed in Go, relies on object storage (e.g., S3, GCS) as backend, supports SDKs for multiple languages (Go, Java, Python, Ruby, etc.), and deeply integrates with Grafana.
en.hot: The release of Pyroscope 2.0 with a new v2 architecture simplifies operations and reduces resource usage at scale, drawing significant attention. Currently 11,564 stars (+6 today), ranked #16 on Go daily trending.
uses: Backend developers — proactively optimize CPU, memory, and other resource usage to improve application performance
SRE/ops engineers — quickly pinpoint performance bottlenecks in production, reducing troubleshooting time
Tech leads — leverage continuous profiling to reduce infrastructure costs and improve system stability

zh.tag: 为AI编码代理提供持久化结构化记忆的分布式图式问题追踪器
zh.what: Beads 是一个为 AI 编码代理设计的分布式图式问题追踪器，提供持久化、结构化的记忆。它用依赖感知的图取代混乱的 Markdown 计划，帮助代理处理长周期任务而不丢失上下文。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Beads CLI 工具源码、安装脚本、文档以及多种代理集成（如 Codex CLI、Claude Code、Cursor 等）。用户通过 `bd` 命令初始化项目、创建/关闭问题、同步远程代理。
zh.stack: 基于 Go 开发，底层依赖 Dolt（分布式版本化数据库）实现图存储和同步。支持通过 npm 和 PyPI 安装 MCP 相关包。
zh.hot: GitHub 日增 95 星，总星数 25601，位列 Go 语言日榜第 11。AI 编码代理的持久记忆需求旺盛，Beads 以轻量 CLI 和分布式图方案解决痛点。
uses: AI 编码代理开发者 —— 为代理提供持久化记忆和任务管理
使用 Codex CLI、Claude Code 等工具的开发者 —— 集成 Beads 以提升长周期任务处理能力
团队协作场景 —— 多代理通过 Dolt 同步工作状态和依赖图

en.tag: A distributed graph issue tracker for AI coding agents with persistent structured memory
en.what: Beads is a distributed graph issue tracker for AI coding agents, providing persistent structured memory. It replaces messy markdown plans with a dependency-aware graph, helping agents handle long-horizon tasks without losing context.
en.content: The repo contains the Beads CLI tool source code, installation scripts, documentation, and integrations for various agents (Codex CLI, Claude Code, Cursor, etc.). Users interact via `bd` commands to init projects, create/close issues, and sync with remote agents.
en.stack: Built with Go, leveraging Dolt (distributed versioned database) for graph storage and sync. Also provides npm and PyPI packages for MCP integration.
en.hot: Gaining 95 stars daily, total 25601, ranking #11 on Go daily trending. The demand for persistent memory in AI coding agents is high, and Beads addresses it with a lightweight CLI and distributed graph approach.
uses: AI coding agent developers — provide persistent memory and task management for agents
Developers using Codex CLI, Claude Code, etc. — integrate Beads to improve long-horizon task handling
Team collaboration — multiple agents sync work status and dependency graph via Dolt

zh.tag: 指标、日志与任意数据的采集、处理与传输代理
zh.what: Telegraf 是一个轻量级的数据采集代理，支持从多种来源（系统、云服务、消息队列等）收集指标、日志和其他数据，并进行处理、聚合后输出到多种后端。它拥有超过 300 个插件，覆盖设备、日志、消息、监控、网络、系统、通用和 Windows 等领域。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Telegraf 的 Go 源码、插件目录（inputs、outputs、processors、aggregators）、文档（安装、配置、快速开始）以及构建脚本。编译为无外部依赖的静态二进制文件，使用 TOML 配置。
zh.stack: 使用 Go 语言开发，依赖少量 Go 标准库和第三方包，编译为独立二进制。支持多种输出后端如 InfluxDB、Prometheus、Kafka 等。
zh.hot: Telegraf 是 InfluxData 生态的核心组件，拥有 17,721 颗星和超过 1,200 名贡献者，因其插件丰富、部署简单、性能稳定而广受 DevOps 和监控领域欢迎。
uses: DevOps 工程师 —— 用于基础设施监控和指标采集，配合 InfluxDB 或 Prometheus 使用
系统管理员 —— 收集服务器 CPU、内存、磁盘等系统指标
物联网开发者 —— 通过 Modbus、OPC UA 等插件采集设备数据
数据工程师 —— 作为数据管道，从多种源采集数据并转发到消息队列或存储

en.tag: Agent for collecting, processing, aggregating, and writing metrics, logs, and other arbitrary data
en.what: Telegraf is a lightweight data collection agent that gathers metrics, logs, and other data from diverse sources (system, cloud services, message queues, etc.), processes and aggregates them, then outputs to various backends. It boasts over 300 plugins covering devices, logs, messaging, monitoring, networking, system, universal, and Windows.
en.content: The repository contains Telegraf's Go source code, plugin directories (inputs, outputs, processors, aggregators), documentation (installation, configuration, quick start), and build scripts. It compiles into a standalone static binary with no external dependencies and uses TOML for configuration.
en.stack: Developed in Go, with minimal dependencies on Go standard library and third-party packages, compiled into a standalone binary. Supports multiple output backends such as InfluxDB, Prometheus, Kafka, etc.
en.hot: Telegraf is a core component of the InfluxData ecosystem, with 17,721 stars and over 1,200 contributors. It is widely popular in DevOps and monitoring due to its rich plugin set, simple deployment, and stable performance.
uses: DevOps engineers — for infrastructure monitoring and metric collection, used with InfluxDB or Prometheus
System administrators — to collect system metrics like CPU, memory, disk
IoT developers — to gather device data via plugins like Modbus, OPC UA
Data engineers — as a data pipeline to collect from various sources and forward to message queues or storage

zh.tag: 云原生数据库备份与恢复工具
zh.what: WAL-G 是一个用于 PostgreSQL、MySQL/MariaDB 和 MS SQL Server 的归档恢复工具，支持 MongoDB 和 Redis（测试版）。它通过预写日志（WAL）实现高效备份与时间点恢复，是 WAL-E 的继任者。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Go 语言编写的二进制程序、配置文件示例、文档和测试代码。支持多种压缩算法（LZ4、LZMA、ZSTD、Brotli）和多处理器并行处理。
zh.stack: 使用 Go 语言开发，依赖 viper 进行配置管理，支持多种云存储后端（如 S3、GCS、Azure Blob）。
zh.hot: 作为数据库备份领域的成熟工具，WAL-G 拥有 4188 颗星，持续活跃维护。其云原生设计和多数据库支持使其在 DevOps 社区中保持热度。
uses: 数据库管理员 —— 实现 PostgreSQL/MySQL 等数据库的自动化备份与恢复
云原生运维 —— 在 AWS/GCP/Azure 上管理数据库灾备
开发测试 —— 快速搭建数据库副本或进行时间点恢复测试

en.tag: Cloud-native database backup and restoration tool
en.what: WAL-G is an archival restoration tool for PostgreSQL, MySQL/MariaDB, and MS SQL Server, with beta support for MongoDB and Redis. It leverages write-ahead logs for efficient backups and point-in-time recovery, succeeding WAL-E.
en.content: The repository contains Go binaries, configuration examples, documentation, and test code. It supports multiple compression algorithms (LZ4, LZMA, ZSTD, Brotli) and multi-processor parallelism.
en.stack: Developed in Go, uses viper for configuration management, and supports various cloud storage backends (e.g., S3, GCS, Azure Blob).
en.hot: With 4188 stars, WAL-G is a mature tool in database backup, actively maintained. Its cloud-native design and multi-database support keep it popular in the DevOps community.
uses: Database administrators — automate backup and recovery for PostgreSQL/MySQL etc.
Cloud-native operators — manage database disaster recovery on AWS/GCP/Azure
Development/testing — quickly spin up database replicas or test point-in-time recovery

zh.tag: Go 语言的 Lodash——基于泛型的实用工具库
zh.what: samber/lo 是一个受 Lodash 启发的 Go 语言工具库，利用 Go 1.18+ 泛型为切片、映射、字符串、通道和函数提供大量便捷方法，简化常见编程任务并提升代码可读性。它提供了许多标准库中缺失的实用函数。
zh.content: 仓库包含主包 lo 以及子包 parallel（并行操作）、mutable（可变操作）和 it（迭代器），提供如 Uniq、Filter、Map 等函数。
zh.stack: 纯 Go 实现，依赖 Go 1.18+ 泛型，无外部依赖。
zh.hot: 作为 Go 生态中首个成熟的 Lodash 风格泛型库，填补了标准库的空白，积累了 2.1 万+ Star，持续受到 Go 开发者欢迎。
uses: Go 开发者 —— 日常编码中简化切片、映射等数据操作
从其他语言（如 JavaScript）转 Go 的开发者 —— 寻找熟悉的 Lodash 风格 API
需要高性能、无依赖工具库的项目 —— 纯 Go 实现，零外部依赖

en.tag: A Lodash-style Go library based on Go 1.18+ Generics
en.what: samber/lo is a Lodash-inspired Go utility library leveraging Go 1.18+ generics to provide dozens of handy methods for slices, maps, strings, channels, and functions, simplifying common coding tasks and improving code readability. It offers many useful abstractions not found in the standard library.
en.content: The repository includes the main lo package and sub-packages parallel, mutable, and it, offering functions like Uniq, Filter, Map, etc.
en.stack: Pure Go implementation, depends on Go 1.18+ generics, no external dependencies.
en.hot: As the first mature Lodash-style generics library in the Go ecosystem, it fills gaps in the standard library, amassing 21k+ stars and remaining popular among Go developers.
uses: Go developers — simplify slice, map, and other data operations in daily coding
Developers transitioning from other languages (e.g., JavaScript) — find familiar Lodash-style APIs
Projects needing a high-performance, dependency-free utility library — pure Go with zero external dependencies

zh.tag: 多智能体全自动AI小说生成引擎
zh.what: ainovel-cli 是一个全自动 AI 长篇小说创作引擎，通过确定性引擎驱动多个自主代理（Architect/Writer/Editor）协作，从一句话需求到完整小说全程无需人工干预。它采用“事实层确定，语义层自主”的架构，确保行为可测试、可审计。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Go 语言实现的 CLI 工具，核心是确定性 Engine、三个 Worker（Architect/Writer/Editor）和按需调用的 Arbiter，以及文件系统 Store。提供 TUI 交互界面，支持多 LLM 后端。
zh.stack: 主语言 Go，依赖 LLM API（OpenRouter/Anthropic/Gemini/OpenAI），使用文件系统存储，无外部数据库。
zh.hot: 今日新增 25 stars，总 1486 stars，GitHub Trending Go 榜第 15 名。其创新的确定性+多智能体架构解决了 AI 小说生成中一致性和可控性的痛点，吸引了大量创作者和开发者。
uses: AI 小说创作者 —— 从一句话梗概自动生成完整长篇小说，支持实时干预
AI 应用开发者 —— 学习多智能体协作与确定性引擎的设计模式
写作爱好者 —— 探索 AI 辅助长篇叙事创作的可能性

en.tag: Multi-agent auto novel generation engine
en.what: ainovel-cli is a fully automated AI novel generation engine that uses a deterministic engine to orchestrate multiple autonomous agents (Architect/Writer/Editor) from a single prompt to a complete novel without human intervention. Its architecture ensures testable and auditable behavior through a 'deterministic facts, autonomous semantics' design.
en.content: The repo contains a Go CLI tool with a deterministic Engine, three Workers (Architect/Writer/Editor), an on-demand Arbiter, and a filesystem Store. It features a TUI interface and supports multiple LLM backends.
en.stack: Written in Go, depends on LLM APIs (OpenRouter/Anthropic/Gemini/OpenAI), uses filesystem storage, no external database.
en.hot: Gained 25 stars today, total 1486 stars, ranked #15 on GitHub Trending Go. Its novel deterministic + multi-agent architecture addresses consistency and controllability issues in AI novel generation, attracting many creators and developers.
uses: AI novel creators — generate full-length novels from a single prompt with real-time intervention
AI app developers — learn multi-agent collaboration and deterministic engine design patterns
Writing enthusiasts — explore AI-assisted long-form narrative creation

zh.tag: 高性能分布式存储系统，支持S3、文件系统和Iceberg表
zh.what: SeaweedFS 是一个分布式存储系统，支持对象存储（S3 兼容）、文件系统和 Iceberg 表。它专为处理数十亿文件而设计，具有 O(1) 磁盘访问和轻松的水平扩展能力。
zh.content: 仓库包含 SeaweedFS 核心服务（Master、Volume、Filer）、S3 API 网关、FUSE 挂载、WebDAV 支持、Hadoop 集成、Kubernetes 部署配置以及丰富的客户端库。
zh.stack: 使用 Go 语言开发，依赖 gRPC、FUSE、WebDAV 协议，支持多种存储后端（本地磁盘、云存储）。
zh.hot: 拥有 33.7k+ Stars，长期活跃，今日新增 30 Stars，因其高性能、S3 兼容和 Iceberg 表支持成为分布式存储领域的热门选择。
uses: 需要海量文件存储和快速访问的云原生应用
数据湖场景，支持 Iceberg 表格式的实时分析
替代或补充 AWS S3 的自托管对象存储方案
大规模文件系统挂载，如媒体存储、备份归档

en.tag: High-performance distributed storage for S3, file systems, and Iceberg tables
en.what: SeaweedFS is a distributed storage system supporting object storage (S3-compatible), file systems, and Iceberg tables. It is designed to handle billions of files with O(1) disk access and effortless horizontal scaling.
en.content: The repo includes core services (Master, Volume, Filer), S3 API gateway, FUSE mount, WebDAV support, Hadoop integration, Kubernetes deployment configs, and various client libraries.
en.stack: Developed in Go, leveraging gRPC, FUSE, WebDAV protocols, and supporting multiple storage backends (local disk, cloud storage).
en.hot: With 33.7k+ stars and steady daily growth (+30 today), it remains a top choice for distributed storage due to its high performance, S3 compatibility, and Iceberg table support.
uses: Cloud-native apps needing massive file storage and fast access
Data lake scenarios with Iceberg table format for real-time analytics
Self-hosted object storage as alternative or supplement to AWS S3
Large-scale file system mounting for media storage, backup, and archiving

zh.tag: 开源身份与访问管理平台，为开发者简化 IAM
zh.what: ZITADEL 是一个开源的身份与访问管理（IAM）平台，为需要超越基础认证的团队而构建。它提供 SSO、MFA、Passkeys、OIDC、SAML、SCIM 以及经过实战考验的多租户模型，帮助开发者安全地管理用户身份。
zh.content: 仓库包含 ZITADEL 的核心 Go 后端、前端应用、文档和部署配置。提供完整的身份认证、授权、用户管理和审计日志功能。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言开发，依赖 CockroachDB 或 PostgreSQL 作为数据库，支持 Docker 和 Kubernetes 部署。
zh.hot: ZITADEL 作为开源 IAM 解决方案，获得了 14.5k+ Stars，因其强大的多租户支持和 OIDC 认证而备受关注，适合需要自托管身份管理的团队。
uses: SaaS 产品开发者 —— 快速集成用户认证和授权
B2B 平台团队 —— 管理多租户身份和权限
自托管 IAM 需求者 —— 完全控制身份基础设施

en.tag: Open-source identity and access management platform, simplifying IAM for developers
en.what: ZITADEL is an open-source identity and access management (IAM) platform built for teams that need more than basic auth. It provides SSO, MFA, Passkeys, OIDC, SAML, SCIM, and a battle-tested multi-tenancy model to help developers securely manage user identities.
en.content: The repository contains the core Go backend, frontend apps, documentation, and deployment configs. It offers complete authentication, authorization, user management, and audit logging capabilities.
en.stack: Primarily developed in Go, with CockroachDB or PostgreSQL as the database, and supports Docker and Kubernetes deployment.
en.hot: With over 14.5k stars, ZITADEL is popular as an open-source IAM solution, gaining attention for its strong multi-tenancy support and OIDC certification, ideal for teams needing self-hosted identity management.
uses: SaaS product developers — quickly integrate user authentication and authorization
B2B platform teams — manage multi-tenant identities and permissions
Self-hosted IAM adopters — full control over identity infrastructure

zh.tag: Avalanche 区块链节点 Go 实现
zh.what: AvalancheGo 是 Avalanche 网络的官方节点实现，用 Go 语言编写。它支持高吞吐量、快速交易的区块链平台，允许用户运行节点参与主网或测试网。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的节点源代码、构建脚本、Docker 支持以及详细的安装与运行指南。提供了二进制发布、APT 仓库和源码编译等多种部署方式。
zh.stack: 技术栈以 Go 为主，依赖 gcc/g++ 编译工具链。支持 Linux (Ubuntu 22.04/24.04) 和 macOS 12+ 操作系统。
zh.hot: 作为 Avalanche 生态的核心基础设施，该项目持续获得关注，目前拥有 2355 个 Star，在 Go 语言日榜排名第 18。
uses: Avalanche 网络节点运营者 —— 部署和维护主网/测试网节点
区块链开发者 —— 研究 Avalanche 协议实现或进行二次开发
基础设施工程师 —— 搭建高可用区块链节点服务

en.tag: Go implementation of an Avalanche blockchain node
en.what: AvalancheGo is the official node implementation for the Avalanche network, written in Go. It supports a blockchain platform with high throughput and fast transactions, allowing users to run nodes to participate in mainnet or testnet.
en.content: The repository contains full node source code, build scripts, Docker support, and detailed installation/running guides. Multiple deployment methods are provided including binary releases, APT repository, and source compilation.
en.stack: The tech stack is primarily Go, with dependencies on gcc/g++ build tools. Supports Linux (Ubuntu 22.04/24.04) and macOS 12+ operating systems.
en.hot: As core infrastructure for the Avalanche ecosystem, this project maintains steady attention with 2355 stars, ranking 18th on the Go daily trending list.
uses: Avalanche network node operators — deploy and maintain mainnet/testnet nodes
Blockchain developers — study Avalanche protocol implementation or build on top
Infrastructure engineers — set up high-availability blockchain node services

zh.tag: 自托管仪表盘，聚合所有信息流
zh.what: Glance 是一个轻量级、高度可定制的自托管仪表盘，能将 RSS、社交媒体、天气、股票、服务器状态等多种信息流整合到一个美观的界面中。它支持多页面/标签页布局，并且针对移动设备进行了优化。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Go 编写的单一二进制文件（<20MB）和 Docker 镜像，通过 YAML 配置文件定义页面、列和小部件。内置多种小部件（RSS、Reddit、Hacker News、YouTube、Twitch、天气、市场行情、Docker 状态等），支持自定义 CSS 和主题。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言开发，依赖极少，使用 Vanilla JS 实现前端交互。支持多操作系统和架构，以及 Docker 部署。
zh.hot: Glance 凭借极低的资源占用（<20MB 二进制）和丰富的可定制性，在自托管社区中迅速走红。目前 GitHub 上已获得 35,913 颗星，日增 39 星，位列 Go 语言日榜第 19 名。
uses: 自托管爱好者 —— 搭建个人信息聚合中心，替代商业仪表盘
开发者 —— 监控多个 RSS 源、社交媒体和服务器状态
极简主义者 —— 追求低资源占用、快速加载的仪表盘解决方案

en.tag: Self-hosted dashboard aggregating all your feeds in one place
en.what: Glance is a lightweight, highly customizable self-hosted dashboard that aggregates RSS feeds, social media, weather, stocks, server status, and more into a beautiful interface. It supports multi-page/tab layouts and is optimized for mobile devices.
en.content: The repo contains a single Go binary (<20MB) and Docker image, configured via YAML files for pages, columns, and widgets. It includes various widgets (RSS, Reddit, Hacker News, YouTube, Twitch, weather, market prices, Docker status, etc.) with support for custom CSS and themes.
en.stack: Built primarily with Go, minimal dependencies, uses Vanilla JS for frontend interactivity. Supports multiple OS/architectures and Docker deployment.
en.hot: Glance has gained rapid popularity in the self-hosted community due to its extremely low resource footprint (<20MB binary) and extensive customizability. It currently has 35,913 stars on GitHub, with 39 new stars today, ranking #19 on the Go daily trending list.
uses: Self-hosters — build a personal info hub to replace commercial dashboards
Developers — monitor multiple RSS feeds, social media, and server status
Minimalists — seek a low-resource, fast-loading dashboard solution

zh.tag: 容器安全沙箱与用户态应用内核，兼容 K8s/Docker
zh.what: gVisor 是 Google 开源的容器应用内核，用 Go 语言在用户态实现了一套 Linux 兼容接口，为容器提供额外的安全隔离层。它通过限制应用对宿主机内核的直接访问，大幅降低容器逃逸风险，同时保持接近原生容器的启动速度与资源开销。
zh.content: 仓库包含 runsc（兼容 OCI 的容器运行时）、Sentry（用户态内核）、Gofer（文件系统代理）等核心组件，以及大量 Linux 系统调用的 Go 语言实现与测试套件。
zh.stack: 主要采用 Go 语言编写，支持 x86_64 与 ARM64 架构；作为 OCI 运行时可直接对接 Docker、containerd 与 Kubernetes 生态。
zh.hot: 在容器安全需求激增的背景下，gVisor 以近 1.9 万 Star 成为云原生沙箱的热门选择，本周新增 85 Star 并跻身 Go 语言周榜第 13 位，体现了社区对"轻量隔离"方案的持续追捧。
uses: 云原生平台运维者 —— 为多租户集群或不可信工作负载提供安全沙箱。
安全合规团队 —— 在保持容器敏捷性的同时满足更严格的内核隔离要求。
边缘与 Serverless 开发者 —— 利用快速启动、低开销的用户态内核运行短时函数或微服务。

en.tag: Userspace application kernel for sandboxed containers with OCI/K8s compatibility
en.what: gVisor is an open-source application kernel from Google that implements a Linux-compatible interface in userspace using Go, adding an extra security isolation layer to containers. By limiting direct access to the host kernel, it significantly reduces container escape risks while maintaining near-native startup speed and resource overhead.
en.content: The repository contains the runsc OCI runtime, the Sentry userspace kernel, the Gofer filesystem proxy, and extensive Go implementations of Linux system calls along with test suites.
en.stack: Written primarily in Go and supports x86_64 and ARM64 architectures; as an OCI runtime it integrates directly with Docker, containerd, and Kubernetes.
en.hot: With nearly 19k stars, gVisor is trending as a top cloud-native sandbox amid surging container security demands; its 85 new stars this week and #13 spot on the Go trending list reflect strong community interest in lightweight isolation.
uses: Cloud-native platform operators —— providing secure sandboxes for multi-tenant clusters or untrusted workloads.
Security and compliance teams —— meeting stricter kernel isolation requirements without sacrificing container agility.
Edge and serverless developers —— leveraging fast-start, low-overhead userspace kernels for short-lived functions or microservices.

zh.tag: 极致美观的动态平铺 Wayland 合成器
zh.what: Hyprland 是一个独立、高度可定制、动态平铺的 Wayland 合成器，注重外观而不牺牲功能。它提供最新的 Wayland 特性、丰富的视觉效果（渐变边框、模糊、动画、阴影等）、强大的插件系统、内置插件管理器、撕裂支持（提升游戏性能）等。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Hyprland 合成器的完整源代码、文档链接、安装指南、配置示例和画廊展示。代码库以 C++ 编写，易于扩展和阅读。
zh.stack: 主要使用 C++ 开发，不依赖 wlroots、libweston、kwin 或 mutter，完全独立实现。依赖 Wayland 协议和相关库。
zh.hot: 凭借出色的视觉效果和高度可定制性，Hyprland 在 Linux 桌面用户中广受欢迎，Star 数达 36,817，今日新增 24，持续活跃开发。
uses: Linux 桌面用户 —— 追求美观、高效、可定制的平铺窗口管理体验
Wayland 爱好者 —— 希望体验最新 Wayland 特性的用户
开发者 —— 对合成器实现感兴趣，或希望为其开发插件的开发者

en.tag: A highly customizable dynamic tiling Wayland compositor with stunning visuals
en.what: Hyprland is an independent, highly customizable, dynamic tiling Wayland compositor that doesn't sacrifice on its looks. It offers the latest Wayland features, extensive eye candy (gradient borders, blur, animations, shadows), a powerful plugin system, built-in plugin manager, tearing support for better gaming performance, and more.
en.content: The repository contains the full source code of the Hyprland compositor, documentation links, installation guides, configuration examples, and a gallery. The codebase is written in C++ and is designed to be easily expandable and readable.
en.stack: Developed primarily in C++, Hyprland is fully independent and does not rely on wlroots, libweston, kwin, or mutter. It depends on Wayland protocols and related libraries.
en.hot: With its stunning visuals and high customizability, Hyprland has gained immense popularity among Linux desktop users, amassing 36,817 stars (24 new today) and maintaining active development.
uses: Linux desktop users — seeking a beautiful, efficient, and customizable tiling window management experience
Wayland enthusiasts — users wanting to experience the latest Wayland features
Developers — interested in compositor implementation or developing plugins for Hyprland

zh.tag: OpenAI Whisper 的 C/C++ 高性能移植，支持端侧与多硬件加速
zh.what: whisper.cpp 是 OpenAI Whisper 自动语音识别（ASR）模型的纯 C/C++ 实现，专注于高性能推理与零依赖部署。它支持从移动端到服务器的全场景运行，可在本地完成语音转文字而无需联网。
zh.content: 仓库核心仅包含 whisper.h 与 whisper.cpp，其余依赖 ggml 机器学习库；提供面向 iOS、Android、WebAssembly、Java 等平台的示例与绑定，以及 Docker 镜像和 C 风格 API。
zh.stack: 基于纯 C/C++ 与 ggml 张量库，无外部依赖；通过 ARM NEON、Metal、Core ML、Vulkan、CUDA、ROCm 等后端实现跨平台硬件加速，并支持 INT8/INT4 量化。
zh.hot: 凭借 51.8k Stars 和本周 238 新增热度，whisper.cpp 以极致轻量化和「苹果芯片优先」策略成为端侧 AI 语音标杆，几乎覆盖了从手机到 NPU 的所有推理场景。
uses: 移动端开发者 —— 需在 iOS/Android 实现离线语音输入与实时字幕
嵌入式与 IoT 工程师 —— 在树莓派等低功耗设备上部署无网 ASR
跨平台桌面应用开发者 —— 通过 C API 或 WebAssembly 集成转写功能
AI 基础设施团队 —— 构建支持多硬件（NVIDIA/AMD/昇腾）的后端推理服务

en.tag: C/C++ Whisper port optimized for edge & multi-hardware inference
en.what: whisper.cpp is a pure C/C++ implementation of OpenAI's Whisper ASR model, optimized for high-performance inference and zero-dependency deployment. It enables on-device speech-to-text across the full spectrum from mobile to server, all without requiring a network connection.
en.content: The repo centers on whisper.h and whisper.cpp, leveraging the ggml library for ML primitives; it ships with platform examples and bindings for iOS, Android, WebAssembly, Java, plus Docker images and a C-style API.
en.stack: Built on pure C/C++ and the ggml tensor library with zero external dependencies; it accelerates inference across hardware via ARM NEON, Metal, Core ML, Vulkan, CUDA, and ROCm, with support for INT8/INT4 quantization.
en.hot: With 51.8k stars and 238 new stars this week, whisper.cpp has become the go-to edge-AI voice benchmark by pairing extreme lightweight design with an Apple Silicon-first strategy, covering nearly every inference scenario from phones to NPUs.
uses: Mobile developers needing offline speech input and real-time captions on iOS/Android.
Embedded and IoT engineers deploying network-free ASR on Raspberry Pi and low-power devices.
Cross-platform desktop developers integrating transcription via C API or WebAssembly.
AI infrastructure teams building backend inference services across NVIDIA, AMD, and Ascend hardware.

zh.tag: 刚体动力学算法库，快速灵活，支持解析导数
zh.what: Pinocchio 是一个高效的开源刚体动力学计算库，专为多关节系统设计。它实现了最先进的刚体算法，支持闭环运动链、摩擦接触问题和物理计算的微分。
zh.content: 仓库包含 C++ 核心库、Python 绑定、文档和示例。提供刚体动力学算法（如递归牛顿-欧拉算法、刚体算法）及其解析导数，基于 Eigen 和 coal。
zh.stack: C++ 核心，Python 绑定，依赖 Eigen（线性代数）和 coal（碰撞检测）。支持 CMake 构建，提供 Conda 和 PyPI 安装。
zh.hot: 作为机器人学和物理仿真领域的经典库，Pinocchio 凭借其高效性和解析导数能力，持续吸引研究者和工程师。今日 GitHub C++ 日榜第 3 名，stars 3597。
uses: 机器人学家 —— 用于运动规划、控制与仿真中的刚体动力学计算
物理仿真工程师 —— 实现高保真物理模拟和接触问题求解
机器学习研究员 —— 利用解析导数进行基于梯度的优化与学习

en.tag: Fast & flexible rigid body dynamics algorithms with analytical derivatives
en.what: Pinocchio is an efficient open-source library for rigid body dynamics computations on poly-articulated systems. It implements state-of-the-art algorithms, supporting closed-loop kinematics, frictional contact, and analytical derivatives.
en.content: The repository contains C++ core library, Python bindings, documentation, and examples. It provides rigid body dynamics algorithms (e.g., RNEA, ABA) and their analytical derivatives, built on Eigen and coal.
en.stack: C++ core with Python bindings, depends on Eigen (linear algebra) and coal (collision detection). Built with CMake, available via Conda and PyPI.
en.hot: As a classic library in robotics and physics simulation, Pinocchio's efficiency and analytical derivatives keep attracting researchers and engineers. Ranked #3 on GitHub C++ daily trending, with 3597 stars.
uses: Roboticists — for rigid body dynamics in motion planning, control, and simulation
Physics simulation engineers — for high-fidelity physics and contact solving
ML researchers — leveraging analytical derivatives for gradient-based optimization and learning

zh.tag: 高性能C++11流媒体服务框架，支持多种协议互转
zh.what: ZLMediaKit 是一个基于 C++11 的高性能运营级流媒体服务框架，支持 RTSP、RTMP、HLS、HTTP-FLV、WebSocket-FLV、GB28181、WebRTC 等多种协议，并提供协议互转功能。它可作为流媒体服务器直接部署，也可作为 SDK 集成到其他应用中。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 MediaServer 服务器、标准 C API 库、restful API 和 web hook 接口，以及丰富的示例和文档。支持全平台（Linux/macOS/Windows/iOS/Android）和多种 CPU 架构。
zh.stack: 基于 C++11 开发，依赖标准库及少量第三方库（如 OpenSSL、FFmpeg 可选），使用多路复用、多线程和异步网络 IO 模型。
zh.hot: ZLMediaKit 是流媒体领域成熟的开源方案，拥有 17k+ Star，长期活跃维护。其全面的协议支持、极低延迟（最低 100ms）和商用级稳定性，使其成为视频监控、直播等场景的首选。
uses: 视频监控平台开发者 —— 需要对接多种协议并实现低延迟播放
直播服务提供商 —— 部署高性能流媒体服务器，支持海量并发
嵌入式/IoT 开发者 —— 在资源受限设备上集成流媒体功能
网络编程学习者 —— 学习 C++11 高性能网络框架设计

en.tag: High-performance C++11 streaming media server framework supporting multi-protocol conversion
en.what: ZLMediaKit is a high-performance, production-grade streaming media server framework based on C++11. It supports multiple protocols including RTSP, RTMP, HLS, HTTP-FLV, WebSocket-FLV, GB28181, and WebRTC, with protocol conversion capabilities. It can be deployed as a standalone media server or used as an SDK.
en.content: The repository includes a full MediaServer application, a standard C API library, RESTful API and web hook interfaces, along with examples and documentation. It supports all major platforms (Linux/macOS/Windows/iOS/Android) and multiple CPU architectures.
en.stack: Built with C++11, depends on standard libraries and optional third-party libraries (e.g., OpenSSL, FFmpeg). Uses multiplexing, multi-threading, and asynchronous network I/O.
en.hot: With over 17k stars, ZLMediaKit is a mature open-source solution in streaming media. Its comprehensive protocol support, ultra-low latency (as low as 100ms), and production-grade stability make it a top choice for video surveillance and live streaming.
uses: Video surveillance platform developers — need multi-protocol support and low-latency playback
Live streaming service providers — deploy high-performance media servers for massive concurrency
Embedded/IoT developers — integrate streaming capabilities on resource-constrained devices
Network programming learners — study C++11 high-performance network framework design

zh.tag: 每秒解析数GB JSON的高性能解析库
zh.what: simdjson 是一个利用 SIMD 指令和微并行算法实现超高速 JSON 解析的 C++ 库。它比 RapidJSON 快 4 倍以上，比 JSON for Modern C++ 快 25 倍，同时保持完整的 JSON 和 UTF-8 验证。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心解析器、API 文档、性能基准测试、绑定和移植（如 Python、JavaScript、Rust 等），以及 CMake 构建系统。
zh.stack: C++17，依赖 SIMD 指令集（如 SSE4.2、AVX2、AVX-512、NEON），可选 CMake 构建。
zh.hot: 被 Node.js、ClickHouse、Meta Velox 等重量级项目采用，性能卓越且持续更新，今日新增 39 星，总星数超 2.4 万。
uses: 需要极速 JSON 解析的数据库和存储引擎（如 ClickHouse、Doris）
高性能网络服务与 API 网关（如 Node.js、WasmEdge）
数据分析和 ETL 管道（如 Velox、Pax）
移动端或嵌入式场景（如 WatermelonDB）

en.tag: Parsing gigabytes of JSON per second with SIMD
en.what: simdjson is a C++ library that leverages SIMD instructions and microparallel algorithms to parse JSON at blazing speeds—over 4x faster than RapidJSON and 25x faster than JSON for Modern C++. It maintains full JSON and UTF-8 validation with lossless parsing.
en.content: The repo includes the core parser, API documentation, performance benchmarks, bindings and ports (e.g., Python, JavaScript, Rust), and a CMake build system.
en.stack: C++17, depends on SIMD instruction sets (SSE4.2, AVX2, AVX-512, NEON), optional CMake build.
en.hot: Adopted by major projects like Node.js, ClickHouse, and Meta Velox; exceptional performance and active maintenance; gained 39 stars today, 24k+ total.
uses: Databases and storage engines needing ultra-fast JSON parsing (e.g., ClickHouse, Doris)
High-performance web services and API gateways (e.g., Node.js, WasmEdge)
Data analytics and ETL pipelines (e.g., Velox, Pax)
Mobile or embedded scenarios (e.g., WatermelonDB)

zh.tag: 现代 C++ 原生单元测试与微基准框架，支持 TDD/BDD
zh.what: Catch2 是一个专为 C++ 设计的现代单元测试框架，同时提供微基准测试与基础 BDD 宏支持。它让测试代码看起来像普通 C++ 布尔表达式，无需繁琐的宏定义即可自然编写测试用例。
zh.content: 仓库包含多头文件库源码、CMake 构建配置、CI 工作流及详尽文档；v3 版本从单头文件重构为常规多文件库，提供独立的 benchmark 模块与测试宏集合。
zh.stack: 核心基于现代 C++（C++14/17/20 为主），使用 CMake 构建，支持 Linux、macOS、Windows 多平台 CI，并提供 Godbolt 在线体验。
zh.hot: 作为 C++ 生态最流行的测试框架之一，Catch2 已积累超 21k Star，本周新增 769 星并跻身 GitHub C++ 周榜第 7 名，反映出 C++ 社区对简洁、现代测试工具的旺盛需求。
uses: C++ 开发者 —— 需要为项目快速引入单元测试与回归测试
TDD/BDD 实践者 —— 想用接近自然语言的断言和场景描述写测试
性能工程师 —— 需要集成微基准测试以追踪代码性能回归
开源库维护者 —— 寻求跨平台、 header-only（v2）或现代库形态（v3）的测试方案

en.tag: Modern C++-native unit-testing & micro-benchmarking framework for TDD/BDD
en.what: Catch2 is a modern, C++-native unit testing framework that also offers micro-benchmarking capabilities and basic BDD macros. It lets you write tests using natural C++ boolean expressions without cumbersome macro boilerplate.
en.content: The repository houses a multi-header library source, CMake build configs, CI workflows, and extensive docs. Starting with v3, it was restructured from a single-header library into a normal multi-file library with a dedicated benchmark module and test macro suite.
en.stack: Built on modern C++ (primarily C++14/17/20), uses CMake, supports cross-platform CI on Linux, macOS, and Windows, and offers Godbolt online playground integration.
en.hot: One of the most popular C++ testing frameworks with over 21k stars, Catch2 gained 769 stars this week and hit #7 on the GitHub C++ Trending list, signaling strong demand for lightweight, modern C++ testing tools.
uses: C++ developers looking to quickly integrate unit and regression tests
TDD/BDD practitioners who want natural-language-like assertions and scenario descriptions
Performance engineers needing built-in micro-benchmarking to track code regressions
Open-source maintainers seeking cross-platform testing in header-only (v2) or modern library (v3) form

zh.tag: 零解析、零拷贝的高效序列化库
zh.what: FlatBuffers 是一个跨平台的高效序列化库，允许直接访问序列化数据而无需先解析或解包，同时保持向前/向后兼容性。它由 Google 开发，广泛应用于游戏、移动应用和实时系统等对性能敏感的场景。
zh.content: 仓库包含 flatc 编译器（用于从 schema 生成代码）、多种语言的运行时库（C++、C#、Go、Java、Python 等）以及示例和测试。
zh.stack: 核心实现为 C++，支持通过 CMake 构建；提供多种语言绑定，包括 C、C++、C#、Dart、Go、Java、JavaScript、Kotlin、Lobster、Lua、Python、Rust、Swift、TypeScript 等。
zh.hot: FlatBuffers 是 Google 出品的久经考验的序列化方案，在 GitHub 上拥有 26k+ star，今日新增 7 星，位列 C++ 日榜第 7。其零拷贝特性在游戏和移动开发中备受推崇。
uses: 游戏开发者 —— 需要高性能、低延迟的数据序列化，避免解析开销
移动应用开发者 —— 在 Android/iOS 上节省内存和带宽
实时系统工程师 —— 用于高频数据交换场景，如金融交易或物联网
跨平台项目团队 —— 需要统一的数据格式，支持多种编程语言

en.tag: Zero-copy, zero-parsing serialization library for maximum memory efficiency
en.what: FlatBuffers is a cross-platform serialization library that enables direct access to serialized data without parsing or unpacking, while maintaining forward/backward compatibility. Developed by Google, it is widely used in performance-sensitive scenarios like games, mobile apps, and real-time systems.
en.content: The repository includes the flatc compiler (for generating code from schemas), runtime libraries for multiple languages (C++, C#, Go, Java, Python, etc.), along with examples and tests.
en.stack: Core implementation in C++ with CMake build system; supports bindings for C, C++, C#, Dart, Go, Java, JavaScript, Kotlin, Lobster, Lua, Python, Rust, Swift, TypeScript, and more.
en.hot: FlatBuffers is a battle-tested serialization solution from Google with 26k+ stars on GitHub, gaining 7 stars today and ranking #7 on the C++ daily trending list. Its zero-copy feature is highly valued in game and mobile development.
uses: Game developers — need high-performance, low-latency serialization without parsing overhead
Mobile app developers — save memory and bandwidth on Android/iOS
Real-time system engineers — for high-frequency data exchange like finance or IoT
Cross-platform project teams — need a unified data format supporting multiple languages

zh.tag: Google 开源的端到端机器学习框架与生态平台
zh.what: TensorFlow 是 Google 开发的端到端开源机器学习平台，提供从研究到生产部署的完整工具链与库生态。它让研究者能够推进机器学习前沿，也让开发者轻松构建和部署 AI 驱动的应用。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心 C++ 运行时、Python 与 C++ API、Keras 高级接口，以及 TensorFlow Lite、TensorFlow.js 等跨平台推理部署工具和丰富的官方示例。
zh.stack: 以 C++ 构建高性能计算后端，通过 Python 提供主要前端接口；支持 CUDA GPU 加速、Bazel 构建系统及 Docker 部署，并提供多语言绑定。
zh.hot: 作为深度学习领域最具影响力的基础框架之一，TensorFlow 凭借 196,329 星（本周新增 365 颗）和工业级稳定性，持续获得学术界与工业界的广泛采用。
uses: 机器学习研究者 —— 需要灵活底层接口进行模型创新与算法实验
AI 应用开发者 —— 希望借助 Keras 和 TF Lite 快速训练并部署到端侧或服务器
工程团队 —— 寻求从训练到推理的规模化、可移植生产流水线
高校学生 —— 学习深度学习原理与工程实践的首选框架之一

en.tag: Google's end-to-end open-source ML framework and ecosystem
en.what: TensorFlow is an end-to-end open-source machine learning platform developed by Google, offering a comprehensive toolchain and library ecosystem from research to production. It enables researchers to push the state-of-the-art in ML while allowing developers to easily build and deploy AI-powered applications.
en.content: The repository contains the core C++ runtime, Python and C++ APIs, the Keras high-level interface, plus cross-platform deployment tools like TensorFlow Lite and TensorFlow.js along with extensive official examples.
en.stack: Built on C++ for a high-performance compute backend with Python as the primary frontend; it supports CUDA GPU acceleration, Bazel builds, Docker deployment, and multi-language bindings.
en.hot: As one of the most influential foundational deep-learning frameworks, TensorFlow maintains strong momentum with 196,329 stars and 365 new stars this week, reflecting broad academic and industrial adoption for its production-grade stability.
uses: ML researchers —— who need flexible low-level APIs for model innovation and algorithmic experiments
AI application developers —— looking to quickly train and deploy models to mobile, edge, or server via Keras and TF Lite
Engineering teams —— seeking scalable, portable production pipelines from training to inference
Students and educators —— using it as a primary framework to learn deep-learning concepts and engineering practices

zh.tag: 跨平台机器学习解决方案，赋能实时媒体处理
zh.what: MediaPipe 是 Google 开源的跨平台机器学习解决方案框架，提供预训练模型、API 和工具，让开发者轻松在移动端、Web、桌面和 IoT 设备上部署实时 ML 应用。它涵盖视觉、文本、音频等任务，支持自定义模型和端侧推理。
zh.content: 仓库包含 MediaPipe Tasks（跨平台 API）、MediaPipe Models（预训练模型）、MediaPipe Model Maker（模型定制工具）和 MediaPipe Studio（浏览器内可视化评估）。
zh.stack: 主要语言为 C++，支持 Android、iOS、Web、Python 等多平台，依赖 TensorFlow Lite 等推理引擎。
zh.hot: MediaPipe 是端侧 ML 部署的标杆项目，拥有 36k+ Star，持续活跃。今日新增 22 Star，位列 C++ 日榜第 9，因其易用性和跨平台能力受到开发者青睐。
uses: 移动端开发者 —— 快速集成人脸检测、手势识别等视觉功能
Web 开发者 —— 在浏览器中运行实时 ML 模型，无需后端
IoT 与边缘设备开发者 —— 部署轻量级 ML 解决方案到资源受限设备

en.tag: Cross-platform ML solutions for live and streaming media
en.what: MediaPipe is an open-source cross-platform ML solutions framework by Google, offering pre-trained models, APIs, and tools to easily deploy real-time ML applications on mobile, web, desktop, and IoT devices. It covers vision, text, and audio tasks, with support for custom models and on-device inference.
en.content: The repo includes MediaPipe Tasks (cross-platform APIs), MediaPipe Models (pre-trained models), MediaPipe Model Maker (customization tool), and MediaPipe Studio (in-browser visualization and evaluation).
en.stack: Primarily C++, supports Android, iOS, Web, Python, and other platforms, with dependencies on TensorFlow Lite and other inference engines.
en.hot: MediaPipe is a benchmark project for on-device ML deployment with 36k+ stars and continuous activity. With 22 new stars today, ranking 9th in C++ daily trending, it's favored for its ease of use and cross-platform capabilities.
uses: Mobile developers — quickly integrate face detection, gesture recognition, and other vision features
Web developers — run real-time ML models in the browser without a backend
IoT and edge device developers — deploy lightweight ML solutions to resource-constrained devices

zh.tag: Facebook开源的高性能C++20基础组件库
zh.what: Folly 是 Facebook 开发并广泛使用的开源 C++20 组件库，专注于提供实用且高效的基础工具。它承载了 Meta 内部大量 C++ 项目的共享代码，并针对大规模场景下的极致性能进行了深度优化。
zh.content: 仓库采用扁平的 folly/ 目录结构，存放各类相对独立的头文件与实现模块；同时包含 experimental、test 与 docs 子目录，分别存放内部实验性组件、单元测试及项目文档。
zh.stack: 基于 C++20 标准构建，与 Boost 及标准库互补而非竞争，仅在既有方案无法满足性能或功能需求时才提供替代实现。
zh.hot: 作为 Facebook C++ 生态的基石项目，Folly 已累计获得 30.4k+ Stars，本月新增 87 Stars 并跻身 GitHub C++ 月榜第 21 位，是高性能系统开发领域广泛认可的基础设施库。
uses: 大规模后端 C++ 开发者 —— 需要高性能基础组件来替代标准库或 Boost 的不足之处
基础设施/中间件团队 —— 构建高并发、低延迟系统时可复用其锁、字符串与内存工具
开源 C++ 项目维护者 —— 希望引入经过 Meta 生产环境长期验证的工业级基础库

en.tag: Facebook's open-source high-performance C++20 core components library
en.what: Folly is an open-source C++20 components library developed and widely used at Meta, designed for practicality and efficiency. It serves as foundational shared code for many of Facebook's C++ projects, with deep performance optimizations targeting large-scale infrastructure.
en.content: The repository follows a flat folly/ directory layout containing relatively independent headers and implementation modules, alongside experimental, test, and docs subdirectories for internal prototypes, unit tests, and project documentation.
en.stack: Built on C++20, it complements rather than competes with Boost and the standard library, providing alternative implementations only when existing solutions fail to meet required performance or functionality profiles.
en.hot: As a cornerstone of Facebook's C++ ecosystem, Folly has accumulated over 30.4k stars, gaining 87 this month and ranking 21st on GitHub's C++ monthly trending list, making it a widely recognized infrastructure library for high-performance systems.
uses: Large-scale backend C++ developers who need high-performance primitives to fill gaps left by the standard library or Boost
Infrastructure and middleware teams building high-concurrency, low-latency systems and reusing its locks, strings, and memory utilities
Open-source C++ maintainers seeking to adopt production-hardened, industrial-grade foundational libraries validated at Meta

zh.tag: vLLM 昇腾 NPU 社区插件，让大模型推理原生支持国产算力
zh.what: 这是 vLLM 推理引擎的社区维护硬件插件，旨在让主流大模型能够高效运行在华为昇腾（Ascend）NPU 上；它为国产 AI 算力提供了与 CUDA 生态对标的高性能推理方案，降低异构迁移成本。
zh.content: 仓库包含昇腾定制的算子实现、Attention 与采样后端加速模块、vLLM 版本兼容层，以及完整的构建脚本与中文/英文文档。
zh.stack: 核心模块以 C++ 编写并绑定 Python，底层调用华为 CANN 计算架构与 PyTorch 昇腾后端，通过 vLLM 的硬件插件接口完成对接。
zh.hot: 在国产算力替代与自主可控需求推动下，该插件补全了 vLLM 在昇腾生态的关键一环；仓库已获 2,431 Star，本周新增 52 星并跻身 GitHub C++ Trending 第 13 位，关注度持续走高。
uses: 昇腾 NPU 集群用户 —— 希望在华为 910B/310P 等硬件上无缝运行 vLLM 推理服务的工程团队。
国产算力平台构建者 —— 需要基于自主可控芯片搭建大模型推理底座的云厂商与科研机构。
异构适配开发者 —— 从事 AI 推理引擎后端移植、算子优化与硬件插件集成的系统工程师。

en.tag: Community plugin for running vLLM inference natively on Huawei Ascend NPUs
en.what: This community-maintained hardware plugin enables the vLLM inference engine to run efficiently on Huawei Ascend NPUs. It provides a high-performance serving solution for domestic AI hardware, reducing the migration cost from CUDA-centric ecosystems.
en.content: The repository houses Ascend-customized operators, attention and sampling acceleration backends, vLLM compatibility layers, plus build scripts and bilingual documentation.
en.stack: Core modules are written in C++ with Python bindings, calling Huawei's CANN stack and PyTorch Ascend backend underneath, and interfacing with vLLM through its hardware plugin API.
en.hot: Driven by demand for domestic hardware independence, the plugin fills a critical gap for vLLM on Ascend; having earned 2,431 stars with 52 added this week and a spot at #13 on GitHub's C++ Trending, it is gaining significant traction.
uses: Ascend NPU cluster users — Engineering teams seeking to run vLLM inference natively on Huawei 910B/310P hardware.
Domestic AI platform builders — Cloud providers and research institutes building LLM serving stacks on homegrown chips.
Heterogeneous adaptation developers — Systems engineers working on backend porting, operator optimization, and hardware plugin integration for inference engines.

zh.tag: 高效、灵活、可移植的分布式梯度提升库
zh.what: XGBoost 是一个优化的分布式梯度提升库，旨在高效、灵活且可移植。它实现了梯度提升框架下的机器学习算法，提供并行树提升（GBDT、GBM），能够快速准确地解决许多数据科学问题。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心 C++ 库、多语言接口（Python、R、Java、Scala、C++ 等）、分布式计算后端（Hadoop、Spark、Dask、Flink、DataFlow）以及丰富的文档和示例。
zh.stack: 核心用 C++ 编写，支持 Python、R、Java、Scala 等语言绑定，依赖分布式计算框架如 Apache Hadoop、Spark、Dask、Flink 和 Google DataFlow。
zh.hot: XGBoost 是机器学习竞赛和工业界的常青树，凭借其高性能和分布式能力持续受到关注。尽管今日新增仅 6 星，但总星数 28594 彰显其长期影响力。
uses: 数据科学家和机器学习工程师 —— 用于分类、回归、排序等任务，尤其在 Kaggle 竞赛中广泛使用
需要高精度模型的生产环境 —— 支持大规模数据分布式训练，适用于金融、广告、推荐系统等
研究人员 —— 作为基准模型或进行梯度提升算法的研究与改进

en.tag: Optimized distributed gradient boosting library for GBDT, GBRT, GBM
en.what: XGBoost is an optimized distributed gradient boosting library designed to be highly efficient, flexible and portable. It implements machine learning algorithms under the Gradient Boosting framework, providing parallel tree boosting (GBDT, GBM) that solves many data science problems quickly and accurately.
en.content: The repository contains the core C++ library, multi-language interfaces (Python, R, Java, Scala, C++, etc.), distributed computing backends (Hadoop, Spark, Dask, Flink, DataFlow), and extensive documentation and examples.
en.stack: Core written in C++, with language bindings for Python, R, Java, Scala, etc. Depends on distributed computing frameworks like Apache Hadoop, Spark, Dask, Flink, and Google DataFlow.
en.hot: XGBoost is a perennial favorite in ML competitions and industry, consistently attracting attention for its high performance and distributed capabilities. Although only 6 stars today, its total 28594 stars reflect long-term impact.
uses: Data scientists and ML engineers — for classification, regression, ranking tasks, widely used in Kaggle competitions
Production environments requiring high-accuracy models — supports distributed training on large-scale data, suitable for finance, advertising, recommendation systems
Researchers — as a baseline model or for research and improvement of gradient boosting algorithms

zh.tag: 宇树机器人官方 SDK，支持二次开发与集成
zh.what: 宇树机器人 SDK 第二版，为开发者提供统一的接口来控制和通信宇树机器人。支持多种架构和操作系统，简化机器人应用的开发流程。
zh.content: 包含构建示例、安装脚本、CMake 集成示例以及依赖管理。提供 C++ 库和头文件，方便开发者集成到自己的项目中。
zh.stack: 基于 C++ 开发，依赖 CMake、GCC、Boost、Eigen3、spdlog、fmt 和 yaml-cpp。支持 Ubuntu 20.04 及 aarch64/x86_64 架构。
zh.hot: 宇树机器人生态日益壮大，开发者对官方 SDK 需求旺盛。1238 Stars 表明社区活跃，尤其受机器人爱好者和研究者关注。
uses: 机器人开发者 —— 快速集成宇树机器人控制功能
学术研究者 —— 用于机器人算法验证与实验
机器人爱好者 —— 二次开发定制机器人行为

en.tag: Official SDK for Unitree robots, enabling secondary development and integration
en.what: Unitree robot SDK version 2, providing a unified interface for controlling and communicating with Unitree robots. It supports multiple architectures and operating systems, simplifying the development of robot applications.
en.content: Includes build examples, installation scripts, CMake integration samples, and dependency management. Provides C++ libraries and headers for easy integration into custom projects.
en.stack: Built with C++, depends on CMake, GCC, Boost, Eigen3, spdlog, fmt, and yaml-cpp. Supports Ubuntu 20.04 and aarch64/x86_64 architectures.
en.hot: The Unitree robot ecosystem is growing rapidly, driving high demand for the official SDK. 1238 stars indicate an active community, especially among robotics enthusiasts and researchers.
uses: Robot developers — quickly integrate Unitree robot control
Academic researchers — for algorithm validation and experiments
Robotics enthusiasts — customize robot behaviors via secondary development

zh.tag: 支持漫游和间歇连接的远程终端
zh.what: Mosh 是一个远程终端应用，支持间歇性连接、IP 漫游，并提供推测性本地回显和行编辑。它能在客户端休眠或网络中断后保持会话，允许客户端和服务器切换 IP 地址而不中断连接。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Mosh 的完整源代码，包括 mosh-client 和 mosh-server 两个二进制文件，以及构建脚本和文档。
zh.stack: 使用 C++ 编写，依赖 protobuf 和 OpenSSL，通过 SSH 进行连接和认证。
zh.hot: Mosh 解决了 SSH 在高延迟或不稳定网络下的痛点，拥有超过 1.4 万星标，是远程终端领域的经典工具。
uses: 移动办公者：在 Wi-Fi 和蜂窝网络间切换时保持 SSH 会话
网络不稳定环境：如咖啡厅、酒店等，Mosh 能自动重连
高延迟链路：如跨国连接，推测性本地回显减少等待

en.tag: Remote terminal app with intermittent connectivity and roaming support
en.what: Mosh is a remote terminal application that supports intermittent connectivity, allows roaming, and provides speculative local echo and line editing. It keeps sessions alive when the client sleeps or loses connection, and allows IP address changes without disconnecting.
en.content: The repository contains the full source code of Mosh, including mosh-client and mosh-server binaries, build scripts, and documentation.
en.stack: Written in C++, depends on protobuf and OpenSSL, uses SSH for connection setup and authentication.
en.hot: Mosh addresses SSH's shortcomings on high-latency or unstable networks, with over 14k stars, making it a classic tool in remote terminal space.
uses: Mobile workers: maintain SSH sessions while switching between Wi-Fi and cellular
Unstable networks: e.g., cafes, hotels, Mosh reconnects automatically
High-latency links: e.g., cross-border connections, speculative local echo reduces lag

zh.tag: Mac 原生轻量级 RAW 照片浏览与管理工具
zh.what: Imagin RAW 是一款专为 Mac 设计的轻量级 RAW 照片浏览、筛选和组织工具，旨在替代 Adobe Bridge。它支持多根目录浏览、实时文件监控、RAW 解码、评级与颜色标签、JPEG/RAW 去重、Spotlight 搜索、SD 卡导入、重复照片检测、Instagram 画幅导出及视频导出等功能。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 macOS 应用源码，采用 SwiftUI 构建 UI，LibRaw 解码 RAW，AppKit/UIKit 处理缩略图列表，FSEvents 监控文件系统，NSMetadataQuery 实现搜索。
zh.stack: 技术栈：SwiftUI (macOS 14.6+)、AppKit/UIKit、LibRaw (C++)、Objective-C++ 桥接、CoreImage、FSEvents、NSMetadataQuery、OperationQueue 与 Tasks。
zh.hot: 作为 Adobe Bridge 的轻量级替代品，Imagin RAW 以约 9MB 的体积、极低的内存占用和零空闲 CPU 使用率吸引了大量摄影师和 Mac 用户，今日新增 8 星，总星数 129。
uses: 专业摄影师：快速浏览和筛选 RAW 照片，无需导入或管理图库
摄影爱好者：轻量级替代 Bridge，支持 SD 卡导入和备份
Mac 用户：原生应用，流畅滚动，低资源占用

en.tag: A lightweight, native macOS RAW photo browser and organizer
en.what: Imagin RAW is a lightweight, native macOS app for browsing, culling, and organizing RAW photos, designed as an efficient alternative to Adobe Bridge. It features multi-root folder browsing, real-time file monitoring, RAW decoding, rating and color labeling, JPEG/RAW deduplication, Spotlight search, SD card ingest, duplicate detection, Instagram frame export, and video export.
en.content: The repository contains the full macOS app source code, built with SwiftUI for UI, LibRaw for RAW decoding, AppKit/UIKit for thumbnail lists, FSEvents for file system monitoring, and NSMetadataQuery for search.
en.stack: Tech stack: SwiftUI (macOS 14.6+), AppKit/UIKit, LibRaw (C++), Objective-C++ bridge, CoreImage, FSEvents, NSMetadataQuery, OperationQueue and Tasks.
en.hot: As a lightweight alternative to Adobe Bridge, Imagin RAW attracts photographers and Mac users with its ~9MB size, low memory footprint, and zero idle CPU usage, gaining 8 stars today (total 129).
uses: Professional photographers: quickly browse and cull RAW photos without import or library management
Photography enthusiasts: lightweight Bridge alternative with SD card ingest and backup
Mac users: native app with smooth scrolling and low resource usage

zh.tag: Google官方C++单元测试与Mock框架，38K+ Star的行业标准
zh.what: GoogleTest是Google开源的C++测试框架，集单元测试与Mock能力于一体。它支持自动测试发现、丰富的断言、参数化测试和死亡测试等特性，帮助开发者高效验证C++代码的正确性。
zh.content: 仓库合并了原GoogleTest与GoogleMock项目，包含测试框架源码、头文件、详细文档及示例代码。
zh.stack: 基于C++17标准构建，使用CMake/Bazel编译，计划引入Abseil作为底层依赖库。
zh.hot: 作为C++生态的事实标准测试框架，GoogleTest已积累38.8K Star，本月新增173星并持续发布1.17.x版本，保持高度活跃。
uses: C++开发者 —— 为项目编写单元测试和集成测试，确保代码质量
需要Mock测试的工程项目 —— 模拟依赖对象，隔离测试复杂系统
开源/企业级C++项目 —— 建立标准化测试流程与CI/CD质量门禁

en.tag: Google's official C++ unit testing and mocking framework, the industry standard
en.what: GoogleTest is Google's open-source C++ testing framework that combines unit testing and mocking capabilities. It supports automatic test discovery, rich assertions, parameterized tests, and death tests to help developers efficiently verify C++ code correctness.
en.content: The repository merges the formerly separate GoogleTest and GoogleMock projects, containing framework source code, headers, comprehensive documentation, and sample code.
en.stack: Built on C++17, compiled with CMake/Bazel, and planning to adopt Abseil as a foundational dependency.
en.hot: With 38.8K stars and 173 new stars this month, GoogleTest remains the de facto standard C++ testing framework, actively maintained with recent 1.17.x releases requiring C++17.
uses: C++ developers —— writing unit and integration tests to ensure code quality
Projects requiring mocking —— simulating dependencies and isolating complex systems for testing
Open-source and enterprise C++ projects —— establishing standardized testing pipelines and CI/CD quality gates

zh.tag: Google 开源的跨语言结构化数据序列化协议
zh.what: Protocol Buffers（protobuf）是 Google 推出的语言无关、平台无关、可扩展的结构化数据序列化机制。它通过定义 .proto 文件描述数据结构，再由编译器生成多种语言的代码，实现高效、紧凑的数据交换。广泛应用于微服务通信、配置文件和数据存储等场景。
zh.content: 仓库包含 protoc 编译器核心（C++）、多语言运行时库以及标准 .proto 定义文件。同时提供了基于 Bazel 和 CMake 的构建配置与完整测试套件。
zh.stack: 核心编译器采用 C++ 实现，支持跨语言代码生成；构建系统以 Bazel 为主并兼容 CMake，运行时覆盖 Java、Python、Go、C++ 等主流语言。
zh.hot: 凭借极致的序列化性能与跨语言生态，protobuf 已成为微服务通信的事实标准。其 71.5k+ Stars 和持续稳定的日增关注，体现了基础设施领域长期且广泛的工业采纳度。
uses: 后端与微服务开发者 —— 构建高性能跨语言 RPC 及数据交换协议
云原生工程师 —— 在 Kubernetes 与服务网格中统一定义数据面接口
跨平台开发者 —— 通过 .proto 一次定义生成多语言客户端与服务端代码
数据工程师 —— 高效存储和传输结构化日志、配置与事件流

en.tag: Google's cross-language data serialization format and compiler
en.what: Protocol Buffers is Google's language-neutral, platform-neutral, extensible mechanism for serializing structured data. Developers define data schemas in .proto files and use the protoc compiler to generate efficient, compact serialization code for multiple languages. It is widely adopted for microservices communication, configuration management, and data storage.
en.content: The repository includes the core protoc compiler (C++), multi-language runtime libraries, and standard .proto definitions. It also provides build configurations for Bazel and CMake alongside comprehensive test suites.
en.stack: The core compiler is implemented in C++ and supports cross-language code generation. The build system is primarily Bazel with CMake support, and runtimes cover Java, Python, Go, C++, and other major languages.
en.hot: It has become the de facto standard for microservices communication through extreme serialization performance and a cross-language ecosystem. Its 71.5k+ stars and steady daily growth reflect massive, long-standing industry adoption in the infrastructure space.
uses: Backend and microservices developers — building high-performance, cross-language RPC and data exchange protocols
Cloud-native engineers — standardizing data-plane interfaces in Kubernetes and service mesh environments
Cross-platform developers — generating multi-language client and server code from a single .proto definition
Data engineers — efficiently storing and transmitting structured logs, configurations, and event streams

zh.tag: 分布式 SQL 数据库，强一致与高可用
zh.what: YDB 是一个开源的分布式 SQL 数据库，结合了高可用性、可扩展性与强一致性及 ACID 事务。它专为 OLTP 工作负载设计，支持行存和列存表，并提供 PostgreSQL 兼容模式。
zh.content: 仓库包含 YDB 数据库的完整源代码、文档、部署脚本（Ansible、Kubernetes）以及示例。核心组件包括分布式存储层、计算层、YQL SQL 方言引擎和主题（持久队列）支持。
zh.stack: 主要使用 C++ 开发，依赖 gRPC、Protobuf、ClickHouse 等。支持 Ansible、Kubernetes 或手动部署，兼容 PostgreSQL 和 Kafka 协议。
zh.hot: YDB 作为高性能分布式 SQL 数据库，在 GitHub 上获得 4755 星，因其强一致性、水平扩展和 PostgreSQL 兼容性吸引关注，适合替代传统关系型数据库。
uses: 需要强一致性和高可用的 OLTP 应用开发者
希望从传统数据库迁移到分布式 SQL 的团队
构建实时分析或事件流处理系统的工程师
对开源分布式数据库技术感兴趣的研究者

en.tag: Distributed SQL Database with strong consistency and high availability
en.what: YDB is an open source Distributed SQL Database that combines high availability, scalability, strong consistency, and ACID transactions. Designed for OLTP workloads, it supports row-oriented and column-oriented tables, and offers a PostgreSQL-compatible mode.
en.content: The repository contains the full source code, documentation, deployment scripts (Ansible, Kubernetes), and examples for YDB. Core components include a distributed storage layer, compute layer, YQL SQL dialect engine, and topic (persistent queue) support.
en.stack: Primarily developed in C++, with dependencies on gRPC, Protobuf, ClickHouse, etc. Supports deployment via Ansible, Kubernetes, or manually, and is compatible with PostgreSQL and Kafka protocols.
en.hot: With 4755 stars, YDB gains attention for its strong consistency, horizontal scalability, and PostgreSQL compatibility, positioning itself as a modern alternative to traditional relational databases.
uses: Developers building OLTP applications requiring strong consistency and high availability
Teams migrating from traditional databases to distributed SQL
Engineers building real-time analytics or event streaming systems
Researchers interested in open-source distributed database technology

zh.tag: 面向 MCP 的本地代码智能图谱，让 AI 编码工具只读关键上下文
zh.what: code-review-graph 通过 Tree-sitter 解析代码库，构建持久的结构化代码地图并增量追踪变更。它作为 MCP 服务器运行，让 AI 编码助手在代码审阅或处理大型仓库时只获取真正相关的上下文，从而显著减少 token 消耗。
zh.content: 仓库包含 CLI 工具与 MCP 服务器实现，提供 build、install 等命令，并附带 benchmark 数据、GitHub Action 集成文档及多语言 README。
zh.stack: 基于 Python 3.10+ 开发，使用 Tree-sitter 进行代码解析，通过 MCP 协议与 AI 工具通信，支持 pip/pipx 安装。
zh.hot: 项目精准击中 AI 编程“token 燃烧”痛点，宣称在真实仓库中实现 38 倍至 528 倍的上下文压缩；凭借近 2 万星标与单日 74 星增速登上 Trending 前十，反映出开发者对低成本、高精度 AI 代码审阅的强烈需求。
uses: 使用 AI 编码助手（如 Cursor、Claude Code）的开发者 —— 降低代码审阅时的 token 消耗与等待时间
大型代码库维护者 —— 在 monorepo 或遗留项目中为 AI 提供精准、增量更新的代码上下文
追求数据隐私的团队 —— 通过 Local-first 架构在本地构建代码图谱，避免上传源码至云端
CI/CD 集成场景 —— 借助 GitHub Action 在自动化流程中嵌入智能代码审查

en.tag: Local-first code intelligence graph feeding AI tools precise context via MCP to cut tokens
en.what: It parses your codebase with Tree-sitter to build a persistent, structural code map and tracks changes incrementally. Serving as an MCP server, it feeds AI coding assistants only the relevant context during reviews or large-repo workflows, dramatically cutting token usage.
en.content: The repo ships a CLI tool and MCP server implementation with commands like build and install, plus benchmark data, GitHub Action integration docs, and multi-language READMEs.
en.stack: Built on Python 3.10+, it uses Tree-sitter for parsing and speaks to AI tools via the MCP protocol, installable through pip or pipx.
en.hot: It directly tackles the “token burn” pain point in AI coding, claiming 38×–528× context reduction on real repos; its nearly 20k stars and 74-star daily growth landed it on Trending Top 10, showing strong demand for low-cost, high-precision AI code reviews.
uses: Developers using AI coding assistants (e.g., Cursor, Claude Code) — slash token costs and wait times during code reviews
Large codebase maintainers — serve AI precise, incrementally-updated context in monorepos or legacy projects
Privacy-conscious teams — keep code intelligence local and avoid uploading source code to the cloud
CI/CD integrators — embed smart code reviews into automation pipelines via the provided GitHub Action

zh.tag: 专治「AI 味」网页的设计 skill，让 AI 生成的 UI 不像模板货
zh.what: Together AI 出品的设计 skill 包：装进 Claude Code、Cursor 或 Codex 后，AI 生成网页 UI 时会从 20 套主题里选宏观结构，并跑 57 项「anti-slop」检查加自我批判，拒绝 LLM 默认那套千篇一律的渐变卡片风。提供生成、hallmark audit（给现有代码打分）、hallmark redesign（换结构重写）、hallmark study（从截图/URL 提取设计 DNA）四个动词。
zh.content: 核心是 skills/hallmark/ 下的 SKILL.md + references/ 规则文件；docs/ 有 recipes 和示例，site/ 是官网及大量自包含 HTML+CSS 示例页（语言占比因此显示为 CSS）。
zh.stack: Markdown 规则 + 参考文档的 skill 包（符合 Agent Skills 规范），示例为纯 HTML/CSS，MIT，无运行时依赖，一行 npx skills add nutlope/hallmark 安装。
zh.hot: 它直指 AI 生成网站同质化这一普遍痛点，并用在线 Demo 降低验证门槛，定位清晰且易于传播。
uses: 独立开发者 / 小团队 —— 没有设计师，也能让 AI 生成不撞脸的官网和落地页
设计师 —— 用 hallmark study 从优秀网站提取设计 DNA 做参考
前端工程师 —— 用 audit 给存量项目打分，找出「AI 味」重灾区

en.tag: The anti-'AI-slop' design skill — AI-built UIs that don't look like templates
en.what: A design skill pack from Together AI: once installed in Claude Code, Cursor or Codex, your agent picks a macro-structure from 20 themes when generating web UIs, then runs 57 'anti-slop' checks plus self-critique — rejecting the default LLM look of identical gradient cards. Four verbs: generate, hallmark audit (score existing code), hallmark redesign (rewrite with a new structure), hallmark study (extract design DNA from a screenshot or URL).
en.content: The core is SKILL.md plus rule files under skills/hallmark/ and references/; docs/ holds recipes and examples; site/ contains the homepage and many self-contained HTML+CSS example pages (which is why the language stat reads CSS).
en.stack: A Markdown-rules skill pack (Agent Skills compliant) with pure HTML/CSS examples; MIT, zero runtime dependencies; install via npx skills add nutlope/hallmark.
en.hot: Its anti-slop positioning addresses a common complaint about AI-generated websites, while the live demo makes the claim easy to evaluate.
uses: Indie devs & small teams — generate distinctive sites and landing pages without a designer
Designers — extract design DNA from great sites with hallmark study
Frontend engineers — audit existing projects to find the worst 'AI-slop' offenders

zh.tag: 终端AI编码代理，开箱即用支持视频输入与子代理
zh.what: Kimi Code CLI 是一个运行在终端中的 AI 编码代理，能够读取和编辑代码、执行 shell 命令、搜索文件、抓取网页，并根据反馈自主决策下一步操作。它默认使用月之暗面的 Kimi 模型，也支持配置其他兼容的模型提供商。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Kimi Code CLI 的完整源代码、安装脚本、文档和示例。CLI 采用单二进制分发，无需 Node.js 环境，通过一条命令即可安装。
zh.stack: 主语言 TypeScript，依赖 Kimi 模型或兼容 API，终端界面基于 TUI 框架，支持 MCP 协议和插件生态系统。
zh.hot: 本周新增 1400+ Star，GitHub 周榜第 4。作为月之暗面推出的 AI 编码代理，其视频输入、子代理并行工作等创新功能吸引了大量开发者关注。
uses: 开发者 —— 在终端中使用 AI 辅助编码、调试和项目理解
团队 —— 通过子代理并行处理多个任务，提升开发效率
AI 爱好者 —— 探索视频输入、MCP 配置等前沿 AI 代理功能

en.tag: Terminal AI coding agent with video input and subagents out of the box
en.what: Kimi Code CLI is an AI coding agent that runs in your terminal, capable of reading and editing code, running shell commands, searching files, fetching web pages, and autonomously deciding next steps based on feedback. It works out of the box with Moonshot AI's Kimi models and can be configured to use other compatible providers.
en.content: The repository contains the full source code, installation scripts, documentation, and examples for Kimi Code CLI. The CLI is distributed as a single binary, requiring no Node.js setup, and can be installed with a single command.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript, relies on Kimi models or compatible APIs, terminal UI based on TUI framework, supports MCP protocol and plugin ecosystem.
en.hot: Gained 1400+ stars this week, ranking 4th on GitHub weekly trending. As Moonshot AI's AI coding agent, its innovative features like video input and parallel subagents have attracted significant developer attention.
uses: Developers — use AI to assist coding, debugging, and project understanding in the terminal
Teams — leverage subagents for parallel task processing to boost development efficiency
AI enthusiasts — explore cutting-edge AI agent features like video input and MCP configuration

zh.tag: 港大出品的 AI 私人家教：个性化终身学习工作区
zh.what: 香港大学 HKUDS 实验室的「agent 原生」学习平台：聊天辅导、刷题测验、深度研究、可视化、解题、Mastery Path 掌握度练习跑在同一套 agent 循环上。支持多引擎 RAG 知识库（LlamaIndex、PageIndex、GraphRAG、LightRAG，可挂 Obsidian 库），可从任意对话呼叫 Claude Code / Codex 等子 agent；带三层可检查记忆（L1 trace / L2 摘要 / L3 综合）和 Memory Graph 溯源。
zh.content: 完整 Web 应用（Python 后端 + Next.js 16 前端），附 11 种语言 README、Docker 部署、CLI/agent-native 接口、EduHub 社区 skills 生态；发版极勤。
zh.stack: Python 3.11+ + Next.js 16，RAG 多引擎 + MCP 工具 + FAISS 向量库，Apache-2.0；2025 年 12 月底创建，有 arXiv 论文背书。
zh.hot: 它把 AI 教育与 Agent 原生工作流结合，并由高校实验室持续维护，概念清晰、可体验性强。
uses: 学生 / 自学者 —— 把教材和论文喂进去，得到 24 小时私人家教
考研 / 考证党 —— 用刷题测验 + 掌握度路径系统备考
知识管理玩家 —— 直接挂 Obsidian 库做 RAG 问答

en.tag: An AI personal tutor from HKU: a lifelong, personalized learning workspace
en.what: An 'agent-native' learning platform from HKU's HKUDS lab: chat tutoring, quizzes, deep research, visualization, problem solving and Mastery-Path practice all run on one agent loop. It supports multi-engine RAG knowledge bases (LlamaIndex, PageIndex, GraphRAG, LightRAG — even your Obsidian vault), lets you call Claude Code / Codex sub-agents from any conversation, and ships three-layer inspectable memory (L1 trace / L2 summary / L3 synthesis) with a Memory Graph for provenance.
en.content: A full web app (Python backend + Next.js 16 frontend) with READMEs in 11 languages, Docker deployment, CLI/agent-native interfaces and the EduHub community skills ecosystem; releases ship very frequently.
en.stack: Python 3.11+ + Next.js 16, multi-engine RAG + MCP tools + FAISS; Apache-2.0; created late December 2025 with an arXiv paper behind it.
