zh.hot: 本周新增 141 星，位居 GitHub JavaScript 周榜第 19 名。作为 Hermes Agent 的原生工作台，它提供了零分支的 Swarm 编排能力，吸引了 AI 代理开发者和自动化爱好者。
uses: AI 代理开发者 —— 在统一界面中调试和编排多个 Hermes Agent
自动化工程师 —— 利用 Swarm 模式实现任务自动分发与协作
研究团队 —— 管理代理记忆、技能和 MCP 配置，加速实验

en.tag: Native web workspace for Hermes Agent: chat, terminal, memory, skills, inspector
en.what: Hermes Workspace is the official web workspace for Hermes Agent, offering a unified interface for chat, file management, memory browsing, skill management, and terminal control. It supports Swarm mode for orchestrating multiple agents with automated task dispatch and collaboration.
en.content: The repo contains a full web frontend with chat, memory editor, skill browser, MCP management page, Swarm control plane, Kanban task board, reports inbox, and TUI view.
en.stack: Built with JavaScript, requires Node.js ≥22, integrates with NousResearch/hermes-agent, uses SSE streaming and tmux workers.
en.hot: Gained 141 stars this week, ranking #19 on GitHub JavaScript weekly trending. As the native workspace for Hermes Agent, it offers zero-fork Swarm orchestration, attracting AI agent developers and automation enthusiasts.
uses: AI agent developers — debug and orchestrate multiple Hermes Agents in a unified interface
Automation engineers — leverage Swarm mode for automated task dispatch and collaboration
Research teams — manage agent memory, skills, and MCP configurations to accelerate experiments

zh.tag: 终端里的编程 agent，专为便宜小模型优化
zh.what: 跑在终端里的 AI 编程助手（OpenAI Codex 的 fork），核心思路「换 harness 不换模型」：内置 claude-code、kimi-cli、qwen-code、deepseek-tui 等多种 agent 运行框架，让低成本开源模型也打出好表现。自带 QA 技能，可驱动真实浏览器或原生 App 做界面测试，支持 macOS/Linux/Windows 原生沙箱执行。
zh.content: 完整 Rust 工程：终端 TUI、文档站（openinterpreter.com/docs）、安装脚本；配置与会话存本地 ~/.openinterpreter，支持 /model 切模型、/harness 切框架、MCP、hooks、AGENTS.md。
zh.stack: Rust（2023 年创建的老牌项目，刚从 Python 重写），Apache-2.0；支持 ACP 协议接入编辑器，可接多家模型 provider。
zh.hot: Rust 重写与「低成本模型运行框架」定位，正好契合开发者对更高效编程 Agent 基础设施的需求。
uses: 预算有限的开发者 —— 用 DeepSeek / Qwen 等便宜模型跑编程 agent，成本降一个量级
多工具用户 —— 一套终端切换 claude-code、kimi-cli 等不同框架
QA 团队 —— 让 agent 驱动真实浏览器做界面自动化测试

en.tag: A coding agent in your terminal, tuned for low-cost models
en.what: An AI coding assistant in your terminal (a fork of OpenAI Codex) built on the idea of 'swap the harness, not the model': it bundles multiple agent runtimes — claude-code, kimi-cli, qwen-code, deepseek-tui — so cheap open models still perform well. It ships a QA skill that drives real browsers or native apps for UI testing, with native sandboxing on macOS/Linux/Windows.
en.content: A full Rust project: the terminal TUI, a docs site (openinterpreter.com/docs) and install scripts; config and sessions live in ~/.openinterpreter, with /model to switch models, /harness to switch runtimes, plus MCP, hooks and AGENTS.md support.
en.stack: Rust (a 2023 veteran, freshly rewritten from Python), Apache-2.0; supports ACP (Agent Client Protocol) for editors and multiple model providers.
en.hot: The Rust rewrite and focus on serving as a harness for lower-cost models align with demand for efficient coding-agent infrastructure.
uses: Budget-conscious devs — run coding agents on cheap models like DeepSeek / Qwen, an order of magnitude cheaper
Multi-tool users — swap between claude-code, kimi-cli and other harnesses in one terminal
QA teams — let agents drive real browsers for UI automation testing

zh.tag: OpenAI 官方轻量级终端 AI 编码代理
zh.what: Codex CLI 是 OpenAI 推出的终端原生 AI 编码代理，可在本地计算机上直接运行。它能理解自然语言指令，协助完成代码编写、重构、调试等任务。用户可通过 ChatGPT 账户或 API 密钥接入，无需离开终端即可进行智能开发。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Codex CLI 的 Rust 源码、跨平台编译构建脚本，以及支持 macOS/Linux/Windows 的预编译二进制发布。除终端版外，项目还指向 IDE 插件和云端 Codex Web 的入口。
zh.stack: 核心采用 Rust 开发，保证高性能与低资源占用；提供 curl、npm、Homebrew 等多种安装方式，支持通过 ChatGPT 账号或 OpenAI API 密钥进行身份验证。
zh.hot: 作为 OpenAI 官方出品的终端编码工具，凭借 99.2k Stars 的超高人气和单日新增 328 Stars 的强劲势头，成功登顶 Rust 日榜第二。它将 AI 编程能力直接嵌入开发者最熟悉的终端环境，轻量且开源。
uses: 终端重度使用者 —— 希望在命令行中直接调用 AI 辅助编程的开发者
全栈工程师 —— 需要快速完成代码生成、重构与调试的敏捷开发场景
开源贡献者 —— 希望基于 Apache-2.0 协议研究或扩展 AI Agent 能力的工程师
ChatGPT 订阅用户 —— 想将现有 Plus/Pro/Edu 等计划权益延伸至本地开发环境

en.tag: OpenAI's official lightweight coding agent for your terminal
en.what: Codex CLI is a terminal-native AI coding agent from OpenAI that runs locally on your machine. It interprets natural language instructions to help write, refactor, and debug code without leaving your terminal. Users can authenticate via their ChatGPT plan or an OpenAI API key.
en.content: The repository contains the Rust source code for Codex CLI, cross-platform build scripts, and precompiled binaries for macOS, Linux, and Windows. It also points to IDE extensions and the cloud-based Codex Web agent.
en.stack: Core is built in Rust for high performance and low resource usage. It supports multiple installation methods including curl, npm, and Homebrew, and authenticates via ChatGPT accounts or OpenAI API keys.
en.hot: As an official OpenAI terminal coding tool, it commands massive attention with 99.2k Stars and 328 new Stars today, ranking second on the Rust daily trending list. It brings AI coding directly into the familiar terminal environment in a lightweight, open-source package.
uses: Terminal power users — developers who want AI assistance directly in their command line
Full-stack engineers — those needing rapid code generation, refactoring, and debugging
Open-source contributors — engineers looking to study or extend an Apache-2.0 AI agent
ChatGPT subscribers — users wanting to extend their Plus/Pro/Edu benefits to local development

zh.tag: 隐私优先的 AI 代理操作系统
zh.what: IronClaw 是一个以隐私、安全和可扩展性为核心的 AI 代理操作系统。它运行本地 AI 助手，确保用户数据完全由自己控制，不离开设备。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Rust 编写的核心引擎、WebUI、加密凭证存储、后台服务以及命令行工具。支持 macOS、Linux 和 Windows/WSL。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Rust 语言，依赖本地 LLM 提供商 API，支持加密存储和后台服务。
zh.hot: 获得 12,537 星，因其强调隐私和本地控制，在 AI 代理工具中独树一帜，吸引了关注数据安全的用户。
uses: 注重隐私的用户 —— 希望 AI 助手不泄露个人数据
开发者 —— 需要可扩展、开源的 AI 代理框架
安全研究人员 —— 审计和定制本地 AI 系统

en.tag: Privacy-first AI Agent OS
en.what: IronClaw is an Agent OS focused on privacy, security, and extensibility. It runs a local AI assistant that keeps your data under your control, never leaving your device.
en.content: The repo includes a Rust core engine, WebUI, encrypted credential store, background service, and CLI tools. Supports macOS, Linux, and Windows/WSL.
en.stack: Primarily written in Rust, relies on local LLM provider APIs, with encrypted storage and background service.
en.hot: 12,537 stars, standing out among AI agent tools for its emphasis on privacy and local control, attracting users concerned about data security.
uses: Privacy-conscious users — want an AI assistant that doesn't leak personal data
Developers — need an extensible, open-source AI agent framework
Security researchers — audit and customize local AI systems

zh.tag: 终端原生 AI Agent 多路复用器，支持持久会话与插件扩展
zh.what: herdr 是一款驻扎在终端内的 Agent 多路复用器，让你能在一个界面中并行运行、监控多个 AI Agent 的状态。它支持会话分离与跨终端重连，Agent 脱离终端后仍可后台运行，并通过纯 Socket API 实现 Agent 之间的相互调用。同时支持键盘与鼠标双模式操作，以及可扩展的插件市场。
zh.content: 仓库主体为一个 Rust 编写的单二进制文件，无需 Electron 或 Node.js 环境，直接嵌入现有终端。核心包含窗格分割与状态可视化、会话持久化、插件系统、纯 Socket API，以及兼容 tmux 风格快捷键与鼠标点击的混合交互层。
zh.stack: 完全基于 Rust 构建，单二进制分发，零额外依赖。提供 curl / Homebrew / mise 等多种安装方式，并已推出 Windows Beta 版本。
zh.hot: 在 AI Agent 工具链需求井喷的节点，herdr 上线不到两周便收获 1.7 万+ Star，本周激增 2512 颗，冲入 Trending 周榜第 17。它用原生终端体验替代了笨重的 Electron 方案，以「Agent 多路复用 + 可编排 Socket API」精准解决了开发者同时管理多 Agent 的痛点。
uses: 终端重度用户/开发者 —— 需要在不离开终端的情况下并行管理多个 AI Agent 任务。
AI Agent 开发者 —— 需要构建、调试和编排 Agent 工作流，并让 Agent 之间互相通信。
远程/服务器开发者 —— 通过 SSH 断连重连，保持 Agent 长时间后台运行不中断。
插件生态爱好者 —— 希望通过插件扩展窗格和工作流，打造自定义终端 Agent 环境。

en.tag: Terminal-native AI agent multiplexer with persistent sessions and plugins
en.what: herdr is a terminal-native agent multiplexer that lets you run and monitor multiple AI agents in parallel from a single interface. Sessions can be detached and reattached from any terminal or over SSH, and agents themselves can orchestrate each other through a pure socket API. It supports both keyboard and mouse workflows, plus a plugin marketplace for extensibility.
en.content: The repo is built as a single Rust binary with no Electron or Node.js runtime, embedding directly into your existing terminal. It ships with core pane splitting and status visualization, persistent sessions, a plugin system, a pure socket API, and a hybrid interaction layer supporting both tmux-style keybindings and mouse actions.
en.stack: Written entirely in Rust and distributed as a single self-contained binary with zero extra dependencies. Installable via curl, Homebrew, and mise, with a Windows beta already available.
en.hot: Riding the wave of AI-agent tooling demand, herdr racked up 17.7k+ stars within weeks of launch, adding 2,512 this week alone and hitting #17 on GitHub Trending. It replaces heavy Electron wrappers with a native terminal experience and solves the pain of orchestrating multiple agents via its unique multiplexing and socket API.
uses: Terminal-heavy developers who need to run and monitor multiple AI agent tasks without leaving the terminal.
Agent developers who need to build, debug, and orchestrate agent workflows with inter-agent communication.
Remote/server developers who require persistent agent sessions that survive SSH disconnects and terminal restarts.
Plugin ecosystem enthusiasts looking to extend pane management and workflows through a customizable plugin marketplace.

zh.tag: 魔法般的 shell 历史管理工具，支持加密同步
zh.what: Atuin 用 SQLite 数据库替代传统的 shell 历史记录，并记录命令的额外上下文（如退出码、执行时间、工作目录等）。它提供可选的端到端加密同步功能，让你在多台机器间共享历史记录。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Rust 编写的命令行工具、同步服务器、以及可选的加密同步服务。提供全屏搜索 UI、统计功能、快捷键绑定等。
zh.stack: 使用 Rust 语言开发，依赖 SQLite 数据库存储历史记录，支持加密同步（可选自建服务器或使用官方服务）。
zh.hot: 30k+ Stars 说明其解决了 shell 历史管理的核心痛点：跨设备同步、搜索效率、上下文记录。今日新增 30 Stars 保持热度。
uses: 开发者/运维人员 —— 需要跨多台机器同步和高效搜索 shell 历史
终端重度用户 —— 希望记录命令退出码、耗时等额外信息
隐私敏感用户 —— 需要端到端加密的历史同步方案

en.tag: Magical shell history tool with encrypted sync across machines
en.what: Atuin replaces your existing shell history with a SQLite database, recording additional context like exit code, duration, and working directory. It offers optional fully encrypted synchronization of history across machines via an Atuin server.
en.content: The repo includes a Rust CLI tool, a sync server, and optional encrypted sync service. Features a full-screen search UI, statistics, and key bindings.
en.stack: Built with Rust, uses SQLite for history storage, supports encrypted sync (self-hosted or official server).
en.hot: 30k+ Stars show it solves core shell history pain points: cross-device sync, search efficiency, and context recording. 30 new stars today maintain its popularity.
uses: Developers/DevOps — need cross-machine sync and efficient shell history search
Heavy terminal users — want extra context like exit codes and duration
Privacy-conscious users — require end-to-end encrypted history sync

zh.tag: Jellyfin 非官方桌面客户端，基于 CEF 和 mpv
zh.what: Jellium Desktop 是一个非官方的 Jellyfin 桌面客户端，旨在提供比网页版更流畅、更原生的媒体播放体验。它利用 CEF 渲染界面，mpv 作为播放后端，支持跨平台运行。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的客户端源码、构建脚本（支持 Linux AppImage/Flatpak、macOS DMG、Windows 安装包）以及开发工具链（just 任务运行器）。
zh.stack: 技术栈：Rust 主语言，CEF（Chromium Embedded Framework）用于 UI，mpv 用于视频播放，跨平台构建支持 Linux、macOS、Windows。
zh.hot: Jellyfin 用户对原生桌面客户端需求强烈，Jellium 凭借 CEF+mpv 的流畅体验和跨平台支持，上线即获 1400+ Star，今日新增 155，登顶 Rust 日榜第 4。
uses: Jellyfin 用户：需要比网页版更流畅、功能更丰富的桌面播放器
媒体中心爱好者：在 Linux/macOS/Windows 上统一管理并播放 Jellyfin 媒体库
Rust 开发者：学习如何结合 CEF 和 mpv 构建跨平台桌面应用

en.tag: Unofficial Jellyfin desktop client built on CEF and mpv
en.what: Jellium Desktop is an unofficial Jellyfin desktop client that offers a smoother, more native media playback experience than the web version. It uses CEF for UI rendering and mpv as the playback backend, with cross-platform support.
en.content: The repository includes full client source code, build scripts (Linux AppImage/Flatpak, macOS DMG, Windows packages), and a development toolchain (just command runner).
en.stack: Tech stack: Rust as the main language, CEF (Chromium Embedded Framework) for UI, mpv for video playback, cross-platform builds for Linux, macOS, and Windows.
en.hot: Jellyfin users have a strong demand for native desktop clients. Jellium, with its smooth CEF+mpv experience and cross-platform support, quickly gained 1400+ stars, adding 155 today, ranking 4th on Rust daily trending.
uses: Jellyfin users: need a smoother, more feature-rich desktop player than the web version
Media center enthusiasts: manage and play Jellyfin media library uniformly on Linux/macOS/Windows
Rust developers: learn how to combine CEF and mpv to build cross-platform desktop apps

zh.tag: AI 代理的便携式单文件记忆层，替代复杂 RAG 管道
zh.what: Memvid 是一个为 AI 代理设计的便携式记忆系统，将数据、嵌入、搜索结构和元数据打包到单个文件中。它无需数据库或服务器，即可提供即时检索和长期记忆，替代复杂的 RAG 管道。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Rust 核心库（memvid-core）、CLI 工具、Python SDK 和 JavaScript SDK，以及基准测试和文档。
zh.stack: 主要语言为 Rust，提供 Python 和 JavaScript SDK，依赖嵌入模型和 LLM 进行记忆检索与推理。
zh.hot: 凭借比现有系统高 35% 的准确率和极低延迟（P50 0.025ms），Memvid 吸引了 16032 颗星，成为 Rust 周榜第 9 名。
uses: AI 代理开发者 —— 为代理添加持久化、版本化的长期记忆，无需管理数据库
RAG 替代方案 —— 用单文件记忆层替换复杂检索管道，简化部署
边缘设备与无服务器场景 —— 轻量级、可移植，适合资源受限环境

en.tag: Portable single-file memory layer for AI agents, replacing complex RAG pipelines
en.what: Memvid is a portable memory system for AI agents that packages data, embeddings, search structure, and metadata into a single file. It provides instant retrieval and long-term memory without databases or servers, replacing complex RAG pipelines.
en.content: The repository contains the Rust core library (memvid-core), CLI tool, Python SDK, JavaScript SDK, along with benchmarks and documentation.
en.stack: Primarily written in Rust, with Python and JavaScript SDKs. It relies on embedding models and LLMs for memory retrieval and reasoning.
en.hot: With 35% higher accuracy than existing systems and ultra-low latency (P50 0.025ms), Memvid has gained 16,032 stars, ranking 9th on Rust weekly trending.
uses: AI agent developers — add persistent, versioned long-term memory to agents without managing databases
RAG alternative — replace complex retrieval pipelines with a single-file memory layer for simpler deployment
Edge devices and serverless scenarios — lightweight and portable, suitable for resource-constrained environments

zh.tag: 比 MinIO 快 2.3 倍的 S3 兼容对象存储
zh.what: RustFS 是一个用 Rust 构建的高性能分布式对象存储系统，兼容 S3 API。它在处理 4KB 小对象时比 MinIO 快 2.3 倍，支持与 MinIO、Ceph 等平台迁移共存，专为数据湖和 AI 场景优化。
zh.content: 仓库包含 RustFS 核心存储引擎、S3 API 网关、分布式节点管理、Docker 部署脚本及完整文档。提供二进制发布和 Docker 镜像，支持快速安装。
zh.stack: 使用 Rust 语言开发，依赖 Tokio 异步运行时、S3 API 库、分布式一致性协议（如 Raft），支持 Docker 和 Kubernetes 部署。
zh.hot: 凭借比 MinIO 快 2.3 倍的性能优势和 Rust 的内存安全特性，RustFS 在 GitHub 上获得 30k+ Stars，本周新增 277 Stars，位列 Rust 周榜第 15 名。
uses: 需要高性能 S3 兼容对象存储的 DevOps 团队 —— 替代 MinIO 提升小对象读写速度
AI/ML 数据湖场景 —— 加速模型训练中的小文件存取
云原生基础设施开发者 —— 作为分布式存储后端集成到 Kubernetes

en.tag: S3-compatible object storage 2.3x faster than MinIO for small objects
en.what: RustFS is a high-performance distributed object storage system built in Rust, compatible with S3 API. It is 2.3x faster than MinIO for 4KB objects, supports migration and coexistence with MinIO, Ceph, and is optimized for data lakes and AI workloads.
en.content: The repo contains the core storage engine, S3 API gateway, distributed node management, Docker deployment scripts, and comprehensive docs. Pre-built binaries and Docker images are available for quick setup.
en.stack: Built with Rust, leveraging Tokio async runtime, S3 API libraries, and distributed consensus (e.g., Raft). Supports Docker and Kubernetes deployment.
en.hot: With 2.3x performance advantage over MinIO and Rust's memory safety, RustFS has gained 30k+ stars on GitHub, adding 277 stars this week, ranking #15 on Rust weekly trending.
uses: DevOps teams needing high-performance S3-compatible storage — replace MinIO for faster small object I/O
AI/ML data lake scenarios — accelerate small file access during model training
Cloud-native infrastructure developers — integrate as distributed storage backend in Kubernetes

zh.tag: 基于Rust的GPU加速跨平台终端模拟器与多路复用器
zh.what: WezTerm 是一款由 Rust 编写的高性能终端模拟器，内置终端多路复用功能。它利用 GPU 加速渲染，在 Windows、macOS 和 Linux 上提供一致的流畅体验，并支持通过 Lua 进行深度定制。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的终端仿真引擎、多路复用器实现、Lua 配置运行时以及跨平台窗口层，附带详尽的用户文档与官网源码。
zh.stack: 核心采用 Rust 语言开发，依托 OpenGL / WebGPU 实现 GPU 加速渲染，使用 Lua 提供可编程配置接口，并基于各平台原生 API 构建窗口系统。
zh.hot: 凭借 Rust 的安全与性能优势，WezTerm 在开发者社区迅速走红；目前拥有 27,669 Stars，本月新增 1,068 Star，跻身 GitHub Rust 月榜第 15 位，成为替代传统终端的热门选择。
uses: 进阶开发者与运维工程师 —— 需要 GPU 加速、多标签/多窗口管理的日常终端用户
跨平台工作者 —— 希望在 Windows、macOS 和 Linux 上保持统一终端体验的开发者
配置控与键盘流用户 —— 追求通过 Lua 脚本深度定制快捷键、外观与行为的极客

en.tag: GPU-accelerated cross-platform terminal emulator and multiplexer in Rust
en.what: WezTerm is a high-performance terminal emulator written in Rust, featuring a built-in terminal multiplexer. It leverages GPU acceleration to deliver smooth, consistent experiences across Windows, macOS, and Linux, with deep customization via Lua configuration.
en.content: The repository contains a full terminal emulation engine, built-in multiplexer, Lua configuration runtime, and cross-platform windowing layer, along with comprehensive user documentation and website source.
en.stack: Core is written in Rust with GPU-accelerated rendering via OpenGL/WebGPU, programmable configuration through Lua, and native platform APIs for windowing.
en.hot: Benefiting from Rust's safety and performance, WezTerm has gained strong traction among developers, amassing 27,669 stars with 1,068 added this month and ranking 15th on GitHub's Rust monthly trending list.
uses: Advanced developers and DevOps engineers who need GPU-accelerated, multi-tab terminal sessions
Cross-platform professionals seeking a consistent terminal experience across Windows, macOS, and Linux
Power users and keyboard-driven workflow enthusiasts who want deep customization via Lua scripting

zh.tag: 24/7 本地录屏与 AI 记忆引擎，让 Agent 理解你的工作
zh.what: Screenpipe 是一款全天候本地运行的屏幕与音频记录工具，将你在电脑上的所有操作转化为可搜索、可自动化的记忆流。它专为 AI Agent 设计，让智能体能够基于你的实际工作上下文自动触发任务、生成 SOP 或执行操作，且所有数据仅存储在本地，确保隐私安全。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Rust 编写的核心录屏与音频采集引擎、本地 SQLite 向量存储、可扩展的 "pipe" 插件系统，以及跨平台桌面客户端。同时提供了与 OpenClaw、Hermes 等 100+ 应用的集成示例和 SDK。
zh.stack: 以 Rust 为主语言实现高性能底层录制与媒体处理，使用 Tauri 构建跨平台桌面端，数据存储依赖 SQLite 与本地向量数据库，并通过插件系统对接外部 AI Agent 和应用生态。
zh.hot: 作为 YC S26 项目，Screenpipe 精准切中了 AI Agent 时代对「个人上下文」的刚需，凭借 20.2k+ Stars 和单日新增 73 星的速度冲上 GitHub Rust 热榜第 3 名。其「本地优先、隐私优先」的 24/7 记忆流理念，解决了云端 Agent 无法获取用户真实工作画面的核心痛点。
uses: 需要给 AI Agent 提供完整工作上下文以自动执行复杂任务的开发者与高级用户
希望将日常操作流程自动沉淀为可搜索知识库或 SOP 的效率极客
对数据隐私要求极高、不愿将屏幕记录上传到云端的企业与个人用户
构建本地-first 自动化工作流、连接 100+ 应用的集成工程师

en.tag: 24/7 local screen recorder feeding work context to AI agents
en.what: Screenpipe is a 24/7 local screen and audio recorder that turns everything you do on your computer into a searchable, automatable memory stream. Designed for AI agents, it lets intelligent systems trigger tasks, generate SOPs, or execute actions based on your actual work context, with all data kept strictly local and private.
en.content: The repository contains a Rust-based core engine for screen and audio capture, local SQLite/vector storage, an extensible "pipe" plugin system, and cross-platform desktop apps. It also includes integration examples and SDKs for 100+ apps like OpenClaw and Hermes.
en.stack: Built primarily in Rust for high-performance capture and media processing, it uses Tauri for the cross-platform desktop client, relies on SQLite and local vector databases for storage, and connects to external AI agents and app ecosystems via a plugin system.
en.hot: As a YC S26 project, Screenpipe hits the sweet spot of the AI Agent era by providing essential personal context, racing to 20.2k+ Stars with 73 new stars today and landing at #3 on the GitHub Rust trending chart. Its "local-first, privacy-first" 24/7 memory stream solves the core pain point that cloud agents cannot access users' actual work screens.
uses: Developers and power users who need to feed AI agents complete work context for complex automation
Productivity enthusiasts wanting to turn daily workflows into searchable knowledge bases or SOPs
Enterprise and individual users with strict data privacy requirements who refuse to upload screen recordings to the cloud
Integration engineers building local-first automation workflows across 100+ connected apps

zh.tag: AI 代理的轻量级操作系统，毫秒级启动，比沙箱便宜 32 倍
zh.what: agentOS 是一个开源的轻量级 Linux VM，专为 AI 代理设计。它能在进程内运行，提供毫秒级启动和极低内存开销，并内置了 Pi、Claude Code 和 OpenCode 等 ACP 代理。
zh.content: 仓库包含 agentOS 核心库、预构建的代理软件包（如 Pi、common）以及 TypeScript SDK。还提供了快速入门指南、基准测试和与沙箱的对比文档。
zh.stack: 主语言为 Rust，提供 TypeScript/Node.js SDK。依赖包括 @rivet-dev/agentos-core、@agentos-software/common 等 npm 包。
zh.hot: 本周新增 341 星，总星数 4017，位列 GitHub Rust 周榜第 20。因其比传统沙箱快 32 倍、成本更低且安全，吸引了 AI 代理开发者的广泛关注。
uses: AI 代理开发者 —— 快速构建和测试编码代理，无需管理完整 VM
后端工程师 —— 将 AI 代理嵌入现有应用，通过绑定直接调用函数
云原生团队 —— 在 Kubernetes 或容器平台上部署代理工作负载

en.tag: A portable OS for AI agents, near-zero cold starts, up to 32x cheaper than sandboxes
en.what: agentOS is an open-source lightweight Linux VM designed for AI agents. It runs inside your process, offering near-zero cold starts (~6 ms) and minimal memory overhead, with built-in ACP agents like Pi, Claude Code, and OpenCode.
en.content: The repo contains the agentOS core library, pre-built agent software packages (e.g., Pi, common), and a TypeScript SDK. It also includes quickstart guides, benchmarks, and comparison docs with sandboxes.
en.stack: Primarily written in Rust, with a TypeScript/Node.js SDK. Dependencies include npm packages like @rivet-dev/agentos-core and @agentos-software/common.
en.hot: With 341 new stars this week and 4017 total, ranking #20 on GitHub Rust weekly trending. It's gaining traction for being 32x faster and cheaper than sandboxes, with built-in agent orchestration and granular security.
uses: AI agent developers — quickly build and test coding agents without managing full VMs
Backend engineers — embed AI agents into existing apps with direct function bindings
Cloud-native teams — deploy agent workloads on Kubernetes or container platforms

zh.tag: 快速、节省磁盘的 Node.js 包管理器
zh.what: pnpm 是一个快速且节省磁盘空间的 Node.js 包管理器。它通过内容可寻址存储来链接 node_modules 中的文件，从而避免重复下载，并支持 monorepo 和严格的依赖隔离。
zh.content: 仓库包含 pnpm CLI 的完整源代码，包括核心逻辑、锁文件处理、工作区支持以及实验性的 Rust 移植版本（pacquet）。
zh.stack: 主要使用 TypeScript 编写，核心部分有 Rust 实验性实现。依赖 Node.js 生态，支持 Windows、Linux 和 macOS。
zh.hot: pnpm 凭借其极致的速度和磁盘效率，已成为大型 monorepo 项目的首选包管理器，拥有超过 35k 星标，本周新增 90 星，持续受到开发者青睐。
uses: Node.js 开发者，希望提升包安装速度和节省磁盘空间
维护大型 monorepo 项目的团队，需要高效的依赖管理
对严格依赖隔离有要求的项目，避免幽灵依赖问题

en.tag: Fast, disk space efficient Node.js package manager
en.what: pnpm is a fast, disk space efficient package manager for Node.js. It links files from a single content-addressable storage to avoid duplication, supports monorepos, and enforces strict dependency isolation.
en.content: The repository contains the full source code of the pnpm CLI, including core logic, lockfile handling, workspace support, and an experimental Rust port (pacquet).
en.stack: Primarily written in TypeScript with an experimental Rust port. Relies on Node.js ecosystem and supports Windows, Linux, and macOS.
en.hot: With its exceptional speed and disk efficiency, pnpm has become the go-to package manager for large monorepos, boasting over 35k stars and 90 new stars this week, continuing to gain developer traction.
uses: Node.js developers seeking faster package installation and disk space savings
Teams managing large monorepo projects needing efficient dependency management
Projects requiring strict dependency isolation to avoid phantom dependencies

zh.tag: 开源 Google Maps 商家数据抓取工具，支持 CLI/Web UI/API 多端使用
zh.what: 该工具可从 Google Maps 批量提取商家名称、地址、电话、网站、评分、评价、坐标及邮箱等字段，用于构建本地商业数据库。它提供免费的命令行、网页界面和 REST API 三种使用方式，并支持对接 AI Agent 自动执行抓取任务，适用于销售线索挖掘、数据丰富与自动化调研。
zh.content: 仓库包含可独立运行的命令行程序、本地 Web 界面、REST API 服务端及可选的 SaaS 多租户平台代码，配套提供 AI Agent 技能文件、常见场景食谱和 Docker 化部署支持。
zh.stack: 核心以 Go 语言编写，依赖浏览器自动化引擎实现无头抓取，并通过并发调度与代理集成突破反爬限制，输出 CSV/JSON 等标准格式。
zh.hot: 在数据驱动的销售拓客与本地生活研究需求推动下，该仓库已积累 5.1k Stars，单日新增 84 Star，冲上 GitHub Go 语言日榜第 5 名；其多形态交付（CLI/Web/API/AI）大幅降低了不同角色的使用门槛。
uses: 销售与市场团队 —— 批量获取本地商家线索，快速构建潜在客户名单
数据分析师与咨询顾问 —— 调研区域商业分布、竞品评价与市场规模
开发者与 DevOps —— 通过 REST API 或 Docker 将地图数据集成至自有系统
AI Agent 用户 —— 让智能编码助手直接调用并执行自动化抓取任务

en.tag: Open-source Google Maps scraper with CLI, Web UI, REST API and AI agent support
en.what: This tool scrapes business details from Google Maps at scale—including name, address, phone, website, ratings, reviews, coordinates and emails. It offers a free open-source CLI, Web UI, and REST API, plus an AI Agent skill for automated scraping, serving lead generation, data enrichment, and local market research.
en.content: The repository ships with a standalone CLI, a local Web UI, a REST API server, and an optional self-hosted SaaS edition, along with AI agent skill files, workflow recipes, and Docker deployment support.
en.stack: Built in Go with a headless browser automation engine for scraping, featuring concurrent scheduling, proxy integration, and exporting to CSV/JSON.
en.hot: Driven by demand for data-driven sales prospecting and local business research, it has reached 5.1k Stars with 84 new stars today, ranking #5 on GitHub's Go daily trending list; its multi-modal delivery (CLI, Web, API, AI) lowers the barrier for diverse users.
uses: Sales and marketing teams — batch-collect local business leads to build prospect lists quickly
Data analysts and consultants — research regional business distribution, competitor reviews, and market size
Developers and DevOps — integrate map data into internal systems via REST API or Docker
AI agent users — let coding agents invoke and run automated scraping tasks directly

zh.tag: 单文件开源实时后端，内置数据库、用户认证与管理后台
zh.what: PocketBase 是一个开源 Go 后端，将 SQLite 数据库、实时订阅、文件存储、用户认证和管理后台打包在一个可执行文件中。它让开发者无需部署和维护多个服务，就能快速启动包含后端的全栈项目。
zh.content: 仓库提供各平台预构建可执行文件、Go 框架源码与基础示例，以及官方 JavaScript 和 Dart SDK；预构建版本默认启用 JS VM 插件，允许通过 JavaScript 扩展后端逻辑。
zh.stack: 基于 Go 1.25+ 构建，内嵌 SQLite 并提供 REST-ish API；客户端通过 JavaScript（浏览器、Node.js、React Native）或 Dart（全平台）SDK 与后端交互。
zh.hot: 凭借「一个文件搞定后端」的极简理念，PocketBase 已积累近 6 万 Star，日增 37 星并登上 Go 语言日榜，成为个人开发者和快速原型场景中 Firebase 的热门轻量替代品。
uses: 个人开发者与独立黑客 —— 无需运维，单二进制文件即可部署上线全栈应用
移动/Web 原型团队 —— 借助 Dart/JS SDK 快速搭建带实时同步与文件存储的后端
追求成本可控的中小项目 —— 作为 Firebase 的自托管开源替代，减少云服务依赖

en.tag: Open-source realtime backend in a single file with embedded DB, auth and admin UI
en.what: PocketBase is an open-source Go backend that bundles an embedded SQLite database with realtime subscriptions, file storage, user authentication, and an admin dashboard into a single portable executable. It enables developers to bootstrap full-stack projects without deploying and managing multiple separate services.
en.content: The repository ships prebuilt executables for multiple platforms, the Go framework source code with base examples, plus official JavaScript and Dart SDKs; the prebuilt binary enables a JS VM plugin by default for extending backend logic with JavaScript.
en.stack: Built with Go 1.25+ around an embedded SQLite database and exposed through a REST-ish API; client interaction is handled via official JavaScript (Browser, Node.js, React Native) and Dart (Web, Mobile, Desktop, CLI) SDKs.
en.hot: With its "backend in one file" philosophy, PocketBase has gained nearly 60k stars—adding 37 today and hitting the Go daily trending list—making it a popular lightweight, self-hosted alternative to Firebase for indie hackers and rapid prototyping.
uses: Indie developers and hackers — ship a zero-ops backend in a single portable binary
Mobile and web prototyping teams — rapidly build backends with realtime sync and file storage using Dart and JS SDKs
Cost-conscious small-to-medium projects — a self-hosted, open-source alternative to Firebase that reduces cloud vendor lock-in

zh.tag: 多账户 Grok API 统一网关
zh.what: Grok2API 是一个多账户 API 网关，统一管理 Grok Build、Grok Web 和 Grok Console 的 API 访问。它通过负载均衡和自动切换，提供稳定、高效的 Grok API 代理服务。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Go 后端和 React 前端，提供 Docker 镜像支持 amd64/arm64 部署。后端实现多账户管理与 API 路由，前端提供 Web 管理界面。
zh.stack: Go 1.26 后端 + React 19 前端，支持 Docker 部署。
zh.hot: 本周新增 551 星，总星数达 6563，位列 GitHub 周榜第 14。Grok API 需求旺盛，该工具简化了多账户管理，受到开发者追捧。
uses: 开发者 —— 统一管理多个 Grok 账户的 API 访问
AI 应用集成 —— 为自有应用提供稳定的 Grok API 代理
学习研究 —— 了解 API 网关与多账户负载均衡实现

en.tag: Multi-account API gateway for Grok services
en.what: Grok2API is a multi-account API gateway that unifies access to Grok Build, Grok Web, and Grok Console APIs. It provides stable and efficient API proxying with load balancing and automatic account switching.
en.content: The repo contains a Go backend and a React frontend, with Docker images for amd64/arm64. The backend handles multi-account management and API routing, while the frontend provides a web admin interface.
en.stack: Go 1.26 backend + React 19 frontend, Docker deployment supported.
en.hot: Gained 551 stars this week, total 6563, ranking #14 on GitHub weekly trending. High demand for Grok API access drives popularity as it simplifies multi-account management.
uses: Developers — centrally manage API access for multiple Grok accounts
AI app integration — provide stable Grok API proxy for own applications
Learning & research — study API gateway and multi-account load balancing

zh.tag: 自托管的虚拟浏览器，支持多人同时访问
zh.what: Neko 是一个自托管的虚拟浏览器，运行在 Docker 中，使用 WebRTC 技术实现低延迟的远程浏览体验。它允许用户从任何地方安全、私密地访问互联网，并支持多人同时共享同一个浏览器环境。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 Docker 镜像、WebRTC 信令服务器、浏览器自动化脚本以及可配置的 UI 界面。支持多种浏览器（如 Firefox、Chromium）和丰富的自定义选项。
zh.stack: 基于 Go 语言开发，使用 WebRTC 进行实时音视频传输，依赖 Docker 容器化部署。前端采用 React，后端与浏览器通过 WebSocket 通信。
zh.hot: Neko 凭借其自托管、隐私友好和多人协作的特性，在开发者社区中广受欢迎，本周新增 321 颗星，总星数达 21714。
uses: 开发者和测试人员 —— 在隔离环境中测试 Web 应用或跨浏览器兼容性
隐私敏感用户 —— 通过虚拟浏览器匿名访问互联网，保护本地 IP
团队协作 —— 多人共享浏览器会话，用于看板、演示或协同浏览
活动组织者 —— 托管观影派对或互动演示，参与者实时同步观看

en.tag: Self-hosted virtual browser with multi-user support via WebRTC
en.what: Neko is a self-hosted virtual browser that runs in Docker and uses WebRTC for low-latency remote browsing. It enables secure and private internet access from anywhere, with multi-user support for shared browsing sessions.
en.content: The repository includes Docker images, a WebRTC signaling server, browser automation scripts, and a configurable UI. It supports multiple browsers (e.g., Firefox, Chromium) and extensive customization.
en.stack: Built with Go, uses WebRTC for real-time streaming, Docker for containerization. Frontend is React, backend communicates with the browser via WebSocket.
en.hot: Neko gains popularity for its self-hosted, privacy-friendly, and collaborative features, adding 321 stars this week to reach 21,714 total.
uses: Developers and testers — test web apps or cross-browser compatibility in an isolated environment
Privacy-conscious users — browse anonymously via a virtual browser to hide local IP
Teams — share browser sessions for dashboards, demos, or collaborative browsing
Event organizers — host watch parties or interactive presentations with real-time sync

zh.tag: 高性能自托管邮件列表管理器，单二进制部署
zh.what: listmonk 是一个高性能、自托管的新闻通讯和邮件列表管理器，提供现代化仪表盘。它作为一个单二进制应用运行，使用 PostgreSQL 作为数据存储，支持 Docker 或直接二进制部署。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Go 后端和 Vue + Buefy 前端，提供完整的邮件列表管理功能，包括订阅管理、模板编辑、统计分析和发送队列。
zh.stack: 后端使用 Go 语言，前端使用 Vue.js 和 Buefy UI 框架，数据存储依赖 PostgreSQL。
zh.hot: 自托管邮件服务需求旺盛，listmonk 以高性能、单二进制部署和现代化界面吸引开发者，本周新增 213 星，总星数超 2.2 万。
uses: 需要自托管邮件列表的独立开发者或小团队
希望避免第三方邮件服务依赖的企业或组织
对邮件发送性能和隐私有高要求的用户

en.tag: High-performance, self-hosted newsletter & mailing list manager, single binary
en.what: listmonk is a high-performance, self-hosted newsletter and mailing list manager with a modern dashboard. It runs as a single binary and uses PostgreSQL as its data store, supporting Docker or direct binary deployment.
en.content: The repo contains a Go backend and Vue + Buefy frontend, offering full mailing list management features including subscriber management, template editing, analytics, and send queues.
en.stack: Backend is written in Go, frontend uses Vue.js with Buefy UI framework, and data storage relies on PostgreSQL.
en.hot: Self-hosted email services are in high demand; listmonk attracts developers with its high performance, single binary deployment, and modern UI, gaining 213 stars this week and over 22k total.
uses: Independent developers or small teams needing self-hosted mailing lists
Organizations wanting to avoid reliance on third-party email services
Users with high performance and privacy requirements for email campaigns

zh.tag: 开源实时基础设施监控平台，秒级粒度
zh.what: Netdata 是一个开源的、实时的、AI 驱动的全栈可观测性平台，专为基础设施监控设计。它能够收集数千个指标，并以每秒一次的频率展示，帮助团队快速发现和诊断问题。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Netdata 的核心监控代理、仪表盘、告警引擎以及 AI/ML 异常检测模块。支持 Docker、Kubernetes、Linux 等多种部署方式。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言开发，依赖 C 语言插件和 Node.js 前端。支持多种数据采集插件（如 Prometheus、StatsD）和存储后端。
zh.hot: 拥有近 8 万 Star，是监控领域最受欢迎的开源项目之一。今日新增 51 Star，位列 Go 语言日榜第 3，因其零配置、秒级粒度和 AI 增强的异常检测能力持续吸引用户。
uses: 运维工程师 —— 实时监控服务器、容器和云基础设施性能
DevOps 团队 —— 集成到 CI/CD 流水线，快速定位性能瓶颈
SRE —— 利用 AI 异常检测减少告警噪音，提升可观测性

en.tag: Open-source real-time infrastructure monitoring platform with per-second granularity
en.what: Netdata is an open-source, real-time, AI-powered full-stack observability platform designed for infrastructure monitoring. It collects thousands of metrics and displays them at per-second granularity, enabling teams to quickly detect and diagnose issues.
en.content: The repository contains the core monitoring agent, dashboard, alerting engine, and AI/ML anomaly detection module. Supports deployment via Docker, Kubernetes, Linux, and more.
en.stack: Primarily developed in Go, with C plugins and a Node.js frontend. Supports various data collection plugins (e.g., Prometheus, StatsD) and storage backends.
en.hot: With nearly 80K stars, it's one of the most popular open-source monitoring projects. Gaining 51 stars today, ranking #3 on Go daily trending, its zero-config, per-second granularity, and AI-enhanced anomaly detection continue to attract users.
uses: Ops engineers — real-time monitoring of servers, containers, and cloud infrastructure
DevOps teams — integrate into CI/CD pipelines for quick performance bottleneck identification
SREs — leverage AI anomaly detection to reduce alert noise and improve observability

zh.tag: 自托管的经典AIM/ICQ即时通讯服务器
zh.what: Open OSCAR Server 是一个用 Go 编写的开源即时通讯服务器，兼容经典的 AIM 和 ICQ 客户端。它允许用户自托管，重现上世纪90年代末至2000年代初的即时通讯体验，支持多种协议和客户端。
zh.content: 仓库包含服务器核心代码、客户端兼容性文档（如 AIM v1.x-v7.x、ICQ 98x-5.x）、快速启动指南（Linux/macOS/Windows）以及管理 API。支持好友列表、聊天室、文件传输、离线消息等功能。
zh.stack: 使用 Go 语言开发，依赖标准库及少量第三方包；客户端支持多种经典协议（OSCAR、TOC1/TOC2）。
zh.hot: 怀旧情怀驱动：AIM 和 ICQ 是互联网一代人的集体记忆，该项目让这些经典客户端重新可用。本周新增 88 星，总星数 1436，位列 Go 周榜第 9。
uses: 怀旧用户 —— 想重新使用经典 AIM/ICQ 客户端聊天的人
自托管爱好者 —— 希望搭建私有即时通讯服务器的技术用户
复古技术研究者 —— 研究早期即时通讯协议和客户端兼容性

en.tag: Self-hostable instant messaging server compatible with classic AIM and ICQ clients
en.what: Open OSCAR Server is an open-source instant messaging server written in Go, compatible with classic AIM and ICQ clients. It enables self-hosting to recreate the late 90s and early 2000s IM experience, supporting multiple protocols and clients.
en.content: The repository includes server core code, client compatibility docs (e.g., AIM v1.x-v7.x, ICQ 98x-5.x), quickstart guides for Linux/macOS/Windows, and a management API. Features include buddy lists, chat rooms, file transfer, offline messaging, etc.
en.stack: Developed in Go, relying on standard library and minimal third-party packages; supports classic protocols like OSCAR, TOC1/TOC2 for clients.
en.hot: Driven by nostalgia: AIM and ICQ are collective memories for a generation, and this project revives those classic clients. With 88 new stars this week and 1436 total, it ranks #9 on Go weekly trending.
uses: Nostalgic users — those who want to chat using classic AIM/ICQ clients again
Self-hosting enthusiasts — tech users who want to run their own private IM server
Retro tech researchers — studying early IM protocols and client compatibility

zh.tag: 高人气内网穿透与反向代理工具，支持 TCP/UDP/HTTP/HTTPS 及 P2P 模式
zh.what: frp 是一个快速反向代理工具，用于将位于 NAT 或防火墙后的本地服务器暴露到公网。它支持 TCP、UDP、HTTP 和 HTTPS 协议，并允许通过域名将请求转发到内网服务，同时提供 P2P 直连模式。
zh.content: 仓库包含 frps（服务端）和 frpc（客户端）二进制及源码，提供完整的配置文件示例、文档（含中文）以及多种协议转发和 P2P 穿透的实现代码。
zh.stack: 以 Go 语言为主开发，支持跨平台编译部署，依赖 Go 标准库及网络协议栈实现高性能内网穿透。
zh.hot: 作为内网穿透领域的事实标准工具，frp 已积累超过 10.8 万 Star，本月新增 879 Star，稳居 Go 语言月榜前列，深受开发者与运维人员信赖。
uses: 远程办公与家庭服务器运维——将内网 SSH、NAS、Web 服务安全暴露到公网
本地开发调试——让前端、后端、Webhook 在公网可访问
云原生与 IoT 场景——为无公网 IP 的容器、边缘设备提供稳定入口
技术爱好者与极客——快速搭建个人博客、图床、游戏服务器等内网穿透服务

en.tag: Popular fast reverse proxy for NAT traversal, supporting TCP/UDP/HTTP/HTTPS and P2P mode
en.what: frp is a fast reverse proxy that exposes local servers behind NAT or firewalls to the internet. It supports TCP, UDP, HTTP, and HTTPS protocols, forwards requests to internal services via domain names, and offers a P2P connect mode.
en.content: The repository contains frps (server) and frpc (client) binaries and source code, complete configuration examples, documentation (including Chinese), and implementations for multi-protocol forwarding and P2P tunneling.
en.stack: Written primarily in Go with cross-platform compilation support, relying on Go's standard library and networking stack to deliver high-performance NAT traversal.
en.hot: A de-facto standard for NAT traversal, frp has accumulated over 108K stars, gaining 879 this month alone and ranking high on the Go monthly trending list, trusted by developers and ops worldwide.
uses: Remote work and homelab ops — securely expose internal SSH, NAS, and web services to the internet
Local development and debugging — make frontend, backend, and webhook endpoints publicly accessible
Cloud-native and IoT scenarios — provide stable ingress for containers and edge devices without public IPs
Hobbyists and geeks — quickly tunnel personal blogs, image hosting, and game servers from behind NAT

zh.tag: 基于K8s的代理工作负载调度与管理系统
zh.what: Agent Substrate 是一个构建在 Kubernetes 之上的系统，专门管理代理类工作负载，实现比纯 K8s 更高的规模、效率和更低延迟。它通过将大量“角色”（如 AI 代理）映射到少量就绪“工作者”（K8s Pod）上，利用代理应用大部分时间空闲的特点实现高复用。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心系统代码、演示（如 Counter Demo 和 Secret Agent Demo）以及文档。核心功能包括角色生命周期管理、实时分配和流量路由。
zh.stack: 技术栈基于 Go 语言，构建在 Kubernetes 之上，使用标准 OCI 容器，与框架无关。
zh.hot: 本周新增 109 颗星，位列 Go 周榜第 11。它解决了 AI 代理大规模部署的痛点，提供高效的资源复用和低延迟调度，吸引了关注 Agentic Infrastructure 的开发者。
uses: AI 代理平台开发者 —— 需要大规模运行有状态 AI 代理，降低基础设施成本
Kubernetes 高级用户 —— 希望优化 K8s 集群利用率，管理特殊工作负载
云原生基础设施工程师 —— 探索 Agentic Infrastructure 方案

en.tag: Kubernetes-based agent workload scheduling and management system
en.what: Agent Substrate is a system built on top of Kubernetes that manages agent-like workloads to achieve higher scale, efficiency, and lower latency than Kubernetes alone. It maps a large set of 'actors' (e.g., AI agents) onto a smaller set of ready 'workers' (K8s Pods), leveraging the fact that agent applications are mostly idle for heavy multiplexing.
en.content: The repository contains core system code, demos (e.g., Counter Demo and Secret Agent Demo), and documentation. Core features include actor lifecycle management, real-time assignment, and traffic routing.
en.stack: Built with Go on top of Kubernetes, using standard OCI containers, framework-agnostic.
en.hot: Gained 109 stars this week, ranking 11th in Go weekly. It addresses the pain point of large-scale AI agent deployment with efficient resource multiplexing and low-latency scheduling, attracting developers interested in Agentic Infrastructure.
uses: AI agent platform developers — need to run stateful AI agents at scale with lower infrastructure cost
Advanced Kubernetes users — want to optimize cluster utilization and manage specialized workloads
Cloud-native infrastructure engineers — exploring Agentic Infrastructure solutions

zh.tag: 微软官方 Go 语言 AI Agent 框架，生产级多智能体编排
zh.what: 这是一个用于构建、编排和部署 AI 智能体及多智能体工作流的 Go 框架。它提供了一致的基础设施，支持从原型到生产的全流程，并集成了多种 AI 服务和协议。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Go 实现的 Agent Framework 核心库、示例代码、文档以及 .NET/Go 功能对比表。支持图模式编排、检查点、可观测性、人工介入等生产级特性。
zh.stack: 技术栈为 Go 语言，依赖 Microsoft Foundry、Azure OpenAI、OpenAI、MCP、A2A、AG-UI、GitHub Copilot SDK 等生态。
zh.hot: 微软官方出品，填补 Go 生态中生产级 Agent 框架的空白，本周新增 179 星，总星数 371，增长迅猛。
uses: Go 开发者构建生产级 AI 智能体应用
需要多智能体编排、图模式工作流的团队
希望集成 Microsoft Foundry、Azure OpenAI 等服务的项目
从原型到生产需要一致性基础设施的 AI 项目

en.tag: Microsoft's official Go framework for building production-grade AI agents and multi-agent workflows
en.what: A Go framework for building, orchestrating, and deploying AI agents and multi-agent workflows. It provides a consistent foundation from prototype to production, integrating with various AI services and protocols.
en.content: Contains the Go implementation of Agent Framework core library, samples, documentation, and a .NET/Go feature comparison. Supports graph-based orchestration, checkpointing, observability, human-in-the-loop, etc.
en.stack: Built with Go, leveraging Microsoft Foundry, Azure OpenAI, OpenAI, MCP, A2A, AG-UI, GitHub Copilot SDK, and more.
en.hot: Official Microsoft release filling the gap for production-grade Agent frameworks in Go, gaining 179 stars this week (total 371) with rapid growth.
uses: Go developers building production-grade AI agent applications
Teams needing multi-agent orchestration and graph-based workflows
Projects integrating with Microsoft Foundry, Azure OpenAI, etc.
AI projects requiring consistent infrastructure from prototype to production

zh.tag: Go 语言的可观测性标准实现
zh.what: OpenTelemetry-Go 是 OpenTelemetry 的 Go 语言实现，提供 API 和 SDK 来测量软件性能和行为，并将数据发送到可观测性平台。它支持追踪（稳定）、指标（稳定）和日志（Beta）三大信号。
zh.content: 仓库包含 OpenTelemetry Go API 和 SDK，以及导出器、处理器等组件，用于生成、处理和导出遥测数据。
zh.stack: 纯 Go 实现，依赖 Go 标准库和少量第三方包，支持多种导出协议（如 OTLP）。
zh.hot: 作为云原生可观测性标准 OpenTelemetry 的官方 Go 实现，随着微服务和云原生架构普及，需求持续增长。本周新增 42 星，总星数 6483，位列 Go 周榜第 12。
uses: Go 后端服务开发者，集成可观测性到应用中
运维和 SRE 团队，统一监控和追踪基础设施
云原生平台开发者，构建可观测性工具链

en.tag: Official Go implementation of OpenTelemetry for observability
en.what: OpenTelemetry-Go is the Go implementation of OpenTelemetry, providing APIs and SDK to measure software performance and behavior, and send data to observability platforms. It supports traces (stable), metrics (stable), and logs (beta).
en.content: The repository contains the OpenTelemetry Go API and SDK, along with exporters, processors, and other components for generating, processing, and exporting telemetry data.
en.stack: Pure Go implementation, depends on Go standard library and a few third-party packages, supports multiple export protocols (e.g., OTLP).
en.hot: As the official Go implementation of the cloud-native observability standard OpenTelemetry, its demand grows with microservices and cloud-native adoption. Gained 42 stars this week, total 6483, ranking 12th in Go weekly trending.
uses: Go backend developers integrating observability into applications
Ops and SRE teams unifying monitoring and tracing across infrastructure
Cloud-native platform developers building observability toolchains

zh.tag: AI 代理的后端基础设施，像微服务一样运行智能体
zh.what: AgentField 是一个 AI 后端平台，允许开发者像构建 API 一样构建 AI 代理，并像微服务一样运行成千上万个代理。它提供控制平面来排队、重试和追踪每个分支，实现从单个请求扇出到数千个代理。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Go 编写的核心后端服务、Python/Go/TypeScript SDK 以及 REST API，支持快速集成和部署。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言构建，提供多语言 SDK（Python、Go、TypeScript）和 REST API，依赖现代云原生基础设施。
zh.hot: 本周新增 77 星，总星数 2434，位列 GitHub Go 周榜第 14。其将 AI 代理与微服务架构结合的理念，满足了大规模 AI 代理编排的迫切需求。
uses: AI 应用开发者 —— 快速构建和部署可扩展的 AI 代理服务
微服务架构师 —— 将 AI 代理作为微服务集成到现有系统中
企业 AI 团队 —— 管理大规模代理工作流，确保可靠性和可观测性

en.tag: AI backend to build, run and scale agents like microservices
en.what: AgentField is an AI backend platform that lets developers build AI agents like APIs and run thousands of them like microservices. It provides a control plane to queue, retry, and trace every branch, fanning out a single request to thousands of agents.
en.content: The repo contains the core backend service written in Go, along with Python, Go, and TypeScript SDKs and a REST API for quick integration and deployment.
en.stack: Built primarily in Go, with multi-language SDKs (Python, Go, TypeScript) and REST API, relying on modern cloud-native infrastructure.
en.hot: With 77 new stars this week and 2434 total, ranking #14 on GitHub Go weekly trending. Its concept of combining AI agents with microservices architecture addresses the urgent need for large-scale agent orchestration.
uses: AI application developers — quickly build and deploy scalable AI agent services
Microservices architects — integrate AI agents as microservices into existing systems
Enterprise AI teams — manage large-scale agent workflows with reliability and observability

zh.tag: 本地运行开源大模型的极简工具
zh.what: Ollama 是一个让开发者能在本地快速运行和管理开源大模型的工具。它支持 Kimi、GLM、DeepSeek、Qwen、Gemma 等主流模型，并提供简洁的 CLI 和 REST API。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Ollama 的 Go 语言源码、安装脚本（macOS/Windows/Linux/Docker）、Python 和 JavaScript 客户端库，以及模型库和集成文档。
zh.stack: 基于 Go 开发，后端依赖 llama.cpp 进行模型推理，提供 REST API 和 Python/JS SDK。
zh.hot: 176k+ Stars 彰显其作为本地 AI 基础设施的统治地位，本周新增 594 Stars 热度不减。支持最新模型和 Claude Code 等集成，持续吸引开发者。
uses: 开发者 —— 本地测试和调试开源大模型
AI 应用构建者 —— 通过 REST API 集成模型到应用
隐私敏感用户 —— 本地运行模型避免数据外传
学习研究 —— 快速体验不同模型无需云服务

en.tag: Run open-source LLMs locally with ease
en.what: Ollama is a tool that lets developers quickly run and manage open-source large language models locally. It supports mainstream models like Kimi, GLM, DeepSeek, Qwen, Gemma, and provides a simple CLI and REST API.
en.content: The repo contains Ollama's Go source code, install scripts (macOS/Windows/Linux/Docker), Python and JavaScript client libraries, model library, and integration docs.
en.stack: Built with Go, backend relies on llama.cpp for model inference, provides REST API and Python/JS SDKs.
en.hot: With 176k+ stars, it dominates as local AI infrastructure; 594 new stars this week show sustained interest. Support for latest models and integrations like Claude Code keeps developers engaged.
uses: Developers — test and debug open-source LLMs locally
AI app builders — integrate models via REST API
Privacy-conscious users — run models locally to avoid data leaks
Learners — quickly try different models without cloud services

zh.tag: 并行AI编码代理的IDE与编排中枢
zh.what: Agent Orchestrator 是一款面向开发者的 Agent IDE，用于统一管理并调度多个 AI 编码代理并行工作。它通过隔离的 Git 工作树为每个代理创建独立会话，自动收集 CI 失败、代码审查意见和合并冲突等反馈，并精准路由给对应代理处理，实现从任务规划到代码合并的全闭环自动化。
zh.content: 包含桌面端应用与 CLI 的双模态入口、基于 Go 构建的本地守护进程（daemon）与后端编排核心，以及用于展示并行会话状态的仪表盘界面。代码围绕“项目管理-会话隔离-代理运行-反馈闭环”四大模块组织。
zh.stack: 以 Go 为主语言构建后端编排引擎与本地守护进程，利用 Git worktree 实现工作区隔离；前端提供桌面可视化仪表盘，并对接 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、Kimi Code 等主流终端型编码代理 CLI。
zh.hot: 随着 AI 编码代理从“单兵作战”走向“多代理并行”，开发者急需一个调度中枢来避免分支混乱与终端失控。该项目凭借精准的 CI/Review/冲突自动回环机制，在 Go 领域迅速获得 8.3k+ Stars，单日新增 30 Stars 并跻身 GitHub Trending 日榜前 20，成为多代理协同赛道的早期标杆。
uses: 大型项目维护者 —— 需要同时派发多个独立编码任务给不同 AI 代理并统一收口
高频迭代团队 —— 希望将 CI 失败、Code Review 意见自动回流给对应代理自我修复
AI 工具链集成者 —— 需要在一个面板中调度 Claude Code、Cursor、Kimi 等多种终端代理
全栈开发者 —— 寻求替代手动多终端管理，实现并行开发工作流的自动化编排

en.tag: IDE and orchestration hub for parallel AI coding agents
en.what: Agent Orchestrator is an IDE that lets developers supervise fleets of parallel AI coding agents from a single interface. It spawns each agent in an isolated git worktree, monitors their sessions, and automatically routes CI failures, review comments, and merge conflicts back to the correct agent, turning chaotic multi-agent coding into a managed workflow.
en.content: The repository includes a desktop app and CLI, a local Go daemon and backend orchestration engine, plus a dashboard for tracking parallel agent sessions. It is organized around four modules: project management, session isolation, agent runtime, and feedback loops.
en.stack: Built primarily in Go for the backend orchestration engine and local daemon, using Git worktrees for workspace isolation. It features a desktop frontend dashboard and integrates with terminal-based coding agents like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Kimi Code.
en.hot: As AI coding agents shift from solo to parallel execution, developers urgently need a central supervisor to prevent branch chaos and lost terminals. With its tight feedback loops for CI, reviews, and merge conflicts, the project has earned 8.3k+ Stars, adding 30 today and hitting GitHub's Go Daily Trending Top 20 as an early leader in multi-agent orchestration.
uses: Engineering leads running large codebases who need to dispatch isolated coding tasks to multiple AI agents from one hub
Fast-moving teams that want CI failures and review comments automatically routed back to the right agent for self-healing
AI tooling integrators looking to supervise Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and Kimi Code agents through a single unified dashboard
Full-stack developers seeking to replace manual multi-terminal management with automated parallel agent orchestration

zh.tag: 轻量级 Kubernetes，生产就绪，单二进制安装
zh.what: K3s 是一个轻量级但完全兼容的 Kubernetes 发行版，专为资源受限环境设计。它通过将 Kubernetes 打包为单个二进制文件并支持 SQLite 作为默认存储，大幅降低了部署复杂度和内存占用。
zh.content: 仓库包含 K3s 的完整源代码、构建脚本、文档和示例。核心是一个小于 100MB 的二进制文件，集成了 Kubernetes 控制平面、kubelet、containerd、Flannel、CoreDNS、Traefik 等组件。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言开发，依赖 containerd、runc、Flannel、CoreDNS、Traefik、Klipper-lb 等开源组件。支持 SQLite、etcd、MariaDB、MySQL、Postgres 作为存储后端。
zh.hot: K3s 拥有 33,555 颗星，因其在边缘计算、IoT、CI/CD 和开发环境中的广泛适用性而持续热门。本周新增 72 星，稳居 Go 语言周榜第 17 名，体现了其在轻量级 Kubernetes 领域的标杆地位。
uses: 边缘计算与物联网场景 —— 在资源有限的设备上运行 Kubernetes
CI/CD 流水线 —— 快速搭建临时测试集群
开发与测试环境 —— 本地快速启动 Kubernetes 集群
嵌入式系统 —— 将 Kubernetes 集成到其他应用中

en.tag: Lightweight Kubernetes, production-ready, single binary install
en.what: K3s is a lightweight yet fully conformant Kubernetes distribution designed for resource-constrained environments. It reduces deployment complexity and memory footprint by packaging Kubernetes as a single binary and supporting SQLite as the default storage backend.
en.content: The repository contains the full source code, build scripts, documentation, and examples for K3s. The core is a single binary under 100MB that integrates the Kubernetes control plane, kubelet, containerd, Flannel, CoreDNS, Traefik, and other components.
en.stack: Primarily developed in Go, with dependencies on containerd, runc, Flannel, CoreDNS, Traefik, Klipper-lb, and other open-source components. Supports SQLite, etcd, MariaDB, MySQL, and Postgres as storage backends.
en.hot: With 33,555 stars, K3s remains popular due to its broad applicability in edge computing, IoT, CI/CD, and development environments. Adding 72 stars this week, it ranks 17th on the Go weekly trending list, solidifying its benchmark status in lightweight Kubernetes.
uses: Edge computing and IoT — run Kubernetes on resource-constrained devices
CI/CD pipelines — quickly spin up ephemeral test clusters
Development and testing — launch a local Kubernetes cluster rapidly
Embedded systems — embed Kubernetes into other applications

zh.tag: 开源托管代理平台，让编码代理成为真正的队友
zh.what: Multica 是一个开源平台，用于管理和协调 AI 编码代理。你可以像给同事分配任务一样给代理分配 Issue，代理会自动编写代码、报告阻塞并更新状态，无需手动复制粘贴提示或持续监控。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Multica 核心服务（Go 编写）、Web 看板界面、CLI 工具以及支持多种代理后端（如 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor Agent 等）的集成层。还提供 Squad 功能，用于代理团队的路由和任务分配。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言构建，前端可能采用现代 Web 框架（未明确说明），依赖多种第三方 AI 代理 CLI 工具。支持自托管部署。
zh.hot: 随着 AI 编码代理的普及，开发者迫切需要统一的管理平台。Multica 提供类似 Jira 的代理任务管理体验，本周新增 1067 星，总星数超 4.1 万，位居 Go 语言周榜第 5。
uses: 开发团队：将 AI 编码代理集成到工作流中，像管理人类队友一样管理代理
AI 代理开发者：测试和比较不同代理后端（如 Claude Code vs Codex）的表现
开源贡献者：参与构建下一代人机协作基础设施

en.tag: Open-source managed agents platform — turn coding agents into real teammates
en.what: Multica is an open-source platform for managing and orchestrating AI coding agents. You can assign issues to agents like you would to a colleague — they autonomously write code, report blockers, and update statuses, eliminating the need for copy-pasting prompts or babysitting runs.
en.content: The repo contains the Multica core service (written in Go), a web board UI, CLI tools, and an integration layer supporting multiple agent backends (e.g., Claude Code, Codex, Cursor Agent). It also includes Squad functionality for routing and task delegation within agent teams.
en.stack: Primarily built with Go, with a web frontend (framework unspecified), and integrates with various third-party AI agent CLIs. Supports self-hosting.
en.hot: As AI coding agents proliferate, developers urgently need a unified management platform. Multica offers a Jira-like experience for agent task management, gaining 1,067 stars this week and over 41K total, ranking #5 on the Go weekly trending list.
uses: Development teams: integrate AI coding agents into workflows and manage them like human teammates
AI agent developers: test and compare performance of different agent backends (e.g., Claude Code vs Codex)
Open source contributors: participate in building next-gen human-AI collaboration infrastructure

zh.tag: 为AI代理生成最佳CLI的自动化工具
zh.what: CLI Printing Press 是一个自动生成 CLI 的工具，它读取官方 API 文档，研究社区 CLI 和 MCP 服务器，甚至嗅探未公开的 API（如 Google Flights），然后融合所有特性，生成一个 token 高效的 Go CLI、一个 Claude Code skill 和一个 MCP 服务器。目标是让 AI 代理拥有肌肉记忆般的 CLI，无需查阅文档、不走弯路、不浪费 token。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Go 源代码、文档（docs/CODEX.md、docs/CURSOR.md）、示例 CLI（如 ESPN、flight-goat、linear-pp-cli）以及一个完整的打印库（printing-press.dev）。
zh.stack: Go 语言开发，依赖 SQLite 本地存储，支持 MCP 协议和 Claude Code skills。
zh.hot: 本周新增 228 星，总星数 4224，位列 Go 周榜第 19。它解决了 AI 代理使用 API 时的效率痛点，通过自动生成最优 CLI 节省 token 和时间，概念新颖且实用。
uses: AI 代理开发者 —— 为代理生成专用 CLI，提升交互效率
API 使用者 —— 快速获得一个功能全面的 CLI，无需手动编写
CLI 工具爱好者 —— 学习如何构建 agent-native 的 CLI

en.tag: Auto-generates the GOAT CLI for any API, designed for AI agents first
en.what: CLI Printing Press automatically generates the best CLI for any API by reading official docs, studying community CLIs and MCP servers, and even sniffing unpublished APIs. It fuses everything into a token-efficient Go CLI, a Claude Code skill, and an MCP server, designed for AI agents to use with zero friction.
en.content: The repo contains Go source code, documentation (docs/CODEX.md, docs/CURSOR.md), example CLIs (ESPN, flight-goat, linear-pp-cli), and a full catalog at printingpress.dev.
en.stack: Built with Go, uses SQLite for local storage, supports MCP protocol and Claude Code skills.
en.hot: Gained 228 stars this week (total 4,224), ranked #19 on Go weekly trending. It addresses the pain point of AI agents wasting tokens on API calls by auto-generating optimized CLIs, a novel and practical concept.
uses: AI agent developers — generate dedicated CLIs for agents to boost efficiency
API consumers — quickly get a feature-rich CLI without manual coding
CLI enthusiasts — learn how to build agent-native CLIs

zh.tag: Mac上运行Linux容器与虚拟机的轻量级工具
zh.what: Lima 在 macOS（及 Linux）上启动 Linux 虚拟机，提供自动文件共享与端口转发，让用户无需复杂配置即可运行 Linux 环境和容器。它原生支持 containerd/nerdctl，也兼容 Docker、Podman 和 Kubernetes 等主流引擎。
zh.content: 仓库包含命令行工具 limactl、一组开箱即用的虚拟机模板（docker、k8s 等），以及基于 QEMU 或 Apple Virtualization Framework 的虚拟化后端，实现完整的虚拟机生命周期管理。
zh.stack: 基于 Go 语言开发，底层使用 QEMU 或 Apple Virtualization Framework (VZ) 提供虚拟化能力，并集成 containerd、nerdctl 等容器运行时。
zh.hot: 仓库已收获 21.5k Star，并位列 Go 语言日榜第 3；它精准解决了 macOS 开发者运行 Linux 容器和 Kubernetes 的痛点，且被 Rancher Desktop、Colima、Finch 等主流桌面容器方案广泛采用。
uses: macOS 开发者需要在本地快速运行 Linux 容器、Kubernetes 或构建跨平台应用
寻求类 WSL2 体验、希望在 macOS 上获得原生 Linux 环境的跨平台用户
为 Rancher Desktop、Colima 等上层容器工具提供底层虚拟机支持的基础设施开发者

en.tag: Lightweight Linux VM and container runtime for macOS
en.what: Lima launches Linux VMs on macOS and Linux hosts with automatic file sharing and port forwarding, enabling users to run Linux environments and containers without complex setup. It natively supports containerd and nerdctl while also offering templates for Docker, Podman, and Kubernetes.
en.content: The repository includes the limactl CLI, a set of ready-to-use VM templates (docker, k8s, etc.), and virtualization backends based on QEMU or Apple Virtualization Framework for full VM lifecycle management.
en.stack: Written in Go, it uses QEMU or the Apple Virtualization Framework (VZ) for virtualization and integrates with containerd, nerdctl, and other container runtimes.
en.hot: With 21.5k stars and ranked #3 on GitHub's Go daily trending list, Lima solves the core pain point of running Linux containers and Kubernetes on macOS. It is also widely adopted by mainstream desktop container tools like Rancher Desktop, Colima, and Finch.
uses: macOS developers who need to run Linux containers, Kubernetes, or build cross-platform apps locally
Cross-platform users seeking a WSL2-like experience and native Linux environment on macOS
Infrastructure developers providing underlying VM support for higher-level tools like Rancher Desktop and Colima

zh.tag: 微软开源的新版 Windows 终端与控制台主机
zh.what: Windows Terminal 是一个现代、快速、高效、强大且高效的终端应用程序，适用于命令行工具和 shell（如命令提示符、PowerShell 和 WSL）。它同时包含原始的 Windows 控制台主机 conhost.exe。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Windows Terminal、Windows Terminal Preview、控制台主机 conhost.exe 以及两者共享的组件，还有 ColorTool 和示例项目。
zh.stack: 主要使用 C++ 开发，依赖 Windows 10 2004 及以上版本，支持通过 Microsoft Store、GitHub、winget、Chocolatey 和 Scoop 安装。
zh.hot: 作为微软官方开源项目，拥有超过 10 万 Star，今日新增 232，持续受到开发者关注，因为它提供了现代化的终端体验并替代了旧版控制台。
uses: Windows 开发者 —— 需要一个功能丰富的现代终端来运行命令行工具和 shell
系统管理员 —— 管理多个命令行环境，如 PowerShell、CMD 和 WSL
开源贡献者 —— 希望参与 Windows 终端或控制台主机的开发

en.tag: Microsoft's open-source new Windows Terminal and console host
en.what: Windows Terminal is a modern, fast, efficient, powerful, and productive terminal application for users of command-line tools and shells like Command Prompt, PowerShell, and WSL. It also includes the original Windows console host (conhost.exe).
en.content: The repo contains Windows Terminal, Windows Terminal Preview, the console host conhost.exe, shared components, ColorTool, and sample projects.
en.stack: Primarily developed in C++, requires Windows 10 2004 or later, and can be installed via Microsoft Store, GitHub, winget, Chocolatey, and Scoop.
en.hot: As an official Microsoft open-source project with over 100k stars and 232 new stars today, it remains popular for providing a modern terminal experience and replacing the legacy console.
uses: Windows developers — need a feature-rich modern terminal for command-line tools and shells
System administrators — manage multiple command-line environments like PowerShell, CMD, and WSL
Open-source contributors — want to contribute to Windows Terminal or console host development

zh.tag: 低延迟语音 AI 工具包，构建实时语音代理
zh.what: Moonshine Voice 是一个开源 AI 工具包，用于构建实时语音代理和界面。它提供语音转文本、意图识别和文本转语音功能，所有处理均在设备端完成，确保低延迟和隐私保护。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心库、预训练模型、跨平台示例应用（iOS、Android、macOS、Windows、Raspberry Pi 等）以及微控制器部署支持。提供高级 API 用于转录、TTS、语音克隆、说话人识别和对话代理。
zh.stack: 主要语言为 C++，支持 Python、iOS、Android、macOS、Linux、Windows 等多平台。模型基于 PyTorch 训练，推理使用 ONNX Runtime 或自定义引擎。
zh.hot: 凭借极低延迟（优于 Whisper）和完全本地运行的特点，吸引了近万 Star，今日新增 282，适合隐私敏感和实时场景。
uses: 语音助手开发者 —— 快速集成低延迟 STT/TTS 到应用中
边缘设备开发者 —— 在 Raspberry Pi、微控制器上部署语音 AI
隐私敏感场景 —— 医疗、金融等需要本地处理的语音应用
多语言语音应用 —— 支持中英西日韩等多语种 STT 和 TTS

en.tag: Low-latency speech AI toolkit for building real-time voice agents
en.what: Moonshine Voice is an open-source AI toolkit for building real-time voice agents and interfaces. It offers speech-to-text, intent recognition, and text-to-speech, all running on-device for low latency and privacy.
en.content: The repo includes the core library, pre-trained models, cross-platform example apps (iOS, Android, macOS, Windows, Raspberry Pi, etc.), and microcontroller deployment support. High-level APIs for transcription, TTS, voice cloning, speaker diarization, and conversational agents.
en.stack: Primarily C++, with bindings for Python, iOS, Android, macOS, Linux, Windows. Models trained with PyTorch, inference via ONNX Runtime or custom engine.
en.hot: With ultra-low latency (outperforming Whisper) and fully on-device processing, it has gained nearly 10K stars (+282 today), appealing to privacy-conscious and real-time applications.
uses: Voice assistant developers — integrate low-latency STT/TTS into apps
Edge device developers — deploy voice AI on Raspberry Pi, microcontrollers
Privacy-sensitive scenarios — medical, finance requiring on-device processing
Multilingual voice apps — STT/TTS supporting English, Chinese, Spanish, Japanese, etc.

zh.tag: GTA 5 增强版的开源作弊菜单 DLL
zh.what: 《GTA 5: Enhanced》的实验性修改菜单（mod menu）：编译成 DLL 后用 Xenos 等注入器在游戏主菜单注入，按 INSERT 或 Ctrl+\ 呼出菜单。建议配合 FSL 把存档数据重定向到本地磁盘以保号，且需要关闭 BattlEye 反作弊（目前没有 BE 绕过，公共战局会被心跳检测踢出）。
zh.content: C++ 源码 + 一份简短 README，讲清使用步骤（FSL → 下载 nightly release → 注入器 → 关 BattlEye → 注入）和常见问题修复（掉线、存档消失、游戏起不来）。
zh.stack: C++，DLL 注入式单机/联机修改器，依赖外部注入器和 FSL，GPL-2.0；默认分支 enhanced。
zh.hot: 它面向 GTA5 增强版 Mod 社区的具体需求，并延续 YimMenu 项目路线，为需要开源菜单的用户提供选择。
uses: GTA5 单机玩家 —— 刷车刷钱体验全部游戏内容
mod 开发者 —— 基于源码学习或二次开发游戏菜单
离线娱乐 —— 关 BattlEye 后在私人战局整活

en.tag: The open-source mod menu DLL for GTA 5: Enhanced
en.what: An experimental mod menu for GTA 5: Enhanced: compile to a DLL, inject at the main menu with an injector like Xenos, then press INSERT or Ctrl+\ to open. Pairing with FSL (redirecting save data to local disk) is recommended to protect your account, and BattlEye anti-cheat must be disabled (there's no BE bypass — public sessions will kick you via heartbeat checks).
en.content: C++ source plus a short README covering the workflow (FSL → nightly release → injector → disable BattlEye → inject) and fixes for common issues (disconnects, missing saves, game won't launch).
en.stack: C++, a DLL-injection single/multiplayer mod menu relying on external injectors and FSL; GPL-2.0; default branch enhanced.
en.hot: It targets a concrete need in the GTA5 Enhanced modding community and continues the familiar YimMenu project line for users seeking an open menu.
uses: GTA5 single-player fans — unlock vehicles and cash to experience all content
mod developers — learn from or fork the source for custom game menus
Offline fun — mess around in private sessions with BattlEye off

zh.tag: PS4 & PS5 模拟器，早期阶段
zh.what: Kyty 是一款正在早期开发中的 PS4 和 PS5 模拟器，能够运行部分简单 PS4 游戏和 PS5 自制程序。项目目前存在图形错误、崩溃、卡顿和低帧率等问题，许多功能尚未实现。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的模拟器源代码、构建脚本（CMake）、CI 配置以及截图示例。支持 Windows 10 x64 平台，使用 Vulkan SDK 和 Qt 5.15.0 作为依赖。
zh.stack: C++ 编写，使用 CMake 构建，依赖 Vulkan SDK 和 Qt 5.15.0。支持 Visual Studio + clang-cl + ninja 或 Eclipse CDT + mingw-w64 + gcc/clang + ninja 工具链。
zh.hot: 作为罕见的 PS4/PS5 模拟器项目，本周新增 118 星，总星数达 2944，位列 GitHub C++ 周榜第 5，吸引了大量游戏爱好者和开发者的关注。
uses: 游戏爱好者 —— 尝试运行 PS4/PS5 游戏或自制程序
模拟器开发者 —— 学习 PS4/PS5 模拟技术或贡献代码
C++ 开发者 —— 参与开源项目，提升技能

en.tag: PS4 & PS5 emulator in early stage
en.what: Kyty is an early-stage PS4 and PS5 emulator capable of running some simple PS4 games and PS5 homebrews. The project currently suffers from graphics glitches, crashes, freezes, and low FPS, with many features not yet implemented.
en.content: The repository contains the full emulator source code, build scripts (CMake), CI configuration, and screenshot examples. It supports Windows 10 x64 and relies on Vulkan SDK and Qt 5.15.0.
en.stack: Written in C++, built with CMake, depends on Vulkan SDK and Qt 5.15.0. Supports toolchains: Visual Studio + clang-cl + ninja or Eclipse CDT + mingw-w64 + gcc/clang + ninja.
en.hot: As a rare PS4/PS5 emulator project, it gained 118 stars this week, reaching 2944 total stars and ranking #5 on GitHub C++ weekly trending, attracting significant attention from gamers and developers.
uses: Gamers — to try running PS4/PS5 games or homebrews
Emulator developers — to learn PS4/PS5 emulation techniques or contribute code
C++ developers — to participate in open-source projects and improve skills

zh.tag: 经典开源后末日回合制生存游戏，被誉为僵尸生存类Roguelike的祖师爷
zh.what: Cataclysm: DDA 是一款设定在末日后的硬核回合制生存游戏。玩家需要在程序生成的残酷、持久世界中搜刮物资、制作工具、驾驶载具，并对抗僵尸、巨型昆虫、杀人机器人等变异怪物，竭尽所能活下去。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的游戏源码、多种瓦片集与图形资源、实验/稳定双分支的构建流水线，以及面向 Linux、Windows、macOS 和 BSD 的编译与分发文档。
zh.stack: 核心以 C++ 编写，同时支持 ncurses 终端模式与 SDL 图形前端；游戏数据与模组内容通过 JSON 驱动，并利用 CMake/Make 及 GitHub Actions 完成跨平台构建。
zh.hot: 该仓库已积累约 1.27 万 Star，今日新增 24 颗并登上 C++ 日榜第 11 位。其持续十数年的高频更新、近乎疯狂的自由度与深度生存模拟，使其在开源游戏社区中拥有极为忠实的玩家群体。
uses: 硬核 Roguelike 爱好者——体验程序生成世界与永久死亡带来的极致生存挑战
开源游戏研究者——学习大型 C++ 游戏项目架构、数据驱动设计与跨平台分发实践
模组开发者——通过 JSON 自定义物品、怪物、地图与玩法规则，扩展末日世界
后末日题材玩家——在僵尸、怪物与人性挣扎中体验高自由度的沙盒叙事

en.tag: Classic open-source post-apocalyptic turn-based survival roguelike
en.what: Cataclysm: DDA is a hardcore turn-based survival game set in a post-apocalyptic world. Players scavenge a procedurally generated, persistent wasteland for supplies, craft gear, drive vehicles, and fight or flee from zombies, mutants, and killer robots to survive as long as possible.
en.content: The repository contains the full game source code, multiple tilesets and graphical assets, CI/CD pipelines for stable and experimental builds, and compilation/packaging documentation for Linux, Windows, macOS, and BSD.
en.stack: Written primarily in C++ with both ncurses terminal and SDL graphical frontends; game data and modding content are JSON-driven, while cross-platform builds are handled via CMake/Make and GitHub Actions.
en.hot: With roughly 12.7k stars and 24 new stars today placing it at #11 on the C++ daily trending list, the game has maintained a devoted following. Decades of relentless updates, extreme freedom, and deep survival mechanics keep the community highly engaged.
uses: Hardcore roguelike fans seeking brutal permadeath survival in a procedurally generated world
Open-source game researchers studying large-scale C++ architecture and data-driven design
Modders who want to extend the apocalypse via JSON-defined items, monsters, and mechanics
Post-apocalyptic gamers craving sandbox storytelling with zombies, mutants, and moral dilemmas

zh.tag: 本地AI服务器，GPU/NPU上运行LLM，免费私密
zh.what: Lemonade 是一款本地 AI 服务器，能在用户自己的 GPU 和 NPU 上运行优化后的 LLM，提供与云端 API 相同的功能，但完全免费且私密。支持聊天、编程、语音和图像生成等最新模型。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Lemonade Server（作为服务安装，兼容 OpenAI/Anthropic/Ollama API）和 Embeddable Lemonade（可嵌入应用的便携二进制）。提供模型管理器、内置聊天/图像/语音界面，以及 iOS 移动端。
zh.stack: 基于 C++ 开发，利用 AMD 工程师的优化，支持 Ryzen AI、Radeon 和 Strix Halo PC。依赖 GPU/NPU 加速，兼容多种模型格式。
zh.hot: 本周新增 132 星，总星数 5042，位列 GitHub C++ 周榜第 11。因其提供免费、私密的本地 AI 体验，且由 AMD 官方优化，吸引大量开发者关注。
uses: 开发者：在本地运行 LLM 进行测试和开发，无需云服务费用
隐私敏感用户：完全离线使用 AI 聊天、编程助手，数据不外传
AMD 硬件用户：充分利用 Ryzen AI、Radeon 等 GPU/NPU 性能

en.tag: Local AI server serving optimized LLMs on your own GPU/NPU, free and private
en.what: Lemonade is a local AI server that runs optimized LLMs on your own GPU and NPU, offering cloud-like capabilities completely free and private. It supports the latest models for chat, coding, speech, and image generation.
en.content: The repo includes Lemonade Server (installable service compatible with OpenAI/Anthropic/Ollama APIs) and Embeddable Lemonade (portable binary for embedding). It features a model manager, built-in chat/image/speech interfaces, and an iOS mobile app.
en.stack: Built with C++, optimized by AMD engineers for Ryzen AI, Radeon, and Strix Halo PCs. Leverages GPU/NPU acceleration and supports multiple model formats.
en.hot: Gained 132 stars this week, total 5042, ranking #11 on GitHub C++ weekly trending. Its free, private local AI experience with official AMD optimizations has attracted significant developer attention.
uses: Developers: run LLMs locally for testing and development without cloud costs
Privacy-conscious users: use AI chat, coding assistants fully offline with no data leakage
AMD hardware users: maximize performance on Ryzen AI, Radeon GPUs/NPUs

zh.tag: 开源反检测浏览器，专为爬虫和AI代理设计
zh.what: Camoufox 是一个开源的反检测浏览器，旨在帮助用户绕过网站的反爬虫机制。它通过模拟真实浏览器指纹和行为，让爬虫和AI代理看起来像普通用户。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Camoufox 浏览器的核心源码、构建脚本、文档和示例。项目处于开发阶段，提供 Python 包和可执行文件。
zh.stack: 基于 C++ 开发，使用 Python 作为主要接口，依赖浏览器引擎（如 Firefox）和指纹库。
zh.hot: 本周新增 264 星，总星数超 1 万，因其填补了开源反检测浏览器的空白，且与 AI 代理和爬虫需求高度契合。
uses: 网络爬虫开发者 —— 需要绕过反爬机制采集数据
AI 代理开发者 —— 让代理在浏览器环境中隐身操作
安全研究人员 —— 测试网站指纹检测能力

en.tag: Open-source anti-detect browser for web scraping & AI agents
en.what: Camoufox is an open-source anti-detect browser designed to help users bypass anti-bot measures. It mimics real browser fingerprints and behaviors to make scrapers and AI agents appear as regular users.
en.content: The repo contains core source code, build scripts, documentation, and examples for Camoufox. It's under development, offering a Python package and executable.
en.stack: Built with C++, uses Python as the primary interface, relies on browser engines (e.g., Firefox) and fingerprinting libraries.
en.hot: Gained 264 stars this week, total over 10k, because it fills a gap in open-source anti-detect browsers and aligns well with AI agent and scraping needs.
uses: Web scrapers needing to bypass anti-bot measures
AI agent developers requiring stealthy browser automation
Security researchers testing fingerprint detection

zh.tag: 面向红队的多功能 ESP32 攻击性固件，支持 WiFi 渗透与硬件黑客
zh.what: Bruce 是一款专为 ESP32 开发板设计的开源固件，内置丰富的攻击性安全功能，主要服务于红队渗透测试与硬件黑客场景。它支持 WiFi 欺骗、去认证攻击、ARP 毒化、RAW 嗅探、EvilPortal 等多种无线与网络攻击向量，并兼容 M5Stack、LilyGo 等主流硬件生态。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 C++ 固件源码、预编译二进制文件（Releases）、Web 刷写工具，以及针对 Cardputer、M5Core、T-Deck 等设备的专项适配代码和硬件设计文档。
zh.stack: 基于 C++ 与 ESP-IDF/Arduino 框架开发，针对 ESP32 系列芯片优化，依赖 esptool.py 进行本地烧录，并提供基于浏览器的 Web Flasher 实现一键刷机。
zh.hot: 凭借 6.1k+ Stars 和单日 21 颗新增 Star 登上 C++ 日榜第 5，Bruce 因其将复杂的无线攻击能力集成到低成本 ESP32 硬件中而备受安全社区追捧，极大降低了红队工具的门槛。
uses: 网络安全红队人员 —— 用于近距离无线渗透测试与社工演练。
硬件黑客与极客 —— 在 Cardputer、M5Stack 等便携设备上快速部署攻击环境。
安全研究者 —— 学习 WiFi 协议漏洞、ARP 欺骗及嵌入式攻击技术的实验平台。
电子爱好者 —— 探索 ESP32 外设与开源硬件设计的参考项目。

en.tag: Multi-functional ESP32 offensive firmware for Red Team ops and hardware hacking
en.what: Bruce is an open-source ESP32 firmware packed with offensive security features designed for Red Team operations and hardware hacking. It supports a wide range of wireless and network attack vectors including WiFi deauthentication, beacon spamming, ARP poisoning, RAW sniffing, and EvilPortal, while being compatible with popular hardware like M5Stack and LilyGo devices.
en.content: The repository houses the complete C++ firmware source code, pre-built binaries in Releases, an official web flasher, and device-specific adaptations for Cardputer, M5Core, T-Deck and other supported boards, along with hardware design references.
en.stack: Built in C++ for the ESP32 platform using the ESP-IDF/Arduino framework, with local flashing via esptool.py and a browser-based Web Flasher for one-click over-the-air installation.
en.hot: Ranking #5 on GitHub's C++ daily trending with over 6.1k stars and 21 new stars today, Bruce has gained traction by packing advanced wireless attack capabilities into low-cost ESP32 hardware, significantly lowering the barrier to entry for Red Team tooling.
uses: Red Team security professionals — For close-proximity wireless penetration testing and social engineering drills.
Hardware hackers and makers — To rapidly deploy offensive security environments on portable devices like Cardputer and M5Stack.
Security researchers — As an experimental platform to study WiFi protocol vulnerabilities, ARP spoofing, and embedded attack techniques.
Electronics enthusiasts — A reference project for exploring ESP32 peripherals and open-source hardware design.

zh.tag: 开源参数化 3D 建模工具
zh.what: FreeCAD 是一款免费开源的跨平台参数化 3D 建模器，主要用于设计各种尺寸的真实物体。它支持参数化建模，允许用户通过修改历史参数轻松调整设计。
zh.content: 仓库包含 FreeCAD 的完整源代码，以及构建脚本、文档和示例文件。
zh.stack: 基于 OpenCASCADE 几何内核、Coin3D 3D 场景库、Python API 和 Qt GUI 框架。
zh.hot: 作为成熟的开源 CAD 替代方案，FreeCAD 持续获得关注，本周新增 175 星，总星数达 32250，位列 C++ 周榜第 10。
uses: 产品设计师和工程师进行参数化建模与设计修改
建筑师创建建筑模型和施工图纸
教育工作者和学生用于学习 3D 建模和 CAD 概念
爱好者和创客制作可实际制造的设计

en.tag: Open-source parametric 3D modeler
en.what: FreeCAD is a free and open-source cross-platform parametric 3D modeler for designing real-life objects of any size. It supports parametric modeling, allowing users to easily modify designs by changing parameters in the model history.
en.content: The repository contains the complete source code of FreeCAD, along with build scripts, documentation, and example files.
en.stack: Built on OpenCASCADE geometry kernel, Coin3D 3D scene library, Python API, and Qt GUI framework.
en.hot: As a mature open-source CAD alternative, FreeCAD continues to gain attention, adding 175 stars this week, reaching 32,250 total, ranking 10th on the C++ weekly trending list.
uses: Product designers and engineers for parametric modeling and design modifications
Architects for creating building models and construction drawings
Educators and students for learning 3D modeling and CAD concepts
Hobbyists and makers for creating real-world manufacturable designs

zh.tag: 跨平台 PlayStation 4 模拟器，已可运行 Bloodborne 等独占大作
zh.what: shadPS4 是一款使用 C++ 编写的早期 PlayStation 4 模拟器，支持在 Windows、Linux 和 macOS 上运行 PS4 游戏。目前它已能成功启动并运行《血源诅咒》《如龙0》等热门独占作品，尽管仍处于开发初期，尚未达到完美体验。
zh.content: 仓库包含模拟器核心源码、图形/音频后端、指令翻译模块及系统服务实现，同时提供文档、兼容性列表与截图。用户可搭配独立的 QtLauncher 获得完整的图形界面体验。
zh.stack: 基于 C++ 开发，利用 Vulkan 等图形 API 实现 GPU 指令转译与渲染，跨平台兼容 Windows、Linux 与 macOS。
zh.hot: 凭借已能运行《血源诅咒》等 PS4 独占 3A 大作的突破性进展，该项目吸引了大量玩家与开发者关注，本周新增 332 Star 并累积至 32K+，跻身 GitHub C++ 周榜第 16 名。
uses: 硬核主机玩家 —— 想在 PC 或 Mac 上体验 PS4 独占大作。
模拟器开发者 —— 研究 PS4 系统架构、图形渲染与指令转译技术。
开源贡献者 —— 参与兼容性测试、漏洞修复与性能优化。
游戏研究者 —— 分析 PS4 游戏运行原理与系统调用实现。

en.tag: Cross-platform PS4 emulator already running exclusives like Bloodborne
en.what: shadPS4 is an early-stage PlayStation 4 emulator written in C++, enabling users to run PS4 titles on Windows, Linux, and macOS. It can already boot and play popular exclusives such as Bloodborne and Yakuza 0, though it remains a work in progress with known issues.
en.content: The repository houses the emulator core, graphics/audio backends, instruction translation modules, and system service implementations, along with documentation, compatibility lists, and screenshots. Users can pair it with the separate QtLauncher for a full GUI experience.
en.stack: Built primarily in C++, it leverages Vulkan and other graphics APIs to translate and render GPU instructions, with cross-platform support for Windows, Linux, and macOS.
en.hot: Its breakthrough ability to run PS4 exclusives like Bloodborne has drawn massive attention from gamers and developers, earning 332 new stars this week for a total of 32K+ and placing it 16th on GitHub's C++ Trending chart.
uses: Hardcore console gamers who want to play PS4 exclusives on PC or Mac.
Emulator developers studying PS4 system architecture, graphics rendering, and instruction translation.
Open-source contributors helping with compatibility testing, bug fixes, and performance optimization.
Game researchers analyzing PS4 game execution principles and system call implementations.

zh.tag: 现代 C++ 的 JSON 解析与序列化库
zh.what: 这是一个广受欢迎的头文件优先 JSON 库，为 C++ 开发者提供直观、STL 风格的 API 来解析、生成和操作 JSON 数据。它支持将 JSON 与 C++ 数据结构无缝互转，大幅降低了现代 C++ 项目中处理 JSON 的复杂度。
zh.content: 仓库以单头文件（json.hpp）为核心分发形态，同时包含完整的测试套件、基准测试、文档网站源码及多包管理器（Conan、vcpkg 等）支持配置。
zh.stack: 基于 C++11/14/17 标准库实现，无需外部依赖，仅依赖 STL 容器和模板元编程，支持通过 CMake 构建测试与示例。
zh.hot: 凭借超 5 万 Star 和今日新增 17 Star 登上 C++ 日榜第 10，它已成为 C++ 生态的事实标准 JSON 库。其“像 STL 一样直观”的 API 设计和单头文件即用的便捷性持续吸引开发者。
uses: C++ 后端/客户端开发者需要轻量、高性能 JSON 解析与序列化
嵌入式与游戏项目团队希望以单头文件引入依赖，简化构建流程
基础设施开发者在微服务、配置系统或协议网关中进行结构化数据交换

en.tag: Modern C++ JSON parsing and serialization library
en.what: A widely-adopted, header-only JSON library for C++ offering an intuitive, STL-like API to parse, generate, and manipulate JSON. It enables seamless mapping between JSON and C++ data structures, dramatically simplifying JSON handling in modern C++ projects.
en.content: The repository centers around a single-header distribution (json.hpp), complemented by comprehensive tests, benchmarks, documentation site sources, and package manager integrations like Conan and vcpkg.
en.stack: Built on C++11/14/17 with zero external dependencies, relying solely on STL containers and template metaprogramming; tests and examples are built via CMake.
en.hot: With over 50k stars and 17 new stars today, ranking 10th on the C++ daily trending list, it has become the de facto standard JSON library in the C++ ecosystem. Its STL-intuitive API design and single-header convenience continue to attract developers.
uses: C++ backend and client developers needing lightweight, high-performance JSON parsing and serialization
Embedded and game teams looking to simplify builds with a single-header dependency
Infrastructure developers performing structured data exchange in microservices, config systems, or protocol gateways

zh.tag: 实时分析型列式数据库管理系统
zh.what: ClickHouse 是一个开源的列式数据库管理系统，专为实时生成分析数据报告而设计。它能够对海量数据进行极速查询，支持 SQL 接口，适用于在线分析处理（OLAP）场景。
zh.content: 仓库包含 ClickHouse 数据库的完整源代码、构建脚本、测试套件以及文档。提供 Linux、macOS、FreeBSD 等平台的安装方式，并有丰富的社区资源如教程、文档、视频和 Slack 群组。
zh.stack: 主要使用 C++ 开发，依赖 LLVM、libcxx、zlib-ng 等底层库，支持多种编译器和平台。
zh.hot: ClickHouse 因其极致的查询性能和实时分析能力而广受欢迎，拥有 48k+ Stars，本周新增 159 Stars，在 C++ 周榜排名第 15。
uses: 数据工程师 —— 构建实时 OLAP 数据管道和仪表盘
DevOps/SRE —— 监控和可观测性数据存储与查询
数据分析师 —— 对海量数据进行交互式探索分析
产品经理 —— 了解用户行为分析场景下的技术选型

en.tag: Real-time analytics column-oriented database management system
en.what: ClickHouse is an open-source column-oriented database management system designed for real-time generation of analytical data reports. It enables blazing-fast queries on massive datasets, supports SQL interface, and is suitable for online analytical processing (OLAP) scenarios.
en.content: The repository contains the complete source code, build scripts, test suites, and documentation for the ClickHouse database. It provides installation methods for Linux, macOS, FreeBSD, and offers rich community resources such as tutorials, documentation, videos, and Slack groups.
en.stack: Primarily developed in C++, with dependencies on LLVM, libcxx, zlib-ng, and other low-level libraries, supporting multiple compilers and platforms.
en.hot: ClickHouse is widely popular for its extreme query performance and real-time analytics capabilities, with over 48k Stars and 159 new stars this week, ranking 15th on the C++ weekly trending list.
uses: Data engineers — building real-time OLAP data pipelines and dashboards
DevOps/SRE — storing and querying monitoring and observability data
Data analysts — interactive exploration and analysis of massive datasets
Product managers — understanding technical choices for user behavior analytics

zh.tag: UE4/5 游戏注入式 Lua 脚本系统与实时模组开发工具
zh.what: RE-UE4SS 是一款面向 Unreal Engine 4/5 游戏的注入式脚本与模组开发框架。它允许玩家和开发者在不替换原始游戏文件的前提下，通过 Lua、蓝图或 C++ API 实时编写并加载模组，同时内置 Live View 属性编辑器与多种 Dump 工具，辅助运行时调试与逆向分析。
zh.content: 仓库包含主注入器核心、Lua API 绑定、C++ Modding API、蓝图模组加载器的完整源码，以及 Live View 实时属性编辑器、UHT / C++ Header Dumper、USMAP / UMAP 导出工具和配套文档。
zh.stack: 项目以 C++ 为主，通过 DLL 注入嵌入 UE4/5 游戏进程，深度依赖 Unreal Engine 的反射系统与对象模型，覆盖 UE 4.12 至 5.7 的广泛版本。
zh.hot: 该仓库以 2,677 Stars 跻身 GitHub C++ 日榜第 14 位，其「零文件替换」的注入式架构和集成的脚本、调试、逆向一体化工具链，精准命中了 UE 游戏模组社区的核心痛点。
uses: UE 游戏模组开发者：无需重打包游戏即可热加载 Lua / 蓝图 / C++ 模组
逆向工程师：利用 Live View 和各类 Dumper 分析运行时内存结构与属性
游戏调试人员：实时查看和编辑对象属性，快速定位数值变更逻辑
普通玩家：通过安装社区模组解锁控制台、修改游戏体验

en.tag: Injectable Lua scripting system and live modding toolkit for UE4/5 games
en.what: RE-UE4SS is an injectable scripting and modding framework for Unreal Engine 4/5 games. It lets players and developers write and hot-load mods via Lua, Blueprint, or a C++ API without touching original game files, and includes a Live View property editor alongside dumping utilities for runtime debugging and reverse engineering.
en.content: The repository hosts the main injection core, Lua API bindings, C++ Modding API, Blueprint mod loader, alongside source code for the Live View property editor, UHT and C++ header dumpers, USMAP/UMAP recreation utilities, plus full documentation.
en.stack: Written primarily in C++, it embeds into UE4/5 game processes via DLL injection, deeply leveraging the Unreal Engine reflection system and object model across versions 4.12 through 5.7.
en.hot: Boasting 2,677 Stars and a #14 spot on GitHub's C++ daily trending list, its non-destructive DLL-injection architecture and unified toolchain for scripting, debugging, and reverse engineering address a core need in the UE modding community.
uses: UE game modders: Hot-load Lua/Blueprint/C++ mods without repackaging game files
Reverse engineers: Analyze runtime memory structures and properties via Live View and dumpers
Game debuggers: Inspect and edit object properties in real time to trace value changes
Casual players: Install community mods to unlock console commands and customize gameplay

zh.tag: 自托管桌面流媒体主机，原生分辨率云游戏
zh.what: Apollo 是一个自托管的桌面流媒体主机，专为 Artemis (Moonlight Noir) 客户端设计，提供低延迟、原生客户端分辨率的流式传输，支持 AMD、Intel 和 Nvidia GPU 硬件编码及软件编码。它包含 Web UI 用于配置和客户端配对，并内置虚拟显示器，自动匹配客户端分辨率与帧率。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的流媒体服务器源码、Web 管理界面、虚拟显示驱动（SudoVDA）集成、权限管理系统、剪贴板同步及客户端连接/断开命令。
zh.stack: 主语言 C++，依赖 Sunshine 框架、SudoVDA 虚拟显示驱动、Web UI 前端，支持 AMD/Intel/Nvidia GPU 硬件编码。
