zh.hot: 在中心化平台监管与数据主权争议加剧的背景下，PeerTube 凭借 15.2k Star 和月增 509 Star 的热度，成为开源社区构建自主视频生态的首选方案。
uses: 希望摆脱 YouTube 等平台绑定的内容创作者与媒体机构
需要搭建私有/社区视频站点的运维人员与开发者
关注数据隐私与去中心化网络的技术倡导者
教育、非营利组织等寻求无广告视频托管的团体

en.tag: Decentralized federated video platform with in-browser P2P streaming
en.what: PeerTube is a free, decentralized, and federated video platform designed as an alternative to centralized services like YouTube. It enables interoperability between instances via ActivityPub and uses P2P technology to distribute video streams directly in the browser, reducing server bandwidth costs.
en.content: The repository contains full server and client-side code for video upload, transcoding, playback, federation, and instance management, supporting multi-instance deployment and Docker containerization.
en.stack: Primarily TypeScript with a Node.js backend, Angular frontend, PostgreSQL and Redis for data storage, and WebTorrent/HLS integration for browser-based P2P streaming.
en.hot: Amid growing concerns over centralized platform control and data sovereignty, PeerTube has become a leading choice for building autonomous video ecosystems, reflected in its 15.2k stars and 509 new stars this month.
uses: Content creators and media organizations seeking independence from YouTube
DevOps and developers building private or community-driven video instances
Privacy and decentralization advocates exploring federated networks
Educational and non-profit groups looking for ad-free video hosting

zh.tag: 让AI编码助手直接操控Chrome DevTools的MCP服务器
zh.what: chrome-devtools-mcp 是一个 MCP 服务器，允许 AI 编码助手（如 Antigravity、Claude、Cursor 或 Copilot）直接控制和检查 Chrome 浏览器。它提供性能分析、高级调试和可靠的自动化能力，让 AI 能像开发者一样使用 DevTools。
zh.content: 仓库包含 MCP 服务器核心代码、CLI 工具、详细的工具参考文档、变更日志、贡献指南和故障排除指南。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript，依赖 Puppeteer 实现浏览器自动化，使用 Chrome DevTools 前端进行性能追踪。
zh.hot: 本月新增 3431 星，总星数达 47481，位列 TypeScript 月榜第 21。它填补了 AI 编码助手直接操控浏览器的空白，极大提升了 AI 调试和自动化能力。
uses: AI 编码助手开发者 —— 集成到 Claude、Cursor 等工具中，让 AI 能实时调试网页
前端开发者 —— 利用 AI 自动化进行性能分析和错误排查
测试工程师 —— 构建基于 AI 的端到端测试流程

en.tag: MCP server enabling AI coding agents to control Chrome DevTools
en.what: chrome-devtools-mcp is an MCP server that lets AI coding agents (like Antigravity, Claude, Cursor, or Copilot) directly control and inspect a live Chrome browser. It offers performance insights, advanced debugging, and reliable automation, enabling AI to use DevTools like a developer.
en.content: The repo contains the MCP server core code, a CLI tool, detailed tool reference docs, changelog, contributing guide, and troubleshooting guide.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript, relies on Puppeteer for browser automation, and uses the Chrome DevTools frontend for performance tracing.
en.hot: Gained 3431 stars this month, total 47481, ranked #21 in TypeScript monthly. It fills the gap of AI coding agents directly controlling browsers, greatly enhancing AI debugging and automation.
uses: AI coding agent developers — integrate into Claude, Cursor, etc., enabling AI to debug web pages in real time
Frontend developers — leverage AI automation for performance analysis and error diagnosis
Test engineers — build AI-driven end-to-end testing workflows

zh.tag: 开源可观测性与数据可视化平台
zh.what: Grafana 是一个开源的可观测性与数据可视化平台，允许用户查询、可视化、告警和理解来自 Prometheus、Loki、Elasticsearch 等多种数据源的指标、日志和链路追踪。它支持创建动态仪表盘、探索指标和日志、设置告警规则，并支持混合数据源。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Grafana 核心前端（TypeScript）和后端（Go）代码，提供丰富的面板插件、数据源插件、告警引擎和仪表盘管理功能。
zh.stack: 前端使用 TypeScript 和 React，后端使用 Go 语言，依赖多种数据源 SDK，支持插件化扩展。
zh.hot: Grafana 是业界最流行的可观测性平台之一，拥有 75k+ 星标，本月新增 1691 星标，持续活跃于 GitHub Trending 榜单。其开源、灵活、多数据源支持的特性吸引了大量 DevOps 和 SRE 用户。
uses: DevOps/SRE 工程师 —— 监控基础设施和应用性能
数据分析师 —— 创建可视化仪表盘展示业务指标
开发团队 —— 集成告警和日志分析，快速定位问题

en.tag: Open-source observability and data visualization platform
en.what: Grafana is an open-source observability and data visualization platform that allows users to query, visualize, alert on, and understand metrics, logs, and traces from multiple sources like Prometheus, Loki, Elasticsearch, and more. It supports dynamic dashboards, ad-hoc metric exploration, log streaming, alerting, and mixed data sources.
en.content: The repository contains the core frontend (TypeScript) and backend (Go) code, offering a rich set of panel plugins, data source plugins, alerting engine, and dashboard management features.
en.stack: Frontend uses TypeScript and React, backend uses Go, with multiple data source SDKs and plugin-based extensibility.
en.hot: Grafana is one of the most popular observability platforms, with 75k+ stars and 1691 new stars this month, consistently trending on GitHub. Its open-source nature, flexibility, and multi-source support attract a large DevOps and SRE community.
uses: DevOps/SRE engineers — monitor infrastructure and application performance
Data analysts — create visual dashboards for business metrics
Development teams — integrate alerting and log analysis for quick issue resolution

zh.tag: Claude Code 的 OpenAI Codex 插件，实现代码审查与任务委托
zh.what: 这是 OpenAI 官方为 Claude Code 开发的插件，让开发者无需离开终端环境即可调用 Codex 进行代码审查或任务委托。用户可通过斜杠命令执行只读评审、对抗性压力测试，或将编码任务后台交给 Codex 代理处理。
zh.content: 仓库包含插件源码、Claude Code 市场清单配置，以及内置的 /codex:* 斜杠命令和 codex-rescue 子代理。同时提供完整安装文档与演示视频，支持通过 npm 安装 Codex CLI 并自动处理登录与会话交接。
zh.stack: 基于 JavaScript/Node.js 18.18+ 构建，作为 Claude Code 插件运行，需 OpenAI Codex CLI 及 ChatGPT 订阅或 OpenAI API Key。通过 Claude Code 插件市场分发，并使用 npm 管理 Codex 全局安装。
zh.hot: 凭借 OpenAI 官方背书与 Claude Code 的庞大用户基础，该插件本周新增 1801 Star，以近 3 万总星标数冲入 GitHub 周榜第 12 名。它精准击中了开发者希望在同一终端内无缝切换 Claude 与 Codex 两大 AI 工作流的痛点。
uses: Claude Code 忠实用户 —— 希望在熟悉的终端工作流中直接复用 Codex 的审查与代理能力。
追求代码质量的团队 —— 需要对多文件变更进行常规审查或对抗性压力测试，发现潜在设计缺陷。
高频使用 AI 辅助编程的开发者 —— 想将耗时任务后台委托给 Codex，通过异步状态查询和结果拉取保持专注。
多 AI 工具链整合者 —— 试图打通 Anthropic 与 OpenAI 生态，构建统一的命令行 AI 开发环境。

en.tag: Claude Code plugin integrating OpenAI Codex for code review and task delegation
en.what: An official OpenAI plugin that embeds Codex capabilities directly into Claude Code, letting developers review and delegate coding tasks without leaving their terminal. It exposes slash commands for read-only reviews, adversarial pressure-testing, and background task delegation to Codex agents.
en.content: The repo hosts the plugin source, Claude Code marketplace manifest, and built-in slash commands such as /codex:review plus the codex-rescue subagent. It also includes comprehensive installation docs and a demo video, supporting npm-based Codex CLI setup and automated session hand-off.
en.stack: Built with JavaScript for Node.js 18.18+, it runs as a Claude Code plugin and requires the OpenAI Codex CLI along with a ChatGPT subscription or OpenAI API key. It is distributed via the Claude Code plugin marketplace and uses npm for global Codex CLI installation.
en.hot: Backed by OpenAI and Claude Code's large user base, the plugin gained 1,801 stars this week and reached #12 on GitHub Trending with nearly 29k total stars. It directly addresses developer demand for seamlessly switching between Claude and Codex within a single terminal workflow.
uses: Claude Code power users who want to leverage Codex review and agent capabilities inside their existing terminal workflow.
Teams focused on code quality looking to run standard or adversarial reviews on multi-file changes to uncover design flaws.
Developers heavily using AI-assisted coding who want to delegate long-running tasks to Codex in the background and check results asynchronously.
Multi-AI toolchain integrators aiming to bridge Anthropic and OpenAI ecosystems within a unified CLI environment.

zh.tag: 面向AI代理的HTML交互式编辑器，支持本地人机协作反馈
zh.what: Lavish 是一款本地优先的 HTML 制品编辑器，专为 AI 代理生成的富交互内容设计。它让开发者直接在浏览器中审阅、标注和修改 HTML 文件，并通过 AXI 协议将反馈无缝回传给 Agent，替代低效的截图与长文本沟通。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Lavish Editor 的核心 CLI、AXI 接口实现、本地浏览器渲染引擎，以及面向 Agent Skills 的 npx skills 安装钩子。README 还提供了面向产品计划、技术方案等场景的内置可视化模板。
zh.stack: 基于 JavaScript/Node.js 构建，以 CLI 形式分发，通过 npm 发布；支持 macOS、Linux 和 Windows 跨平台运行。
zh.hot: 本月新增 1,445 星，以 1,967 星登上 GitHub Trending JavaScript 月榜第 5。它精准切中了 AI Agent 时代“生成 HTML 容易、协作修改难”的痛点，用本地优先和 AXI 协议重新定义了人机协作的编辑体验。
uses: 使用 AI 编程助手并需要可视化审阅 Agent 生成 HTML 报告/原型的开发者
需要与 Agent 进行精细化交互反馈而非截图和文字的产品经理与技术负责人
希望本地安全运行、不愿将 HTML 制品上传云端的企业与隐私敏感用户

en.tag: Local-first interactive HTML editor for human-AI collaboration on agent artifacts.
en.what: Lavish is a local-first HTML editor designed for AI agent-generated rich artifacts. It lets users review, annotate, and edit rendered HTML directly in the browser, then sends structured feedback back to agents via the AXI protocol—replacing inefficient screenshots and long text messages.
en.content: The repo contains the core CLI, AXI interface, local browser rendering engine, and npx skills install hooks for agent integration. It also ships with built-in visualization templates for product planning and technical design scenarios.
en.stack: Built with JavaScript/Node.js and distributed as a cross-platform CLI via npm, supporting macOS, Linux, and Windows.
en.hot: It gained 1,445 stars this month, hitting 1,967 total and ranking 5th on GitHub's monthly JavaScript Trending. It nails the pain point that HTML is easy for agents to generate but hard for humans to collaboratively refine, redefining the human-AI editing loop with local-first principles and the AXI protocol.
uses: Developers using AI coding assistants who need to visually review agent-generated HTML reports or prototypes
Product managers and tech leads seeking precise interactive feedback loops with agents instead of screenshots
Privacy-conscious users and enterprises wanting local-first execution without uploading artifacts to the cloud

zh.tag: 反“AI流水线”前端框架，为AI代理注入设计品味与精致UI技能
zh.what: Taste Skill 是一套可移植的 Agent 技能集合，专门解决 AI 生成的前端界面千篇一律、缺乏设计感的问题。它通过结构化的布局、排版、动效和间距规则，让 AI 代理（如 Codex、Cursor、Claude Code）输出更精致、更具品牌感的界面。同时内置图像生成技能，可用于快速生成 Web、移动端和品牌套系的视觉参考板。
zh.content: 仓库包含一系列可复用的 Agent Skill 模块（前端布局、排版、动效、间距规范）以及图像生成提示词与参考板模板，支持与 ChatGPT Images 等工具链配合后交由主流 AI 编程助手实现。
zh.stack: 基于 JavaScript 构建，兼容 Vercel Labs 的 Agent Skills 生态，可与 ChatGPT Images、Codex、Cursor、Claude Code 等主流 AI 工具链无缝集成。
zh.hot: 在 AI 生成代码泛滥导致界面同质化严重的背景下，Taste Skill 切中了开发者对“AI 审美”的痛点；仓库已获 64.7k Star，本月新增 19.1k，位列 GitHub JavaScript 月榜第 3，足见社区对反“AI 流水线”设计的强烈需求。
uses: 前端开发者/AI 辅助编程用户 —— 想让 Cursor/Codex 输出更精致、不千篇一律的界面
设计师与创意开发者 —— 需要快速生成品牌视觉参考板并直接落地为代码
独立开发者/创业公司 —— 在缺少专职设计师时，用结构化技能提升产品 UI 质感
AI Agent 构建者 —— 希望为自研 Agent 集成反“slop”的前端设计与实现能力

en.tag: Anti-slop agent skills framework that gives AI builders design taste
en.what: Taste Skill is a portable set of agent skills that upgrades AI-built interfaces with stronger layout, typography, motion, and spacing to eliminate generic-looking UIs. It acts as an anti-slop frontend framework, giving AI agents like Codex, Cursor, and Claude Code a refined design taste. The repo also includes image-generation skills for creating reference boards for web, mobile, and brand kits.
en.content: The repository contains reusable agent skill modules covering frontend layout, typography, motion, and spacing guidelines, along with image-generation prompts and reference board templates designed to be paired with tools like ChatGPT Images and implemented via Codex, Cursor, or Claude Code.
en.stack: Built primarily in JavaScript and compatible with the Vercel Labs Agent Skills ecosystem, it integrates seamlessly with mainstream AI toolchains including ChatGPT Images, Codex, Cursor, and Claude Code.
en.hot: As AI-generated code floods the web with homogenized interfaces, Taste Skill strikes a nerve by curing AI's bad taste; it has amassed 64.7k stars with 19.1k added this month alone, ranking 3rd on GitHub's JavaScript monthly trending list.
uses: Frontend developers using AI-assisted coding who want Cursor/Codex to produce polished, non-generic UIs
Designers and creative developers looking to rapidly generate brand reference boards and turn them into code
Indie hackers and startups needing to elevate product UI quality without dedicated designers
AI agent builders seeking to equip their agents with anti-slop frontend design and implementation skills

zh.tag: 为 AI 编码代理打造的设计语言与技能集，终结千篇一律的 SaaS 模板风
zh.what: Impeccable 是一套面向 AI 编码代理（如 Claude、Cursor 等）的设计指导语言与 CLI 工具。它通过 23 条标准化命令和 46 条确定性检测规则，帮助 AI 在生成前端界面时摆脱千篇一律的 SaaS 模板风格，产出更具品牌感与专业度的设计。开发者只需在项目中运行初始化命令，即可建立包含品牌语境、视觉规范与组件库的设计上下文。
zh.content: 仓库包含可安装在 AI 工具中的核心技能包、用于本地检测的 CLI 与浏览器扩展，以及一套由 PRODUCT.md 和 DESIGN.md 驱动的设计上下文系统。整体以命令式交互为主，支持实时浏览器迭代与无需 LLM 的离线规则检测。
zh.stack: 基于 JavaScript/Node.js 构建，通过 npm 分发并以 npx 方式安装，同时提供浏览器扩展用于实时迭代检测。设计规则以确定性逻辑实现，可独立于 LLM 运行。
zh.hot: 该仓库在 GitHub 上已获得 47.7K Star，本周新增 2,331 星并跻身 Trending 周榜第 14 名，反映出开发者对「AI 生成前端同质化」的强烈痛点共鸣。它精准击中了当前 AI 编码工具产出界面千篇一律的普遍问题，提供了可落地的设计工程化方案。
uses: 前端开发者 —— 希望让 AI 助手生成更专业、不千篇一律的界面代码
独立创始人/产品经理 —— 需要快速建立品牌感强、视觉一致的产品界面
设计工程师 —— 想将设计规范转化为 AI 可执行的确定性规则与检测流程

en.tag: A design language and skillset for AI coding agents to escape generic SaaS templates
en.what: Impeccable is a design guidance language and CLI tool for AI coding agents like Claude and Cursor. It provides 23 standardized commands and 46 deterministic detection rules to help AI-generated frontend designs break away from generic SaaS templates and achieve stronger brand identity. Developers can set up a comprehensive design context—including brand voice, visual guidelines, and component libraries—through a single initialization command.
en.content: The repository includes a core skill package for AI tools, a CLI and browser extension for local auditing, and a design context system driven by PRODUCT.md and DESIGN.md. It focuses on command-based interactions, supporting live browser iteration and offline deterministic rule checks without requiring an LLM or API key.
en.stack: Built on JavaScript/Node.js, distributed via npm and installed through npx, with a browser extension for real-time iteration and auditing. The design rules are implemented as deterministic logic that can run independently of any LLM or API key.
en.hot: With 47.7K stars and 2,331 new stars this week landing it at #14 on GitHub Trending, the project resonates strongly with developers frustrated by homogenized AI-generated frontend designs. It directly addresses the pain point of repetitive SaaS templates by offering a practical, engineering-grade design system for AI agents.
uses: Frontend developers who want their AI assistants to generate professional, non-generic UI code
Indie founders and product managers looking to quickly build brand-conscious, visually consistent interfaces
Design engineers seeking to convert design specifications into deterministic, AI-executable rules and audit workflows

zh.tag: 跨平台隐私优先语音转文字工具，支持本地与云端模型
zh.what: OpenWhispr 是一款开源的桌面端语音听写应用，用户可通过全局热键在任何软件中将语音实时转为文字。它支持完全离线的本地转录（Whisper / NVIDIA Parakeet），也允许接入自有密钥的云模型，确保音频数据不出本地即可隐私可控地完成输入。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的跨平台桌面客户端源码与构建产物，覆盖 macOS、Windows、Linux 的全局热键、语音听写、会议转录、AI 笔记及 Agent 功能模块，并附带安装包、API 文档与官网。
zh.stack: 项目以 JavaScript 为主语言开发，基于 Electron 或同类跨平台桌面框架，前端采用现代 Web 技术栈，后端通过本地绑定集成 Whisper 与 NVIDIA Parakeet，并提供 REST API 以对接第三方云服务。
zh.hot: 在 WisprFlow、Granola 等付费语音转写工具备受关注的背景下，OpenWhispr 以“完全开源、零数据收集”的隐私定位成为热门替代方案，本月新增 802 Star，累计达 4,617 Star，跻身 GitHub JavaScript 月榜第 10 名。
uses: 需要高效语音输入的写作者与开发者——通过全局热键在任意编辑器中快速 dictation。
对隐私敏感的用户与团队——利用本地模型实现完全离线的会议转录与笔记生成。
寻求免费替代方案的知识工作者——以开源方案替换 WisprFlow/Granola 进行日常语音记录。

en.tag: Privacy-first cross-platform voice-to-text dictation with local & cloud models
en.what: OpenWhispr is an open-source desktop dictation app that turns speech into text anywhere via a global hotkey. It offers fully offline transcription with local engines like Whisper and NVIDIA Parakeet, or cloud processing via BYOK, keeping user audio data private and under their own control.
en.content: The repository includes the full cross-platform desktop client source and release builds for macOS, Windows, and Linux, featuring global hotkey handling, voice dictation, meeting transcription, AI note-taking, and agent modules, plus API docs and a website.
en.stack: Primarily written in JavaScript and built on a cross-platform desktop framework (likely Electron or Tauri) with a modern web-based UI, it binds locally to Whisper and NVIDIA Parakeet for on-device inference and exposes REST APIs for optional cloud integration.
en.hot: Positioned as a free, open-source and zero-telemetry alternative to paid tools like WisprFlow and Granola, OpenWhispr gained strong traction this month with 802 new stars, reaching 4,617 total stars and ranking #10 on GitHub’s JavaScript monthly trending chart.
uses: Writers and developers needing efficient voice input — dictate into any editor via a global hotkey.
Privacy-conscious users and teams — run fully offline meeting transcription and note-taking with local models.
Knowledge workers seeking free alternatives — replace paid tools like WisprFlow or Granola for daily voice logging.

zh.tag: 非官方 ChatGPT Linux 桌面端，从 macOS 官方包提取并本地构建
zh.what: 该项目将 OpenAI 官方仅提供 macOS 版本的 ChatGPT 桌面应用（含 Chat、Work、Codex）转换为可在 Linux 运行的 Electron 应用。它通过提取上游 DMG 文件、应用 Linux 兼容性补丁并重建原生模块，最终打包成多种 Linux 发行版支持的安装格式。
zh.content: 仓库包含从 macOS DMG 提取、打补丁、构建原生模块的完整脚本，以及用于 Debian/Ubuntu、Fedora、Arch 和 Nix 的安装包配置；可选的 Linux 专属功能存放在 `linux-features/` 目录，同时提供 AppImage 自构建和本地更新管理器支持。
zh.stack: 基于 Electron 与 JavaScript 开发，依赖 Node.js 运行时；构建系统使用 Makefile 驱动，通过 CI 工作流自动化打包 .deb、.rpm、pacman 及 AppImage，并支持 Wayland 与 X11 显示协议。
zh.hot: OpenAI 迟迟未推出官方 Linux 客户端，该项目填补了空白；本周新增 395 Star 并登上 JavaScript 周榜第 5，反映出 Linux 开发者对原生 ChatGPT 桌面体验的强烈需求。
uses: Linux 开发者/用户 —— 想在 Debian、Fedora、Arch 等发行版上获得原生 ChatGPT 桌面体验
AI 重度使用者 —— 需要本地安装 Chat、Work 和 Codex 功能，而非仅使用网页版
偏好桌面端工作流的用户 —— 希望利用系统级快捷键、本地集成和离线更新管理
开源社区贡献者 —— 参与非官方 Linux 适配、Electron 跨平台补丁与打包流程改进

en.tag: Unofficial ChatGPT Desktop for Linux, extracted & rebuilt from official macOS DMG
en.what: This project converts OpenAI's official macOS-only ChatGPT Desktop app (including Chat, Work, and Codex) into a runnable Linux Electron application. It extracts the upstream DMG, applies Linux compatibility patches, rebuilds native modules, and packages the result for various Linux distributions.
en.content: The repository contains complete scripts for extracting the macOS DMG, applying patches, and rebuilding native modules, alongside packaging configs for Debian/Ubuntu, Fedora, Arch, and Nix. Optional Linux-only integrations live in `linux-features/`, with support for AppImage self-builds and a local update manager.
en.stack: Built with Electron and JavaScript, requiring Node.js; the build system is driven by Makefiles and CI workflows that automate packaging into .deb, .rpm, pacman, and AppImage formats, with support for both Wayland and X11.
en.hot: With no official Linux client from OpenAI, this project fills a critical gap; it gained 395 stars this week and hit #5 on the JavaScript Trending list, reflecting strong demand from Linux users for a native ChatGPT desktop experience.
uses: Linux developers/users seeking a native ChatGPT desktop experience on Debian, Fedora, Arch, and other distros.
Power users who need local access to Chat, Work, and Codex features instead of relying solely on the web app.
Desktop-centric workflow users wanting system-level shortcuts, local integrations, and an offline update manager.
Open-source contributors interested in unofficial Linux ports, Electron cross-platform patching, and packaging improvements.

zh.tag: 高性能低开销的 Node.js Web 框架，专注开发者体验与插件生态
zh.what: Fastify 是一个专为 Node.js 设计的高性能 Web 框架，致力于在提供卓越开发者体验的同时保持极低的服务器开销。它通过强大的插件架构让开发者能够快速构建可扩展的后端服务，并在高负载下依然保持出色的响应速度。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Fastify v5 核心源码、完整的类型定义、官方文档网站源码，以及丰富的示例和基准测试脚本。核心由轻量级的路由引擎、请求生命周期管理器和插件系统组成，配套有完善的 CI/CD 工作流。
zh.stack: 基于 Node.js 运行时开发，核心使用 JavaScript 编写并完整支持 TypeScript，依赖 find-my-way 高性能路由库、Pino 日志库，以及 @fastify 系列官方插件。
zh.hot: 拥有 36.7k Star 的 Fastify 凭借比 Express 更低的性能开销和原生的异步/等待支持，成为 Node.js 生态中构建高并发服务的首选框架之一。本周新增 85 Star 并冲入 JavaScript 周榜第 7，反映出社区对其 v5 版本稳定性与插件生态的持续认可。
uses: 需要支撑高并发 API 服务的后端开发团队
希望从 Express 迁移到更现代、更低开销框架的 Node.js 开发者
构建微服务架构并需要强大插件扩展能力的工程师
追求高性能日志与请求链路管理的运维型开发者

en.tag: High-performance, low-overhead Node.js web framework with plugin architecture
en.what: Fastify is a high-performance web framework for Node.js designed to deliver the best developer experience with minimal overhead. Its powerful plugin architecture enables developers to build scalable backend services that maintain excellent responsiveness under heavy load.
en.content: The repository contains the Fastify v5 core source code, complete TypeScript definitions, official website source, and comprehensive benchmarks. The core consists of a lightweight router, request lifecycle manager, and plugin system with extensive CI/CD workflows.
en.stack: Built on Node.js with JavaScript core and full TypeScript support. It relies on find-my-way for routing, Pino for logging, and the official @fastify plugin ecosystem.
en.hot: With 36.7k stars, Fastify has become a top choice for high-concurrency Node.js services by offering lower overhead than Express and native async/await support. Its 85 new stars this week and #7 spot on the JavaScript trending list reflect sustained community confidence in its v5 stability and plugin ecosystem.
uses: Backend teams building high-concurrency API services
Node.js developers migrating from Express to a more modern, lower-overhead framework
Engineers building microservices that require a powerful plugin extension system
Developers seeking high-performance logging and request lifecycle management

zh.tag: 网文作者的全流程 AI 写作助手
zh.what: 这是一个为网文作者设计的 AI 技能包，覆盖长篇和短篇网络小说的扫榜、拆文、写作、去AI味、封面图生成全流程。它内置了多款 AI 编码助手的适配，让作者能通过自然语言指令完成从市场分析到成品输出的完整创作。
zh.content: 仓库包含多个 skill 文件，按流程分为环境部署、扫榜选材、拆文学习、落笔创作、精修定稿等模块，并配有流程图和详细的版本更新日志。
zh.stack: 基于 JavaScript，适配 Claude Code、OpenCode、ZCode、OpenClaw、Codex CLI、Reasonix、workbuddy 等多种 AI 编码环境，通过 skills 机制加载。
zh.hot: 本月新增 1623 星，总星数 4383，位列 GitHub Trending 月榜 JavaScript 第 14 名。它精准解决了网文作者在 AI 辅助写作中的痛点，尤其是去AI味和商业化写作方法论，受到创作者社区热捧。
uses: 网文作者——从扫榜到完稿的全流程 AI 辅助
AI 写作工具开发者——学习如何构建垂直领域的 skill 包
内容创业者——快速量产符合市场口味的网文

en.tag: All-in-one AI skill pack for web fiction writing
en.what: A comprehensive AI skill pack for web fiction authors, covering trend scouting, story analysis, writing, AI-slop cleanup, and cover generation for both long-form and short-form web novels. It integrates with multiple AI coding assistants, enabling authors to complete the entire creative workflow from market analysis to final output via natural language commands.
en.content: The repo contains multiple skill files organized by workflow phases: environment setup, trend scouting, story analysis, writing, and polishing. It includes a flowchart and detailed changelog.
en.stack: Built with JavaScript, compatible with Claude Code, OpenCode, ZCode, OpenClaw, Codex CLI, Reasonix, workbuddy, and other AI coding environments via the skills mechanism.
en.hot: Gained 1623 stars this month, total 4383, ranked #14 on GitHub Trending monthly (JavaScript). It precisely addresses pain points in AI-assisted web fiction writing, especially AI-slop cleanup and commercial writing methodology, gaining popularity among creators.
uses: Web fiction authors — full workflow AI assistance from trend scouting to final draft
AI writing tool developers — learn how to build domain-specific skill packs
Content entrepreneurs — quickly produce market-oriented web novels

zh.tag: 固执己见的通用代码格式化工具，终结代码风格争论
zh.what: Prettier 通过解析代码并重新打印，强制统一项目内的代码风格，避免开发者在代码审查中陷入无意义的格式争论。它支持 JavaScript、TypeScript、CSS、HTML、Vue、GraphQL 等十余种语言，可直接集成到编辑器、Git 预提交钩子及 CI 流程中。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心格式化引擎、多语言解析器封装、CLI 命令行工具、丰富的编辑器集成插件以及开放的插件 API。同时还提供在线 Playground 和完整的文档网站，方便用户即时预览与接入。
zh.stack: 基于 JavaScript/TypeScript 开发，底层依赖 Babel、Flow、TypeScript 等语言解析器，可在 Node.js 与浏览器环境运行，并通过 npm 分发。
zh.hot: 作为前端生态事实上的代码风格标准，Prettier 已积累 52k+ Stars，本月新增 364 星，在 GitHub JavaScript 月榜排名第 11。其“零配置”理念和广泛的编辑器支持让它几乎成为现代 JavaScript 项目的标配。
uses: 前端开发团队 —— 统一多人协作时的代码风格，减少代码审查中的格式争论
开源项目维护者 —— 在 CI 中强制检查代码格式，保证贡献者提交的代码风格一致
全栈开发者 —— 格式化 JavaScript、TypeScript、CSS、HTML、GraphQL 等多种语言文件
技术写作者 —— 统一 Markdown 文档的排版风格，提升可读性

en.tag: Opinionated multi-language code formatter that ends style debates
en.what: Prettier enforces a consistent style by parsing your code and re-printing it with its own rules, eliminating nit-picky formatting debates in code reviews. It supports over a dozen languages including JavaScript, TypeScript, CSS, HTML, and GraphQL, and integrates seamlessly into editors, pre-commit hooks, and CI pipelines.
en.content: The repository contains the core formatting engine, parsers for multiple languages, a CLI tool, editor integrations, and an open plugin API. It also includes an online Playground and comprehensive documentation for instant testing and adoption.
en.stack: Built with JavaScript/TypeScript, it relies on parsers like Babel, Flow, and TypeScript, runs in both Node.js and browser environments, and is distributed via npm.
en.hot: With 52k+ stars and 364 new stars this month, ranking 11th on GitHub's JavaScript monthly trending list, Prettier has become the de facto code style standard. Its zero-config philosophy and broad editor support make it an essential tool for modern JavaScript projects.
uses: Frontend teams — enforce consistent style across collaborators and eliminate formatting debates in reviews
Open-source maintainers — integrate into CI to ensure all contributions follow the same code style
Full-stack developers — format multiple languages including JS, TS, CSS, HTML, and GraphQL in one tool
Technical writers — standardize Markdown document formatting for better readability

zh.tag: JavaScript 模块打包器，前端构建基石
zh.what: Webpack 是一个模块打包工具，主要将 JavaScript 文件打包成浏览器可用的资源，同时也能转换、打包任何资源或资产。它支持代码拆分，允许按需加载应用部分，并通过加载器处理 CommonJs、AMD、ES6 模块、CSS、图片、JSON 等多种模块类型。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心打包器源码、CLI 工具、丰富的加载器和插件系统，以及详细的文档和示例。
zh.stack: 基于 Node.js，使用 JavaScript 编写，依赖 Tapable 插件架构和 enhanced-resolve 模块解析。
zh.hot: 作为前端构建工具的事实标准，Webpack 拥有 6.5 万+ Star，本月新增 279 Star，持续活跃在 GitHub Trending 月榜。
uses: 前端开发者 —— 构建现代 Web 应用，管理模块依赖和资源打包
项目维护者 —— 配置自定义构建流程，优化性能
学习构建工具 —— 理解模块打包原理和插件系统

en.tag: A bundler for JavaScript and friends, the foundation of frontend build
en.what: Webpack is a module bundler that primarily bundles JavaScript files for browser usage, while also capable of transforming, bundling, or packaging any resource or asset. It supports code splitting for on-demand loading and uses loaders to handle various module types like CommonJs, AMD, ES6 modules, CSS, images, JSON, and more.
en.content: The repository includes core bundler source code, CLI tools, a rich loader and plugin system, along with comprehensive documentation and examples.
en.stack: Built on Node.js, written in JavaScript, leveraging Tapable plugin architecture and enhanced-resolve for module resolution.
en.hot: As the de facto standard for frontend build tools, Webpack has 65k+ stars, with 279 new stars this month, consistently trending on GitHub monthly charts.
uses: Frontend developers — build modern web apps, manage module dependencies and asset bundling
Project maintainers — configure custom build pipelines, optimize performance
Learning build tools — understand module bundling principles and plugin systems

zh.tag: 让AI代理用原始人语回复，节省65%输出token
zh.what: Caveman 是一个技能/插件，适用于 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 等30+ AI编码代理。安装后，代理会以原始人式的简短语言回答问题，同时保持代码、命令和错误信息的准确性，从而大幅减少输出token消耗。
zh.content: 仓库包含安装脚本、配置文件（支持30+代理）、不同原始人等级（如caveman、grunt）以及基准测试数据。
zh.stack: 基于JavaScript，依赖各AI代理的配置系统（如Claude Code的CLI配置、Cursor的rules等）。
zh.hot: 凭借幽默的原始人概念和惊人的65% token节省效果，迅速获得9万+星标，开发者纷纷尝试降低AI使用成本。
uses: AI编码代理用户 —— 希望减少token消耗、降低API费用的开发者
Claude Code / Cursor / Windsurf 等代理的重度使用者 —— 通过简短回复提升效率
对AI输出风格有幽默需求的极客 —— 享受原始人式对话

en.tag: Make AI coding agents reply like cavemen, slashing 65% output tokens
en.what: Caveman is a skill/plugin for 30+ AI coding agents like Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor. Once installed, agents reply in terse caveman-speak, preserving code, commands, and errors verbatim while drastically cutting output token usage.
en.content: The repo includes installation scripts, configuration files for 30+ agents, multiple caveman levels (e.g., caveman, grunt), and benchmark data.
en.stack: Built with JavaScript, relies on configuration systems of various AI agents (e.g., Claude Code CLI config, Cursor rules).
en.hot: With its humorous caveman concept and impressive 65% token savings, it quickly garnered 90K+ stars as developers seek to reduce AI usage costs.
uses: AI coding agent users — developers looking to cut token usage and API costs
Heavy users of Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, etc. — boost efficiency with terse replies
Geeks with a sense of humor — enjoy caveman-style conversations

zh.tag: 基于 React 的全栈 Web 框架
zh.what: Next.js 是一个基于 React 的全栈 Web 开发框架，支持服务端渲染、静态站点生成和 API 路由。它提供了开箱即用的优化功能，如图像优化、国际化、零配置等，帮助开发者快速构建高性能的 Web 应用。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Next.js 核心源码、CLI 工具、文档和示例。主要目录包括 packages/next（核心库）、examples（示例项目）、test（测试套件）等。
zh.stack: 基于 React 和 Node.js，使用 Rust 编写的 Turbopack 作为打包工具，依赖 React 18、Webpack 等。
zh.hot: 作为最流行的 React 框架之一，Next.js 持续获得大量关注，本月新增 2225 颗星，总星数超 14 万，稳居 JavaScript 项目前列。
uses: 前端开发者 —— 构建高性能 React 应用，支持 SSR/SSG
全栈开发者 —— 利用 API 路由和中间件实现后端逻辑
企业团队 —— 用于生产级 Web 应用，如电商、内容平台

en.tag: The React Framework for Production
en.what: Next.js is a full-stack React framework that enables server-side rendering, static site generation, and API routes. It provides built-in optimizations like image optimization, internationalization, and zero-config setup, helping developers build high-performance web applications quickly.
en.content: The repository contains Next.js core source code, CLI tools, documentation, and examples. Key directories include packages/next (core library), examples (sample projects), and test (test suite).
en.stack: Built on React and Node.js, uses Turbopack (Rust-based bundler), depends on React 18, Webpack, etc.
en.hot: As one of the most popular React frameworks, Next.js consistently gains significant attention, with 2,225 new stars this month and over 141k total stars, ranking among the top JavaScript projects.
uses: Frontend developers — build high-performance React apps with SSR/SSG
Full-stack developers — implement backend logic with API routes and middleware
Enterprise teams — use for production-grade web apps like e-commerce and content platforms

zh.tag: 基于 WebRTC 的流式 BitTorrent 客户端
zh.what: WebTorrent 是一个用 JavaScript 编写的流式 BitTorrent 客户端，同时支持 Node.js 和浏览器环境。在浏览器中，它利用 WebRTC 数据通道实现点对点传输，无需插件或扩展即可直接下载和播放 torrent 文件。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心 JavaScript 库，提供 API 用于创建客户端、添加种子、监听事件和流式传输文件。同时提供命令行工具和桌面应用（WebTorrent Desktop），以及丰富的示例和文档。
zh.stack: 纯 JavaScript 实现，依赖 WebRTC 进行浏览器端 P2P 传输，Node.js 端使用 TCP/UDP。支持通过 npm 安装，可与 Browserify、Webpack 等打包工具集成。
zh.hot: 拥有 31k+ Star，本月新增 488，长期活跃。作为浏览器端 torrent 流式传输的标杆项目，解决了传统 torrent 无法在 Web 中直接使用的痛点，创新性地结合 WebRTC 技术。
uses: Web 开发者 —— 在网站中嵌入 torrent 下载或流媒体播放功能
Node.js 开发者 —— 构建高性能的 torrent 下载工具或服务
P2P 技术爱好者 —— 学习 WebRTC 与 BitTorrent 协议的结合实现

en.tag: Streaming torrent client using WebRTC for browser and Node.js
en.what: WebTorrent is a streaming BitTorrent client written in JavaScript, running in both Node.js and the browser. In the browser, it uses WebRTC data channels for peer-to-peer transport, enabling torrent download and streaming without plugins or extensions.
en.content: The repository contains the core JavaScript library with APIs for creating clients, adding torrents, listening to events, and streaming files. It also includes a command-line tool, the WebTorrent Desktop application, examples, and documentation.
en.stack: Pure JavaScript implementation, using WebRTC for browser P2P transport and TCP/UDP for Node.js. Installable via npm, integrates with bundlers like Browserify and Webpack.
en.hot: With 31k+ stars and 488 added this month, it's a long-standing benchmark for browser-based torrent streaming. It solves the pain point of using torrents on the web by innovatively leveraging WebRTC.
uses: Web developers — embed torrent downloading or media streaming in websites
Node.js developers — build high-performance torrent download tools or services
P2P enthusiasts — learn the integration of WebRTC and BitTorrent protocol

zh.tag: JavaScript 版《代码整洁之道》实践指南
zh.what: 将 Robert C. Martin 的《Clean Code》中的软件工程原则适配到 JavaScript，提供可读、可复用、可重构的代码编写指南。它不是一份风格指南，而是关于如何产出高质量 JavaScript 代码的准则集合。
zh.content: 仓库包含按主题组织的章节，如变量、函数、对象、类、SOLID 原则、测试、并发、错误处理和注释，每个章节都有坏/好代码示例。
zh.stack: 纯 JavaScript，无外部依赖，仅需 Node.js 环境即可运行示例代码。
zh.hot: 作为 JavaScript 开发者必读的经典资源，累计 94,729 星，本月新增 475 星，长期占据 GitHub 趋势榜。
uses: JavaScript 初学者 —— 学习编写整洁、可维护的代码
团队代码审查 —— 作为代码质量标准的参考
资深开发者 —— 重温并巩固代码整洁原则
技术培训 —— 用于内部培训或工作坊教材

en.tag: Clean Code principles adapted for JavaScript
en.what: Adapts software engineering principles from Robert C. Martin's 'Clean Code' for JavaScript, offering guidelines to produce readable, reusable, and refactorable code. It's not a style guide but a collection of principles for writing high-quality JavaScript.
en.content: The repo contains chapters organized by topic such as Variables, Functions, Objects, Classes, SOLID, Testing, Concurrency, Error Handling, and Comments, each with bad/good code examples.
en.stack: Pure JavaScript, no external dependencies, only requires Node.js to run examples.
en.hot: A classic resource for JavaScript developers, with 94,729 stars and 475 new stars this month, consistently trending on GitHub.
uses: JavaScript beginners — learn to write clean, maintainable code
Team code reviews — use as a reference for code quality standards
Experienced developers — revisit and reinforce clean code principles
Technical training — material for internal workshops or courses

zh.tag: 免费在线数据库 ER 图编辑器与 SQL 生成器
zh.what: DrawDB 是一款在浏览器中运行的免费、简单直观的数据库实体关系图（ERD）编辑器。它支持通过点击快速构建图表、导出和导入 SQL 脚本、生成迁移，无需注册账户即可使用。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 Web 应用源码，基于 JavaScript 和 React 构建，支持本地开发、生产构建以及 Docker 部署。可选配后端服务实现图表分享功能。
zh.stack: 前端使用 JavaScript 和 React，构建工具为 Vite，支持 npm 和 Docker 部署。可选后端基于 Node.js。
zh.hot: 因其免费、无需注册、功能完整的在线数据库设计工具而广受欢迎，GitHub 上已获得 38k+ Stars，本月新增 773 Stars，位列 JavaScript 月榜第 15 名。
uses: 数据库设计师和架构师 —— 快速绘制 ER 图并生成 SQL
开发者 —— 在浏览器中可视化数据库结构，无需安装软件
教育场景 —— 教学数据库设计，直观展示关系模型

en.tag: Free online database ER diagram editor and SQL generator
en.what: DrawDB is a free, simple, and intuitive database entity relationship diagram (ERD) editor that runs in your browser. It allows you to build diagrams with a few clicks, export and import SQL scripts, generate migrations, and customize your editor without creating an account.
en.content: The repository contains the full web application source code built with JavaScript and React, supporting local development, production build, and Docker deployment. An optional backend server enables diagram sharing.
en.stack: Frontend uses JavaScript and React with Vite as build tool, supports npm and Docker deployment. Optional backend is Node.js-based.
en.hot: It has gained popularity for being a free, account-free, and feature-rich online database design tool, with over 38k stars on GitHub and 773 new stars this month, ranking 15th in the JavaScript monthly trending list.
uses: Database designers and architects — quickly draw ER diagrams and generate SQL
Developers — visualize database structures in the browser without installing software
Educational scenarios — teach database design with intuitive relationship models

zh.tag: 面向 AI Agent 的即时并发安全沙箱服务
zh.what: CubeSandbox 是一个基于 RustVMM 和 KVM 的高性能安全沙箱服务，专为 AI Agent 执行代码和任务而设计。它支持在 60 毫秒内启动硬件级隔离的运行环境，且兼容 E2B SDK，可无缝对接现有 AI Agent 工作流。无论是单节点部署还是多节点集群扩展，它都能提供极低内存开销（<5MB）的高并发沙箱服务。
zh.content: 仓库包含基于 Rust 实现的沙箱核心运行时、兼容 E2B 的 API 服务端、Python SDK（PyPI 发布）以及完整的文档与快速开始指南，支持单节点和集群部署形态。
zh.stack: 核心以 Rust 编写，基于 Linux KVM 虚拟化与 RustVMM 构建硬件级隔离；对外提供 E2B 兼容 API，并通过 PyPI 提供 Python SDK 便于集成。
zh.hot: 在 AI Agent 爆发期，安全沙箱需求激增；该项目凭借 60ms 极速启动和 <5MB 的超低内存开销，一周新增 918 Star 冲上 Trending 第 4，成为 E2B 生态的热门开源替代方案。
uses: 为 AI Agent 提供安全代码执行环境——适用于大模型代码生成与工具调用的隔离运行
需要 E2B 兼容沙箱的开发者与平台——可作为 E2B 的开源自托管替代方案
追求高并发、低延迟沙箱的云计算场景——适合大规模并发创建与销毁容器化工作负载
构建多租户 AI 应用的基础设施团队——提供硬件级隔离保障租户安全

en.tag: Instant, secure, lightweight sandbox purpose-built for AI agents
en.what: CubeSandbox is a high-performance, secure sandbox service built on RustVMM and KVM, designed for running AI agent code and tasks. It spins up hardware-isolated environments in under 60 ms with less than 5 MB memory overhead and is compatible with the E2B SDK for seamless integration into existing AI agent workflows. It supports both single-node deployments and easy scaling to multi-node clusters for high-concurrency workloads.
en.content: The repository contains the Rust-based core sandbox runtime, an E2B-compatible API server, a Python SDK published on PyPI, and comprehensive documentation with quick-start guides, supporting both single-node and clustered deployments.
en.stack: Written in Rust and built on Linux KVM virtualization and RustVMM for hardware-level isolation; it exposes an E2B-compatible API and offers a Python SDK via PyPI for easy integration.
en.hot: Amid the AI agent boom, demand for secure execution environments is surging; its sub-60ms startup and under-5MB memory footprint have earned it 918 new stars in a week, landing 4th on the Rust Trending chart as a popular open-source alternative in the E2B ecosystem.
uses: AI agent developers needing secure code execution — ideal for isolating LLM-generated code and tool calls
Teams seeking an E2B-compatible, self-hostable sandbox — a drop-in open-source alternative to E2B
Cloud platforms requiring high-concurrency, low-latency isolation — suited for massive concurrent workload creation and teardown
Infrastructure teams building multi-tenant AI apps — provides hardware-level isolation for tenant security

zh.tag: Git 工作树 + tmux 窗口的零摩擦并行开发管理器，专为 AI Agent 打造
zh.what: workmux 是一款高度定制化的终端工作流工具，通过将 git worktree 与 tmux（以及 kitty、WezTerm、Zellij 等）窗口一一绑定，为每个任务提供独立的开发环境。它特别适合同时运行多个 AI Agent 进行并行编码，无需 stash 或切换分支，实现真正的零摩擦上下文切换。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Rust 源码、核心命令（add、merge 等）、支持多终端后端的适配层、Dashboard 与 Sidebar 界面，以及用于向 worktree 内 Agent 委派任务的 /worktree skill 集成。
zh.stack: 核心由 Rust 编写，底层依赖 git worktree 机制，并支持 tmux、Zellij、Kitty、WezTerm 作为窗口后端，通过 CLI 与终端 UI 进行交互。
zh.hot: 凭借 AI Agent 并行开发的热潮，该仓库在 Rust 周榜排名第 15，目前已获 1,853 Stars，本周新增 73 Star。其'零摩擦'理念——用现有终端工具而非新 GUI——精准切中了开发者对多 Agent 工作流的管理痛点。
uses: 需要同时维护多个功能分支、避免频繁切换上下文的终端开发者
在本地并行运行多个 AI Agent（如编码、review、测试）的工程师
使用 tmux/Zellij/Kitty 等终端复用器并追求自动化工作流的重度 CLI 用户
希望一键清理（合并分支、删除 worktree、关闭窗口）的全栈开发者

en.tag: Git worktree + tmux parallel dev manager built for AI agents
en.what: workmux is a highly opinionated terminal workflow tool that pairs git worktrees with tmux (and kitty, WezTerm, Zellij) windows to create isolated dev environments per task. It is designed to run multiple AI agents in parallel for concurrent coding, eliminating the need to stash or switch branches and enabling true zero-friction context switching.
en.content: The repo includes Rust source code, core commands (add, merge), adapters for multiple terminal backends, a Dashboard and Sidebar UI, and a /worktree skill integration for delegating tasks to agents inside worktrees.
en.stack: Built primarily in Rust, it relies on git worktrees under the hood and supports tmux, Zellij, Kitty, and WezTerm as windowing backends, exposing both CLI and terminal UI interfaces.
en.hot: Riding the wave of AI agent parallel development, it ranks #15 on GitHub Trending Rust, with 1,853 stars and 73 new this week. Its 'zero-friction' philosophy of leveraging existing terminal tools rather than new GUIs directly addresses developer pain points in managing multi-agent workflows.
uses: Terminal developers juggling multiple feature branches who want to avoid constant context switching
Engineers running multiple AI agents (coding, review, testing) in parallel locally
Heavy CLI users of tmux/Zellij/Kitty seeking automated, opinionated workflows
Full-stack developers who want one-command cleanup after merging branches

zh.tag: 极速递归搜索工具，智能遵循 gitignore 规则
zh.what: ripgrep（rg）是一款面向行的递归搜索工具，能够在目录中基于正则表达式快速查找文本。默认情况下自动遵守 gitignore 规则、跳过隐藏文件与二进制文件，支持 Windows、macOS 和 Linux 跨平台使用。
zh.content: 仓库包含 rg 核心源码、CLI 入口、多线程搜索引擎，以及完善的用户指南（GUIDE.md）、FAQ 和 Shell 补全脚本，并提供各平台的二进制发布。
zh.stack: 采用 Rust 编写，依托 regex 引擎实现高性能正则匹配，支持 SIMD 加速与内存映射等优化手段。
zh.hot: 坐拥 66.2k+ Stars 且今日新增 98 Stars，ripgrep 凭借比 grep/ag 快数倍的速度和“开箱即用”的默认过滤策略，成为开发者日常代码检索的首选利器。
uses: 开发者日常在大型代码库中快速检索函数、变量或日志关键词
DevOps/运维人员排查配置文件、查找特定错误模式
CI/CD 流水线中集成高速文本搜索与代码审查
跨平台用户（Windows/macOS/Linux）替代传统 grep 的现代化方案

en.tag: Blazing fast recursive search tool that respects gitignore
en.what: ripgrep (rg) is a line-oriented recursive search tool that quickly finds regex patterns across directories. By default, it respects gitignore rules and automatically skips hidden files and binaries, with first-class support for Windows, macOS, and Linux.
en.content: The repository contains the core rg source code, CLI entry point, multi-threaded search engine, along with comprehensive documentation including a user guide (GUIDE.md), FAQ, shell completions, and cross-platform binary releases.
en.stack: Written in Rust, leveraging a high-performance regex engine with optimizations such as SIMD and memory mapping.
en.hot: With 66.2k+ stars and 98 new stars today, ripgrep is the go-to code search tool for developers, offering several-fold speed improvements over grep/ag and an out-of-the-box default filtering strategy.
uses: Developers quickly searching for functions, variables, or log keywords in large codebases
DevOps engineers inspecting config files and hunting for specific error patterns
Integrating high-speed text search into CI/CD pipelines and code review workflows
Cross-platform users (Windows/macOS/Linux) looking for a modern grep alternative

zh.tag: 受 Kakoune 启发的后现代模态编辑器，Rust 原生内置 LSP 与 Tree-sitter
zh.what: Helix 是一款受 Kakoune 与 Neovim 启发的终端模态文本编辑器，采用 Rust 编写。它将 Kakoune 的选择-操作模型与现代 IDE 功能结合，原生内置语言服务器（LSP）支持。通过 Tree-sitter 提供增量式语法高亮与智能代码编辑，致力于在终端中实现开箱即用的现代开发体验。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Rust 编写的核心编辑器源码、基于 tree-sitter 的 runtime 语法查询文件与缩进定义、多平台构建配置及文档。此外还包含实验性的 wgpu 自定义渲染器探索代码，以及完整的键位映射与安装指南。
zh.stack: 核心以 Rust 语言构建，利用 Tree-sitter 进行增量语法解析与高亮，内置 LSP 客户端实现 IDE 级代码补全与诊断。终端界面基于自有渲染层，并正探索以 wgpu 实现跨平台图形化前端。
zh.hot: 仓库已斩获 45.5k Stars，本月新增 735 并跻身 Rust 月榜第 12，反映出开发者对「模态编辑现代化」的强烈需求。它无需繁琐配置即可提供与 VS Code 相当的 LSP 和语法高亮体验，精准击中了 Vim/Neovim 用户渴望「开箱即用」的痛点。
uses: 追求极致键盘效率的终端开发者——希望获得 Vim 级模态编辑但不想手动配置插件
Rust 及系统编程爱好者——需要原生高性能、低资源占用的跨平台编辑器
偏好开箱即用 IDE 功能的用户——需要内置 LSP、语法高亮与多光标选择的现代化支持

en.tag: Post-modern modal editor in Rust, inspired by Kakoune with built-in LSP and tree-sitter
en.what: Helix is a terminal-based modal text editor written in Rust, heavily inspired by Kakoune and Neovim. It combines Kakoune’s selection-action editing model with modern IDE features like built-in language server protocol (LSP) support. Smart, incremental syntax highlighting and code editing are powered by tree-sitter, aiming for an out-of-the-box modern development experience in the terminal.
en.content: The repository holds the Rust-based core editor source, tree-sitter runtime query files and indentation definitions, multi-platform build configurations, and documentation. It also includes experimental code for a custom wgpu renderer, along with comprehensive keymaps and installation guides.
en.stack: Built primarily in Rust, it leverages tree-sitter for incremental parsing and syntax highlighting, and includes a native LSP client for IDE-grade code intelligence. The terminal UI runs on a custom rendering layer, with ongoing experiments toward a cross-platform GUI frontend using wgpu.
en.hot: With 45.5k stars and 735 new stars this month, ranking 12th on the GitHub Trending Rust monthly list, Helix reflects strong demand for a modernized modal editing experience. It hits the sweet spot for Vim/Neovim users by offering IDE-grade LSP and tree-sitter features out of the box, without the burden of heavy configuration.
uses: Terminal-centric developers seeking Vim-level modal efficiency without manual plugin configuration
Rust and systems programming enthusiasts who demand a native, high-performance, low-resource editor
Users preferring an out-of-the-box IDE experience with built-in LSP, syntax highlighting, and multiple selections

zh.tag: 开源可扩展的离线语音转录桌面工具
zh.what: Handy 是一款跨平台的桌面语音转文字应用，主打完全离线、隐私优先的转录体验。用户只需按下可配置的快捷键说话，即可将语音实时转换为文本并自动输入到任意文本框中。所有音频处理均在本地完成，无需联网或上传云端。
zh.content: 仓库包含跨平台桌面客户端源码、基于 Rust 的本地音频处理管线，以及集成 Whisper 和 Parakeet V3 的离线转录引擎，同时提供了 Raycast 插件等扩展集成。
zh.stack: 基于 Rust 构建，使用 Silero VAD 进行语音活动检测，支持 Whisper（Small/Medium/Turbo/Large）和 Parakeet V3 本地模型，并可在 GPU 加速下运行。
zh.hot: 在隐私焦虑与云服务费高涨的背景下，Handy 以「完全开源、完全离线」的差异化定位迅速获得开发者关注，本月新增近 3,000 Star，累计突破 2.6 万，登榜 GitHub Rust 月榜第 17 名。
uses: 隐私敏感用户 —— 需要在本地完成语音输入、拒绝云端上传的写作者与专业人士。
开发者与极客 —— 希望 Fork 并二次扩展自定义模型或工作流的技术用户。
跨平台办公场景 —— 在 Windows、macOS 或 Linux 上追求高效语音转文字输入的远程工作者。
可访问性需求者 —— 需要无障碍语音输入工具但不愿付费订阅的辅助功能使用者。

en.tag: Free, open-source & extensible offline speech-to-text desktop app
en.what: Handy is a cross-platform desktop speech-to-text app that transcribes your voice entirely offline with a privacy-first approach. Press a configurable shortcut, speak, and it pastes the transcribed text directly into any text field. All audio processing happens locally on your machine, with no data sent to the cloud.
en.content: The repository houses the cross-platform desktop client source, a Rust-based local audio pipeline, and an offline transcription engine integrating Whisper and Parakeet V3 models, plus integrations like a Raycast extension.
en.stack: Built in Rust, it uses Silero VAD for voice-activity detection and supports local Whisper (Small/Medium/Turbo/Large) and Parakeet V3 models with optional GPU acceleration.
en.hot: Amid rising privacy concerns and cloud-service costs, Handy's 'fully open-source and fully offline' positioning has resonated strongly with developers, adding nearly 3,000 stars this month to reach 26.7K+ and ranking 17th on GitHub's Rust monthly trending list.
uses: Privacy-conscious users — writers and professionals who need local voice input without cloud uploads.
Developers & tinkers — technical users who want to fork and extend custom models or workflows.
Cross-platform workers — remote workers on Windows, macOS, or Linux seeking efficient offline dictation.
Accessibility seekers — users needing assistive voice-input tools without paid subscriptions.

zh.tag: 兼容 Git 的下一代版本控制系统
zh.what: Jujutsu 是一个从头设计、兼顾易用性与强大功能的版本控制系统。它抽象了用户界面与存储后端，目前使用 Git 仓库作为存储层，因此兼容现有 Git 工具链。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Jujutsu 的 Rust 源码、文档、安装指南、教程及开发路线图。核心开发者使用它管理自身代码。
zh.stack: 使用 Rust 编写，依赖 Git 作为存储后端，支持多种平台。
zh.hot: 作为 Git 的潜在替代品，Jujutsu 提供了更简洁的命令和更智能的冲突处理，吸引了 3 万+ Star，本月新增近 900 Star。
uses: 开发者——寻求更直观、高效的版本控制体验
团队——希望简化 Git 工作流并减少合并冲突
Git 用户——想尝试兼容 Git 的新工具
开源项目——评估下一代 VCS 作为 Git 的替代

en.tag: A next-gen VCS that's Git-compatible, simple, and powerful
en.what: Jujutsu is a version control system designed from the ground up for ease of use and power. It abstracts the UI from storage backends, currently using Git repos as a storage layer, making it compatible with existing Git tools.
en.content: The repo contains Jujutsu's Rust source code, documentation, installation guides, tutorials, and a development roadmap. Core developers use it to develop Jujutsu itself.
en.stack: Written in Rust, relies on Git as a storage backend, cross-platform.
en.hot: As a potential Git replacement, Jujutsu offers cleaner commands and smarter conflict resolution, amassing 30k+ stars with ~900 new stars this month.
uses: Developers — seeking a more intuitive and efficient version control experience
Teams — wanting to simplify Git workflows and reduce merge conflicts
Git users — looking to try a new Git-compatible tool
Open-source projects — evaluating next-gen VCS as a Git alternative

zh.tag: AI Agent 统一代理网关，支持 MCP/A2A 协议
zh.what: Agentgateway 是一个基于 Rust 构建的下一代开源 Agentic 代理，原生支持 MCP 与 A2A 协议。它为 Agent 与 LLM、外部工具及其他 Agent 之间的交互提供统一的安全、治理与可观测层，支持多模型路由与跨 Agent 任务协作。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心代理引擎（LLM/MCP/A2A Gateway）、多协议传输实现（stdio/HTTP/SSE/Streamable HTTP）、统一 OpenAI-compatible API 适配层，以及架构文档与示例配置。
zh.stack: 基于 Rust 构建，确保高性能与内存安全。支持 HTTP/SSE/stdio/Streamable HTTP 多协议传输，集成 OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini/Bedrock 等主流 LLM，并可对接 Kubernetes 进行自托管模型推理路由。
zh.hot: 作为宣称首个完整的 Agentic AI 连接方案，它在 MCP/A2A 协议爆发期精准卡位，单月新增 605 Star 并登上 Rust 月榜第 9，吸引了大量构建 Agent 工具链的开发者关注。
uses: AI Agent 平台开发者 —— 需要统一代理、安全管控与多模型路由的 Agent 基础设施团队。
企业 AI 架构师 —— 需在内部落地 MCP/A2A 协议并增加预算控制、审计与可观测性的场景。
Agent 工具链集成者 —— 需要联邦多源工具、统一 OAuth 接入并暴露给 LLM 的开发者。

en.tag: Unified AI agentic proxy for secure MCP, A2A and LLM connectivity
en.what: Agentgateway is an open-source, Rust-built next-generation proxy for agentic AI, natively supporting MCP and A2A protocols. It provides a unified security, governance, and observability layer for communication between agents, LLMs, and external tools, enabling intelligent routing, tool federation, and cross-agent collaboration.
en.content: The repository includes the core proxy engine (LLM, MCP, and A2A gateways), multi-protocol transport implementations (stdio, HTTP, SSE, Streamable HTTP), a unified OpenAI-compatible API layer, and architectural documentation with sample configurations.
en.stack: Built in Rust for high performance and memory safety. It supports multi-protocol transports (HTTP, SSE, stdio, Streamable HTTP), integrates with major LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Bedrock), and leverages Kubernetes for self-hosted inference routing.
en.hot: Positioned as the first complete connectivity solution for agentic AI, it gained 605 stars this month and ranked #9 on the Rust trending list, capturing strong interest from developers building agent toolchains amid the MCP/A2A protocol boom.
uses: AI agent platform builders —— infrastructure teams needing a unified proxy with security controls and multi-model routing for agentic systems.
Enterprise AI architects —— organizations adopting MCP/A2A internally that require budget controls, audit trails, and observability.
Agent toolchain integrators —— developers federating multi-source tools and exposing them via unified OAuth/OpenAPI to LLMs.

zh.tag: 开源本地优先的个人财务与投资组合追踪器
zh.what: Wealthfolio 是一款开源、本地优先的个人财务与投资追踪工具，可在设备端私密管理投资组合、净资产、日常支出并运行财务模拟。它无需云端账户即可永久免费使用，同时提供可选的订阅服务来接入 30 余家券商的自动同步与加密多设备同步。
zh.content: 仓库采用 Rust 后端与前端应用结合的全栈架构，包含桌面端（macOS / Windows / Linux）、移动端（iOS）以及 Docker 自托管部署方案。代码库涵盖核心财务数据处理、本地数据库、前端 UI 以及可选的 Wealthfolio Connect 同步服务接口。
zh.stack: 以 Rust 为核心后端，搭配现代前端技术构建跨平台桌面与移动客户端，支持 Docker 自托管部署。数据完全本地化存储，同时通过 Wealthfolio Connect 提供可选的加密云端同步与券商数据接入。
zh.hot: 在数据隐私焦虑日益加剧的背景下，这款本地优先、无需账户即可永久免费使用的个人财务工具精准击中了用户痛点，本月新增 681 Star 并跻身 GitHub Trending Rust 月榜前 20。其优雅的开源定位与可选的券商自动同步订阅模式，也为个人理财工具树立了新的隐私标杆。
uses: 注重财务隐私的个人用户 —— 希望投资与消费数据完全保留在本地的个人理财者
跨平台桌面与移动端用户 —— 需要在 macOS、Windows、Linux 及 iOS 间无缝查看资产的人群
自托管与开源爱好者 —— 偏好使用 Docker 部署并完全掌控数据的开发者与技术用户
被动投资与净资产追踪者 —— 需要跟踪多券商投资组合、净资产变化及未来模拟的投资者

en.tag: Local-first, privacy-focused open-source portfolio & personal finance tracker.
en.what: Wealthfolio is an open-source, local-first personal finance and investment tracker that lets you privately manage portfolios, net worth, spending, and simulations on your own device. It requires no cloud account and is free forever for manual tracking and CSV imports, with an optional subscription for automatic brokerage syncing across 30+ institutions and encrypted multi-device sync.
en.content: The repo contains a full-stack Rust-backed application with desktop clients for macOS, Windows, and Linux, an iOS app, and a Docker self-hosting option. It includes core financial data processing, a local database, frontend UI, and interfaces for the optional Wealthfolio Connect sync service.
en.stack: Built primarily in Rust on the backend with a modern frontend stack powering cross-platform desktop and mobile clients, packaged for macOS, Windows, Linux, and iOS. It also supports Docker-based self-hosting and optional encrypted cloud sync via Wealthfolio Connect.
en.hot: Amid growing privacy concerns, its local-first, account-free, and forever-free approach has resonated strongly with users, earning 681 new stars this month and breaking into the top 20 of GitHub’s Rust monthly trending list. The elegant balance between open-source self-custody and an optional brokerage-sync subscription sets a new benchmark for privacy-centric personal finance tools.
uses: Privacy-conscious individuals who want investment and spending data to remain strictly on their own devices.
Cross-platform users who need seamless access to their net worth and portfolios across desktop and iOS.
Self-hosting enthusiasts and developers who prefer open-source tools and Docker-based deployment.
Passive investors and net-worth trackers looking to monitor multi-brokerage holdings, spending, and run financial simulations.

zh.tag: 基于 Rust 的现代化 JavaScript/TypeScript 安全运行时
zh.what: Deno 是一个基于 V8、Rust 和 Tokio 构建的 JavaScript、TypeScript 与 WebAssembly 运行时，默认启用安全沙箱和权限控制。它提供出色的开发者体验，可用于构建 Web 服务器、CLI 工具及各类现代应用。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Deno 运行时核心源码、CLI 工具链、标准库以及完整文档。用户可通过官方脚本或包管理器一键安装，也支持从源码编译。
zh.stack: 核心引擎基于 Google V8 执行 JavaScript，底层使用 Rust 编写，异步 IO 由 Tokio 驱动，并支持 WebAssembly。
zh.hot: 作为 Node.js 的现代化替代方案，Deno 凭借原生 TypeScript 支持、内置安全权限和单一可执行文件等优势持续吸引开发者。目前累计获星 107,711 颗，本周新增 290 星并跻身 Rust 语言周榜第 12 位。
uses: 前端/后端开发者：希望用原生 TypeScript 开发高性能 Web 服务与 API。
DevOps 与 CLI 工具开发者：需要安全沙箱和单一可执行文件部署脚本。
Rust/JavaScript 混合生态建设者：寻求基于 V8 和 Rust 的高性能运行时。
云原生应用开发者：利用 Deno Deploy 等边缘计算平台快速部署。

en.tag: Modern Rust-based JavaScript/TypeScript runtime with secure defaults
en.what: Deno is a JavaScript, TypeScript, and WebAssembly runtime built on V8, Rust, and Tokio, featuring secure-by-default permissions and sandboxing. It delivers a great developer experience for building web servers, CLI tools, and modern applications.
en.content: The repository houses the Deno runtime core, CLI toolchain, standard library, and comprehensive documentation. It supports one-line installation via official scripts or package managers, as well as building from source.
en.stack: Built on the Google V8 engine for JavaScript execution, with a Rust-written core and Tokio-powered asynchronous I/O, plus WebAssembly support.
en.hot: As a modern alternative to Node.js, Deno continues to attract developers with native TypeScript support, built-in security permissions, and a single executable. It has amassed 107,711 stars, gaining 290 this week and ranking 12th on the Rust trending chart.
uses: Frontend/backend developers building high-performance web services and APIs with native TypeScript.
DevOps and CLI tool developers who need secure sandboxing and single-binary deployment.
Builders of hybrid Rust/JavaScript ecosystems seeking a high-performance V8-based runtime.
Cloud-native developers leveraging Deno Deploy for rapid edge-computing deployment.

zh.tag: 基于公钥的QUIC网络库，内置NAT穿透与可组合协议
zh.what: Iroh 提供基于公钥的节点互联 API，替代传统 IP 寻址，自动寻找并维护最快连接路径。它内置 NAT 穿透（打洞）与 Relay 回退机制，底层基于 QUIC 实现认证加密与多流并发。开发者还可直接组合 Blobs、Gossip、Docs 等高层协议，快速构建去中心化应用。
zh.content: 仓库以 Rust crate 形式提供核心网络库，包含 Endpoint 绑定、连接管理与性能测量体系；同时维护了 iroh-blobs、iroh-gossip、iroh-docs 等可组合协议，覆盖内容传输、消息订阅与最终一致性存储。
zh.stack: 纯 Rust 实现，核心依赖 noq（QUIC 实现）与自定义 Relay 协议，支持跨平台部署（包括移动设备），可通过 cargo 直接集成。
zh.hot: 该仓库月增 2,307 星至 11.7K，位列 Rust 月榜第 6，反映了开发者对「IP-less」、密钥化网络连接方案的强烈需求。
uses: P2P 与去中心化应用开发者——需要替代传统 IP 寻址的可靠网络层
移动/IoT 开发者——需要内置 NAT 穿透与跨平台 QUIC 连接
协议构建者——希望基于 iroh-blobs、gossip 等模块快速搭建内容传输或数据同步网络

en.tag: Rust QUIC library with key-based dialing, NAT traversal & composable protocols
en.what: Iroh provides a key-based dialing API that lets you connect to devices by public key instead of fragile IP addresses, automatically finding and maintaining the fastest path. It handles NAT hole-punching with a fallback to public relay servers, using QUIC (via noq) for authenticated encryption and concurrent streams. Built-in composable protocols like iroh-blobs, iroh-gossip, and iroh-docs let you add content transfer, pub-sub, and document sync without building from scratch.
en.content: The repo ships as a Rust crate with an Endpoint API, connection management, hole-punching, relay fallback, and continuous performance benchmarking. It also includes higher-level composable protocols—iroh-blobs for content-addressed transfer, iroh-gossip for scalable pub-sub, and iroh-docs for eventually-consistent key-value storage.
en.stack: Implemented in Rust, with QUIC provided by noq and a custom relay protocol; distributed via crates.io and designed to run on devices ranging from servers to average phones.
en.hot: Gained 2,307 stars this month to reach 11.7K, ranking #6 on GitHub’s Rust monthly trending list, signaling strong demand for IP-less, key-based networking infrastructure.
uses: P2P & decentralized app builders who need a reliable network layer beyond IP addresses
Mobile/IoT developers needing built-in NAT hole-punching and cross-platform QUIC
Protocol engineers looking to compose content transfer, pub-sub, or doc sync from existing iroh modules

zh.tag: 高通设备上本地运行前沿大模型的最简方案
zh.what: GenieX 是一个面向高通骁龙设备的端侧生成式 AI 推理运行时。它允许开发者用几行代码在 Hexagon NPU、Adreno GPU 或 CPU 上运行来自 Hugging Face 的 GGUF 模型或高通 AI Hub 的预编译包。
zh.content: 仓库包含一个统一的 C SDK，通过 CLI、Python、Kotlin/Java、Docker 和 OpenAI 兼容服务器暴露。底层集成了 llama.cpp 运行时（GGML 在 CPU/GPU/Hexagon HTP 上）和高通 AI Engine Direct 运行时（NPU 上）。
zh.stack: Rust 编写核心，依赖 llama.cpp (GGML)、Qualcomm AI Engine Direct、Hexagon HTP 内核。支持 Windows ARM64、Android、Linux ARM64。
zh.hot: 高通官方开源社区版 GENIE，让开发者无需云端即可在骁龙设备上运行前沿模型，月增 159 星，总星 8247，位列 Rust 月榜第 19。
uses: 高通骁龙设备上的 AI 应用开发者 —— 快速集成本地推理能力
边缘计算与 IoT 场景 —— 在 Linux ARM64 设备上部署模型
移动端 AI 开发 —— 通过 Android SDK 在手机上运行 LLM/VLM
研究与原型设计 —— 在本地快速测试 GGUF 模型

en.tag: The easiest way to run frontier LLMs & VLMs locally on Qualcomm devices
en.what: GenieX is an on-device Gen AI inference runtime for Qualcomm Snapdragon devices. It lets developers run GGUF models from Hugging Face or pre-compiled bundles from Qualcomm AI Hub on Hexagon NPU, Adreno GPU, or CPU with just a few lines of code.
en.content: The repo contains a single C SDK exposed via CLI, Python, Kotlin/Java, Docker, and an OpenAI-compatible server. Under the hood, it integrates the llama.cpp runtime (GGML over CPU/GPU/Hexagon HTP) and the Qualcomm AI Engine Direct runtime on the NPU.
en.stack: Core written in Rust, depends on llama.cpp (GGML), Qualcomm AI Engine Direct, Hexagon HTP kernels. Supports Windows ARM64, Android, Linux ARM64.
en.hot: Qualcomm's official open-source community version of GENIE, enabling developers to run frontier models on Snapdragon devices without the cloud. Gained 159 stars this month, total 8247, ranked #19 on Rust monthly trending.
uses: AI app developers on Qualcomm Snapdragon devices — quickly integrate on-device inference
Edge computing & IoT scenarios — deploy models on Linux ARM64 devices
Mobile AI development — run LLMs/VLMs on phones via Android SDK
Research & prototyping — test GGUF models locally

zh.tag: Rust 语言官方源码仓，包含编译器与标准库
zh.what: Rust 编程语言官方主仓库，包含编译器、标准库及文档。致力于通过所有权模型和类型系统，让开发者构建高性能且内存安全的系统级软件。
zh.content: 包含 Rust 编译器（rustc）、标准库、官方文档、测试套件及构建脚本。
zh.stack: 以 Rust 自举编译，依赖 LLVM 作为后端，配合 Cargo、rustfmt、Clippy 及 rust-analyzer 构成完整工具链。
zh.hot: 拥有 11.4 万 Star 并长期稳居 Rust 语言周榜前列，得益于其“零成本抽象”与内存安全特性，已成为系统编程、区块链及云原生基础设施的首选语言。
uses: 系统编程开发者 —— 需要高性能且内存安全的底层软件开发
区块链/Web3 工程师 —— 构建高效、可靠的智能合约与节点程序
云原生与基础设施开发者 —— 用于编写容器、微服务及 DevOps 工具
编程语言爱好者与研究者 —— 学习现代类型系统、所有权模型及编译器实现

en.tag: Official Rust language source repo with compiler and standard library
en.what: This is the official main source repository for the Rust programming language, containing the compiler, standard library, and documentation. It empowers developers to build reliable and efficient software through its ownership model and rich type system.
en.content: The repository houses the Rust compiler (rustc), standard library, official documentation, test suites, and build scripts.
en.stack: Self-hosted Rust compiler with LLVM backend, accompanied by Cargo, rustfmt, Clippy, and rust-analyzer for a complete toolchain.
en.hot: With 114.7K stars and consistently ranking on the Rust trending list, its zero-cost abstractions and memory safety guarantees have made it the go-to choice for systems programming, blockchain, and cloud-native infrastructure.
uses: Systems programmers building high-performance, memory-safe low-level software
Blockchain and Web3 engineers developing efficient smart contracts and node implementations
Cloud-native and infrastructure developers creating containers, microservices, and DevOps tooling
Programming language enthusiasts and researchers studying modern type systems, ownership models, and compiler design

zh.tag: 用 Rust 编写的并行浏览器引擎原型
zh.what: Servo 是一个用 Rust 语言开发的原型浏览器引擎，旨在利用并行架构实现高性能和安全性。它支持在多种操作系统上运行，包括 macOS、Linux、Windows、OpenHarmony 和 Android。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Servo 浏览器引擎的完整源代码，包括布局、渲染、网络和 JavaScript 引擎等模块，以及构建工具和文档。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Rust 语言，依赖 Cargo 构建系统，支持通过 mach 工具进行跨平台编译。
zh.hot: Servo 作为 Mozilla 的下一代浏览器引擎项目，凭借 Rust 的安全性和并行性能吸引大量关注，目前 Star 数超过 37k，月增 360。
uses: 浏览器开发者 —— 研究并行浏览器引擎架构
嵌入式应用开发者 —— 将 Web 技术嵌入轻量级应用
Rust 爱好者 —— 学习大型 Rust 项目实践

en.tag: A prototype parallel browser engine written in Rust
en.what: Servo is a prototype web browser engine written in Rust, designed to leverage parallel architecture for high performance and safety. It runs on multiple operating systems including macOS, Linux, Windows, OpenHarmony, and Android.
en.content: The repository contains the full source code of the Servo browser engine, including modules for layout, rendering, networking, and JavaScript engine, along with build tools and documentation.
en.stack: Primarily written in Rust, uses the Cargo build system, and supports cross-platform compilation via the mach tool.
en.hot: As Mozilla's next-generation browser engine project, Servo attracts attention for its safety and parallelism in Rust, with over 37k stars and 360 new stars this month.
uses: Browser developers — studying parallel browser engine architecture
Embedded application developers — embedding web technologies in lightweight apps
Rust enthusiasts — learning large-scale Rust project practices

zh.tag: 高性能命令行模糊搜索工具与交互式终端应用框架
zh.what: fzf 是一个通用的命令行模糊查找器，能够在海量数据中通过模糊匹配快速定位目标。它既可以作为独立的文件、历史记录搜索工具，也可通过事件驱动架构嵌入脚本，构建丰富的交互式终端应用。
zh.content: 仓库包含一个 Go 编写的单二进制可执行文件源码，以及针对 Bash、Zsh、Fish、Nushell、Vim 和 Neovim 的即用型集成脚本与插件。
zh.stack: 基于 Go 语言开发，编译为无依赖的独立二进制文件；通过事件驱动架构提供可编程接口，并原生支持主流 Shell 与编辑器生态。
zh.hot: 凭借 81K+ Star 和月增 1,121 Star 的势头，fzf 已成为终端效率工具的标杆；其毫秒级检索速度、零依赖部署以及对全平台 Shell 和编辑器的深度集成，让它在开发者群体中经久不衰。
uses: 终端重度用户 —— 快速模糊定位文件、目录与命令历史，替代传统 grep/find 交互。
Shell 效率极客 —— 通过键盘驱动的工作流，在 Bash/Zsh/Fish 中构建自定义模糊菜单。
Vim/Neovim 用户 —— 作为编辑器插件实现文件、Buffer、LSP 符号等模糊搜索。
运维与 DevOps 工程师 —— 在日志、进程、K8s 资源等海量文本中秒级定位目标。

en.tag: A blazing-fast command-line fuzzy finder and interactive terminal toolkit
en.what: fzf is a general-purpose command-line fuzzy finder that lets you rapidly locate items in massive datasets using fuzzy matching. It works as a standalone tool for searching files and command history, and its event-driven architecture allows embedding into scripts to build rich interactive terminal applications.
en.content: The repository contains the source code for a single Go binary, along with ready-to-use integration scripts and plugins for Bash, Zsh, Fish, Nushell, Vim, and Neovim.
en.stack: Written in Go and distributed as a self-contained, dependency-free binary. It exposes a programmable, event-driven interface and natively integrates with major shells and editors.
en.hot: With 81K+ stars and 1,121 new stars this month, fzf is a benchmark for terminal productivity; its millisecond-level search speed, zero-dependency deployment, and deep integration across all major shells and editors make it a perennial favorite among developers.
uses: Power terminal users — Fuzzy-locate files, directories, and command history at speed, replacing traditional grep/find interactions.
Shell efficiency enthusiasts — Build custom fuzzy menus and keyboard-driven workflows in Bash, Zsh, Fish, or Nushell.
Vim/Neovim users — Use as an editor plugin for fuzzy searching files, buffers, LSP symbols, and more.
Ops & DevOps engineers — Instantly pinpoint targets in massive logs, processes, or Kubernetes resources.

zh.tag: Kubernetes 声明式 GitOps 持续交付工具
zh.what: Argo CD 是面向 Kubernetes 的声明式 GitOps 持续交付工具，通过监控 Git 仓库中的配置声明自动将应用状态同步到目标集群。它支持 Kustomize、Helm、Jsonnet 等多种配置管理工具，让应用部署和生命周期管理实现自动化、可审计且易于理解。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Argo CD 核心服务端、Web UI、CLI 命令行工具及完整文档，源码以 Go 为主，同时提供 Helm Chart 和标准化安装清单。
zh.stack: 基于 Go 语言开发，深度依赖 Kubernetes 及其 API，前端采用 React/TypeScript 构建，并集成 Kustomize、Helm、Jsonnet 等主流配置管理工具。
zh.hot: 作为云原生 GitOps 领域的标杆项目，Argo CD 已获 23.6k+ Star，本周新增 163 Star 并跻身 Go 语言周榜第 4，反映出 Kubernetes 社区对声明式交付和自动化运维的强烈需求。
uses: 云平台运维团队 —— 需要为多个 Kubernetes 集群实现声明式、自动化的应用持续交付
DevOps 工程师 —— 希望以 Git 为唯一可信源，落地 GitOps 工作流并提升部署可审计性
云原生架构师 —— 构建多环境（开发/测试/生产）一致性的 Kubernetes 应用交付体系

en.tag: Declarative GitOps continuous delivery tool for Kubernetes
en.what: Argo CD is a declarative GitOps continuous delivery tool for Kubernetes that automatically syncs application states to target clusters by monitoring configuration declarations in Git repositories. It supports multiple configuration management tools including Kustomize, Helm, and Jsonnet, enabling automated, auditable, and transparent application deployment and lifecycle management.
en.content: The repository contains the Argo CD core server, Web UI, CLI tool, and comprehensive documentation. The source code is primarily written in Go, with Helm charts and standard installation manifests provided.
en.stack: Built primarily in Go and relies on Kubernetes and its APIs. The frontend is built with React/TypeScript, and it integrates configuration management tools including Kustomize, Helm, and Jsonnet.
en.hot: As a landmark project in the cloud-native GitOps space, Argo CD has garnered over 23.6k stars, with 163 new stars this week and a ranking of #4 on the GitHub Go Trending weekly list, reflecting strong community demand for declarative delivery and automated operations in Kubernetes environments.
uses: Platform/Ops teams —— Automating declarative app delivery across multiple Kubernetes clusters
DevOps engineers —— Implementing GitOps workflows with Git as the single source of truth for auditable deployments
Cloud-native architects —— Building consistent Kubernetes application delivery pipelines across dev, test, and production environments

zh.tag: 本地优先的 AI 编程助手会话分析与成本追踪工具
zh.what: AgentsView 是一款本地优先的工具，能够自动发现、浏览和搜索你本地所有 AI 编程助手（如 Claude Code、Codex、Devin 等）的历史会话。它提供统一的 Web 仪表板与 CLI，帮助用户追踪 token 消耗、分析使用成本并获取深度洞察，且无需注册账户，所有数据均保存在本地 SQLite 中。
zh.content: 项目以单一 Go 二进制文件发布，包含命令行界面（CLI）、可后台运行的本地守护进程（daemon），以及可选的桌面端应用和 Docker 镜像。核心组件包括自动发现各 Agent 会话数据的同步引擎、本地 SQLite 数据存储、用于成本与 token 分析的 Web 仪表板，并支持通过 S3 兼容存储聚合多机会话。
zh.stack: 基于 Go 语言开发，数据层使用 SQLite 进行本地存储，桌面端为独立应用，同时提供 Docker 容器化部署方案。通过支持 S3 兼容协议实现会话数据的远程聚合，并以本地守护进程实现 CLI 与桌面端的数据共享。
zh.hot: 随着 AI 编程助手（Claude Code、Codex 等）的快速普及，开发者迫切需要统一的成本洞察与历史会话管理工具；该仓库凭借「本地优先、零账户、单二进制」的简洁体验，在一个月内新增 1,736 Star，总星数达 4,407，冲上 GitHub Go 语言月榜第 3 名。
uses: 高频使用 AI 编程助手的开发者 —— 需要追踪 Claude Code、Codex 等工具的每日 token 消耗与成本。
多 Agent 并行的技术团队 —— 希望在本地统一查看、搜索和分析不同 Agent 的历史会话与产出。
注重数据隐私的个人或企业 —— 倾向无需账户、完全本地存储的会话管理与审计方案。
跨设备协作的工程师 —— 利用 S3 兼容存储同步多机会话，实现集中化分析。

en.tag: Local-first session analytics and cost tracker for AI coding agents
en.what: AgentsView is a local-first tool that automatically discovers, browses, and searches historical sessions from all your local AI coding agents (such as Claude Code, Codex, Devin, and more). It provides a unified web dashboard and CLI to track token usage, analyze costs, and surface insights—without requiring any accounts, keeping all data in a local SQLite database.
en.content: The project ships as a single Go binary bundling a CLI, a background local daemon, and an optional desktop app plus Docker image. Its core components include an auto-discovery sync engine for agent sessions, local SQLite storage, a web dashboard for cost and token analytics, and support for aggregating multi-machine sessions via S3-compatible object storage.
en.stack: Built in Go with SQLite as the local data store, packaged as a single binary with an optional desktop app and Docker deployment. It aggregates remote sessions over S3-compatible protocols and uses a local daemon to share data between the CLI and desktop client.
en.hot: As AI coding agents like Claude Code and Codex proliferate, developers urgently need a unified way to manage session history and control costs. Its “local-first, no accounts, single binary” design earned it 1,736 new stars this month, bringing the total to 4,407 and landing it at #3 on GitHub’s monthly Go trending chart.
uses: Heavy AI coding agent users who need to track daily token consumption and costs for tools like Claude Code and Codex.
Teams running multiple agents in parallel who want a unified, local interface to search and analyze session history across tools.
Privacy-conscious individuals and enterprises requiring zero-account, fully local session storage and audit trails.
Engineers working across multiple machines who want to centralize analytics by syncing sessions via S3-compatible storage.

zh.tag: 云原生监控告警系统与多维时序数据库
zh.what: Prometheus 是 CNCF 毕业项目，通过拉取模式采集目标指标，基于多维数据模型存储时序数据，并提供 PromQL 查询与灵活的告警规则。它能独立完成监控、可视化与告警闭环，无需依赖分布式存储。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Prometheus 主服务源码、PromQL 查询引擎、告警规则评估器、HTTP API、多种服务发现适配器，以及官方文档与架构图。
zh.stack: 以 Go 为主语言实现，支持通过 HTTP 拉取或 Push Gateway 接收指标，可与 Grafana 等可视化工具及多种服务发现后端（Kubernetes、Consul 等）集成。
zh.hot: 作为云原生监控的事实标准，Prometheus 已积累 65,191 Stars，本周新增 277，位列 GitHub Go 周榜第 14，是 Kubernetes 生态不可或缺的观测基础设施。
uses: SRE / 运维团队 —— 构建云原生监控与统一告警体系
后端开发者 —— 为微服务与容器集群埋点暴露指标
企业 IT 架构 —— 进行基础设施监控、容量规划与故障定位
平台厂商 —— 集成或基于 Prometheus 二次开发可观测性产品

en.tag: Cloud-native monitoring and multi-dimensional time series database
en.what: A CNCF graduated project that scrapes metrics from targets using a pull model, stores them in a multi-dimensional time series model, and offers PromQL querying with flexible alerting. It operates as autonomous single nodes without distributed storage dependencies.
en.content: The repository holds the Prometheus server source, PromQL query engine, rule evaluator, HTTP APIs, various service discovery adapters, plus official documentation and architecture diagrams.
en.stack: Implemented primarily in Go, supporting HTTP scraping or Push Gateway ingestion, and integrating with visualization tools like Grafana and service discovery backends such as Kubernetes and Consul.
en.hot: With 65,191 stars and 277 new this week, it ranks #14 on GitHub's Go Trending weekly list, serving as the de facto observability standard in the Kubernetes and cloud-native ecosystem.
uses: SRE / DevOps teams — building unified cloud-native monitoring and alerting stacks
Backend developers — instrumenting microservices and container clusters with metrics
Enterprise IT — monitoring infrastructure, capacity planning, and incident diagnosis
Platform vendors — integrating or extending Prometheus for commercial observability offerings

zh.tag: 基于 WireGuard 的零配置安全组网与远程访问基础设施
zh.what: Tailscale 基于 WireGuard 协议构建安全的虚拟专用网络，让用户无需公网 IP 或端口转发即可将设备组成私有网络。它集成了身份验证和两因素认证（2FA），简化了团队和设备之间的安全远程访问与内网穿透。
zh.content: 仓库主要包含 tailscaled 守护进程与 tailscale 命令行工具的核心源码，覆盖 Linux、Windows、macOS 及 BSD 系统的网络栈与控制逻辑。移动端 App 的底层网络库亦来源于此，但各平台 GUI 包装代码位于其他独立仓库。
zh.stack: 项目以 Go 语言为主开发，要求使用最新版 Go 1.26 编译，并基于 WireGuard 协议实现加密通信。构建脚本 `build_dist.sh` 用于将版本信息嵌入二进制，支持多种 Linux 发行版及跨平台打包。
zh.hot: 凭借“零配置”即可在任意设备间建立加密组网的能力，Tailscale 已成为远程办公和云原生时代的核心网络工具，GitHub 累计获得 34k+ Stars，本周再以 583 新增 Star 登上 Go 语言 Trending 榜第 2 名。
uses: 远程办公团队 —— 无需公网 IP 即可安全访问公司内网与私有云资源
开发运维人员 —— 快速搭建跨云、跨地域的容器与服务器调试网络
个人技术爱好者 —— 将家庭 NAS、树莓派等设备组成加密私有网络
安全合规企业 —— 基于 SSO/2FA 的零信任网络替代传统 VPN 方案

en.tag: Zero-config WireGuard VPN for secure remote access and private networking
en.what: Tailscale builds secure virtual private networks on top of WireGuard, allowing devices to form a private mesh network without public IPs or port forwarding. It integrates identity-based authentication and two-factor authentication (2FA) to simplify secure remote access and intranet penetration for teams and devices.
en.content: The repository primarily contains the core source code for the `tailscaled` daemon and the `tailscale` CLI tool, covering the networking stack and control logic for Linux, Windows, macOS, and BSD systems. It also serves as the underlying network library for mobile apps, while platform-specific GUI wrappers reside in separate repositories.
en.stack: Developed primarily in Go and requiring the latest Go 1.26 release, it implements encrypted communication over the WireGuard protocol. The `build_dist.sh` script embeds version metadata into binaries, supporting packaging for multiple Linux distributions and cross-platform deployments.
en.hot: Its "zero-config" approach to encrypted mesh networking across any device has made it an essential tool for remote work and cloud-native environments. With over 34k total stars and 583 new stars this week, it ranks #2 on GitHub's Go Trending chart, reflecting strong community traction.
uses: Remote teams — Securely access corporate intranets and private cloud resources without public IPs
DevOps engineers — Quickly build debug networks across multi-cloud and multi-region servers and containers
Homelab enthusiasts — Encrypt and interconnect personal devices like NAS and Raspberry Pi into a private mesh
Security-focused enterprises — Replace legacy VPNs with zero-trust networking based on SSO and 2FA

zh.tag: 基于 HTTP 的轻量级 pub-sub 消息推送服务，支持自托管
zh.what: ntfy 是一个基于 HTTP 的 pub-sub 通知服务，允许用户通过简单的 PUT/POST 请求从任何脚本或计算机向手机、桌面推送实时通知。它无需注册账号或支付费用即可使用官方托管服务，同时也支持完全开源的自托管部署，满足隐私与定制化需求。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Go 编写的服务端核心与 Web 前端，并配合独立维护的开源 Android 与 iOS 客户端应用，形成端到端的推送生态。
zh.stack: 后端基于 Go 构建高性能 HTTP API，默认采用 SQLite 存储消息与订阅状态；客户端覆盖 Android、iOS 及 PWA 多平台。
zh.hot: 凭借「一行 curl 即可推送」的极简体验和完全开源可自托管的特性，ntfy 已获得近 3.2 万 Star，本月新增 1195 Star，跻身 GitHub Go 语言月榜第 8，成为开发者最喜爱的轻量消息基础设施之一。
uses: DevOps / SRE —— 将服务器告警、CI/CD 流水线结果实时推送到手机
开发者 / 极客 —— 脚本执行完毕、定时任务完成时接收桌面或移动端通知
隐私敏感用户 —— 通过自托管实例替代商业推送服务，掌控数据主权
IoT / 家庭自动化 —— 将设备状态、智能家居事件推送到家庭成员终端

en.tag: Lightweight HTTP pub-sub notification service with self-hosting support
en.what: ntfy is a simple HTTP-based pub-sub notification service that lets you send real-time alerts to your phone or desktop via PUT/POST requests from any script or computer. It requires no sign-up or fees to use the hosted instance, and being fully open source, it also supports self-hosting for privacy and customization.
en.content: The repository contains the Go-based server core and web frontend, complemented by separate open-source Android and iOS clients, forming an end-to-end push ecosystem.
en.stack: The backend is built in Go for a high-performance HTTP API, using SQLite by default for message and subscription storage, with clients available for Android, iOS, and PWA.
en.hot: With its 'one-line curl to push' simplicity and fully open-source, self-hostable nature, ntfy has earned nearly 32k stars, gaining 1,195 this month and ranking 8th on GitHub's Go monthly trending list as a favorite lightweight messaging infra tool.
uses: DevOps / SRE —— Push server alerts and CI/CD pipeline results to mobile in real time
Developers / Geeks —— Get notified on phone or desktop when scripts or cron jobs finish
Privacy-conscious users —— Self-host to replace commercial push services and retain data sovereignty
IoT / Home automation —— Push device status and smart-home events to family members' devices

zh.tag: 高颜值现代化终端文件管理器
zh.what: superfile 是一款在终端中运行的文件管理器，采用现代化的 TUI 界面，让开发者无需离开命令行即可高效浏览、预览和操作文件。它支持多面板布局、主题定制与插件扩展，致力于在保持终端工作流的同时提供图形化般的交互体验。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 Go 源码、安装脚本与构建指南，以及丰富的主题包、插件文档和快捷键配置示例。同时提供了面向 macOS、Linux 和 Windows 的跨平台发布与安装说明。
zh.stack: 基于 Go 语言构建，采用现代化终端 UI 技术实现跨平台渲染，支持多架构二进制分发与 Homebrew 等包管理器集成。
zh.hot: 凭借精致的多栏 TUI 设计与流畅的交互体验，superfile 在开发者中迅速走红，目前已积累 18.6k Stars，本月新增 1,295 颗，跻身 GitHub Go 语言月榜第 11 位，成为传统终端文件管理器的强力现代替代品。
uses: 终端重度用户与键盘党 —— 追求不离开命令行即可完成复杂文件操作
DevOps 与运维工程师 —— 需要在远程服务器上快速浏览、编辑和管理文件
追求美观的开发者 —— 希望终端工具拥有现代 UI 与丰富主题定制
跨平台工作者 —— 在 macOS、Linux 和 Windows 间寻求一致的文件管理体验

en.tag: A fancy, modern terminal file manager with rich TUI
en.what: superfile is a terminal-based file manager that delivers a modern, fancy TUI interface, allowing developers to browse, preview, and manipulate files without leaving the command line. It features multi-panel layouts, customizable themes, and plugin support, blending the efficiency of terminal workflows with a near-GUI interactive experience.
en.content: The repository ships full Go source code, installation scripts, build guides, and a rich collection of themes, plugin docs, and hotkey configuration samples. It also provides cross-platform release notes and installation instructions for macOS, Linux, and Windows.
en.stack: Built in Go with modern terminal UI libraries for cross-platform rendering, supporting multi-arch binaries and package managers like Homebrew.
en.hot: Thanks to its polished multi-pane TUI design and smooth interactions, superfile has gained strong traction among developers, amassing 18.6k stars with 1,295 added this month and ranking 11th on GitHub's Go monthly trending list as a compelling modern alternative to classic terminal file managers.
uses: Terminal power users and keyboard-driven developers who want to handle complex file operations without leaving the CLI
DevOps and system administrators who need to quickly browse, edit, and manage files on remote servers
Aesthetics-minded developers looking for modern UI, rich themes, and customization in terminal tools
Cross-platform workers seeking a consistent file management experience across macOS, Linux, and Windows

zh.tag: 生产级容器编排与调度平台
zh.what: Kubernetes（K8s）是开源的容器集群管理系统，用于自动化部署、扩展和管理容器化应用。它基于 Google 十五年大规模运行生产工作负载的 Borg 系统经验构建，能够跨多台主机实现高效的资源调度与自愈。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心控制平面组件（kube-apiserver、kube-scheduler、kube-controller-manager）、节点代理 kubelet、命令行工具 kubectl，以及完整的内置 API 和丰富的扩展机制（如 CRD、Operator、CNI/CSI/CRI 插件接口）。
zh.stack: 核心以 Go 语言编写，使用 etcd 作为分布式键值存储，组件间通过 gRPC/HTTP 通信，并基于容器运行时接口（CRI）对接 Docker、containerd 等底层运行时。
zh.hot: 作为云原生技术栈的基石，Kubernetes 拥有近 12.4 万 Star，本月新增 1,895 星，稳居 Go 语言月榜第 13 位，几乎已成为现代云基础设施的事实标准控制平面。
uses: 云原生 / SRE / DevOps 工程师构建高可用、可扩展的微服务架构
企业运维团队统一调度混合云、多云及本地数据中心的容器集群
平台开发者基于 K8s API 与 CRD 扩展能力构建内部 PaaS 或 Serverless 平台
开源贡献者与 CNCF 生态参与者投身核心基础设施演进

en.tag: Production-Grade Container Orchestration and Scheduling Platform
en.what: Kubernetes is an open-source system for automating the deployment, scaling, and management of containerized applications across multiple hosts. Built on Google’s 15+ years of experience running production workloads at scale with Borg, it provides a robust, self-healing framework for distributed systems.
en.content: The repository hosts the core control plane components (kube-apiserver, kube-scheduler, kube-controller-manager), the node agent kubelet, the CLI tool kubectl, as well as comprehensive built-in APIs and extensive extension mechanisms such as CRD, Operator, and CNI/CSI/CRI interfaces.
en.stack: The core is written in Go, relying on etcd as the distributed key-value store, using gRPC/HTTP for inter-component communication, and integrating with underlying runtimes such as Docker and containerd via the Container Runtime Interface (CRI).
en.hot: As the cornerstone of cloud-native technology, Kubernetes boasts nearly 123.8k stars, with 1,895 new stars this month, ranking 13th on the Go Trending monthly list, making it the de facto standard control plane for modern cloud infrastructure.
uses: Cloud-native, SRE, and DevOps engineers building highly available, scalable microservices architectures
Enterprise ops teams managing hybrid-cloud, multi-cloud, and on-premises container clusters
Platform developers building internal PaaS or Serverless platforms using the K8s API and CRD extensions
Open-source contributors and CNCF ecosystem participants driving core infrastructure evolution

zh.tag: 轻量级个人云系统，让家庭服务器管理像使用手机一样简单
zh.what: CasaOS 是一个开源的个人云系统，旨在让用户轻松搭建和管理自己的家庭服务器。它提供了直观的 Web 界面，支持一键安装应用、文件管理、存储管理等功能，将复杂的服务器操作简化到如同使用手机应用一般。
zh.content: 仓库包含 CasaOS 的核心后端（Go 编写）、前端界面（Vue.js）以及应用商店和文档。系统采用模块化架构，支持通过 Docker 容器扩展功能。
zh.stack: 后端使用 Go 语言，前端基于 Vue.js，依赖 Docker 容器技术实现应用隔离与部署。
