zh.hot: CasaOS 凭借极简的安装和使用体验，吸引了大量希望自建私有云的用户，Star 数已达 36.8k，本月新增 2.8k，长期位居 GitHub 趋势榜。
uses: 家庭用户 —— 轻松搭建个人云存储、媒体服务器或智能家居中心
开发者 —— 在本地或低配设备上快速部署开发环境或测试服务
NAS 爱好者 —— 作为现有 NAS 系统的补充或替代方案

en.tag: A simple, easy-to-use, elegant open-source Personal Cloud system
en.what: CasaOS is an open-source personal cloud system designed to make it easy for users to set up and manage their own home server. It provides an intuitive web interface with one-click app installation, file management, storage management, and more, simplifying complex server operations to be as easy as using a mobile app.
en.content: The repository contains CasaOS core backend (Go), frontend UI (Vue.js), app store, and documentation. The system uses a modular architecture and supports extension via Docker containers.
en.stack: Backend in Go, frontend in Vue.js, relies on Docker for application isolation and deployment.
en.hot: CasaOS has attracted a large number of users who want to build their own private cloud with its minimal installation and user-friendly experience. It has 36.8k stars, with 2.8k added this month, consistently trending on GitHub.
uses: Home users — easily set up personal cloud storage, media server, or smart home hub
Developers — quickly deploy development environments or test services on local or low-end devices
NAS enthusiasts — as a supplement or alternative to existing NAS systems

zh.tag: Go 原生的 AI 代理开发工具包
zh.what: ADK Go 是 Google 开源的 Go 语言 AI 代理开发工具包，提供构建、评估和部署智能代理的模块化框架。它采用代码优先的设计理念，支持多代理协作、丰富工具集成，并针对云原生环境优化。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Go 库、示例代码、文档和测试工具，核心模块包括代理定义、工具注册、多代理编排和部署支持。
zh.stack: 技术栈基于 Go 语言，依赖 Google Gemini API（但模型无关），支持 gRPC 和 HTTP 部署，与 Google Cloud Run 等云平台集成。
zh.hot: 作为 Google 官方推出的 Go 版 AI 代理框架，ADK Go 填补了 Go 生态中高级代理开发工具的空白，本月新增 433 星，总星数达 8513，在 GitHub Go 月榜排名第 10。
uses: Go 开发者构建云原生 AI 代理应用
需要高性能、并发安全的代理系统
希望代码优先、可版本控制的代理开发团队
多代理协作和复杂工作流编排场景

en.tag: Code-first Go toolkit for building AI agents
en.what: ADK Go is an open-source Go toolkit for building, evaluating, and deploying sophisticated AI agents. It offers a modular, code-first framework that supports multi-agent systems, rich tool integration, and cloud-native deployment.
en.content: The repo contains Go libraries, examples, documentation, and testing utilities, with core modules for agent definition, tool registration, multi-agent orchestration, and deployment.
en.stack: Built with Go, model-agnostic with Gemini optimization, supports gRPC/HTTP deployment, and integrates with cloud platforms like Google Cloud Run.
en.hot: As Google's official Go agent framework, ADK Go fills a gap in the Go ecosystem for advanced agent development, gaining 433 stars this month (total 8513) and ranking #10 on GitHub Go monthly trending.
uses: Go developers building cloud-native AI agent applications
Teams needing high-performance, concurrency-safe agent systems
Developers preferring code-first, version-controlled agent development
Scenarios requiring multi-agent collaboration and complex workflow orchestration

zh.tag: Tailscale 控制服务器的开源自托管实现，可自建私有 VPN 控制平面
zh.what: Headscale 是 Tailscale 商业控制服务器的完全开源替代方案，允许用户在自己的服务器上部署私有控制平面，管理 WireGuard 节点、分配 IP 与路由。它专为个人开发者、家庭实验室及小型组织设计，实现去厂商锁定的安全组网。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Go 编写的控制服务端代码、CLI 工具、NixOS 模块及完整文档，提供容器镜像与二进制开发构建，支持多种官方 Tailscale 客户端接入。
zh.stack: 采用 Go 语言开发，基于 WireGuard 协议构建 overlay 网络控制层；作为独立服务端兼容 Tailscale 官方客户端，通过 NAT 穿透实现节点自动发现与组网。
zh.hot: 仓库已收获 41.8k Stars，本周新增 369 星并位列 GitHub Go 周榜第 7，反映出用户对自托管网络主权、去厂商锁定及低成本安全组网的强烈需求。
uses: 自托管爱好者与家庭实验室用户——希望完全掌控网络控制平面，避免依赖第三方商业服务。
中小团队与开源组织——需要低成本、跨地域的加密组网与设备访问控制。
隐私敏感型开发者与运维人员——追求数据不出境，通过自建控制服务器实现端到端加密连接。
寻求厂商替代方案的企业——意图摆脱商业 Tailscale 控制层绑定，实现可审计、可定制的 VPN 基础设施。

en.tag: Open-source, self-hosted Tailscale control server for private VPN mesh networks
en.what: Headscale is a fully open-source, self-hosted alternative to the Tailscale commercial control server, letting users deploy their own control plane to manage WireGuard nodes, assign IPs, and share routes. It targets hobbyists, homelabbers, and small organizations seeking a vendor-free, secure mesh network.
en.content: The repository includes the Go-based control server, CLI tools, a NixOS module, and full documentation, shipping container images and development binaries for official Tailscale clients.
en.stack: Written in Go and built on WireGuard for the overlay control plane; it runs as a standalone server compatible with official Tailscale clients, enabling automatic NAT traversal and node discovery.
en.hot: With 41.8k stars and 369 added this week, placing 7th on GitHub's Go Trending, it reflects strong demand for network sovereignty, vendor independence, and low-cost secure mesh networking.
uses: Self-hosting enthusiasts and homelabbers who want full control over their network control plane without relying on third-party commercial services.
Small teams and open-source organizations needing low-cost, cross-region encrypted mesh and device access control.
Privacy-focused developers and operators seeking data residency and end-to-end encryption through a self-hosted control server.
Businesses looking for vendor independence—aiming to replace the commercial Tailscale control layer with an auditable, customizable VPN infrastructure.

zh.tag: 全自动AI渗透测试代理系统
zh.what: PentAGI 是一个基于人工智能的自动化渗透测试平台，利用自主 AI Agent 自动规划并执行复杂的安全测试任务。它能够在完全隔离的 Docker 沙箱环境中运行，帮助安全研究人员和伦理黑客高效地发现系统漏洞。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 Docker 化部署方案、Web 界面与 API 接口，以及面向 OpenAI、Anthropic、DeepSeek、Ollama 等十余种 LLM 的适配配置。同时集成了知识图谱（Graphiti）、Langfuse 可观测性与 OAuth 认证等高级模块。
zh.stack: 核心系统以 Go 语言构建，前端基于现代 Web 技术。它通过 Docker 实现任务级沙箱隔离，并支持灵活接入主流闭源与开源大模型。
zh.hot: 该仓库已收获 20,871 Stars，本周新增 1,111 Star 并跻身 GitHub Go 语言周榜第 15 位，反映出网络安全社区对「AI+自主渗透测试」这一交叉领域的极大热情。
uses: 企业安全团队 —— 需要自动化评估系统漏洞与防御能力的红队/蓝队成员
渗透测试工程师 —— 希望借助 AI 代理提升复杂渗透测试任务效率的安全专家
安全研究员 —— 研究 AI Agent 在攻防场景下自主决策与工具链调用的学者
伦理黑客 —— 在隔离沙箱中快速验证漏洞利用路径的技术爱好者

en.tag: Fully autonomous AI agent system for complex penetration testing
en.what: PentAGI is an AI-powered autonomous penetration testing platform that plans and executes complex security assessments using intelligent agents. It operates within fully isolated Docker sandboxes to help security researchers and ethical hackers identify vulnerabilities efficiently.
en.content: The repository includes a complete Docker-based deployment, web UI and API, plus adapters for over a dozen LLM providers including OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek and Ollama. It also integrates advanced modules such as Graphiti knowledge graph, Langfuse observability, and OAuth authentication.
en.stack: The core system is built in Go with a modern web frontend. It leverages Docker for strict task-level sandbox isolation and offers flexible plug-ins for both proprietary and open-source LLMs.
en.hot: With 20,871 Stars and 1,111 added this week alone, PentAGI ranks 15th on GitHub's weekly Go trending list, reflecting strong community excitement for autonomous AI-driven penetration testing.
uses: Enterprise red/blue teams seeking automated vulnerability assessment and defense validation
Penetration testers looking to boost efficiency of complex security tasks with AI agents
Security researchers studying autonomous decision-making and tool orchestration in offensive AI
Ethical hackers and enthusiasts who need isolated sandboxes to rapidly verify exploit paths

zh.tag: 开源LLM知识平台，集RAG检索、Agent推理与自动Wiki于一体
zh.what: WeKnora 是腾讯开源的面向企业级文档理解与语义检索的 LLM 知识框架。它能将原始文档转化为可查询的 RAG 知识库、自主编排检索与工具调用的推理 Agent，以及可自动维护的互联 Wiki 知识图谱。
zh.content: 仓库以 Go 语言服务端为核心，包含多数据源接入模块、ReAct Agent 引擎、Wiki 自动构建与知识图谱组件，以及可嵌入外部站点的发布部件、Chrome 扩展、运行时任务队列看板与多工作空间 RBAC 企业级管理后台。
zh.stack: 主语言为 Go，后端兼容 20 余种 LLM 提供商，接入 Langfuse 实现全链路可观测，并支持多实例存储后端与飞书、Notion、语雀等企业数据源。
zh.hot: 凭借「RAG + Agent + 自动 Wiki」三位一体的独特定位，WeKnora 在 GitHub 已斩获 18.5k Stars，单日新增 49 Star 并跻身 Go 语言 Trending 日榜第 20 位，成为企业知识管理赛道的瞩目新星。
uses: 企业知识管理团队 —— 需要将飞书/Notion 等分散文档统一为可检索、可推理的中央知识库。
AI 应用开发者 —— 希望快速集成带 RBAC、多租户和可观测性的 RAG 与 Agent 能力。
社区与开源项目维护者 —— 想通过自动 Wiki 与知识图谱降低文档维护成本。
网站运营者 —— 意图通过嵌入部件将智能问答 Agent 发布到外部站点。

en.tag: Open-source LLM knowledge platform unifying RAG, Agent reasoning, and auto-Wiki
en.what: WeKnora is a Tencent open-source, LLM-powered knowledge framework for enterprise-grade document understanding and semantic retrieval. It turns raw documents into a queryable RAG system, an autonomous ReAct agent that orchestrates retrieval and tools, and a self-maintaining interlinked Wiki with an interactive knowledge graph.
en.content: The repository centers on a Go-based server core, featuring multi-source ingestion adapters, a ReAct Agent engine, auto-Wiki and knowledge graph components, plus embeddable site widgets, a Chrome extension, a runtime task-queue dashboard, and enterprise multi-workspace RBAC controls.
en.stack: Primarily written in Go, it integrates with 20+ LLM providers, leverages Langfuse for full observability, and supports multi-instance storage backends alongside enterprise data sources such as Feishu, Notion, and Yuque.
en.hot: Driven by its unique trio of RAG, Agent, and auto-Wiki, WeKnora has earned 18.5k stars on GitHub, adding 49 stars in a single day and hitting 20th place on the Go Trending daily list, making it a rising star in enterprise knowledge management.
uses: Enterprise knowledge teams seeking to unify scattered docs from Feishu/Notion into a centralized, searchable, and reasoning-ready knowledge base.
AI application developers looking to quickly integrate RAG and Agent capabilities with RBAC, multi-tenancy, and observability.
Open-source maintainers and communities wanting to reduce documentation overhead via auto-generated Wiki and knowledge graphs.
Website operators aiming to publish intelligent Q&A agents to external sites through embeddable widgets.

zh.tag: 微软用 Go 原生重写 TypeScript 编译器，迈向高性能 TS 7
zh.what: 这是 TypeScript 编译器的原生 Go 语言移植版，目标是用原生性能替代现有的 TypeScript-on-JavaScript 架构。它将成为 TypeScript 7 的核心基础，最终合并回主仓库。目前大部分核心功能（解析、类型检查、代码生成等）已实现，并提供可预览的 npm 包和 VS Code 扩展。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的编译器管线实现（扫描、解析、类型解析与检查、声明和 JS 输出），以及 LSP 语言服务原型和命令行工具链。开发者可通过 npm 安装 `@typescript/native-preview` 使用 `tsgo` 命令，或在 VS Code 中安装预览版扩展体验。
zh.stack: 整体以 Go 语言原生实现编译器核心，兼顾跨平台性能；通过 npm 分发预览包并提供 Node.js 可用的 CLI 封装，同时配套发布 VS Code 扩展以集成语言服务。
zh.hot: 作为 TypeScript 生态的基石级重写，该项目在 GitHub 已斩获 25.9k Star，本周新增 110 Star 并冲入 Go 语言周榜第 3 名，社区高度关注编译速度可能带来的数量级提升。
uses: 前端/全栈开发者 —— 希望在大型代码库中获得更快的类型检查和编译速度。
TypeScript 工具链贡献者 —— 关注编译器架构迁移与 Go 实现细节，提前适配 TS 7。
VS Code 用户 —— 想抢先体验基于原生编译器的语言服务与实时反馈。
基础设施团队 —— 评估将核心开发工具从 JavaScript 运行时迁移到原生二进制的影响。

en.tag: Microsoft's Go rewrite of the TypeScript compiler for high-performance TS 7
en.what: This is a native Go port of the TypeScript compiler, aiming to replace the existing TypeScript-on-JavaScript architecture with native performance. It will serve as the foundation for TypeScript 7 and eventually merge back into the main TypeScript repository. Most core features like parsing, type checking, and emit are already implemented, with preview npm packages and a VS Code extension available.
en.content: The repo houses the full compiler pipeline (scanning, parsing, type resolution and checking, declaration and JS emit), plus an LSP language service prototype and CLI toolchain. Developers can try it via the `@typescript/native-preview` npm package using the `tsgo` command, or through a preview VS Code extension.
en.stack: The compiler core is built natively in Go for cross-platform performance, distributed via npm with a Node.js-compatible CLI wrapper, and paired with a VS Code extension that integrates the language service.
en.hot: As a cornerstone rewrite of the TypeScript ecosystem, the project has garnered 25.9k stars on GitHub, adding 110 this week and hitting #3 on the Go Trending chart, reflecting massive community interest in potential order-of-magnitude compile-speed gains.
uses: Front-end/full-stack developers seeking faster type-checking and compilation in large codebases.
TypeScript toolchain contributors tracking the compiler architecture migration and Go implementation ahead of TS 7.
VS Code users wanting to preview the native-compiler-based language service and real-time feedback.
Infrastructure teams evaluating the impact of migrating core dev tools from JavaScript runtime to native binaries.

zh.tag: 基于 YAML 模板的快速漏洞扫描器，安全社区驱动
zh.what: Nuclei 是一款高性能的漏洞扫描工具，通过简洁的 YAML 领域特定语言让全球安全社区协作编写检测模板。它能够快速发现应用程序、API、网络、DNS 及云配置中的安全漏洞，并以极低的误报率模拟真实攻击场景。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心扫描引擎、YAML 模板解析器、丰富的官方模板库以及多协议支持模块（HTTP/DNS/TCP/SSL 等），同时提供完善的 CLI 工具和 SDK 集成接口。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言编写，依托 YAML 模板引擎实现漏洞检测逻辑。支持跨平台运行并可与 CI/CD 流程及各类云原生工具链无缝集成。
zh.hot: 凭借 29,811 Stars 和本周新增 228 Stars 的热度，Nuclei 已成为安全社区事实上的漏洞扫描标准。其 YAML 模板生态让全球研究者能够实时响应最新漏洞，实现了「当天漏洞、当天检测」的协作式安全防御。
uses: 企业安全团队 —— 用于资产梳理、漏洞巡检与红蓝对抗演练
渗透测试工程师 —— 快速验证目标环境中已知 CVE 与配置缺陷
DevSecOps 工程师 —— 集成至 CI/CD 流水线实现自动化安全左移
安全研究员 —— 编写并共享 YAML 模板，跟踪分析最新漏洞趋势

en.tag: Fast, community-powered vulnerability scanner using YAML templates
en.what: Nuclei is a high-performance vulnerability scanner that uses a simple YAML-based DSL to enable global security collaboration on detection templates. It rapidly identifies vulnerabilities across applications, APIs, networks, DNS, and cloud configurations while mimicking real-world attack scenarios with minimal false positives.
en.content: The repository houses the core scanning engine, YAML template parser, extensive official template libraries, and multi-protocol support modules (HTTP/DNS/TCP/SSL), along with a comprehensive CLI tool and SDK integration interfaces.
en.stack: Written primarily in Go, it relies on a YAML template engine for vulnerability detection logic. It supports cross-platform execution and integrates seamlessly with CI/CD pipelines and various cloud-native toolchains.
en.hot: With 29,811 Stars and 228 new Stars this week, Nuclei has become the de facto standard for community-driven vulnerability scanning. Its YAML template ecosystem allows global researchers to respond to emerging threats in real time, enabling same-day detection of trending vulnerabilities through collaborative security defense.
uses: Enterprise security teams — for asset inventory, vulnerability patrols, and red/blue team exercises
Penetration testers — to rapidly verify known CVEs and misconfigurations in target environments
DevSecOps engineers — integrating into CI/CD pipelines for automated shift-left security
Security researchers — writing and sharing YAML templates to track and analyze emerging vulnerability trends

zh.tag: 基础设施即代码的行业标准工具
zh.what: Terraform 是一个开源的基础设施即代码工具，允许用户通过声明式配置文件安全、可预测地创建、更改和管理基础设施。它支持众多云服务提供商和自定义解决方案，将 API 编码为可共享、版本化的配置文件。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Terraform 核心引擎，包括配置解析、执行计划生成、资源图构建和状态管理。还提供 CLI 工具、文档和示例。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言开发，依赖 HCL（HashiCorp Configuration Language）作为配置语言，支持多种云提供商和服务的插件化 Provider 架构。
zh.hot: Terraform 是基础设施即代码领域的标杆项目，拥有 49k+ Stars，本月新增近千 Star，持续受到 DevOps 和云原生社区的广泛关注。
uses: 云基础设施自动化管理 —— 适用于 DevOps 工程师和平台团队
多云环境编排 —— 企业跨 AWS、Azure、GCP 等统一管理资源
基础设施版本控制与协作 —— 团队使用 Git 工作流管理基础设施变更

en.tag: Industry-standard infrastructure as code tool
en.what: Terraform is an open-source infrastructure as code tool that enables users to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure using declarative configuration files. It supports numerous cloud providers and custom solutions, codifying APIs into shareable, versioned configurations.
en.content: The repository contains the Terraform core engine, including configuration parsing, execution plan generation, resource graph construction, and state management. It also includes CLI tools, documentation, and examples.
en.stack: Primarily developed in Go, relies on HCL (HashiCorp Configuration Language) for configuration, and supports a plugin-based provider architecture for various cloud providers and services.
en.hot: Terraform is a benchmark project in the IaC space with 49k+ Stars and nearly 1k new stars this month, consistently attracting attention from DevOps and cloud-native communities.
uses: Automated cloud infrastructure management — for DevOps engineers and platform teams
Multi-cloud orchestration — enterprises managing resources across AWS, Azure, GCP, etc.
Infrastructure version control and collaboration — teams using Git workflows for infrastructure changes

zh.tag: 终极摄像头流媒体应用，零延迟多协议支持
zh.what: go2rtc 是一个轻量级、零依赖的摄像头流媒体应用，支持数十种格式和协议。它提供极低的流媒体延迟，并能将任意视频源发布到 YouTube、Telegram 等平台。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Go 编写的核心二进制文件、Docker 镜像、Home Assistant 插件，以及完整的文档和示例配置。支持 RTSP、WebRTC、HLS、MP4 等输入输出格式。
zh.stack: 使用 Go 语言开发，依赖 Pion WebRTC 库和 FFmpeg（可选转码）。支持全平台（Windows、macOS、Linux、FreeBSD）。
zh.hot: 凭借零延迟、多协议兼容和极简部署，go2rtc 在智能家居和监控社区广受欢迎，GitHub 星标超 13.5k，月增 265。
uses: 智能家居开发者 —— 集成摄像头流到 Home Assistant 等平台
监控系统管理员 —— 低延迟实时查看多品牌摄像头
直播主播 —— 将任意视频源推流到 YouTube/Telegram
嵌入式系统开发者 —— 在资源受限设备上运行轻量级流媒体服务

en.tag: Ultimate camera streaming app with zero-delay multi-protocol support
en.what: go2rtc is a lightweight, zero-dependency camera streaming application supporting dozens of formats and protocols. It offers minimal streaming latency and can publish any video source to platforms like YouTube and Telegram.
en.content: The repo includes Go binaries, Docker images, Home Assistant add-on, along with comprehensive docs and config examples. Supports input/output formats like RTSP, WebRTC, HLS, MP4.
en.stack: Built with Go, leveraging Pion WebRTC library and optional FFmpeg for transcoding. Cross-platform (Windows, macOS, Linux, FreeBSD).
en.hot: With zero-delay streaming, broad protocol support, and minimal setup, go2rtc is a hit in smart home and surveillance communities, boasting 13.5k+ stars and 265 new stars this month.
uses: Smart home developers — integrate camera streams into Home Assistant and more
Surveillance system admins — low-latency live view of multi-brand cameras
Live streamers — push any video source to YouTube/Telegram
Embedded system developers — run lightweight streaming on resource-constrained devices

zh.tag: 多核友好的C++刚体物理与碰撞检测引擎，服务3A游戏与VR
zh.what: Jolt Physics 是一个为现代多核 CPU 优化的刚体物理与碰撞检测库，专为游戏和 VR 应用设计。它支持在后台线程并行加载物理数据、执行碰撞查询，同时保持主模拟循环的稳定性能与即时可见的数据一致性。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的物理引擎源码、可独立运行的示例程序与测试用例，以及针对布娃娃、车辆、碰撞查询等模块的详细文档。代码采用 C++17 编写，提供了跨平台的 CMake 构建系统与 CI 配置。
zh.stack: 核心基于现代 C++17 标准开发，无第三方运行时依赖，支持 Windows、Linux、macOS 及主流游戏主机平台。构建系统采用 CMake，并集成了 SonarCloud 质量门禁与自动化测试。
zh.hot: 凭借《地平线：西之绝境》与《死亡搁浅2》等3A大作的背书，该仓库已获得近 1.1 万 Star，本周新增 242 星并登上 GitHub C++ 周榜第 2 名。开发者在寻求 PhysX/Havok 替代方案时，高度关注其多核并行架构与即时可见的数据一致性设计。
uses: 3A游戏工作室 —— 需要高性能、可定制物理引擎以驱动开放世界与复杂交互的团队
VR/AR开发者 —— 追求稳定物理模拟与低延迟交互的沉浸式应用制作人
独立游戏开发者 —— 寻找零授权费用、跨平台支持且生产验证过的物理中间件
图形引擎研究者 —— 学习现代多核物理架构、碰撞检测算法与无锁数据设计的工程师

en.tag: Multi-core C++ rigid body physics engine powering AAA games and VR apps
en.what: Jolt Physics is a modern, multi-core optimized rigid body physics and collision detection library designed for games and VR applications. It supports background loading of physics data and concurrent collision queries while maintaining stable simulation performance and immediately visible data consistency.
en.content: The repository contains the full engine source, standalone sample applications, test suites, and detailed documentation for ragdolls, vehicles, and collision queries. It is written in C++17 with cross-platform CMake build systems and CI configurations.
en.stack: The core is written in modern C++17 with no third-party runtime dependencies, supporting Windows, Linux, macOS, and major game consoles. It uses CMake for building and integrates SonarCloud quality gates with automated testing.
en.hot: Backed by AAA titles like Horizon Forbidden West and Death Stranding 2, the repo has amassed nearly 11k stars, gaining 242 this week and hitting #2 on GitHub's C++ Trending list. Developers exploring alternatives to PhysX/Havok are drawn to its multi-core parallel architecture and immediate data consistency.
uses: AAA game studios needing high-performance, customizable physics for open worlds and complex interactions
VR/AR developers building immersive apps that require stable simulation and low-latency interaction
Indie developers seeking a zero-license-fee, cross-platform, production-proven physics middleware
Engine researchers studying modern multi-core physics architectures and lock-free data design

zh.tag: Google 开源 C++ 通用库，生产级标准库扩展
zh.what: Abseil 是 Google 开源的 C++ 通用库集合，旨在补充和扩展 C++ 标准库。它从 Google 内部代码库提取，经过大规模生产环境验证，提供 C++17 兼容的高可靠基础组件。
zh.content: 仓库包含 base、algorithm、cleanup、container、debugging、flags、hash、log、numeric、strings、synchronization、time 等模块代码，覆盖初始化、算法扩展、容器、日志与并发工具等基础能力，支持 Bazel 和 CMake 构建。
zh.stack: 基于 C++17 标准开发，官方支持 Bazel 与 CMake 构建，兼容主流编译器与平台，无外部运行时依赖，仅依赖 C++ 标准库。
zh.hot: 本周新增 608 Star 冲上 GitHub 周榜第 2，反映出 C++ 开发者对经过 Google 生产环境验证、能填补标准库空白的高质量基础组件的强劲需求。17964 Star 的积累也证明了其作为现代 C++ 基础设施的核心地位。
uses: C++ 后端/基础架构开发者 —— 需要可靠的基础工具库替代或补充标准库
追求代码稳定性与工程规范的大型项目 —— 使用 Google 内部验证过的高质量保证库
跨平台 C++ 应用开发团队 —— 借助其良好的编译器与平台支持降低移植成本

en.tag: Google's open-source C++ common libraries extending the standard library
en.what: Abseil is an open-source collection of C++ libraries from Google designed to augment the standard library. Extracted from Google's internal codebase and battle-tested in production, it provides C++17-compliant foundational utilities.
en.content: The repository includes modular components such as base, algorithm, cleanup, container, debugging, flags, hash, log, strings, synchronization, and time, supporting both Bazel and CMake build systems.
en.stack: Built on C++17 with official Bazel and CMake support, compatible with major compilers and platforms, with zero external runtime dependencies beyond the C++ standard library.
en.hot: Surging to #2 on GitHub Trending with 608 new stars this week, it reflects strong demand from C++ developers for battle-tested, production-grade utilities that fill gaps in the standard library. Its 17,964 total stars cement its role as essential modern C++ infrastructure.
uses: C++ backend and infrastructure developers who need reliable foundational utilities to complement or replace the standard library
Large-scale projects prioritizing code stability and engineering rigor, leveraging Google's internally battle-tested libraries
Cross-platform C++ teams looking to reduce porting costs through broad compiler and platform support

zh.tag: 阿里开源轻量级进程内向量数据库，支持混合检索与全文搜索
zh.what: Zvec 是一款可直接嵌入应用程序的进程内向量数据库，由阿里巴巴开源并内部实战验证，主打低延迟、高可扩展的相似性搜索。最新 v0.5.0 原生支持全文搜索与混合检索，可在单一查询中融合稠密向量、稀疏向量与标量过滤。
zh.content: 仓库以 C++ 实现高性能核心引擎，同时提供 Python、Node.js、Go 与 Rust 多语言 SDK；包含完整文档、基准测试数据及 CI 流水线配置。
zh.stack: 核心引擎采用 C++ 构建以保证极致性能，通过 PyPI 和 npm 等包管理器发布多语言绑定，并依赖 DiskANN 等算法实现磁盘级向量索引。
zh.hot: 凭借 15.1K Star 与月增 4.3K 的增速，Zvec 跃居 GitHub C++ 月榜第 3 名；其“嵌入即开即用”的轻量架构与阿里云实战背书，精准命中了 AI 应用对低门槛、高性能向量检索的需求。
uses: AI 应用开发者 —— 需要在本地或边缘端快速嵌入高性能向量检索，无需部署独立数据库服务。
RAG/搜索工程师 —— 需要在一套系统中同时完成稠密向量、稀疏向量与全文搜索的混合召回。
资源敏感型场景 —— 利用 DiskANN 磁盘索引在内存受限环境下支撑大规模向量数据集。

en.tag: Alibaba's open-source, lightning-fast in-process vector DB with hybrid retrieval
en.what: Zvec is an open-source, in-process vector database developed by Alibaba that embeds directly into applications for production-grade, low-latency similarity search. Its latest v0.5.0 introduces native full-text search and hybrid retrieval, enabling a single query to combine dense vectors, sparse vectors, and scalar filtering.
en.content: The repository contains a high-performance C++ core engine alongside official Python, Node.js, Go, and Rust SDKs, plus comprehensive docs, benchmarks, and CI pipelines.
en.stack: The core engine is written in C++ for maximum performance, distributed via PyPI and npm bindings, and leverages algorithms like DiskANN for on-disk vector indexing.
en.hot: With 15.1K stars and 4.3K added this month alone, Zvec ranks 3rd on GitHub's C++ monthly trending list; its zero-dependency, in-process architecture and Alibaba production pedigree directly address the AI industry's demand for high-performance, low-latency vector retrieval.
uses: AI application developers who need to embed high-performance vector search directly into apps without standalone database deployments.
RAG and search engineers requiring unified hybrid retrieval of dense, sparse, and full-text results in a single query.
Resource-constrained environments that benefit from DiskANN on-disk indexing to run large-scale vector datasets with limited RAM.

zh.tag: 极速 C++ 日志库，支持头文件-only与编译双模式
zh.what: spdlog 是一款高性能 C++ 日志库，支持头文件-only和编译两种集成方式。它提供丰富的日志输出目标、异步/同步模式、运行时与编译时日志级别过滤，以及基于 fmt 的现代化格式化语法。
zh.content: 仓库包含头文件目录、CMake 构建脚本、多平台 CI 配置、示例代码及基准测试；用户可直接拷贝 include 文件夹以头文件方式使用，或通过 CMake 编译为静态/动态库。
zh.stack: 核心为现代 C++11/14 实现，格式化层依赖 fmt 库；支持通过 CMake 构建，并覆盖 Linux、Windows、macOS、Android 等主流平台。
zh.hot: 作为 C++ 生态最广泛采用的日志方案之一，spdlog 凭借极致性能与零成本抽象累积近 3 万 Star；本月新增 141 Star 并登 Trending 月榜第 16，足见其在高性能后端与嵌入式场景的持续热度。
uses: 高性能 C++ 后端服务开发者 —— 需要纳秒级延迟的同步或异步日志记录
跨平台桌面与嵌入式应用团队 —— 寻求覆盖 Windows、Linux、macOS 及 Android 的统一日志方案
游戏引擎与中间件开发者 —— 追求头文件-only快速集成或编译库以缩短构建时间
DevOps 与系统工具开发者 —— 需要日志轮转、syslog、环境变量级别控制等生产级特性

en.tag: Blazing-fast C++ logging library with header-only & compiled modes
en.what: spdlog is a high-performance C++ logging library offering both header-only and compiled integration modes. It supports multiple sinks, asynchronous/sync logging, runtime and compile-time level filtering, and modern formatting powered by the fmt library.
en.content: The repo provides header-only sources, CMake build scripts, cross-platform CI configs, usage examples, and benchmarks. Users can either copy the include folder for header-only use or build a static/shared library via CMake.
en.stack: Built on modern C++11/14, it relies on the fmt library for formatting and uses CMake for building, supporting Linux, Windows, macOS, Android, and more.
en.hot: As one of the most widely adopted C++ logging solutions, spdlog has amassed nearly 30k stars thanks to its extreme performance and zero-cost abstractions; gaining 141 stars this month and ranking 16th on the Trending monthly chart reflects its enduring popularity in high-performance backends and embedded systems.
uses: High-performance C++ backend engineers — needing nanosecond-scale sync or async logging
Cross-platform desktop and embedded teams — seeking a unified logging solution across Windows, Linux, macOS, and Android
Game engine and middleware developers — pursuing header-only quick integration or compiled libraries for faster build times
DevOps and systems tool builders — requiring production-grade features like log rotation, syslog, and environment-level controls

zh.tag: 跨语言高性能开源 RPC 框架与通信基础设施
zh.what: gRPC 是由 Google 开源的现代高性能远程过程调用（RPC）框架，旨在让客户端与服务端应用透明通信。它基于 HTTP/2 和 Protocol Buffers 构建，支持多种编程语言，简化了分布式连接系统的构建。
zh.content: 仓库包含基于 C++ 的核心运行时、多语言绑定（Python、Ruby、PHP、C#、Go、Java 等）以及丰富的示例代码。同时提供构建脚本、测试套件和每日更新的预编译包。
zh.stack: 核心基于 C++ 实现，依赖 Protocol Buffers 作为接口定义与序列化格式，通过 HTTP/2 传输。提供各语言原生 SDK，涵盖 Node.js、Go、Java、Dart、Kotlin 等主流生态。
zh.hot: 凭借 45.1K+ Star 的社区认可度与本周新增 158 Star 的持续热度，gRPC 已成为云原生时代服务间通信的事实标准。其多语言支持与卓越性能使其在微服务架构中广受欢迎，稳居 C++ 周榜第 4。
uses: 后端开发者构建跨语言微服务与分布式系统
云原生架构师设计服务网格与容器化通信方案
基础平台团队打造高性能内部 API 与基础设施
多语言技术栈团队统一服务调用协议与接口规范

en.tag: Cross-language, high-performance open-source RPC framework
en.what: gRPC is a modern, high-performance open-source RPC framework by Google that enables transparent communication between client and server applications. Built on HTTP/2 and Protocol Buffers, it supports multiple languages and simplifies building distributed connected systems.
en.content: The repository contains the C++-based core runtime, multi-language bindings (Python, Ruby, PHP, C#, Go, Java, etc.), and extensive examples. It also includes build scripts, test suites, and daily precompiled packages.
en.stack: The core is implemented in C++, relying on Protocol Buffers for IDL and serialization over HTTP/2. It offers native SDKs for major ecosystems including Node.js, Go, Java, Dart, and Kotlin.
en.hot: With 45.1K+ stars and 158 new stars this week, gRPC has become the de facto standard for service-to-service communication in the cloud-native era. Its multi-language support and outstanding performance make it widely adopted in microservices, ranking 4th on the C++ weekly trending list.
uses: Backend developers building cross-language microservices and distributed systems
Cloud-native architects designing service mesh and containerized communication
Platform teams building high-performance internal APIs and infrastructure
Polyglot teams standardizing service call protocols and interface specifications

zh.tag: 实时纳秒级帧分析器，支持CPU/GPU/内存全链路性能剖析
zh.what: Tracy 是一款面向游戏及其他高性能应用的实时遥测分析器，提供纳秒级精度的 CPU、GPU、内存与锁性能剖析。它采用混合帧分析与采样分析模式，支持远程性能数据捕获与可视化，并可自动将截图关联到对应帧。
zh.content: 仓库包含探针客户端库（多语言绑定）、跨平台图形化分析器 GUI、服务器端捕获工具，以及编译好的 Windows x64 二进制文件和完整 PDF 文档。配套提供交互式在线 Demo、各版本功能介绍视频与详细构建说明。
zh.stack: 核心以 C++ 编写，客户端提供 C/C++、Lua、Python、Fortran 等原生支持，并扩展至 Rust、Zig、C# 等第三方绑定；图形后端覆盖 OpenGL、Vulkan、Direct3D 11/12、Metal、CUDA、WebGPU 等主流 GPU API。
zh.hot: 凭借纳秒级精度和对 CPU/GPU/内存的全方位覆盖，Tracy 已成为游戏与实时应用性能调优的利器；目前收获 16.4K Star，本月新增 341 颗并跻身 GitHub C++ 月榜第 10，持续攀升的热度反映了开发者对极致性能剖析工具的强烈需求。
uses: 游戏引擎开发者 —— 需要精确到纳秒的帧时间与 GPU 负载分析
高性能应用工程师 —— 对 C++/Rust 等服务端程序进行 CPU 与内存热点剖析
图形/Compute 程序员 —— 调优 Vulkan、Direct3D 12、CUDA 等渲染与计算管线
跨平台团队 —— 统一在 Windows、Linux 等系统上进行远程遥测与性能监控

en.tag: Real-time nanosecond-resolution frame profiler for CPU/GPU/memory
en.what: Tracy is a real-time, nanosecond-resolution telemetry profiler for games and high-performance applications, offering hybrid frame and sampling profiling. It captures and visualizes CPU, GPU, memory, lock, and context-switch data remotely, with automatic screenshot attribution to specific frames.
en.content: The repository contains instrumentation client libraries with multi-language bindings, a cross-platform profiler GUI, server-side capture tools, pre-built Windows x64 binaries, and comprehensive PDF documentation. It also includes an interactive online demo, versioned feature videos, and detailed build instructions.
en.stack: The core is written in C++, with native client instrumentation for C, C++, Lua, Python, and Fortran plus third-party bindings for Rust, Zig, C#, and others. It supports all major graphics/compute APIs including OpenGL, Vulkan, Direct3D 11/12, Metal, CUDA, and WebGPU.
en.hot: With nanosecond precision and comprehensive CPU/GPU/memory coverage, Tracy has become essential for game and real-time app optimization. It has amassed 16.4K stars, gaining 341 this month and ranking 10th on GitHub's C++ monthly trending list, reflecting strong demand for extreme-performance profiling tools.
uses: Game engine developers — profiling frame times and GPU loads down to the nanosecond
High-performance application engineers — analyzing CPU and memory hotspots in C++/Rust services
Graphics/Compute programmers — optimizing rendering and compute pipelines across Vulkan, Direct3D 12, and CUDA
Cross-platform teams — conducting remote telemetry and performance monitoring on Windows, Linux, and beyond

zh.tag: 比特币官方核心客户端与全节点验证软件
zh.what: Bitcoin Core 是比特币网络的官方参考实现，负责连接 P2P 网络、下载并完整验证所有区块与交易。它还内置了钱包功能与可选的图形界面，为用户提供完整的比特币交互能力。作为集成与 staging 仓库，它承载了比特币协议最新的开发与稳定代码。
zh.content: 仓库包含比特币协议的核心源码（共识、网络、验证、钱包、GUI），以及构建脚本、测试套件（C++ 单元测试与 Python 功能/回归测试）和开发文档。master 分支为日常开发主线，release 分支与标签用于标记稳定版本，GUI 开发曾在独立仓库进行。
zh.stack: 主要使用 C++ 编写，依赖 Boost、Qt（可选 GUI）、SQLite/Berkeley DB（钱包）、libsecp256k1 等密码学与网络库。构建系统采用 Autotools，并支持跨平台编译（Windows、Linux、macOS），测试依赖 Python 框架。
zh.hot: 作为比特币网络的官方参考实现，它是区块链领域最具权威性的开源项目之一，拥有近 9 万 Star 的庞大社区认可。本月新增 550 Star 并跻身 GitHub C++ 月榜第 14 名，反映出市场对比特币底层技术持续的高关注度与开发者对协议改进的活跃参与。
uses: 区块链开发者——研究比特币协议共识、网络通信与验证逻辑的参考实现。
节点运维者——部署全节点以独立验证交易、增强网络去中心化与安全性。
安全研究人员——审计核心代码、测试升级补丁或进行密码学相关实验。
加密货币从业者——集成钱包功能或构建基于比特币网络的衍生应用。

en.tag: Bitcoin's official core client and full-node validation software
en.what: Bitcoin Core is the reference implementation of the Bitcoin protocol, connecting to the peer-to-peer network to download and fully validate blocks and transactions. It also includes an integrated wallet and an optional graphical user interface for end-user interaction. As the integration and staging tree, it hosts both the latest development and stable release code for the Bitcoin network.
en.content: The repository contains the core protocol source (consensus, networking, validation, wallet, GUI), build scripts, test suites (C++ unit tests and Python functional/regression tests), and extensive developer documentation. The master branch serves as the daily integration branch, while release branches and tags mark stable versions, with GUI development maintained in a separate repository.
en.stack: Primarily written in C++, it depends on Boost, Qt (optional GUI), SQLite/Berkeley DB (wallet), libsecp256k1, and other cryptographic/networking libraries. It uses Autotools for building, supports cross-platform compilation on Windows, Linux, and macOS, and leverages Python frameworks for functional testing.
en.hot: As the authoritative reference implementation of the Bitcoin network, it commands nearly 90k stars, reflecting massive community trust. Its addition of 550 stars this month and rank at #14 on GitHub's monthly C++ Trending list signal sustained mainstream interest and active developer engagement in protocol-level improvements.
uses: Blockchain developers — studying the reference implementation of Bitcoin consensus, networking, and validation logic.
Node operators — running full nodes to independently verify transactions and strengthen network decentralization.
Security researchers — auditing core code, testing upgrade patches, and conducting cryptographic experiments.
Crypto builders — integrating wallet functionality or developing applications atop the Bitcoin network.

zh.tag: 跨平台 C++ 异步网络与底层 I/O 基础设施库
zh.what: Asio 是一个跨平台的 C++ 库，专注于提供异步网络与底层 I/O 编程能力，统一封装了各操作系统的复杂原生 API。开发者可用它高效构建 TCP/UDP 套接字、串口通信及定时器等组件，广泛应用于高并发服务器、实时系统和嵌入式通信场景。
zh.content: 仓库包含头文件-only 与源码编译两种形态的完整实现，以及示例程序、单元测试和离线 HTML 文档。根目录按 src、include、doc、example 组织，便于直接集成或打包构建。
zh.stack: 核心为现代 C++（C++11 起），零依赖或可选衔接 Boost，支持 Linux、Windows、macOS 及嵌入式平台。编译系统覆盖 Autotools、CMake 和纯 Makefile，适配多种工具链。
zh.hot: 作为 C++ 异步网络编程的事实标准之一，Asio 凭借稳定 API 与卓越性能持续吸引开发者，目前获星 6.1k，本周新增 175 星并跻身 C++ 周榜第 8。最新 1.38.1 版本的发布进一步印证了社区对高性能底层 I/O 基础设施的旺盛需求。
uses: 需要构建高并发网络服务或实时通信系统的后端 C++ 开发者
追求跨平台一致 API、不想直接编写操作系统原生 I/O 代码的嵌入式/工具链团队
希望基于成熟异步模型开发游戏服务器、金融行情网关或物联网网关的工程团队

en.tag: Cross-platform C++ library for asynchronous networking and low-level I/O
en.what: Asio is a cross-platform C++ library for network and low-level I/O programming, offering a consistent asynchronous model across operating systems. It abstracts complex native APIs into composable components like TCP/UDP sockets, serial ports, and timers, making it ideal for high-concurrency servers and real-time systems.
en.content: The repository ships the library in both header-only and compiled source forms, alongside examples, unit tests, and offline HTML documentation. It is organized under src, include, doc, and example directories for easy integration or packaging.
en.stack: Written in modern C++ (C++11 and up) with zero mandatory dependencies—optionally interoperable with Boost—and supports Linux, Windows, macOS, and embedded targets. Build systems include Autotools, CMake, and plain Makefiles for broad toolchain compatibility.
en.hot: A de-facto standard for C++ asynchronous networking, Asio maintains strong momentum with 6.1k stars and 175 added this week, ranking 8th on the GitHub C++ Trending list. The recent 1.38.1 release underscores continued community demand for robust, high-performance low-level I/O infrastructure.
uses: Backend C++ developers building high-concurrency network services or real-time communication systems
Embedded and tooling teams seeking a cross-platform, consistent API without managing native OS I/O directly
Engineering teams developing game servers, financial market gateways, or IoT hubs on a proven asynchronous model

zh.tag: 通用运动恢复结构和多视角立体视觉管线
zh.what: COLMAP 是一个通用的运动恢复结构（SfM）和多视角立体（MVS）管线，提供图形界面和命令行接口。它支持对有序和无序图像集合进行三维重建，广泛应用于计算机视觉和摄影测量领域。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 SfM/MVS 源代码、预编译二进制文件、Docker 镜像、Python 绑定（pycolmap）以及详细的文档和示例数据集。
zh.stack: 基于 C++ 开发，依赖 Ceres Solver、PoseLib、SiftGPU、VLFeat 等库，支持 CUDA 加速。
zh.hot: 12.2k Stars，月增 314，稳居 GitHub C++ 热榜。作为开源 3D 重建的标杆工具，持续吸引研究者和开发者。
uses: 计算机视觉研究者 —— 用于三维重建算法实验和基准测试
摄影测量与测绘从业者 —— 从图像生成高精度点云和网格
AR/VR 开发者 —— 快速构建真实场景的三维模型
文化遗产保护 —— 对文物或建筑进行数字化存档

en.tag: General-purpose Structure-from-Motion and Multi-View Stereo pipeline
en.what: COLMAP is a general-purpose Structure-from-Motion (SfM) and Multi-View Stereo (MVS) pipeline with a graphical and command-line interface. It enables 3D reconstruction from ordered and unordered image collections, widely used in computer vision and photogrammetry.
en.content: The repository contains the full SfM/MVS source code, pre-built binaries, Docker images, Python bindings (pycolmap), along with comprehensive documentation and sample datasets.
en.stack: Built with C++, depends on Ceres Solver, PoseLib, SiftGPU, VLFeat, and supports CUDA acceleration.
en.hot: 12.2k stars, +314 monthly, consistently on GitHub C++ trending. As the gold standard for open-source 3D reconstruction, it continues to attract researchers and developers.
uses: Computer vision researchers — for 3D reconstruction algorithm experiments and benchmarks
Photogrammetry and surveying professionals — to generate high-precision point clouds and meshes from images
AR/VR developers — to quickly build 3D models of real scenes
Cultural heritage preservation — to digitally archive artifacts or buildings

zh.tag: C++ 日志库，已停止维护
zh.what: glog 是 Google 开源的 C++ 应用级日志库，提供基于 C++ 流式风格的日志 API 和辅助宏。目前已停止维护，建议迁移到 ng-log 或 Abseil Logging。
zh.content: 仓库包含 glog 的完整源代码、文档和构建配置，支持多种日志级别、条件日志、自定义日志目标等功能。
zh.stack: 纯 C++14 实现，依赖 CMake 构建系统，可选依赖 gflags 用于命令行参数。
zh.hot: 虽然已停止维护，但作为经典 C++ 日志库仍有大量存量用户，本月新增 128 星，月榜第 16 名。
uses: C++ 开发者 —— 在遗留项目中继续使用 glog 或参考其设计
日志库迁移者 —— 需要从 glog 迁移到 ng-log 或 Abseil Logging 的开发者
学习日志库设计 —— 研究 Google 日志库的实现原理

en.tag: C++ logging library, now deprecated
en.what: glog is Google's open-source C++ application-level logging library, providing stream-style logging APIs and helper macros. It is now deprecated and users are advised to migrate to ng-log or Abseil Logging.
en.content: The repository contains the full source code, documentation, and build configuration for glog, supporting multiple log levels, conditional logging, custom log destinations, etc.
en.stack: Pure C++14 implementation, built with CMake, optionally depends on gflags for command-line flags.
en.hot: Despite being deprecated, it remains a classic C++ logging library with a large user base, gaining 128 stars this month and ranking 16th on the monthly C++ trending list.
uses: C++ developers — using glog in legacy projects or studying its design
Library migrators — developers needing to migrate from glog to ng-log or Abseil Logging
Logging design learners — studying the implementation of Google's logging library

zh.tag: 致敬 90 年代 UI 的类 Unix 图形操作系统
zh.what: SerenityOS 是一个为 64 位 x86、Arm 和 RISC-V 计算机打造的图形化类 Unix 操作系统。它融合了 90 年代末生产力软件的审美与 2000 年代末 Unix 的易用性，拥有自定义内核、浏览器、开发工具等完整生态。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的操作系统源码，包括内核、系统服务（窗口服务器、登录服务器等）、用户态库（LibC、LibJS、LibGL 等）、应用程序（浏览器、IDE、游戏等）以及构建脚本和文档。
zh.stack: 主要使用 C++ 编写，部分汇编和 C；构建系统基于 CMake，依赖 GCC/Clang 编译器。
zh.hot: 凭借复古 UI 设计、完整自研生态和活跃社区，长期吸引开发者关注，GitHub 星标超 3.3 万，本月新增 350 星。
uses: 操作系统爱好者 —— 学习现代 OS 设计与实现
复古 UI 爱好者 —— 体验 90 年代风格桌面环境
C++ 开发者 —— 参与大型开源项目贡献代码
技术探索者 —— 研究自研浏览器、内核等组件

en.tag: A graphical Unix-like OS paying homage to 90s UI
en.what: SerenityOS is a graphical Unix-like operating system for 64-bit x86, Arm, and RISC-V machines. It combines the aesthetics of late-1990s productivity software with the power-user accessibility of late-2000s Unix, featuring a custom kernel, browser, development tools, and more.
en.content: The repository contains the complete OS source code, including kernel, system services (WindowServer, LoginServer, etc.), userland libraries (LibC, LibJS, LibGL, etc.), applications (browser, IDE, games, etc.), build scripts, and documentation.
en.stack: Primarily written in C++, with some assembly and C; build system is CMake-based, relying on GCC/Clang compilers.
en.hot: With its retro UI design, complete self-built ecosystem, and active community, it has long attracted developers, amassing over 33k stars on GitHub with 350 new stars this month.
uses: OS enthusiasts — learn modern OS design and implementation
Retro UI fans — experience a 90s-style desktop environment
C++ developers — contribute to a large open-source project
Technology explorers — study self-built browser, kernel, etc.

zh.tag: Google 边缘端 ML/GenAI 高性能推理运行时
zh.what: LiteRT 是 TensorFlow Lite 的继任者，提供在边缘设备上部署机器学习与生成式 AI 的高性能运行时。它支持 GPU/NPU 加速，并集成了 LLM 推理、Web 推理、C++ 张量操作和 CLI 工具链。
zh.content: 仓库包含 LiteRT 运行时核心、构建状态徽章、文档链接以及多个子项目（LiteRT-LM、LiteRT.js、Tensor API、LiteRT CLI）的入口。
zh.stack: 主语言 C++，依赖 Python 3.13 构建环境，支持 Linux/macOS/Windows 多平台，集成 GPU/NPU 加速与 WebGPU/WASM。
zh.hot: 作为 TensorFlow Lite 的官方继任者，LiteRT 在边缘 AI 领域具有重大影响力，本月新增 586 星，总星数 3157，位列 C++ 月榜第 24 名。
uses: 移动端和嵌入式设备上的 ML/GenAI 推理部署
浏览器中通过 WebGPU/WASM 运行客户端 AI
AI 编码代理工作流加速（通过 LiteRT CLI）
边缘端 LLM 部署（通过 LiteRT-LM）

en.tag: Google's on-device runtime for high-performance ML & GenAI deployment on edge platforms
en.what: LiteRT, the successor to TensorFlow Lite, is Google's on-device runtime for deploying ML and GenAI on edge platforms with high performance. It features GPU/NPU acceleration, LLM inference, Web inference via WebGPU/WASM, C++ tensor API, and a CLI toolkit.
en.content: The repo contains the LiteRT runtime core, build status badges, documentation links, and entry points to subprojects like LiteRT-LM, LiteRT.js, Tensor API, and LiteRT CLI.
en.stack: Primary language is C++, with Python 3.13 build environment, multi-platform support (Linux/macOS/Windows), GPU/NPU acceleration, and WebGPU/WASM integration.
en.hot: As the official successor to TensorFlow Lite, LiteRT has significant impact in edge AI, gaining 586 stars this month (total 3157) and ranking #24 on the C++ monthly trending list.
uses: ML/GenAI inference deployment on mobile and embedded devices
Running client-side AI in browsers via WebGPU/WASM
Accelerating AI coding agent workflows via LiteRT CLI
On-device LLM deployment via LiteRT-LM

zh.tag: 跨平台 Android 实时投屏与操控工具
zh.what: QtScrcpy 是一款通过 USB 或网络显示和控制 Android 设备的桌面软件，无需 root 权限。它支持 GNU/Linux、Windows 和 macOS 三大平台，注重轻量、高性能、低延迟和非侵入性。
zh.content: 仓库包含 QtScrcpy 的完整源代码、跨平台构建配置、键位映射脚本（如 PUBG Mobile 默认映射）以及 QuickMirror 专业版推广信息。
zh.stack: 基于 Qt 框架和 C++ 开发，依赖 scrcpy 核心协议实现屏幕镜像，支持 Windows、macOS、Linux 原生构建。
zh.hot: 30,676 星，月增 774，因其免费、跨平台、低延迟的 Android 投屏体验，以及内置键位映射功能，深受游戏玩家和开发者喜爱。
uses: Android 开发者 —— 实时调试和演示设备屏幕
游戏玩家 —— 使用键鼠操控手机游戏（如 PUBG）
演示/教育场景 —— 将手机屏幕投射到电脑进行展示
多设备管理 —— 通过 QuickMirror 专业版批量控制多台手机

en.tag: Cross-platform Android real-time display and control tool
en.what: QtScrcpy is a desktop software that displays and controls Android devices via USB or network without root. It supports GNU/Linux, Windows, and macOS, focusing on lightness, high performance, low latency, and non-intrusiveness.
en.content: The repository contains full source code, cross-platform build configurations, key mapping scripts (e.g., default for PUBG Mobile), and promotion for the professional version QuickMirror.
en.stack: Built on Qt framework and C++, leveraging scrcpy core protocol for screen mirroring, with native builds for Windows, macOS, and Linux.
en.hot: 30,676 stars (+774/month), popular for its free, cross-platform, low-latency Android screen mirroring and built-in key mapping, appealing to gamers and developers.
uses: Android developers — real-time debugging and device screen demonstration
Gamers — play mobile games (e.g., PUBG) with keyboard and mouse
Presentation/education — project phone screen to computer for display
Multi-device management — batch control multiple phones via QuickMirror Pro

zh.tag: 把 GitHub Copilot 智能体嵌进你自己应用的官方 SDK
zh.what: GitHub 官方出的多语言 SDK：在自己的应用或服务里直接调用 Copilot Agent 的能力。它暴露的是 Copilot CLI 背后同一套经过生产验证的 agent 运行时 —— 你不用自己搭编排层，定义好 agent 行为，规划、工具调用、文件编辑都交给 Copilot 处理。
zh.content: 单仓库 6 套 SDK，按目录分：nodejs/、python/、go/、dotnet/、java/、rust/，另有 docs/、test/ 和 cookbook 示例；各语言经 npm / PyPI / NuGet / Maven Central / crates.io 分发。
zh.stack: 多语言 monorepo（TS/Python/Go/.NET/Java/Rust 六个 SDK），MIT；2026 年 1 月创建，推送非常活跃。
zh.hot: 「Copilot agent 能力开放给第三方应用」的定位自带关注度，GitHub 官方背书。
uses: SaaS 厂商 —— 在产品里内嵌 Copilot 级 AI 助手（IDE、低代码平台等）
企业内部工具 —— 快速给内部系统加 agent 能力，不用自研编排
多语言团队 —— JS / Python / Go / .NET / Java / Rust 任选

en.tag: GitHub's official SDK for embedding the Copilot agent in your own apps
en.what: GitHub's official multi-language SDK: call the Copilot Agent's capabilities directly from your own apps and services. It exposes the same production-proven agent runtime behind the Copilot CLI — no need to build your own orchestration layer: define the agent's behavior and let Copilot handle planning, tool calls and file edits.
en.content: Six SDKs in one repo, by directory: nodejs/, python/, go/, dotnet/, java/, rust/, plus docs/, test/ and cookbook examples; distributed via npm / PyPI / NuGet / Maven Central / crates.io.
en.stack: A multi-language monorepo (TS/Python/Go/.NET/Java/Rust), MIT; created January 2026, committing very actively.
en.hot: 'Copilot agent capabilities opened to third-party apps' draws attention by itself — with GitHub's official stamp on it.
uses: SaaS vendors — embed Copilot-grade AI assistance into products (IDEs, low-code platforms)
Internal tooling — add agent capabilities to internal systems without building orchestration
Polyglot teams — pick from JS / Python / Go / .NET / Java / Rust

zh.tag: 你的「AI 团队总管」：把一堆 agent 组织起来 7×24 干活
zh.what: 定位「Chief Agent Operator」：把多个 AI agent 当工作单元统一招聘、调度和汇报。核心功能包括 Agent Builder（描述需求即可自动配置出可用 agent）、Agent Groups（多 agent 并行协作）、Pages/Schedule/Project/Workspace 协作面板，以及白盒可编辑的 Personal Memory；支持接入任意模型和模态，号称 10000+ skills 和 MCP 插件生态。
zh.content: 可自部署的 Web 应用（Vercel/Docker/Zeabur/Sealos 一键部署），仓库含完整中英文档、Changelog、插件体系和本地开发指南；默认分支 canary，今天仍在高频 push。
zh.stack: TypeScript + Next.js 系 Web 应用，Docker 自托管，插件走 MCP 协议；许可证为自定义（非标准）。
zh.hot: 多 Agent 调度与即时通信网关的组合，让这一成熟 AI 应用平台形成了明确的协作化方向。
uses: 一人公司 / 自由职业者 —— 组建 7×24 自动干活的 agent 团队处理重复工作
运营团队 —— 定时调度 agent 做日报、巡检、内容分发
进阶玩家 —— 用 Personal Memory 和 10000+ skills 定制专属助手

en.tag: Your 'Chief Agent Operator' — an AI team working 7×24
en.what: Positioned as a 'Chief Agent Operator': hire, schedule and hear reports from multiple AI agents as work units. Key features: Agent Builder (describe the need, get a configured agent), Agent Groups (parallel multi-agent collaboration), Pages/Schedule/Project/Workspace panels, and a white-box editable Personal Memory; any model and modality, with a claimed 10,000+ skills and MCP plugin ecosystem.
en.content: A self-deployable web app (one-click Vercel/Docker/Zeabur/Sealos), with full bilingual docs, a changelog, the plugin system and local dev guides; default branch canary, still pushing frequently today.
en.stack: TypeScript + Next.js, self-hosted via Docker, plugins over MCP; custom (non-standard) license.
en.hot: Its combination of multi-agent orchestration and messaging gateways gives an established AI application platform a clear collaboration-focused direction.
uses: Solo founders & freelancers — run a 7×24 agent team for repetitive work
Ops teams — schedule agents for daily reports, patrols and content distribution
Power users — craft custom assistants with Personal Memory and 10,000+ skills
